gaurīśanam danaḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdra ādayaḥ varṇāḥ sat aiśvarya prapūritāḥ sabhāyām ca sadi etāni anyāni sarvāṇi ṣaṣ vaktrasya eva dhāraṇāt anantaḥkarkaṭaḥ ca eva puṇḍarīkothatakṣakaḥ ca etena āgā mahā vīryāḥ saptavaktre vyavasthitāḥ prītyā asya asarva pāpāni kṣayam yānti dinedine yat pāpam labhate martyaḥ sarvam naśyati tad kṣaṇāt aṣṭavaktraḥ mahā senaḥ sākṣāt devaḥ vināyakaḥ tat śṛṇuṣva mama janma janmana mūrkhaḥ syāt na āturaḥ na ca naṣṭa dhīḥ naipuṇyam lipi kāryeṣu mahā kāryeṣu kauśalam tasya dine dine ardha kūṭam tulā kūṭam sarva kūṭam tathā eva ca maśna udara kareṇa eva sam spṛśet vā aguru striyam evamādīni sarvāṇi hanti pāpāni sarvathā akṣayam tridivam bhuktvā a muktaḥ yāti parām gatim guṇāni etāni sarvāṇi aṣṭavaktrasya dhāraṇāt mad asyam proktam dhārayet yaḥ tu bāhoḥ lakṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi brahmahatyāḥ karoti yaḥ tāḥ sarvāḥ dahate śīghram nava vaktrasya dhāraṇāt hara vat vara veśma sthaḥ gaṇeśaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ pannagāḥ ca vinaśyanti daśavaktrasya dhāraṇāt ca ikādaśa smṛtāḥ dhārayet nityam tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu aśvamedha sahasrāṇi yajṣa koṭi śatāni ca tad phalam śīghram āpnoti vaktra ekādaśa dhāraṇāt rudrākṣam dvādaśāsyam dhārayet mad ādityaḥ tuṣyate nityam dvādaśāsyā iva avasthitaḥ tad phalam śīghram āpnoti vajra ādeḥ ca nivāraṇam artha lābham sukham bhuṅkte īśvara ūna daridra tā hasti aśva nara mārjāra mūṣakān śaśakān stathā mucyate na atrasam dehaḥ vaktra dvādaśa dhāraṇāt śam sudhā rasāyanam ca eva dhātuvādaḥ ca pādukā mātṛ pitṛ svasṛ bhrātṛ gurūn vātha nihatya ca mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ trayodaśa āsya dhāraṇāt param akṣayam labhate svargam yathā devaḥ maheśvaraḥ tatam paṇḍam śivasya ca nyasanam kena mantreṇa dhāraṇam vā katham vada uvāca tad amantra uccāraṇāt deva guṇāḥ hi ete prakīrtitāḥ idānīm mantra ādiśyam te aum rudraḥ ekavaktrasya caturvaktrasya paṣcavaktrasya aum ṃ ṣaḍvaktrasya aum hraḥ saptavaktrasya aum kaṃ aṣṭavaktrasya aum jūṃ navavaktrasya daśavaktrasya aum śrī ekādaśavaktrasya aum hrīṃ dvādaśa vaktrasya aum trayodaśa vaktrasya aum nrāṃ caturdaśa vaktrasya evam mantrāḥ yathākramam nyastavyāḥ śirasi urasi mālām ca gṛhītvā ayaḥ vrajet naraḥ sarveṣām api vaktrāṇām dhāraṇe mad samaḥ bhavet dhārayitvā tu rudrākṣam mṛtya sidīna asi sam vṛta ajīrṇa vāsasā prāha deva dūtāt mayā aśrutam apatat sa papāta urvyām rudrākṣasya ardha khaṇḍake tatra tiṣṭhati sam ciram mamām śakam samāsādya īśvaraḥ kaudhanībhavet evam rudrākṣakhaṇḍe ca mṛtasya sugatiḥ sutaiḥ saḥ phalam vaktum na śaknumaḥ rudrākṣakam yaḥ paṭhet pāṭhayet vā api śrāvayet śṛṇute pi vā sarva pāpāt pramukta ātma asukham svargam labhet kramāt iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe rudrākṣamāhātmyam nāma ekonaṣaṣṭhitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca aparasya apipṛcchāmi phalasya pūta tām taroḥ uvāca dhātrī phalam param pūtam sarva lokeṣu viśrutam pāvanam vāsudevasya aphalam prīti karam śubham asya bhakṣaṇa mātreṇa mucyate sarva kalmaṣāt bhakṣaṇe ca bhavet āyuḥ pāne vaidharma sam cayaḥ alakṣmī nāśanam snāne sarva aiśvaryam avāpnuyāt yasmin gṛhe mahā sena dhātrī tiṣṭhati sarvadā magaṅgā nagayā ca eva na kāśī naca puṣkaram dhātrī samprāptā harivāsare ekādaśyām pakṣa yuge dhātrī snānam karoti yaḥ sarva pāpa kṣayam yānti viṣṇu loke mahīyate dhātrī phalam sadā sevyam bhakṣaṇe snāne eva ca niyatam pāraṇe viṣṇoḥ snāna mātre hareḥ dine saṃyate pāraṇe ca eva dhātrī eka sparśane naraḥ bhuktvā tu laṅghayet yaḥ tu ekādaśyām sita asite ekena eva upavāsena kṛtena tu ṣaḍānanaiḥ sapta janma kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ akṣayam labhate svargam viṣṇu sāyujyam āvrajet dhātrī draveṇa satatam yasya keśāḥ suram jitāḥ na pibet sa punar mātuḥ stanam kaścid ṣaḍānana dhātrī darśana sam sparśāt nāmnā auccāraṇe pi vā vara daḥ sam mukhaḥ viṣṇuḥ sam tuṣṭaḥ bhavati priyaḥ dhātrī phalam ca yatra āste tatra tiṣṭhati keśavaḥ tatra brahmā asthirā padmā tasmāt tām tu gṛhenyaset alakṣmī naśyate tatra yatra dhātrī pratiṣṭhati sam tuṣṭāḥ sarva devāḥ ca na tyajanti kṣaṇam mudā tasya tuṣṭaḥ bhavet viṣṇuḥ na anyaiḥ kratu śataiḥ api snātvā dhātrī draveṇa eva pūjayet yaḥ tu mādhavam tathā eva lakṣaṇam smṛtvā pūjayitvā phalena tu nām skam da munīnām yoga sevinām tām samavāpnoti dhātrī sevā rataḥ naraḥ sā āgatiḥ labhyate pum sām dhātrī phala susevayā prītiḥ ca sarva devānām devīnām no gaṇasya ca mukha avaradā snāne dhātrī phala niṣevaṇe graha aduṣṭāḥ ca ca daitya rākṣasāḥ yānti dhātrī phala su sevanāt sarva yajṣeṣu kāryeṣu śastam ca āmalaka phalam sarva devasya pūjāyām varjayitvā aravim suta tasmāt ravi dina itāta saptamyām ca viśeṣataḥ dhātrī phalāni satatam dūratas parivarjayet yaḥ tu snāti tathā aśnāti dhātrīm ca ravi vāsare tad saṃkrānti auca bhṛgu vāre ṣaṣṭhyām pratipi di dhruvam navamyām ca api amāyām ca dhātrīm dūrāt parityajet nāsikā karṇa tuṇḍeṣu mṛtasya cikureṣu vā tiṣṭhet dhātrī phalam diram dhātrī samparka mātreṇa mṛtaḥ yāti acyuta ālayam tad dhātrī dravam naraḥ liptvā ayastu snānam samācaret tavaḥ sarve te prapalāyam te grahāḥ duṣṭāḥ ca dāruṇāḥ mṛgayā artham vanaṅgāt mṛga pakṣi gaṇān hatvā atṛṣayā aparipīḍitaḥ kṣudhayā āmalaka vṛkṣam puraḥpīna phala anvitam dṛṣṭvā sam ruhya sahasā ācakhāda phalam uttamam tatas daivāt sa vṛkṣa agrāt nipapāta mahī tale tatas preta gaṇāḥ sarve rakṣas bhūta gaṇāḥ tathā tanum voḍhum mudāsarveyevaiśamana sevakāḥ na śaknuvanti cāṇḍālam mṛtam draṣṭum mahā balāḥ anyonyam vigrahaḥ teṣām mama ayam iti bhāṣatām grahītum ca apinetum cana śaktāḥ te parasparam pretāḥ ūcuḥ kim artham munayaḥ dhīrāḥ cāṇḍālam pāpa kāriṇam prekṣitum śaktān aca api yama sevakāḥ parāṅmukhāḥ sāhasaiḥ pātita abhīta avajra agni kāṣṭha pīḍitāḥ sim ha vyāghra hata amartya a vyāghraiḥ vāja lajam tubhiḥ mṛtāḥ mṛtāya ica śrāddha ādi karma varjitāḥ dviṣaḥ pāṣaṇḍāḥ kaulikāḥ krūra agara dāḥ kūṭa sākṣiṇaḥ saṃśayaḥ mama ayam iti bhāṣantaḥ netum tam cana śaknumaḥ mā āditya eva duṣprekṣyaḥ kim munayaḥ ūcuḥ anena bhakṣitam pretāḥ pakvam ca āmalaka phalam tad saṅgam yānti tasya eva phalāni pracurāṇi ca tena eva kāraṇena ayam duṣprekṣyaḥ bhavatām dhruvam mṛkṣa agra patitasya atha prāṇaḥ snehān na ca tyajet na ayam cāreṇa sūryasya na ca anye pāpa kāriṇaḥ dhātrī bhakṣaṇa mātreṇa pāpāt pūtaḥ vrajet divam pretāḥ ūcuḥ niṃ dakāḥ kvacid viṣṇu lokāt vimānam tu yāvat na eva atra gacchati ucyatām muni śārdūlaiḥ ava udrutam manasi sthitam ghoṣyam te yatra vedāḥ ca mantrāṇi vividhāni ca purāṇa smṛtayaḥ yatra kṣaṇam sthātum na śaknumaḥ tasmāt vṛttam samucyatām kim vai kṛtvā apretayonim labham dvijāḥ ūcuḥ tad śīta vāta ātapa kleśaiḥ kṣudh pipāsā viśeṣakaiḥ anyaiḥ api ca duḥkhaiḥ ye pīḍitāḥ kūṭa sākṣiṇaḥ ca chidra anveṣa parasmai ca dvijānām karma ghātinaḥ tathā eva ca gurūṇām ca te pretāḥ ca apunarbhavāḥ pratividhyati tasya vā atmanaḥ vā gān kṛtvā āpīḍana vāhane ye mūḍhāḥ te pretāḥ karma jāḥ bhuvi hīna pratijṣāḥ ca asatyāḥ tathā abhagnavratāḥ anarāḥ nalinī dala bhuktāḥ ca te pretāḥ karma jā bhuvi mad sutām śuddhām striyam sādhum akam ṭakām pitṛvya mātula ādeḥ ca te pretāḥ karma jā bhuvi ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ pretāḥ jātāḥ sva karmabhiḥ pretāḥ ūcuḥ tathā na bhavanti katham pretāḥ karmaṇā kena vā dvijāḥ dvijāḥ ūcuḥ yena ca eva kṛtam snānam jaletīrthasya adhīmatā namaskṛtam param liṅgam na pretaḥ jāyate naraḥ ekādaśyām upoṣya eva dvādaśyām ca viśeṣataḥ te śrutvā paurāṇikam vākyam divyam ca dharma sam hitam pāṭhayitvā a paṭhitvā ca piśāca tvam na gacchati vrataiḥ ca vividhaiḥ pūtāḥ padma akṣa dhāraṇaiḥ tathā japtvā ā padma akṣamālāyām preta tvam na eva gacchati dhātrī phala dravaiḥ snātvā nityam tad bhakṣaṇa īratāḥ tena viṣṇum su piśāca tām pretāḥ ūcuḥ satām sam darśanāt puṇyam iti paurāṇikau viduḥ tasmāt vaḥ darśanam jātam hitam naḥ kartum arhatha preta bhāvāt yathā muktiḥ sarveṣām na u bhaviṣyati vrata upadeśakam dhīra vaḥ śaraṇa āgatāḥ tatas udayālavaḥ sarva etān ūcuḥ dvija sattamāḥ dhātrīṇām bhakṣaṇam śīghram kurvatām mukti hetave ūcuḥ dhātrīṇām darśane viprau ayam sthātum na śaknumaḥ katham teṣām phalānām dvijāḥ ūcuḥ naḥ vacanena atra dhātrīṇām bhakṣaṇam śivam atha tebhyaḥ varam labdhvā dhātrī vṛkṣam piśācakaiḥ samāruhya phalam prāpya bhakṣitam līlayā tadā tatas devālayāt tūrṇam ratham pīna su śobhanam āgatam tam samāruhya sa cāṇḍāla piśācakāḥ uvāca dhātrī bhakṣaṇa mātreṇa puṇyam labdhvā divaṃgatāḥ tad bhakṣiṇaḥ katham svargam na gacchanti nara ādayaḥ uvāca pūrvam te jñāna lopāt cana jānanti hita ahitam ucchiṣṭam śvabhiḥ utspṛṣṭam śleṣma mūtram śakṛt tuvā matvā ācamohitāḥ śreṣṭham sadā eva hi mad śakṛt śauca jalam vām tam bali sūkara kukkuṭaiḥ varjitā pretāḥ ca tatra vai apuṅgavāḥ kulaiḥ jātyā abala utsāha vivarjitāḥ badhirāḥ ca kṛśa a dīnāḥ piśācāḥ karma jātayaḥ prati kṣaṇam ca maṅgalam nāsti duḥkhaiḥ deha yutā bhṛśam tena eva vikṛta ākārāḥ sarva bhoga vivarjitāḥ tapta amṛta arūkṣa amalīmasāḥ ete ca anye ca duḥkha ārtāḥ sa daiva preta jātayaḥ tena karma vipākena jāyam te kāmam īdṛśāḥ pitṛ mātṛ gurūṇām ca devanim dā pare ca ye pāṣaṇḍāḥ kaulikāḥ pāpāḥ te pretāḥ karma jāḥ bhuvi galapāśaiḥ jalaiḥ śastraiḥ garalaiḥ ātmaghātakāḥ mahā loke cate pretāḥ cāṇḍāla ādiṣu sambhavāḥ tyaja āḥ patitāḥ ca eva pāpa roga mṛtāḥ ca ye mahā pātaka saṃyuktā vivāha ica bahiṣkṛtāḥ śauryāt sāhasikāya ca te pretāḥ karma jāḥ bhuvi rāja droha kara āya ica pitṝṇām droha cim takāḥ dhyāna adhyayana hīnāḥ ca vrataiḥ deva arcana ādibhiḥ amantrāḥ snāna hīnāḥ ca guru strī gamana īratāḥ tathā eva cām tyaja strīṣu durgata āsu ca saṅga tāḥ mṛtāḥ krūra upavāsena mleccha deśa sthitāḥ amṛtāḥ mleccha bhāṣā yuta aśuddhāḥ tathā a mleccha upajīvinaḥ striyāḥ yaiḥ ca na rakṣyam tapta deham tam tam guṇa puṇya atithim tyaktvā a piśāca tvam vrajanti te vikrīṇanti ca vaigāḥ ca mleccheṣu ca go āśiṣu tareya ica jātāḥ ca paśavaḥ mṛtāḥ ciram pretāḥ piśācāḥ ca mṛtāḥ jātāḥ punar punar snāna sam dhyā sura arcābhiḥ veda yajṣa vrata akṣaraiḥ ājanma varjitāḥ pāpāḥ te pretāḥ ca apunarbhavāḥ bhojana ucchiṣṭa pātrāṇi yāni deha malāni ca ye tīrthe te pretān na atra saṃśayaḥ preta loke ciram sthitvā ajāyam tya yoniṣu patim cavam cayitvāya a viṣaya indriya mohitāḥ ca adanti yāḥ pāpāḥ tāḥ tu pretāḥ ciram bhuvi abhakṣya bhakṣakāḥ ca anye pretāḥ ca apunarbhavāḥ tasmāt āmalakīm bhuktvā snātvā atasya draveṇa ca tasmāt sarva prayatnena seva yāmalakīm śivām yā edam śṛṇuyāt nityam puṇya ākhyānam idam śubham sarva pāpa prapūta ātmā aviṣṇu loke mahīyate śrāvayet satatam lokevaiṣṇaveṣu viśeṣataḥ sayāti viṣṇu sāyujyam iti paurāṇika viduḥ uvāca mahīruha phalam jṣātam prapūtam dvividham prabho idānīm śrotum icchāmi pattram puṣpam su mokṣa dam uvāca sarvebhyaḥ pattra puṣpebhyaḥ sattamā tulasī śivā pradā sarva kāma pradā śuddhā vaiṣṇavī viṣṇu su priyā yām āśritya gatāḥ svargam akṣayam muni sattamāḥ hita artham sarva lokānām viṣṇunā āropitā purā yathā viṣṇoḥ priyā alakṣmī yathā aham priyaḥ eva ca tuṣyate daitya hā viṣṇuḥ tulasyāḥ ca dalaiḥ vinā tena dattam hutam yajṣa vrata ādikam janma janma nibha āsi tvam sukham bhāgyam yaśaḥ śriyam kulam śīlam kalatram ca putram duhitaram tathā dhanam rājyam aroga tvam jñānam vijñānam eva ca veda vedāṅga śāstram ca purāṇa āgama sam hitāḥ yathā gaṅgā pavitra aṅgā sura loke vimokṣa dā yathā bhāgīrathī puṇyā tathā evam tulasī śivā sevayā tasmāt tām sam nikṛṣṭetusadā devīm prapūjayet ye ca pretāḥ ca kūśmāṇḍāḥ piśāca abrahmarākṣasāḥ alakṣmī nāśinī ghūrṇāyā ḍākinī ādi mātaraḥ sarvāḥ saṅkocitām yānti dṛṣṭvā tu tulasī dalam brahmahatyā ādayaḥ pāpa vyādhayaḥ pāpa sambhavāḥ tena vidhivat priya dakṣiṇam ca anyeṣu ca tulasī grahaṇam kṛtvā viṣṇoḥ sāyujyam āvrajet manam tulasīm ropayet dhīraḥ sa yāti mādhava ālayam pūjayitvā harim devam nirmālyam tulasī dalam dhārayet yaḥ sva śīrṣa itu pāpāt pūtaḥ divam vrajet pūjane kīrtane dhyāne ropaṇe dhāraṇe kalau tulasī dahate pāpam svargam mokṣam dadāti ca upadeśam diśet asyāḥ svayam ācarate punar sarveṣām api devānām devīnām tatas śrāddheṣu yajṣa kāryeṣu parṇam ekam ṣaḍānana gurum vipram devatīrtham tasmāt tulasīm kṛtvā ayastu prāṇān parityajet yā gatiḥ prāpyate dhīraiḥ tulasī sevinām bhavet avāpnoti kim anyaiḥ śāstra vistaraiḥ arcitaḥ keśavaḥ yena śākhā mṛdula pallavaiḥ bhāvayet puruṣān martyaḥ śata śotha sahasraśas pūjayitvā harim nityam komalaiḥ tulasī dalaiḥ pradhānāt guṇāḥ tāta tulasyā a gadita amayā nikhilam purukāleṇa guṇam vaktum na śaknumaḥ yaḥ tu idam śṛṇuyāt nityam ākhyānam puṇya sam cayam sakṛt paṭhana mātreṇa vahniṣṭoma phalam labhet na ca ādhayaḥ na ca pretān aśokaḥ na avamānanā na tiṣṭhanti kṣaṇam tatra yatra iyam vartate lipiḥ ca tulasī māhātmyam nāma adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūcuḥ tulasī puṣpa māhātmyam śrutam tvattaḥ hareḥ śubham tasya stotraṃkṛtam puṇyam śrotum icchāmaha iva vayam uvāca tat mayā a kīrtitam dvijāḥ muneḥ śiṣyāḥ sarve te saṃ śita vratāḥ hatānam daḥ uvāca nāma uccāre kṛte tasyāḥ prīṇāti asura darpa hā pāpāni vilayam yānti puṇyam bhavati ca akṣayam sā katham tulasī lokaiḥ pūjyate ivam hi darśanāt eva yasyāḥ tudānam koṭi gavām bhavet śālagrāma śilā artham tu tulasī prati ahaṃkṣitau ti iha bhū tale kim kariṣyati sam ruṣṭaḥ yamaḥ pi saha eṅ kaṅkaraiḥ tulasī dalena deveśaḥ pūjitaḥ yena duḥkha hā snāne dāne tathā dhyāne prāśane keśava arcane cinomi tvām vara dā bhava śobhane pūjanam vāsudevasya lakṣa koṭi guṇam bhavet prabhāvam te deveśi gāyanti sura sattamāḥ munayaḥ siddha gandharvāḥ pātāle nāga rāj svayam na te prabhāvam jānanti devatāḥ keśavāt ṛte guṇānām parimāṇam tu kalpa koṭi śataiḥ api kṛṣṇa ānandāt samudbhūtā kṣīroda mathana udyame uttamāṅge purā yena tulasī viṣṇunā dhṛtā prāpya etāni tvayā devi viṣṇoḥ aṅgāni sarvaśas pavitra tā tvayā prāptā tulasīm tvām namāmi aham tathā kuruṣva mama avighnam yatas yāmi parām gatim ropitā gomatī tīre svayam kṛṣṇena pālitā vasiṣṭha vacanāt pūrvam rāmeṇa sarayū taṭe rākṣasāṇām vadha arthāya jagat priye ropitā tapasaḥ vṛddhaye tulasīm tvā namāmi aham viyoge vāsudevasya dhyātvā tvām janakātmajā śaṃkara artham purā devi pārvatyā tvam himālaye ropitā tapasaḥ vṛddhaye tulasīm tvā namāmi aham duḥsvapna nāśana arthāya sevitā tvam namaḥ astu te dharmāraṇye gayāyām ca sevitā pitṛbhiḥ svayam sevitā tulasī puṇyā ātmanaḥ hitam icchatā ropitā rāmacandreṇa sevitā lakṣmaṇena ca pālitā sītayā bhaktyā tulasī daṇḍake vane trailokya vyāpinī gaṅgā yathā śāstreṣu gīyate bhṛśyamūke ca vasatā kapi rājena sevitā tulasī vāli nāśāya tārā saṃgama hetave praṇamya tulasī devīm sāgara utkramaṇam kṛtam kṛta kāryaḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ ca hanumant punar āgataḥ tulasī grahaṇam kṛtvā vimuktaḥ yāti pātakaiḥ athavā muni śārdūla brahma hatyām vyapohati tulasi tvām namāmi aham dvādaśyām jāgare rātrau yaḥ paṭhet tulasī stavam dvātriṃśat aparādhān ca kṣamate tasya keśavaḥ yat pāpam yauvane bālye kaumāre vārddhake kṛtam tat sarvam vilayam yāti tulasī stava pāṭhāt prītim āyātideva īśaḥ tuṣṭaḥ lakṣmīm prayacchati kurute śatru nāśam ca sukham vidyām prayacchati tulasīnām tulasīnām amātreṇa devāḥ yacchanti vām śitam tulasī stavasam tuṣṭā sukham vṛddhim dadāti ca na aśubham vidyate tasya śubham āpnoti niścitam subhikṣam sarva dātasya dhanam dhānyam ca puṣkalam ca ca vaiṣṇavaiḥ dvādaśyām jāgare rātrau yaḥ paṭhet tulasī stavam iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe tulasīstavamāhātmyam nāma ekaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvijāḥ ūcuḥ majjanāt akhilam pāpam kṣayam yāti su niścitam mahā pātakam anyat ca tad ādeśam vadasva naḥ pāpāt pūtaḥ akṣayam nākam aśnute divi śakra vat sura yoneḥ na hāni ḥ syāt upadeśam vadasvanaḥ uvāca gatim cim viprāḥ tūrṇam sāmānya janmanām strī pum sāmīkṣaṇāt yasmāt gaṅgā pāpam vyapohati ca pāpāni darśanāt guru kalmaṣam snānāt pānāt ca jāhnavyām pitṝṇām tarpaṇāt tathā mahā pātaka vṛndāni kṣayam yānti dinedine agninā ādahyate tūlam tṛṇam śuṣkaṅkṣaṇāt yathā tathā gaṅgā jala sparśāt puṃs sāṃ pāpam dahet kṣaṇāt samprāpnoti akṣayam svargam gaṅgā snānena keśavam yaśaḥ rājyam labhet puṇyam svargamam te parām gatim pitṝn uddiśya gaṅgāyām yaḥ tu piṇḍam prayacchati śṛṇu anna ekena tu sāhasram varṣam pūjyaḥ surālaye evam piḍa pradānena nityam kratu śatam bhavet dhana putra yuta ārogyam sukha sam māna pūjitāḥ rasātala gata ayeca yeca kīṭā mahī tale sthāvare pakṣi saṅgha ādaute martyāḥ dhaninaḥ nṛpāḥ jāmātṛ bhāgineyaiḥ ca suhṛd mitraiḥ priya apriyaiḥ pradīyate jalam piṇḍam yathā upakaraṇa anvitam bhavet ūrdhvam svargetasya sthitāḥ satvāḥ adhaḥsthā madhya vāsinaḥ nityam vām tusura nimnagām yaḥ pūyam tetasya pūruṣāḥ gaṅgā kṛtsna guṇam vaktum na śaktaḥ ca turānanaḥ atas kim cit vadām yatra adya api nanivartam vai prāsādāḥ yatra sauvarṇāḥ sarva loka ūrdhva gāḥ śivāḥ iṣṭa dravyaiḥ su sampūrṇāḥ striyaḥ yatra manoramāḥ pārijātaḥ samāḥ puṣpa vṛkṣāḥ kalpadruma upamāḥ taiḥ sam sevatām ca sā māra jam patitam duṣṭamam tyajam guru ghātinam tyajanti pitaram putrāḥ priyam patnyaḥ suhṛd gaṇāḥ yathā mātā svayam janma mala śaucam cakārayet kroḍīkṛtya tathā teṣām gaṅgā prakṣālayet malam bhavanti te su vikhyāta ābhogya alaṅkāra pūjitāḥ teṣām kulānām lakṣam tu bhavāt tārayate śivā dhyātā ārti hartrīyaiḥ dhyātā āsam stutā a sādhu moditā tiṣu vyatīpāte grahaṇe candra sūryayoḥ puṇye snātvā tugaṅgāyām kula koṭim samuddharet māse divā amartyā gaṅgāyām uttarāyaṇe prāṇān tyaktvā vrajet svargam punar āvṛtti varjitam sarva deva mayaḥ viṣṇuḥ gaṅgā viṣṇu mayī iyatas gaṅgāyām piṇḍa dānena pitṝṇām vai tila udakaiḥ naraka sthāḥ divam yānti svarga sthāḥ mokṣam āpnuyuḥ samayācāra hīnasya na asti gaṅgā samā gatiḥ kim yajṣaiḥ bahu vitta āḍhyaiḥ kim tapobhiḥ su duṣkaraiḥ svarga mokṣa pradā gaṅgā sukha saubhāgya pūjitā bhukti mukti pradā gaṅgā sukha mokṣa agratas sthitā aneka janma saṃghāta pāpam puṃ sāṃ vinaśyati snāna mātreṇa gaṅgāyām sadyas syāt puṇya bhāj naraḥ labhate yat phalam dāne gaṅgā snānāt dinedine dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā atulabhatedivam prasaṅgāt api sā gaṅgā mokṣa dātu avagāhitā sarva indriyāṇām cāpalyam vāsanā śakti sambhavam nirghṛṇa tvam tatas gaṅgā darśanāt pravinaśyati para dravya abhikāṅkṣi tvam para dāra abhilāṣi tā sarva bhūta samatvam ca gaṅgāyām majjanāt bhavet yaḥ tu gaṅgām samāśritya sukham tiṣṭhati mānavaḥ gaṅgām sam śritya yaḥ tiṣṭhet tasya kāryam na vidyate mānavaḥ majṣa udānam tapaḥ japyam śrāddham ca sura pūjanam gaṅgāyām tu kṛtam nityam koṭi koṭi guṇam bhavet anya sthāne kṛtam pāpam gaṅgā tīre vinaśyati naraḥ snātvā tu gaṅgāyām sva kulam ca samuddharet ha tam sadā naraḥ sakṛt gaṅgām tathā a stutvā bhavet svargasya bhājanam aśraddhayā api gaṅgāyām yaḥ asau nāma anukīrtanam tat kṣitau bhāvayataḥ martyān nāgām stārayataḥ api adhas divi tārayate devān gaṅgā tripathagā smṛtā jñānatas ajñānatas vā api kāmatas akāmatas api vā ca ca vindati sā agatiḥ tyajataḥ prāṇān gaṅgāyām tu śarīriṇaḥ ca ret kāya śodhanam pānam kuryāt yatheccham ca gaṅgām bhaḥ sa viśiṣyate tāvat prabhāvaḥ tīrthānām devānām tu viśeṣataḥ tāvat prabhāvaḥ vedānām yāvat na āpnoti jāhnavīm tisraḥ koṭyaḥ ūrdhva koṭīca tīrthānām vāyuḥ abravīt hari pāda abjaiḥ sambhūte gaṅge tripathagāmini trā himā menasaḥ tasmāt ājanmamaraṇām tikāt matā rajasā ācate amṛtena mahā devi bhāgīrathi punīhi mām tribhiḥ śloka varaiḥ ebhiḥ yaḥ snāyāt jāhnavī jale janma koṭi kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ mūlamantram pravakṣyāmi jāhnavyā āhara bhāṣitam sakṛt japāt naraḥ pūtaḥ viṣṇu dehe pratiṣṭhati mantraḥ ca ayam aum namaḥ gaṅgāyai viśvarūpiṇyai nārāyaṇyai namaḥ namaḥ jāhnavī tīra sambhūtām mṛdam mūrdhanā bibharti yaḥ sarva pāpa vinirmuktaḥ gaṅgāsnānam vinā naraḥ yadi sa pūtaḥ kalmaṣāt ghorāt svargam ca akṣayam aśnute yāvat asthi manuṣyasya gaṅgā toye pratiṣṭhati pitroḥ bandhu janānām ca anāthānām guroḥ api hīyate gaṅgām prativahet yaḥ tu pitṝṇām asthi khaṇḍakam dhanyā jānapadāya ca paśavaḥ pakṣi kīṭakāḥ sthāvara ajaṅgamāḥ ca anye gaṅgā tīra samāśritāḥ tara mṛtāya ica jāhnavyā dvija sattamāḥ mānavā devatāḥ asanti itare mānavā bhuvi taṅgāḥ śalabhāḥ pāda āghātena gacchatām yevadanti pratijanam dvijāḥ te ca yānti param puṇyam gaṅgā snāna phalam narāḥ jāhnavīm yecanim danti pāṣaṇḍaiḥ hatacetasaḥ gaṅgā gaṅgā iti yaḥ brūyāt yojanānām śataiḥ api ca na kīrtayanti ye gaṅgām jaḍa tulya anara adhamāḥ parān na upadiśanti sma vātūlāḥ citta vibhramāḥ na paṭhanti janāya ica teṣām śāstram viniṣphalam pāṭhayanti paṭhanti ca bhāgīrathyā ālabhet snānam yaḥ para annena gacchati icchayā ani chayā ca ācāpi preraṇena anya sevayā yogāt puṇyām sa gacchet nirjarālayam dvijāḥ ūcuḥ gaṅgā kasmāt kimākārā akutaḥsāhī atipāvanā uvāca śṛṇudhvam kathayāmi adya kathām puṇyām purātanām yām śrutvā mokṣa mārgam ca prāpnoti nara sattamaḥ brahma lokam purā gatvā nāradaḥ muni puṃgavaḥ kim sṛṣṭam matam śam bhu kṛṣṇayoḥ devī vā a devatākā vā sarvāsām uttamottamā samāsādya devāḥ ca daitya mānuṣa pannagāḥ aṇḍa jāḥ sveda jāḥ vṛkṣāya ica anya audbhid ja ādayaḥ sṛjatā aca purā proktā māyā prakṛti rūpiṇī tvattobhavam sṛjāmi aham tadā etat śrutvā aparā sāca saptadhā ca bhavat tadā sarva sasya vasu pradā jñāna vidyā umā devī śakti bījā tapasvinī etāḥ sapta prakīrtitāḥ svasti svāhā svadhā dīkṣāḥ etā gāyatrī jā smṛtāḥ uccārayet sadā yajṣe gāyatrīm mātṛkā ādibhiḥ prāpya bhaveyuḥ ajara amarāḥ tatas sudhā rasam devāḥ mumucuḥ dharaṇī tale atha sasyavatī pṛthvī oṣadhīnām parā aśubhā bhāratī sarva lokānām ca ānane mānase sthitā śokam moha amoham śiva aśivam kamalā sambhavaḥ ca eva vastra bhūṣaṇa sam cayaḥ sukham rājyam triloke tu tatas sā harivallabhā bhoḥ jñānam lokeṣu sam tatam bhoḥ ardha aṅga vāsinī sarva lokeṣu lokānām sthiti saṃhāra kāriṇī nihatāḥ līlayā devyā ye asurāḥ daitya puṃgavāḥ evam balāni daityānām nihatya sarvadā tayā mahatīm tām samālokya mayā kamaṇḍalau dhṛtā asmābhiḥ ca tribhiḥ yuktāḥ brahma viṣṇu maheśvaraiḥ dharmadravā parikhyātā jalarūpā kamaṇḍalau bali yajṣeṣu sambhūtā viṣṇunā a prabhaviṣṇunā chadmanā a chalitaḥ pūrvam baliḥ balavatām varaḥ tatas pāda dvayena eva krām tam sarvam mahī talam nabhaḥ pādaḥ ca brahmāṇḍam mayā sampūjitaḥ pādaḥ kamaṇḍalu jalena vai prakṣālya eva arcitāt pādāt hemakūṭe apatat jalam tad kūṭāt śaṃkaram prāpya bhramate sā jaṭā sthitā tapasā agaja puṃgavaḥ tena bhitvā nagam vīryāt tribhiḥ taiḥ kṛtam bilam samāsādya catām devīm sarva dharma phalam labhet sā āgatiḥ na bhavet jantoḥ sevā yācayā trailokya puṇya saṃ yogāt tasmāt tām vraja nāradaiḥ yogāt sutāḥ te sagarasya ca svar gatāḥ pitṛbhiḥ ca eva sva pūrva apara jaiḥ saha gaṅgādvāre tapaḥ kṛtvā brahmaṇā sadṛśaḥ bhavat sarvatra sulabhā gaṅgā triṣu sthāneṣu durlabhā gaṅgādvāre prayāge ca gaṅgāsāgara saṃgame tri rātreṇa eka rātreṇa naraḥ yāti parām gatim tatas gacchata dharma jṣāḥ śivām bhāgīrathīm iha viśeṣāt kali kāla ica gaṅgā mokṣa prada anṛṇām anantaḥ puṇya sambhavaḥ tatas te brāhmaṇāḥ hṛṣṭāḥ śrutvā vyāsāt giram śubhām gaṅgāyām tu tapaḥ taptvā mokṣa mārgam yayuḥ tadā ca edam śṛṇuyāt martyaḥ puṇya ākhyānam anuttamam dānam japyam tathā adhyānam stotram mantram sura arcanam iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe gaṅgāmāhātmyam nāma adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ etasmin antare pūrvam vyāsa śiṣyaḥ mahā muniḥ namaskṛtya gurum bhīṣmasam jayaḥ paripṛcchati devānām pūjana upāyaṃkramam brūhi su niścitam te ca pūjā kasya eva kasya kaḥ vā prabhāvakaḥ brahman pūjayitvā ālabhet naraḥ uvāca nagasutā sidhi artham paryabhāṣata mad mad mad mad asya pravakṣyāmi śṛṇutam tu samāhitau sarva śāstra artha tattva jṣaḥ sarva śastra astra kovidaḥ nipuṇaḥ sarva tam treṣu lekhakaḥ cit ra kṛt sudhīḥ jñāna vijñāna tattva jṣaḥ sarva jṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ śrutvā mātṛ mukhāt evam vacaḥ parama kovidaḥ barhiṇam svam samāruhyatu abhiṣekaḥ kṛtaḥ kṣaṇāt pitarā pradakṣiṇam kṛtvā alam sudhīḥ tatas pitroḥ arcā kṛtaḥ kopi kalām na arhati ṣoḍaśām tasmāt suta śatāt eṣaḥ adhikaḥ śataguṇaiḥ api asya eva kāraṇāt asya agre pūjā makheṣu ca yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam yam asya eva pūjanāt agre devāḥ tuṣṭā abhavam tu ca sarvāsām api devīnām pitṝṇām ca samam tatas tatas sarveṣu yajṣeṣu pūjayet gaṇapam dvijaḥ koṭi koṭi guṇam teṣu devadevī vacaḥ yathā tat tvā sarva guṇam puṇyam devadevyā tathā mudā ca sarva deva agratas tadā tasmāt prājyeṣu yajṣeṣu stotreṣu nitya pūjane labhet evam nakta āhāraḥ ca turthyām tu pūjayitvā gaṇādhipam sāgarāt bho kṛta upavāsaḥ gaṇapam pūjayet yona romudā stotram tasya pravakṣyāmi nāma dvādaśakam śubham om namaḥ gaṇapataye mantraḥ eṣa udāhṛtaḥ gaṇapatiḥ vighnarāja ulam vināyakaḥ cārukarṇaḥ paśupāla ubhava ātmajaḥ dvādaśa etāni nāmāni prātar utthāya yaḥ paṭhet mahā pretāḥ śamam yānti na ca iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe gaṇapatistotram nāma adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sarva siddhi karam pūtam sarva abhīṣṭa phala pradam ekadam tam mahā kāyam tapta kāṣcana saṃnibham taṃ bodaram viśāla akṣam vaṃ dehaṃgaṇa nāyakam mum ja kṛṣṇa ajina dharam nāga yajṣa upavītakam bāleṃ dukalikā maulim vaṃ dehaṃgaṇa nāyakam mahā bāhum dehaṃgaṇa nāyakam pariveṣṭitam citra ratna vicitra aṅgam citra mālā vibhūṣaṇam kāma rūpa dharam devam vaṃ dehaṃgaṇa nāyakam gaja vaktram sura śreṣṭham cāru karṇa vibhūṣitam stūyamānam mahā deham vaṃ dehaṃgaṇa nāyakam gaṇāṣṭakam idam puṇyam bhakti toyaḥ paṭhet naraḥ mahā rājaḥ bhavet naraḥ vaśyam karoti trailokyam paṭhanāt śravaṇāt api tat stotram param mahā puṇyam gaṇapasya mahātmanaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe gaṇapatistotram nāma adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca mukheṣu sarveṣu pūjayet yogaṇa adhipam gaṇānām tvā iti mantreṇa sarva yajṣa ghaṭeṣu ca mṛṇmaye pratimāyām ca citre ca atha dṛṣaṇmaye budhaḥ sthāpayitvā atuherabam śaktyā ayaḥ pūjayet budhaḥ tasya kāryāṇi siddhyanti dayitāni samam tatas vidyā arthī labhate vidyām veda śāstra samudbhavām anyām ca śilpi vidyām ca vijayām svarga dāyinīm dhana arthī vipulam vittaṃkanyām sādhvīm manoramām mantraḥ ca ayam aum namaḥ gaṇapataye nārāyaṇa priyaiḥ puṣpaiḥ anyaiḥ ca api sugandhibhiḥ pūjā upakaraṇam vastram sarvam lakṣa guṇam bhavet lauhitya dakṣiṇe tīre liṅga rūpaḥ vināyakaḥ hara gaurī samādeśāt devānām saṃ matena ca sthitaḥ loka praśām tyartham sarva vighna vināśanāt pūjayitvā atutam devam śaktitas dravya sam cayaiḥ sakṛt pradakṣiṇaṅkṛtvā dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā tu mānavaḥ sam sargiṇām ca mlechānām gatyartham su tapasvinām putra artham sarva lokānām tatra śam bhuḥ vināyakaḥ kṛtvā abhiṣekam lauhitye spṛśet yaḥ tu gaṇādhipam sapta janma kṛtāt pāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ pūjayitvā tu gaṇapam narasya na atra saṃśayaḥ tasya pūjām a kṛtvā ca sarva abhīṣṭam vinaśyati tatra devāḥ ca su prītāḥ brahma viṣṇu hara ādayaḥ atha asuraiḥ mahā vīryaiḥ hiraṇyākṣa mukhaiḥ aṇe maghavā atujitaḥ vīryāt hiraṇyākṣeṇa vā etadā tatas surāḥ ca nirvīryāyāḥ yāvat varṣa śatam purā parājayaḥ heram pūjayāte parā siddhiḥ deva ādīnām bhavatu iti mahā makhena yuṣmābhiḥ pūjā gaṇapateḥ kṛtā mahātmanaḥ bhaviṣyati prahṛṣṭa avibudhāḥ sarve gaṇapasya puras sthitāḥ devāḥ ūcuḥ svarga bhoga prada prītyā aheram natāḥsmaha mahā māyam mahā kāyam heram natāḥsmaha ekadam tam mahā prājṣam laṃ batuṇḍam vināyakam devam mahā ṛṣi devānām mā indrasya canatāḥsmaha yat tepuḥ arcanam yajṣena kṛtam tat kṣama svanaḥ surāṇām ca giraḥ śrutvā gaṇapaḥ vākyam abravīt yuṣmābhiḥ vriyatām chitaḥ tatas śakra ādayaḥ sarve bṛhaspati purogamāḥ ūcuḥ gaṇapatim devaiḥ ājayaḥ naḥ bhavatu iti devānām vacanam śrutvā gaṇeśaḥ vākyam abravīt bāḍham eva suraśreṣṭhāḥ jayaḥ uvaḥ bhavatu drutam tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve harṣa nirbhara mānasāḥ gaṇeśam pūjayāmāsuḥ gandha sāraiḥ tu maṇḍanaiḥ mām vām śitam catataḥsurāḥ pītām baram namaskṛtya ūcuḥ deva gaṇāḥ mudā hara ātmajam tu samprāpya pūjayitvā gaṇādhipam mahātman adya keśavaiḥ etat śrutvā ātudevānām vacanam hariḥ avyayaḥ śrutvā vāc amṛtam deva nārāyaṇa mukhāt cyutam hṛṣṭāḥ ca su mudā āviṣṭāḥ dravyaiḥ iṣṭaiḥ samarcayan punar viṣṇuḥ uvāca idam devān indra purogamān svam svam balam samāhṛtya sajjībhava tavijvarāḥ hariṣyetān durācārān balam ca eva samam tatas vṛndam mādhavasya vacaḥ śrutvā pragatāḥ sura puṃgavāḥ vimānāni samāruhya sarve divya astra dhāriṇaḥ devānām harṣa vākyāni daitya cāraiḥ śrutāni vai rājānam kathayāmāsuḥ hiraṇyākṣam mahā balam adhunā indra ādi devāḥ ca nikhilāḥ krūra buddhayaḥ katham jayam ca lapsyāmaḥ daitya vṛnda iti dāruṇe tripurāriḥ tripurāriḥ uvāca idam gaṇeśam yajata amarāḥ pūjayitvā atutam devam jeṣyatha asura dānavān tatas deva gaṇaiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ pūjitaḥ gaṇanāyakaḥ jeṣyatha adya asurān sarvām hareḥ bāḍham upaśrutya rathinaḥ śastra pāṇayaḥ ha yad yad yad śaktiḥ asti iha devān jetum vadatu alam tatas rājṣaḥ vacaḥ śrutvā madhurvacanam abravīt rājan sahāyam meni yojaya hite nārāyaṇe devāḥ sa bhayāḥ tridaśaiḥ adhruvam tasmāt nārāyaṇaḥ naḥ bhāgaḥ sarva puram jayaḥ tatas dhum dhuḥ ca sum daḥ ca kālakeyaḥ mahā balaḥ sahāyaḥ ca madhoḥ tasya jeṣyāmaḥ mādhavam nṛpa sarva daitya balemukhyāḥ ca tu āro dṛḍha vikramāḥ kāla mṛtyu samā vīrāḥ sarva astra vidhi pāragāḥ tam ca jeṣyāmi jiṣṇum ca pratijṣāma idṛḍhāḥ nṛpa ūcatuḥ tau nṛpam hi āvām jeṣyāvaḥ u vai balāt balau jeṣyāmi na atrasam dehaḥ daityāḥ bhavata vijvarāḥ tripuraḥ ca abravīt vākyam jeṣyāmi ca vināyakam tāvat ūce atha senā nīḥ mayaḥ devām takaḥ balī kuberam pratirakṣobhiḥ sarvān ca eva hiraṇyakān rājyam tyajasva avācā anaḥprāṇeṣu yat ita ihitam tatas kopāt uvāca idam nāradam muni sattamam ahim syaḥ tvam brāhmāṇa adya agacchat ūrṇam mama agratas devānām ca vipattim cakadanam nidhanam puras tam prāptam hari hara ādikam sajjīkṛtya balam sarvān rathān śca ānayata drutam daitya rāja vacaḥ śrutvā balādhyakṣaḥ samam tatas trastāḥ tūrṇam āgatāḥ koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi akṣauhiṇyaḥ balāni ca danāni vicitra aṇi gaja uṣṭra aśva kharān api ca samāruhya yayuḥ tadā ca diśaḥ tupūrayāmāsuḥ iḥ saṃdhu velā acala adharāḥ sarva lokāḥ ca vitresuḥ samudrāḥ ca cakam pire deva duṃ dubhayaḥ neduḥ sarva devaiḥ samīritāḥ tīvram mahā havam parighaiḥ pāśa śūlaiḥ ca khaḍga yaṣṭi paraśvadhaiḥ śastra astraiḥ bahudhā muktaiḥ diśaḥ sarvāṇi raṃ taram hi gṛheṣu dharaṇyām ca parvateṣu jaleṣu ca devasthāne tathā ākāśe parvata agreṣu sānuṣu puṣkala ādi ghanānām ca varṣa dhārā jalam yathā tya strāṇi sainyeṣu śata śotha sahasraśas kecid petuḥ pṛthivyām tu śaraiḥ sambhinna vigrahāḥ śaktibhiḥ musalaiḥ ca anye chattra śūla paraśvadhaiḥ mukheśūra āyuddheṣu nyāya vartinaḥ tāraḥ vimukhān raṇe tridiva sthāḥ gaja ārohāḥ saindhava sthāḥ tathā aparān ratha sthān ca ratha ārohāḥ pada gān ca padātayaḥ parasparam vinighnanti śūra āyuddha abhikāṅkṣiṇaḥ muditāḥ sattva sampanna adharmiṣṭha abala sam vṛtāḥ keṣām cit vāhavaiḥ channā musalaiḥ bhinna mastakāḥ sirām siva strāṇi nipetuḥ dharaṇī tale madhya chinnāḥ tathā abhinnāḥ petuḥ urvyām mahā balāḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ tathā ca ugraiḥ śranna bhinnāḥ paraśvadhaiḥ gām eva patita adhīra adivya alaṃkāra bhūṣitāḥ pradīptaḥ bhūt dharā deśaḥ vīraiḥ nāgaiḥ hayaiḥ athaiḥ vividha ābharaṇaiḥ naṣṭaiḥ patākābhiḥ ca ketubhiḥ tatovasum dharā sarva āsa śaila vana kānanā lohitam pracuram pītam rakṣobhiḥ ca vṛka ādibhiḥ khāditam prītimadbhiḥ ca pheru gṛdhra gaṇaiḥ mudā mṛtasam jīvanī vidyām surāṇām sam jajāpaha brahma vidyām mahā balām tatra devāḥ ca jīvanti yemṛtāḥ ca mahā have prayudhyanti bhṛśam punar tatas siddha cāraṇāḥ mahecarāḥ ca anye ye ca eva apsarasā aṅgaṇāḥ gītiṅgāyanti gandharvāḥ śaśam suḥ parama ṛṣayaḥ jaghāna sura saṃghām stād nartayāmāsa bhū tale tara śara oghena chāditam gaganam tadā nipatanti śarāḥ sainye koṭi koṭi sahasraśas viśikhaiḥ pīḍitāḥ devāḥ petuḥ dharaṇī tale petuḥ urvyām mahā vīryāya iraṇesura puṃgavāḥ śaraiḥ pravyathitāḥ tetuḥ sthātum śakta ānasam mukhe na śekuḥ samare sthātum maghavam tam yayuḥ tadā citraratha aiti khyātaḥ devaḥ śastrabhṛtām varaḥ yathā ahaṃsi mahā śūra sura senām mudā anvitaḥ mataḥ hiraṇyākṣa priyam karma kṛtam yuddhetvayā adhunā idānīm mama bāṇaiḥ ca gacchasva yamamam diram idānīm yuddhe balam sarvam tuhelayā ebhiḥ tvām niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ nayām iyam amam diram punar bāṇān ca samare yojayitvā adrutam ruṣā jaghāna pracurān daityām s tām ś ca karttasa lāghavāt tatas nyonyam śaraiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ kāla anala sama prabhaiḥ yuddhe dhanuṣmatām śreṣṭhaḥ ciccheda bhuvi vegāt draṣṭu kāma āgatāḥ pārśvam ṛṣi devāḥ sura uragāḥ evam śata sahasrāṇi bāṇānām vidhṛtāni ca atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejā gandharvāṇām patiḥ tadā tribhiḥ bibheda bāṇaiḥ ca lalāṭa hṛdi paṣcabhiḥ śaraiḥ sampātitaḥ daityaḥ mugdhaḥ kaśmala tā aṅgāt śithilīkṛta cāpaḥ ca lebhesam jṣām cirāt balī tatobāṇa sahasraiḥ tukālām taka sama prabhaiḥ bibheda daitya sim haṃ tu surāṇām uttamaḥ balī hata cetāḥ sa daitya indraḥ bahu śoṇita saṃsravaḥ bahu bāṇa ārtaḥ śūlam jagrāha dānavaḥ hatvā ācapātayāmāsa tribhiḥ yam tāram eva ca jaghāna śūlam urvīṣṭhaḥ tatas dharva sattamam vicakarta tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥśūlam citrarathaḥ balī dṛṣṭvā hata bhogam iva uragam pradudrāva asuram balī sa mudgaram samāyātam daitya senā adhipam tadā sa papāta mahī pṛṣṭhe isam cacāla vasum dharā adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhrātaram nihatam dṛṣṭvā kāleyaḥ nāma dānavaḥ citraratham pradudrāva dhṛtvā bāṇam sa kārmukam dṛṣṭvā suram vidhāvam taṅkāla mṛtyu sama prabham arautsīt tam mahā vīryaḥ jayam taḥ pākaśāsanaḥ śastra abhighāta duḥkha ārtaṅka śmalam ca ānyasam yutam tam abravīt vākyam kāleyaḥ krodha mūrcchitaḥ nihatya bhrātṛ hām tāram atha tvām hanmi sāṃpratam tatas tam ca asura śreṣṭham kāla anala sama prabham yathā vṛṣṭi gaṇam prāpya nadī gaiḥ ika vāhinī tathā atauca mahā vīryau na kṣīṇau na ca kātarau yam tāram paṣcabhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale aṣṭabhiḥ niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ ca tura uśvān apātayāt śaktim saṅgṛhya bhūmiṣṭhaḥ kumāram ca jaghāna ha gadayā āpīḍitam sa aśvam sa varūtha aṃsa kūbaram pātayitvā adharaṇyām ca sim hanādam nanāda ha lāghavāt sa dharām gatvā gadā pāṇiḥ upasthitaḥ vajra pātāt yathā śabdaḥ lokānām duḥsahaḥ bhavet tathā tayoḥ gadā pāte śabdaḥ syāt tu muhur muhur evam tayoḥ gadā yuddham yāvat abda catuṣṭayam tadā āpadātinoḥ yuddham adbhutam loma harṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā ca vismayam jagmuḥ deva asura mahā uragāḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ muhūrtām śiraiḥ chattvā āsya khaḍgena pātayāmāsa bhū tale prabhagnāḥ daitya saṅghāḥ ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ pradudruvuḥ mad adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sa roṣaḥ ca ati tāmra akṣaḥ hi asurān ādideśa ha svayam gacchāmi yuddhāya devānām vijighām sayā śeṣāḥ daitya gaṇa adhipāḥ yuddhāya prayayuḥ sarve śūla pāśa ati paṇḍitāḥ adhikam pūrva sainyāḥ ca tathā a śataguṇaiḥ api niḥ taram tathā ākāśam prayayuḥ yuddha kāṅkṣiṇaḥ tatas rudrāḥ sa sādhyāḥ ca viśveca vasavaḥ tathā naḥ daḥ ca gaṇapaḥ ca eva viṣṇu jiṣṇu purogamāḥ te ca hṛṣṭa araṇa samutsukāḥ na bhūtam na śrutam pūrvam sarva loka bhayaṅkaram mahā astraiḥ barhudhā yuktam śiśireṇa iva kānanam dharām svargaukaḥ ākāśam sam rudhya yuddham ābabhau anyonyam jaghnuḥ ākāśe tathā anyonyam mahī tale śaktibhiḥ musalaiḥ bhallaiḥ bahubhiḥ śara vṛṣṭibhiḥ dāruṇaiḥ khaḍga pātaiḥ ca tathā cakra paraḥśvadhaiḥ bhavan ghora rūpāṇi dharā ākāśa vyayāni ca śastraiḥ śaraiḥ asṛj pātaiḥ kaṅka vāyasa jam bukaiḥ tathā eva kṣatajaiḥ srastaiḥ sva aṅgāt ca deva dānavāḥ mum canti ca ārta nādān ca sim ha nādam muhur muhur keṣām cit bāhavaḥ chinnāḥ chinna pādāḥ tathā apare chinna pārśva udarāḥ kecid nipetuḥ śataśas bhuvi koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi gaja vāji asurāṇi ca apatan dharaṇī pṛṣṭhe rakta oghe bahudhā bhuvi tatas tu dharaṇī pṛṣṭhe tu abhavat lohitārṇavaḥ tṛṇa kāṣṭha pare tatra śaktayā udāru sam cayāḥ mudgara ā musalāḥ śūla ā makara ādyāḥ bhavanti ca jayanti ca rmakāyakāḥ śara ādibhiḥ mahā uṣṭraiḥ ca niruddhāḥ pracuraiḥ tathā sampūrṇāḥ tāḥ tatas tatas patadbhiḥ ca tathā anyaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ kṣataja arṇavaḥ tadā avasum dharā sarva āsa śaila vana kānanā parśunā aparameṇa eva agninā agni śikhaiḥ śaraiḥ yamasya ca pāśena baddhā magnā ayamakṣaye yeṣām putraiḥ ca pautraiḥ ca purogaiḥ sacivaiḥ tathā nipātitāḥ ca daiteyāḥ śara śakti ṛṣṭi vṛṣṭibhiḥ pannagānām viṣaiḥ ghoraiḥ daityāḥ petuḥ dharā tale pātitāḥ prayayuḥ sarve idha raṇyām tu gatāsavaḥ kecid gacchanti pātālam puṇya apuṇya prayogāt prayudhyamāneṣu anyeṣu sāṃpratam sarvajam vibudhaiḥ arditāḥ daityāḥ śeṣāḥ parvatam āśritāḥ prajagmuḥ ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ kātara araṇa bhīravaḥ ca sam yamyā agni samaiḥ śaraiḥ tasya bāṇa arditāḥ devāḥ bahavaḥ bala darpitāḥ patita ādharaṇī pṛṣṭhe kecid bhagna araṇa ajire dṛṣṭvā tasya mahat karma dāruṇam loka bhīṣaṇam mur ṛṣayaḥ devāḥ tatra śiṣṭāḥ pracukruśuḥ atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ śatakratuḥ arim damaḥ jaghāna śarasam dohaiḥ balam balavatām varam rudhireṇa avasikta aṅgau prasṛtena mahā balau tau yathā mādhave māsi puṣpitau kim śuka drumau ca tāni cakra aṇi śūlāni nicakarta śara uttamaiḥ sahasā abhrāntaḥ līlayā asamarebalī mahā tejāḥ śaktyā ca eva puram daram nijaghāna tadā tūrṇam gaja stham tare tabdhasam jṣobalam jiṣṇuḥ bibheda danu jaṅkṣaṇāt carma tīkṣṇam dhvajam tasya śareṇa ekena vīra hā śareṇa ekena sūtasya śiraḥ ciccheda tad kṣaṇāt nipatya mūrchitaḥ pṛthvyām muhūrtāt mṛtyum āpasaḥ gadām ādāya sahasā sajaghāna mahā gajam prahāreṇa arditaḥ padmīsam cacāla sa vihvalaḥ rudhireṇa avasikta aṅgaḥ vimukhaḥ vedanā āturaḥ śatakratum vidhāvanti śata śotha sahasraśas ca ciccheda pākaśāsanaḥ jaṃ tubhiḥ tasya māyābhiḥ arditāḥ sura puṃgavāḥ dṛṣṭvā tasya mahā karma mādhavaḥ viśikhān tathā tatas jiṣṇuḥ tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale haṃ tum samudyataḥ sa papāta mahī pṛṣṭha īkṣata vakṣā mahā balaḥ sādhu sādhu iti devāḥ ca siddhāḥ ca eva mahā ṛṣayaḥ pūjayan stadāśakram bahubhiḥ puṣpa vṛṣṭibhiḥ gītam gāyanti gandharvān anṛtuḥ ca apsaraḥ gaṇāḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāya uvāca balam ca nihatam dṛṣṭvā namucim ca svaka agrajam muciḥ tatra abravīt vākyam tvayā parokṣeṇa adhunā tvā ca śaraiḥ neṣyāmi bhāskarim tam abravīt mahā tejāḥ śakraḥ sarva sura arcitaḥ vahneḥ uṣṇam avijṣāya pramohāt śalabhā yathā sahasā apraviśam ti agnim tathā amām yoddhum icchasi evam bruvāṇam indram ca jaghāna viśikhaiḥ tribhiḥ sa ciccheda tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ śakraḥ para puram jayaḥ āyasām tām gadām kopāt mahā bala parākramaḥ devāḥ pracakruḥ nṛtyāni dānavāḥ vipradudruvuḥ padma purāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ uvāca vicakarta śarām stām stām nirbibheda śara uttamaiḥ sa daityaḥ sahasā askam chādayāmāsa mārgaṇaiḥ tāreya ugni śaraiḥ jaghāna raṇa mūrdhani samparyavārayat tat nirastam kṛtam tena bāṇena āsphālitena ca aghoram prākṣipat daityaḥ ghora rūpam su dāruṇam sahāḥ tathā sarpa ādayaḥ śarāḥ dhāvanti pārvatīputram koṭi koṭi sahasraśas mad bheda daitya puṃgavam mā pādam tam śaraiḥ agni arka saṃnibhaiḥ tvarṇa puṅkhāḥ śara ālagnāḥ dehe daityapateḥ bhṛśam rejuḥ te svarṇa śakalāḥ yathā kṛṣṇa śiloccaye tasya dehāt tatas ca eva bahu susrāva śoṇitam yathā ca mādhava imāsi purupuṣpaḥ śamītaruḥ syam ca ra a śvāḥ ca śiiśya rebhūmi lagnakāḥ atha kruddhaḥ mahā daityaḥ śūlam bhīmam ca dāruṇam dhṛtvā atam praticikṣepa kāla mṛtyu sama prabham pārvatīnam danena apiśūlam pāśupatena aha kṣiptam tena kṛtam dagdham muhūrtena raṇa ajire punar śaktim mumoca atha brahmadatta antu dānavaḥ śūlam pratijaghāna atha śatakūṭa sama prabham tayoḥ sa vīryayoḥ astredharaṇyām praṇipetatuḥ tām tathā aśvān bahubhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhū tale gṛhītvā a musalam vegāt sa dudrāva sthaleguham maghāna tena daitya indraḥ śikhinam śikhivāhanam punar tam ca jaghāna asura puṃgavam praciccheda asinā āvegāt musalam ca ati dāruṇam tāreyaḥ śaktim ādāya jaghāna ca dāraṇam saḥ upi śaktim mumoca atha amoghām duṣṭa ghātinīm tatas sam dahya sā śaktiḥ viśva pralaya kāriṇī yama daṇḍa samānam sa gatāsuḥ papāta urvyām ca ālayam ca vasum dharām puṣpa dhūpa ādibhiḥ skaṃdaḥ sarva devaiḥ prapūjitaḥ tāreyavadhaḥ nāma ekona ūna uvāca cakāradharmeṇasam cakāradharmeṇasam daṣṭa oṣṭha puṭaḥ balī sa gatvā ca abravīt vākyam sarva loka vigarhitam na jānāsi mahā dharmam duṣṭa mohāt yathākramam na jānāsi yatas dharmam kāla mṛtyu puraḥsaraḥ dharmāt pracalitaḥ śam uktam vasum mahā vīryam yamam dharma eka sākṣikam sa jaghāna tribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ kāla mṛtyu sama prabhaiḥ tatas tu uccais śaraiḥ prājyaiḥ yugām tānala saprabhaiḥ nijaghāna yamam saṃkhye sa ciccheda śaraiḥśarān etasmin antare kruddhaḥ śaktyā apraśamanam ruṣā bibheda daitya śārdūlaḥ hi ahaṃkāra yutaḥ balī tām eva atha ruṣā adharmaḥ gṛhītvā aśaktikām drutam nijaghāna tayā eva amum tare bhṛśam sa vihvalita sarva aṅgaḥ mukhāt āgata śoṇitaḥ tatas kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ dhṛtvā daṇḍam su dāruṇam sa aśvam ratham tathā asūtam yoddhāram śastra sam cayam cakāra bhasmasāt tam ca śamanaḥ krodha mūrchitaḥ hastaḥ tu pradudrāva jighāṃsayā śūla hastam samāyām tam vaḍavānala saṃnibham āsasāda raṇe mṛtyuḥ śakti hasta ūti nirbhayaḥ saca dṛṣṭvā asuraḥ mṛtyum śūlena eva jaghāna aha śaktim ca eva tatas mṛtyuḥ pracikṣepa raṇa ajire sam dahya sahasā śūlam vahni kūṭa sama prabham hṛdayam atha anyaḥ durmukhaḥ mṛtyuḥ kṛṣṭa cāpaḥ mahā balaḥ dṛṣṭvā tam viśikhaiḥ prājyaiḥ jaghāna sa yamam raṇe mahat śiraḥ ciccheda sahasā pātayitvā ca bhū tale hata śeṣam balam sarvam pradudrāva diśaḥ daśa śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe uvāca viśikhaiḥ ardayāmasa ghoraiḥ āśīviṣa upamaiḥ na śaknuvanti bāṇānām vegam soḍhum samam tatas puruhūtaḥ samāsthāya prāgamat tam mahā balam dṛṣṭvā śakram mahā vīryam namuciḥ daitya puṃgavaḥ abravīt vāsavam saṃkhyā iva sa anugam tadā nirjaram ha lābha kṛtakam tam abravīt mahā tejāḥ śakraḥ para puram jayaḥ śūra tā vākya mātreṇa sarvatra sulabhā bhavet mahā parākramam yat vā astitedānava adhama puram neṣyāmi bhāskareḥ etat śrutvā mahā tejāḥ cukopa daitya puṃgavaḥ anyonyam sahasā āvegāt śaraiḥ cicchidatuḥ śarān atya pūrvam kṛtam karma tābhyām eva raṇe bhṛśam lāghavaṃśa rasam dhāna graha mokṣam su durlabham dṛṣṭvā tu vismayam jagmuḥ deva asura gaṇāḥ tadā viśikhāḥ śataśas tatra viniśceruḥ samam tatas śakraḥ kopāt punar śīghram dhanuḥ udyamya vīryavān tatas mārgaṇa sāhasraiḥ aṣṭabhiḥ tu adhikam tathā śaraiḥ niḥ tara ākāśam dadṛśuḥ tatra sam yuge nipatanti dharā pṛṣṭhe khaḍga pātaiḥ sahasraśas māyā astram darśayāmāsa krūra kṛt namuciḥ tadā tāmasam triṣu lokeṣu kṛtam syāt tuniram taram parasparam na paśyanti deva asura gaṇāḥ bhṛśam sūrya candra grahānām ca vahnīnām ca divaukasām vibhagnāḥ sarva devāḥ ca śakraḥ ca raṇasam mukhe prabhagnāḥ ca apare śūrāḥ sam yānti ca diśaḥ daśa tasya parijṣāya sarva deva arcitaḥ hariḥ vi lam bi tam samālokya śaktyā ca bahu gham ṭayā cirātsam cirātsam ca daiteyaḥ krodha mūrchitaḥ gatvā vegāt suraśreṣṭha maiḥ āvatam dadhāra ha trāsayāmāsa sutarām indrasya adviradam ruṣā sa indram mumoca dharaṇī tale tatas bhūmi gataḥ śakraḥ kaśmalam cakṣaṇam gataḥ tad yūtha pasyasaḥ sarve prajahṛṣuḥ devāḥ gandharvāḥ lalitam jaguḥ padma purāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe dvitīya namucivadhaḥ nāma eka uvāca gatvā ca mādhavam saṅkhye deva asura gaṇa agratas abravīt paruṣam vākyam avyayam harim īśvaram katham anyāyāt durvadha upāyam kṛtvā a naṣṭaḥ ūna śocasi sura tvam ca upanaṣṭam syāt anya sṛṣṭim karomi aham bahubhiḥ sarva gātreṣu jaghāna camadhum tatas māyayā āchāditaḥ saḥ bhūt daityaḥ tam sura sattamāḥ ca rudra ādyāḥ tridaśāḥ sattva dhāriṇaḥ devyaḥ nānāvidhāḥ ca api sa āyudha āvāhana anvitāḥ senā nyaḥ gaṇapā deva ālokeśa hara viṣṇavaḥ anye graha ādayaḥ devāḥ sarve yudhyanti saṅga tāḥ vinaṣṭāḥ ca tadā adeva amadhoḥ vaimāyayā adhruvam sam mukhe vimukhe ca eva śara śakti ṛṣṭi vṛṣṭibhiḥ patanti sahasā deva abhūmau śastra abhipīḍitāḥ etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ gṛhītvā āca sudarśanam asurān māyayā adevān jaghāna raṇa mūrdhani atha teṣām śirām syeṣat hitvā ca eva sahasraśas ha pātayāmāsa deveśaḥ daityānām ca sura ātmanām evam anyān vibhuḥ daityān drāvayāmāsa saṃgarāt tam dṛṣṭvā munayaḥ devāḥ sarve vismayam āyayuḥ karṇe karṇe prajalpante devāḥ muni gaṇāḥ tathā sarva sākṣī tu ayam devaḥ daitya jiṣṇuḥ yuge yuge daityānām agratas pāpa raṇe devān samantataḥ hatvā iṅkam te śivam ca adya dharma kīrti yaśas guṇāḥ atas tvām niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ na yāmi yama sādanam evam uktvā śaraiḥ ugraiḥ jaghāna keśavam raṇe nicakarta śarān tān tu mādhavaḥ vākyam abravīt jānāmi tvām raṇe daityam hara rūpa dharam priyam śūram śūra vikarmāṇam madhum māyā niyojitam mithyā lokam pradāsyāmi pātayitvā raṇa ajire etasmin antare tīkṣṇaiḥ śaraiḥ vivyādha saṃyuge jaṭilam vṛṣaketum ca vṛṣabha stham maheśvaram parasparam bhindatoḥ ca prāptān prāptān śarān śaraiḥ tatas ca pātayāmāsa ghoṭakam vṛṣa rūpiṇam bhrāmayitvā tatas śūlam jaghāna parameśvaram tribhiḥ ciccheda bāṇaiḥ ca śūlam kāla anala prabham tatas krūraḥ mahā bāhuḥ madhuḥ māyā atimāyikaḥ devī rūpam samāsthāya asim hasthaḥ prayayau hariḥ śaraiḥ bahuvidhaiḥ viṣṇum jaghāna eva abravīt vacaḥ svāmī tumesura śreṣṭha tvayā eva pātitaḥ yudhi aham tvām ca haniṣyāmi sutauskam davi nāyakau tam ca daiteyam jaghāna bahu mārgaṇaiḥ sapapāta mahī pṛṣṭhe gatāsuḥ lohita udgiraḥ pitarā nihatau dṛṣṭvā māyā vat haḥ mahā balaḥ daḥśaktim samādāya prāyāt yodhayitum harim tatas dhātā abravīt vākyam skaṃ dam moha prapīḍitam paśyate pitarau dūre paśyam tau yuddham īdṛśam tarikṣebhramam taucasam sthitaulokasākṣiṇaḥ taradhīyata tau dharāpṛṣṭhepravīrau kṣata vikṣatau madhuḥ tad āgataḥ tūrṇamam tardha anantamas vṛtaḥ yātayāmāsa viṣṇau ca māyayā śataparvatān krodhāt sudarśanena eva śiraḥ chitvā ani pātitaḥ madhusūdana eti khyātiḥ viṣṇoḥ lokeṣu kāri tā tad adhika adhika adhika adhika uvāca tatas vṛtraḥ mahā tejāḥ daityānām pravaraḥ yudhi diggaja āḍhyam gaja ārūḍhaḥ prādravat balasūdanam māgaccham tam tatas vṛtram śaraiḥ kāla anala prabhaiḥ tatas vṛtraḥ tu śīrṣam ca jiṣṇoḥ eva patatriṇā ātmānam ca samāśvāsya dhanuḥ udyamya vīryavān śarān śchitvā bibheda āśu śaraiḥ āśīviṣa upamaiḥ śatakratum mahā vīryaḥ sarva deva adhipam yudhi parasparam śara āyānti yathā sapta aśva raśmayaḥ manojava samāḥ śīghrāḥ gāḍhāḥ śikhariṇaḥ yathā sparśāḥ khaga vajrārabhedakāḥ tayoḥ dhanuṣmatoḥ yuddheśarāḥ tulya guṇa anvitāḥ tad nipatya mahī pṛṣṭhe lāghavāt sva ratham yayau dṛḍham bibheda lāghavena āśu vajreṇa iva mahā girim kam tatas śaktim samādāya āvidhya maghavā asuram kṣaṇāt sam jṣām samālambya sa vinadya patatriṇā bibheda samare śakram satataḥ kaśmalam gataḥ indraḥ sam punar prāpya jaghāna viśikhaiḥ śitaiḥ śata koṭi samaiḥ bāṇaiḥ arditaḥ vyathayā anvitaḥ tatas vṛtraḥ mahā śūlam prākṣipat nirjara īśvare ha sparśa neca sphuliṅgānām ubhayayoḥ senayoḥ bhaṭāḥ na śaktāḥ sam mukhe sthātum śalabhā jvalane yathā dagdhāḥ petuḥ pṛthivyām ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ pradudruvuḥ deva dānavayoḥ vīrāḥ śūnyaḥ tatra abhavat raṇaḥ tat astram nirastakam dṛṣṭvā sa daityaḥ krodha mūrchitaḥ māyayā aśailasam doham astram śakraiḥ imumoca ha bāṇa oghaiḥ śaila saṃghātam praciccheda raṇehariḥ aghoram prāsṛjat daityaḥ puruhūte mahā bale koṭi koṭi sahasrāṇi jam tūnām pravarāṇi ca ha śārdūla bhallūka vṛka vyāghra mahā gajāḥ daśūka ādayaḥ sattvāḥ pradhāvanti sureśvaram sūtam ca aśvān pṛthivyām ca pātayāmāsa tad kṣaṇāt ṭaka aṅgadām bhīmām sampūjya asura sattamaḥ jaghāna padminaḥ śīrṣe mohāt dam tīkṣitim yayau sa gadaḥ sarva deva īśaḥ dharaṇīm samupasthitaḥ adhas ūrdhvam prahāram ca pārśvayoḥ ati bhīṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā deva gaṇāḥ siddhāḥ dānavāḥ vismayam gatāḥ deva dānava vīrāḥ ca draṣṭum na eva tat īśire īśa brahma ādayaḥ khetu sthitāḥ draṣṭum tat adbhutam dṛśyete sarva lokaiḥ ca lāghavam vismayaṃgataiḥ maṇḍalam cakradhanvam ca lāghavam ca pariplutam keśān vṛtrasya utplutya sampradhṛtya asinā ādrutam śiraḥ ciccheda sahasām agha vāraṇa mūrdhani xc jaya śabdaḥ tatas tu āsīt devānām ca samam tatas deva dum dubhayaḥ neduḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsaras gaṇāḥ gītam gāyanti gandharvāḥ munayaḥ stuti pāṭhakāḥ bhītāḥ palāyitāḥ sarve daityāḥ tyakta āyudhāḥ diśaḥ ca uvāca traipuriḥ sam ruroha atha abravīt vākyam aṅgaṇa adhipam pitāmeni hataḥ pitrā atas ayasmāt gaṇādhipa tasmāt tvām adya viśikhaiḥ nayām iyama sādanam tava tātena duṣṭena surāṇām ahitam purā mahat pāpam śrutam naḥ janakena hi pāpa karma ratam duṣṭam jṣātvā ajñāna balena ca paṅkāt pratāritaḥ mohāt preṣitaḥ yam amam diram tvām ca aham tad patham daitya preṣayā abhikṣaṇāt iha tam mahā prājṣam surāṇām ca gaṇa adhipam hivyādha daśabhiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ kāla anala sama prabhaiḥ yama daṇḍa samaiḥ bāṇaiḥ kṣurapraiḥ ca śilīmukhaiḥ kaṅka pattraiḥ mahā tīkṣṇaiḥ vajra anala sama prabhaiḥ śca asi alam bodaraḥ sura arcitaḥ tatobhadraḥ ca saubhadraḥ bhīṣaṇaḥ nirjarām takaḥ svām sva aṅgadām samādāya dudruvuḥ tam vināyakam lāghavāt tu vṛthak kṛtvā gadāḥ teṣām mahā balaḥ bhadrakasya tu śīrṣe ca ahanat paraśuṇā tadā bhīṣaṇasya kuṭhāreṇa khaḍgena nirjarām takam herambaḥ mahā giri samām tadā catur ogaṇa mukhyām ca anyām ś ca apātayat dviṣaḥ tatas sam jṣām samālabh yatra ipuriḥ ca asura uttamaḥ tām stuci cheda dharma ātmā a punar vivyādhatam śaraiḥ caturbhiḥ saim ca eva śara ekena ca sārathim śaraiḥ sampātayāmāsa dharaṇyā aṅgaṇa nāyakān lāghavāt turatham ca anyam gatvā tripura nam danaḥ viśikhaiḥ vajra saṃkāśaiḥ sambibheda gaṇādhipam rudhireṇa avasikta aṅga uruṣā ghora yama prabhaḥ bāṇaiḥ sapta ca tare tatas sūtena dhīreṇa apanīta ūraṇa ajirāt bimukham na ahanat śūraḥ vināyakaḥ sura arcitaḥ cirāt sam jṣām samālabhya ayam tāram ca abravīt vacaḥ tatas iyam tā abravīt vākyam satyam pathyam ca komalam hara ātmaja śarān soḍhum kaḥ samartha uraṇa ajire tasmāt moha gataḥ tvam camayā ānītaḥ prabhāsuta etat jṣātvā tu idānīm bho yat yuktam tat vidhīyatām auṣadha ādi prayogeṇa gajaḥ sam jṣām abodhayat akārayat śataguṇa prāṇam ca jayam ādiśat prāk jalam mantritam da tvā ārurodha asya aṅgaka vraṇān evam śata sahasrāṇi sainyāni sainyapālakān sa daityaḥ tasya pṛṣṭha sthaḥ śaraiḥ kāla anala prabhaiḥ hatvā atu apātayat ca urvyām mukhya mukhyān sura adhipān śaraiḥ tasya tadā devāḥ yama daṇḍa sama prabhaiḥ tatra tatra cakāra āśu bhīṣaṇam sam citam śaraiḥ gajena pātitāḥ kecid gaja ārohena ca apare vegena bhramaṇena eva surāḥ kecid pratāpitāḥ evam sura gaṇa adhyakṣāḥ śastra astraiḥ vividhaiḥ ca tam tathā api tad gajam yoddhum na śaktāḥ te mahā balāḥ kṣipram tām taiḥ traipuraḥ apātayat śaraiḥ ca deva ajarjara vigrahāḥ magmuḥ bhītāḥ te vedanā āturāḥ devānām kadanam dṛṣṭvā gaṇādhīśaḥ pratāpavān sa gajam tāḍayāmāsa vajra anala samaiḥ śaraiḥ balam parśunā pṛṣṭhavaṃśa agre sthitvā tena ahanat punar sa gajaḥ sa papāta urvyā aṅga tāsuḥ lohitam vaman munayaḥ devāḥ sādhu sādhu iti ca bruvat nāma uvāca śrutvā maheśvarāt vākyam devāḥ śakra purogamāḥ dudruvuḥ daitya saṃghām stān sarve sarvān samam tatas ājagāma mahā bāhuḥ kum bho nāma mahā suraḥ manaiḥ ṛtu yakṣa rāja anaṅgadayā ca ahanat bhṛśam tatas nyonyam gadā yuddham abhavat bhīṣaṇam tayoḥ prācuram bhīṣaṇam yānam sphoṭa taila abhivāstikam tena kṛtvā mahā yuddham avasāne dhaneśvaraḥ tasya kumbhasya ca urasi kum tadā jaghāna śara saṃghaiḥ ca tathā evaiḥ āvaṇam bhṛśam sa papāta dharā pṛṣṭhe gatāsuḥ lohita ukṣitaḥ catur ogaṇa mukhyām ca śaktyā abibheda sam yuge senānyaḥ ca eva pratyekam pātayāmāsa lāghavāt hrādam yamadaṇḍam narām takam hatvā ācapātayāmāsa sa bhasmīkṛta vigrahaḥ kālaḥ ca khaḍga pātena pātayāmāsa bābhravam śaktyā amṛtyuḥ bibheda aśvam tathā ani rghṛṇakam raṇe agninā adahyamānāḥ ca sapta ete ca mahā balāḥ dagdha dehāḥ ca petuḥ urvyā aṅga tāsavaḥ pāśa baddhā mahā vīryā varuṇasya mahātmanaḥ petuḥ urvyām mahā satvāḥ śūrāḥ śūra bhayānakāḥ śūrasya raśmi jālena nihatāḥ paṣca dānavāḥ turutum buruduḥ medhaḥ sādhaka asādhaka abhidhāḥ ṣaṇmukhāḥ śaraiḥ nipātitāḥ daityāḥ sam yuge mātariśvaṇā taiḥ ṛtogadayā abhīmam pātayāmāsa bhū tale śūla pātaiḥ ca rudrāṇām śataśas daitya dānavāḥ nipetuḥ sam yugebhītāḥ sam mukhāraṇa paṇḍitāḥ vasūnām śara pātaiḥ ca śūrāṇām raśmimālinām ca vajra pātaiḥ su dāruṇaiḥ nipāti tāraṇe daityāḥ śataśas bala śālinaḥ tya urvyām skam da śaktyā tathā āhatāḥ muktena cakreṇa tīvra karmaṇā daityānām pravarāṇām ca śirām sini patanti kau śamanas yama daṇḍena koṭi koṭi sahasraśas pātayat tadā bhūmau kālaḥ khaḍgena dānavān mṛtyuḥ śaktyā tathā daityān pāśīpāśena ca aparān pātena takṣaka ādīnām sudhām śoḥ śiśireṇa ca gajān bhedaityānām nāśayat tatas evam aśvān gajān ca eva lāghavāt sani apātayat anyābhiḥ devatābhiḥ ca sa mātṛ gaṇa nāyakaiḥ śaraiḥ ca khaḍga pātaiḥ ca śūla śakti paraśvadhaiḥ taiḥ ca tyasurān surāḥ evam saṅkṣīyamāṇeṣu daitya rāj samapadyata bhūṣitam śātakumbha mayam divi aṅgham ṭā cāmara bhūṣitam patākā dhvaja sampūrṇam ramyam śakra ratha upamam tam āruhya mahā vīraḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ asura adhipaḥ jaghāna śara jālaiḥ ca durnivāryaḥ sura asuraiḥ sa sainyāni gajān vīrorathān ca sahasaim dhavān pātayāmāsa bhū mauca śata śotha sahasraśas pātayāmāsa daitya indraḥ śara oghān mṛtyu saṃnibhān yathā puṣkariṇī vṛnde gajaḥkam javanam śitaiḥ śara pātaiḥ ha nādaiḥ punar punar dharaṇyām patitā āvegāt tadā daitya īśvarasya ca daśabhiḥ ca su tīkṣṇa agraiḥ jayam tam sajaghāna ha tam paṣcabhiḥ bāṇaiḥ śakram paṣcadaśena tu citraratham viṃśatibhiḥ paṣcaviṃśatibhiḥ guham tri śareṇa eva catvārim śat śaraiḥ yamam tathā eva kālam mṛtyum ca pāṇinā adviguṇena ca guhyakeśam jagatprāṇam daśabhiḥ daśabhiḥ śaraiḥ madhyam ca sapta ca eva rudrān sarvān pṛthak pṛthak vasūn sarvān ca sa śaraiḥ siddha gandharva pannagān daśa aṣṭa daśabhiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ yuddhe devān bhinatti asau mahā oja oghāt ati vīryāt tu śīghra lāghava ḍaśanān na ca īśvarāḥ maheśa śūla saṃkāśaiḥ śaraiḥ marma vibhedibhiḥ tāḍitāni rjarā yuddhe mūrchita ādharaṇām yayuḥ tasya eva sam mukhe sthātum na śekuḥ pravarāḥ surāḥ tatas devāḥ vinirdhūtāḥ tridiveśena sam yutāḥ haraṇyam te harim tatra śaraṇam tāḍita āyayuḥ etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ prāha jiṣṇum khageśvaram tūrṇam gataḥ tasya anti kam javāt sa ratham mārgaṇaiḥ bhitvā viṣṇum ārodhayat javam anya sṛṣṭim karomi adya hatvā tvām ca sa nirjaram tatas viṣṇuḥ tam daitya puṃgavam tatas śara śataiḥ eva jaghāna viṣṇum avyayam sambhrām saḥ sa ciccheda yama daṇḍa nibhān śarān punar śara sahasrāṇi prerayāmāsatam raṇe tām ca chitvā śaraiḥ śauriḥ tam ca vivyādha mārgaṇaiḥ pragauravāt ahārya ābhaiḥ sam sparśāt bāḍaba analaiḥ śaraiḥ ca bhedakaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ khagamaiḥ ca manojavaiḥ lāghavāt keśavāḥ trasya tūla śuṣka tṛṇa upamaiḥ bādhayā abhyarditaḥ kruddhaḥ dhṛtvā śikhariṇam raṇe jaghāna mādhavam vegāt hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā balaḥ tam ca sam cūrṇayāmāsa gadayā a līlayā a hariḥ evam parvata sāhasram pātitam tu krameṇa hi tathā eva lāghavāt cūrṇam hariṇādāna vāriṇā punar bāhu sahasrāṇi kṛtvā asau dānava uttamaḥ śaraiḥ śaktibhiḥ ati ugraiḥ śūlaiḥ paraśuka ādibhiḥ vavarṣa bahubhiḥ viṣṇum krodha āviṣṭena cetasā śaraiḥ dīptaiḥ mahā ghoraiḥ asurāṇām bhayaṅkaraiḥ dānava adhipatiḥ saṅkhye hi avyayaḥ hariḥ īśvaraḥ gatvā sarva śaktim anuttamām kāla jihvā upama aṅghorām aṣṭagham ṭā samanvitām śuśubhe sa sura śreṣṭhaḥ taḍit tvad sāndra megha vat tatas ca cukruśuḥ daitya ajayā iti sādhu vādinaḥ teṣām sisam chidya mādhavam punar āgamat sa daityam śaktipātena pātayāmāsa vaiḥ aṇe cirāt sam jṣām samālambya vahni bāṇena keśavam tatas mumoca māyā astram ca asuram ca ati dāruṇam ca tadvat dvipa sarīsṛpān pratāpavān tatas māyā astra sambhūtān śastra astra oghān raṇe hariḥ sa vihvalita sarva aṅgaḥ tad kṣaṇam lohita ukṣitaḥ tat śūlam catribhiḥ bāṇaiḥ pravivyādha surādhipaḥ yam tāram capra ciccheda daśabhiḥ ca hariḥśaraiḥ mukham ca akarot balī bhū maṇḍalam samuddhṛtya viveśa carasātalam śeṣāḥ ca viviśuḥ daityāḥ tam anu prīti sam yutāḥ tatas viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ jṣātvā daitya balam mahat dadhāra rūpam vārāham daitya rāja jighāṃsayā dhṛtvā akroḍa tanum viṣṇuḥ viveśa tam anudrutam tatra gatvā rasā mūleḥ asātala gatām mahīm dṛṣṭvā sva dam ṣṭrayoḥ dadhre loka ādhārām vasum dharām tām dhṛtvā āgacchataḥ tasya viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ samājagāma daitya indraḥ dhṛṣṭam vāgbhiḥ tudan anu māyā kroḍa tanuḥ viṣṇuḥ durvacām sisahan ruṣā jala upari dadhāra imām dharām bhūdharaḥ eva ca tasyām casacakāra tadā acalām tatas paścāt sa sam lagna udaitya rāj samupasthitaḥ māyayā asūkaraḥ viṣṇuḥ tāṃ aṅgadām samavam cayat tatas punar aruṣa āviṣṭaḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā balaḥ muṣṭinā aprāharat devam dakṣiṇetu bhuje prabhoḥ evam yuddham mahā ghoram savya asavyaṅga tā gatam tathā ūcuḥ ca deva deveśam viṣṇum vārāha rūpiṇam mā ākrīḍa bāla vat deva jahi amum devakam ṭakam tatas viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ māyā vārāha rūpa dhṛk brahma ādi anumatim prāpya cakram prākṣipat ulbaṇam sahasra sūrya saṃkāśam sahasra aram mahā prabham tat cakram viṣṇunā amuktam hiraṇyākṣam mahā balam cakāra bhasmasāt sadyas brahma ādīnām ca paśyatām daityām raudram cakram ca agamat acyutam tatas brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ śakru mukhyāḥ ca lokapāḥ dṛṣṭvā ca vijayam viṣṇoḥ stuvanti sma samāgatāḥ devāḥ ūcuḥ natāḥ asma viṣṇum jagant ādi bhūtam sura asura indram jagantām prapālakam yad nābhi padmāt kila padmayoniḥ babhūva tam vaiśaraṇam gatāḥ smaḥ namaḥ prakurmaḥ ca nṛsiṃha rūpiṇe tathā punar vāmana rūpiṇe namaḥ namaḥ stute kṣatra vināśanāya rāmāya rāmāya daśāsya nāśine mlecchām mlecchām takāya apica kalki nāmne namaḥ punar kroḍa vapurdharāya niṣūditaḥ ayam hi adhunā kila tvayā daityaḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ eti pragalbhaḥ mad tvam eva asya yuge yuge ca rūpāṇi dhatse su manoharāṇi tvam eva kāla agni haraḥ ca ca ta kāle atas bhavān eva ca viśva kāraṇam nate param jīvam ajīvam īśaiḥ ca bhaviṣya rūpam pravartamānam ca tathā eva rūpam sarvam tvam eva asi carācara ākhyam cit tvayi eva bhātam sat asat svarūpam ṛte bhavat pāda parāyaṇam janam tena āgatā asmat śaraṇam śaraṇyam uvāca tatas viṣṇuḥ prasanna ātmā uvāca tridivaukasaḥ tuṣṭaḥ asmi devaiḥ bhadram vaḥ tvad stotreṇa sāṃpratam tat phalam samavāpnoti kīrtanāt śravaṇāt naraḥ atas param mahā jñānam na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati padma purāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe devāsurasaṅgrāmasamāptauvijayastotram nāma adhyāyaḥ sam jayaḥ uvāca ye asurāḥ ca mukhe vimukhe api vā adya api āsan gatāḥ kutra etat mā īśam sabhā guro uvāca sam sam mukheśūrāḥ daityānām pravara araṇe svayam bhogyam aśnanti śāśvatam prāsādāḥ yatra sauvarṇa a nānā ratna āvibhūṣitāḥ sarva kāma pradāḥ vṛkṣāḥ svarṇadī toyasam yutāḥ dadhi dugdha ājya khaṇḍaiḥ ca yutā puṣkariṇī śubhā atīva rūpa sampannāḥ sa daiva nava yauvanāḥ evam janma aṣṭakam prāpya dhaninā adhyakṣa mantriṇaḥ mukha gātreṇa divam aśnanti śāśvatam ye ca māyāvinaḥ raṇe tāras nirayam yānti uvācakāḥ para nyāsa apahartāraḥ vimukhāḥ santi tattvāt rātrauvā vipina naṣṭe corāḥ sāhasa kāriṇaḥ sarva bhakṣa rata amūḍha mleccha go brahma ghātakāḥ uvācaka para mleccha etad yad kūṭa yoni teṣām paiśācikī bhāṣā loka ācāraḥ ūna vidyate na asti śaucam tapas jñānam na deva pitṛ tarpaṇam dāna śrāddha ādikam ca prapūjanam pitṝṇām cana śuśrūṣā dvija deva tapasvinām jñāna lopāt atas teṣām mala śaucam na vidyate mātaram bhaginīm ca anyām gṛhiṇīm kāmayanti ca tārkṣyasya udvavanānām ca anyeṣām gotra vāsinām pula jātāḥ sadā daityāya eṣām puṇyam akāraṇam durgatim ca mṛta āyānti dvija strī śiśu ghātinaḥ go āśinaḥ durātmānaḥ hi abhakṣya bhakṣaṇa īratāḥ kīṭa yonim vrajam ca pipīlikāḥ agrajaḥ sahajaḥ teṣām sadṛṅṅ na u grāmya vṛttayaḥ makeśa praṇetāraḥ kravyabhakṣa ratā bhuvi sāhasam ca vratam dānam snānam yajṣa ādikam ca yat matsya mām sādi iṣu prīta amṛṣā vacana bhāṣiṇaḥ sadā kāmāḥ sadā lobhāḥ sadā krodha mada anvitāḥ ku bhṛtyāḥ ku jana prītāḥ pūti gandha ratāḥ narāḥ na deveṣu na vijṣeṣu na dharma śravaṇeṣu ca stotra mantra ādike puṇye yathā kāryeṣu aniḥ ca yāḥ bahu roga adhiroṣāḥ ca bahu rūpa paricchadāḥ cihnāni etāni bhū tale na jānanti param lokam na gurum svam na ca aparam svapna idānam na jānanti bhakṣaṇa anna paricchadam gopāyanti dhanam yasmāt te yakṣa anara rūpiṇaḥ prāṇām ca rājñi ca parārtha ibhāra vāhakāḥ pretānām lakṣaṇam yat vā sarva loka vigarhitam strīṇām ca puruṣāṇām ca śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ amama mala paṅka dharāḥ nityam satya śauca vivarjitāḥ takum tala vastrāṇām vapuṣaḥ umalasam cayāḥ rocate na paśyanti sukham strīṇām viśanti kānane drutam bhakṣaṇebhiḥ tadācid svastha tā nāsti kvacid vā aśuci tā tanau lakṣaṇam nara lokeṣu pretānām īdṛśam kila hita ahitam na jānanti mitra amitram guṇa aguṇam pāpa puṇya ādikam sthānam snānam deva dvija arcanam ari mitram udāsīnam navim danti svabhāvāt martya sthāḥ paśavaḥ te ca jṣāyam te buddhi sam mataiḥ buddhyā a nānātva bhāvāḥ ca bhramanti ca mṛṣā bhuvi yakṣa rūpāḥ narāḥ te ca sarva karma bahiṣkṛtāḥ eṣām bhedam pravakṣyāmi lakṣaṇam dharaṇī tale vijāta amartya lokeṣu pāpasya eva anurūpatas malīmasa bhuvi prastham nāgaram chadma rūpiṇam vighasa ādi prabho ktāraṅkākam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ abhakṣye nirataḥ pāpaḥ kukuraḥ pūti sampriyaḥ pravṛttaḥ sarva gṛhyeṣu bhakṣya abhakṣya sa jīvanaḥ bhūmau paśu ādi yonīnām kuleṣu sambhavāḥ śvnaḥ vigṛhya hastena mlecchānām bhakṣaṇa priyāḥ yathā caraṇa yodhinām poṣaṇe bhakṣaṇe prītāḥ pūti garhyeṣu asādhuṣu parvate karaṇāt vahneḥ kāṣṭha sam caya saṃgrahe mlecchāḥ kṣatriyāṇām bhaya ākulāḥ lokānām naṣṭa dharma ica sat āśauca vivarjite kulīnānām tadā mlecchāḥ bhaviṣyanti cadasyavaḥ tasmin kāle janāḥ sarve duḥkha roga pratāpitāḥ durbhikṣa anna parāmūḍhāḥ sadā rāja prapīḍitāḥ tatra asatya īrata amartyāḥ sarva śauca vivarjitāḥ tejanaiḥ eva purāṇa āgama sam hitāḥ sa priyāḥ pāpāḥ sarva bhakṣāḥ su dāruṇāḥ dāruṇa ācāra niratāḥ nityam chala parāyaṇāḥ na puṣṇanti sutāḥ tātam prasuvam ca gurūn api na śuśrūṣanti vaibhṛtyāḥ svāminam guṇa śālinam bhartāram na striyaḥ kāścid śvaśurau ca sva mātaraḥ nitya kaṣṭa anarāḥ tatra kalahaḥ ca gṛhe gṛhe nṛpa a mlecchāḥ surāpāḥ ca tathā a mantri purohitāḥ manuṣyaiḥ ca baliḥ teṣām matsyaiḥ mām saiḥ nirāmiṣaḥ pāṣaṇḍa āyāsa yogebhyaḥ pradhāna aguṇa vārttayoḥ tatas nyonyam priyā mūḍhau aneva anagareṣu ca matsya mām sa ādikam narāḥ vane dvijātayaḥ ca anyebhum jate ca anupāpakam tam paśum tyapunarbhavam pātayanti pitṝn pāpāḥ sarve te pūrvadevakāḥ murtyaka aguhyaka adhruvam ete ca avinaya prītān adevān aca mānuṣāḥ sam jayaḥ uvāca katham ca martya bhāveṣu lakṣam jānanti tāttvikāḥ etam mad saṃśayam nātha dūrīkuru tatas tatas uvāca kṛta pāpa anurūpāḥ tu dvijātiṣu anya jātiṣu asura arākṣasāḥ pretāḥ svabhāvam na tyajanti te ye ca asura amartye sadā te kalaha utsukāḥ kuhakāḥ kaccarāḥ krūrāḥ vijṣeyāḥ rākṣasāḥ bhuvi jana udvigna ādikam dānam tathā deva arcanam bhuvi ugra bhāvāt dhanam labdhvā rājyam bhuṣjanti śāśvatam jayam śaurya ādikam puṇyam punar pāpa kṣayam vrajet evam urvyām tathā nāka nāga lokā iyam ālaye vāsudevam samārādhya prahlādaḥ sura pūjitaḥ tasya eva gaṇa mukhya tvam lebhe bhṛṅgī mahā balaḥ kecid daitya kule jātāḥ pṛthivyām sura sattamāḥ bhāvayanti pitṝn sarvān śata śotha sahasraśas ekena api su putreṇa kula trāṇam ca dhīmatā ekaḥ api vaiṣṇavaḥ putraḥ kula koṭim samuddharet janaṅkulam āsīt tatra sarve dvijāḥ śaśvat sam dhyā upāsana tatparāḥ veda pāṭha rata adhīrāḥ deva atithi dvija arcakāḥ yajṣa vrata agnikarmāṇaḥ ṣaṭkarma pariniḥ ca yāḥ atikṛcchre cateṣām vainapāpe vartatemanaḥ kurvanti satatam vīrāvratam yajṣam sanātanam tad projjhi tuṅgāt sopi rakṣā artham sthāpya ceṭikām tasyāḥ tu anavadhānena śvanā ācājyam ca bhakṣitam tatas pātram svīya mūtreṇa sambhṛtam ca ca tatas vahnau lakṣitam tena tad kṣaṇāt kūṭam hema mayam sākṣāt svarṇam jām būnada prabham gṛhītvā tat mudā vipraḥ pāpa yogam cakāra ha mudā tatra yathāvṛttam kathitam tutayā dvijaiḥ taṅkarma durācāram śrutvā lobhāt asādhubhiḥ guru lobhāt ca su mahat svām te paṅkam viśati api paṅkāt deva bhayāt mohāt mati bhram śobhavat tatas striyaḥ duṣṭāḥ jana aduṣṭāḥ sarve pāpa balāt tadā tasya bhāryā tadā sādhvī puru duḥkhena sam yutā bhartāram kṛcchrasantaptā pura kāryam jagāda sā uvāca kaṣṭam kaṣṭam tvām duḥkha sam yutam grāma ācāram imam yat vā api aparam kartum arhasi ete vipra ādurācārāḥ sa dārāḥ sa paricchadāḥ matāḥ am te apunarbhavam prāpya aparādha antaḥ na vidyate aham ekaḥ tratiṣṭhāmi sva puṇya parirakṣaṇāt yat iyāsyām icān yatra itas uham tad kṣaṇāt priye kṣipram sacatayā sārdham yayau sīmām taram dvijaḥ sthitvā apaśyat purītā vat sthirā atiṣṭhati pūrvavat tam sācā hatam patim sādhvī purīcā iyam nanaśyati vimṛśyatām uvāca idam vipra varyaḥ su vismitaḥ vicārya sādhavam tyau upānahau tatra dhārayiṣyāmi kim nu vai evam uktvā patim sādhvī gṛhītvā te upāgatā pateḥ abhyāśāt dṛṣṭam puram tatas vipra ādayaḥ varṇāḥ kaccarāḥ pura vāsinaḥ bhṛcchāt yama puram yānti na asti teṣām ca niṣkṛtiḥ pūrvavat bhakṣaṇe prītaḥ hi adya pāpam karoti ca steya śīla ūniśā cārī budhaiḥ savam cakaḥ abudhaḥ sarva kāryeṣu ajṣātaḥ sarva karmasu samaya ācāra hīnaḥ tu paśuḥ eva sa bāliśaḥ evam uṣṭra ādayaḥ santi bhakṣa ādi nakula ādayaḥ vighasa ādi priyaḥ nityam naraḥ śvā kīrtitaḥ budhaiḥ calaḥ plavagaḥ kānana prītaḥ naraḥ śākhāmṛgaḥ bhuvi ca balavān krāṃ ta śīlaḥ ca satatam ca anapatrapaḥ pūti mām haḥ samudāhṛtaḥ tad svanāt eva sīdanti bhītāḥ anya vṛka ādayaḥ te dūra darśiṇaḥ evamādi krameṇa eva vijānīyāt nareṣu ca surāṇām lakṣaṇam brūmaḥ nara rūpam vyavasthitam dvija deva atithīnām ca guru sādhu tapasvinām bhūjā tapas rataḥ nityam dharma śāstreṣu nītiṣu kṣamā śīla ujita krodhaḥ satya vādī jiteṃ indrayaḥ vāgīśaḥ sarva kāryeṣu guṇī dakṣaḥ mahā balaḥ sa akṣaraḥ ca api vidvān ca gīta nṛtya artha tattva vid ma vidyā ādi kāryeṣu sarvatam tri svareṣu ca haviṣyeṣu ca sarveṣu gavyeṣu ca nirāmiṣe gandha mālyeṣu vastreṣu śāstreṣu ābharaṇeṣu ca samprītaḥ ca atithau dāne pārvaṇa ādiṣu karmasu snāna dāna ādibhiḥ kārye vrataiḥ yajṣaiḥ sura arcanaiḥ ca na klībam vāsaram bhavet ayam eva manuṣyāṇām sat ācāraḥ taram bhīraḥ sarva dā devaḥ sadā eva mānavaḥ mṛduḥ prīti bhāvam param saukhyam sauhṛdam sukṛtam śubham preta ādīnām ca preteṣu paśau prītiḥ paśoḥ api kāka ādayaḥ sva jātau ca tathā anye ca sva jātiṣu prītāḥ bhavanti ca aprīta avidyā teṣām ca lakṣaṇam evam puṇya viśeṣeṇa sa viśeṣāsu jātiṣu priya apriyam vijānīyāt puṇya apuṇyam guṇa aguṇam patiyoḥ na sukham kim cit jāti bhedāt nṛṇām bhuvi ati puṇyān labhet āyuḥ śobhanāḥ puṇya kāriṇaḥ pāpa ātmānaḥ labham te antam ye ca daitya ādayaḥ narāḥ kṛte jātāḥ surā bhūmauna daityāḥ ca anya jātayaḥ tretāyām eka pādam ca dvi padam dvāpare yuge sam dhyāyām ca saṅkulam deva ādīnām bhavet jātam bhāratam yat pravartitam aśvatthāman haraḥ sākṣāt hariḥ naṃ da kula udbhavaḥ yad indrāḥ pāṇḍavāḥ jātāḥ viduraḥ dharmaḥ eva ca gām dhārī draupadī kum tī caitā devyaḥ dharā tale deva daityāḥ kaleḥ madhye daityāḥ śeṣe ca mānavāḥ utpatsyam te sadā pretāḥ kravyādāḥ paśu pakṣiṇaḥ teṣām nityam dvam dveṣu samprītyā a teṣām ācāra bhāṣiṇī uvāca daitya ādīnām mṛṣābhāvāt sura tvam na sura ālayam rājyam āyuḥ tathā kīrtiḥ abhīṣṭam dayitam balam nīti vidyā ādikam bhāvyam janma vṛddham sanātanam dāna adhyayana karmāṇi yajṣa ādi ca katham prabho etat āptāya śiṣyāya mahyam bho vaktum arhasi uvāca daityānām sāhasāt deva tapaḥ bhavati niścitam muktaḥ nīti śāsra artha tattva gaḥ etaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ pūtaḥ sa bhavet sura lakṣaṇaḥ purāṇa āgama karma aṇinākeṣu svayam ācarate puṇyam sa dharā uddharaṇa kṣamaḥ ṣaṭkarma nirataḥ vipraḥ sarva yajṣa rataḥ sadā dvija deveṣu vidviṣṭāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ ha yeca madya ratāḥ pāpā dyūta karma ratāḥ tathā bhāṣaṇḍa patita ālāpāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ smṛti śāstra arthaka udvignāḥ śātayanti dharām narāḥ dāra tā dveṣāt śātayanti dharām narāḥ dīna anāthān pīḍayanti śātayanti dharām narāḥ ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ pāpa karma kṛtaḥ narāḥ puruṣān pātayitvā atuśātayanti dharām narāḥ yā edam śṛṇuyāt ramyam guhyāt guhyam param hitam tasya na ca pāpaiḥ pralipyate halpam kalpam divam bhuktvā a mokṣa mārgam vrajati asau nāma adhyāyaḥ uvāca kaḥ yat kaḥ vā aprabhāvaḥ sya kutra jātaḥ ghṛṇī īśvaraḥ yam kiṃkaroti hi kāryam nikhilaiḥ mānuṣaiḥ pūjyaḥ sa daiva brāhmaṇa ādibhiḥ uvāca sākṣāt brahma mayam viddhi dharma kāma artha mokṣa dam mayūkhaiḥ nirmalaiḥ kūṭam ati caṇḍam su duḥsaham dṛṣṭvā pradudruvuḥ lokāḥ karaiḥ ca ṇḍaiḥ prapīḍitāḥ tatas ca sāgarāḥ sarve vara nadyaḥ nada ādayaḥ śuṣyanti tavaḥ tatra mriyam atha śakra ādayaḥ devāḥ brahmāṇam samupāgatāḥ ayam rajaḥ mayaḥ sākṣāt sudhām śvas tanu madhya gaḥ etābhyām pālita ālokāḥ trailokye sacarācarāḥ divya upapādakāt eva atra eva jarāyu jāḥ ca eva ye iva atra eva udbhid ja ādayaḥ anena rakṣitā ālokāḥ janitāḥ pālitāḥ dhruvam asya eva sadṛśaḥ na asti sarveṣām parirakṣaṇāt yam ca dṛṣṭvā pi uṣas kāle pāpa rāśiḥ pralīyate tam ārādhya jana amokṣam sādhayanti dvijātayaḥ asya eva maṇḍala sthām ca devīm sam dhyā svarūpiṇīm te ca āsya raśmibhiḥ sam dhyā upāsana mātreṇa akalmaṣāt pūta tām vrajet dṛṣṭvā cāṇḍāla kaṅgoghnam patita kuṣṭha saṅga tam mahā pātaka saṅkīrṇam upapātaka sam vṛtam paśyanti yenarāḥ sūram tepūta aguru kilbiṣāt na ca dāridryam na duḥkham na ca śocyatām ca deva hari hara ādayaḥ dhyāna rūpa pragamyāḥ te dṛṣṭaḥ devaḥ hi ayam smṛtaḥ ūcuḥ astu prasādana ārādhyaḥ ca astu upāsana pūjanam sarve nara ādayaḥ sattva amṛta avasthā aṅga tā bhuvi asya tejaḥ prabhāvena praṇaṣṭāḥ sāgara ādayaḥ na samarthau ayam soḍhum katham anye pṛthagjanāḥ tasmāt tava prasādāt ca pūjayāmaḥ yathā aravim devānām vacanam śrutvā gataḥ brahmakhageśvaram brahma rūpa dharaḥ sākṣāt duṣprekṣyaḥ pralaya analaḥ tvad ṛte sarva lokānām dina ekam na astijīvanam prabhuḥ tvam sarva lokānām trātā goptā pitā prasūḥ cara acarāṇām sarveṣām tvad prasādāt hṛtam jagant rūpa gandha ādi kārī tvam rasāṇām svādu tā tvayā evam viśveśvaraḥ sūraḥ nikhila sthiti kārakaḥ tīrthānām puṇya kṣetrāṇām makhānām jagantaḥ prabho tvam ekaḥ prayataḥ hetuḥ sarva sākṣī guṇa ākaraḥ tsukaḥ ca dāridrya duḥkha nāśanaḥ uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājṣa viśvendra viśvabhāvaka brūhi śīghram param yat te kariṣyāmi matam vidhe mayūkhaḥ tu ati caṇḍaḥ ca lokānām ati duḥsahaḥ uvāca te kiraṇāḥ koṭi koṭiḥ meloka nāśa karāḥ parāḥ na ca abhīṣṭa kara āloke prayogāt chindhi tān prabho tatas virim ravi vākya vaśāt dhruvam māhūya viśvakarmāṇam kṛtvā vajra mayīm bhrami amogham yama daṇḍam ca śūlam paśupateḥ tathā kālasya ca paraḥ khaḍgaḥ śaktiḥ guru pramodinī caṇḍikāyāḥ param śastram vicitram śūlakam tathā cakre brahmā ajṣayā aśīghram tena eva viśvakarmaṇā sahasrakiraṇam śiṣṭam anyat ca eva praśātitam ayam carati viśvām temeru śṛṅgam bhramati api sūraḥ sam carate māsān dvādaśa dvādaśa ātmakaḥ tiḥ sarvaiḥ eva pratīyate tāsu yat vā phalam brūmaḥ lokānām nikhilam mune dhanuḥ mithuna mīneṣu kanyāyām ṣaṣ aśītayaḥ bha sim he viṣṇupadī smṛtā tarpaṇam ca akṣayam viddhi dānam deva arcanam tathā bhavet tulakṣam mīte tūla paṭī dāna anna duḥkham jāyate tanau tulā dāne talpa dāne dvayoḥ eva akṣayam phalam sarva upakaraṇām śayyām yaḥ dadāti vimatsaraḥ varṇa mukhya āya vipra āyasa rāja padavīm labhet tathā eva agnim jalam būla mūrvyāḥ adhipatiḥ bhavet satya bhāvāt dvijam vrajet māghe māsya site pakṣe paṣcadaśyām ahar mukhe su lakṣaṇām ca gām maṇi prabhām raupya khura pradeśām sya su dohanām etām da tvā dvijāgryāya sārvabhaumaḥ bhavet nṛpaḥ tvāt na ābharaṇam bhojya annam brāhmaṇa id atvā akṣayam svargam aśnute dhānyam vastram tathā ābhṛti aṅgṛha pīṭha ādikam yaḥ dadāti dvijāgrya āyatam ca lakṣmīḥ namum ca ti cit dīyate dānam su alpam yat vā adeva arcanam stotram dharma ākhyāna pratiśravaḥ tṛtīyā māgha māsasya sitā manu tarā smṛtā tasyām yat dīyate dānam sarvam akṣayam ucyate dhanam bhogyam tathā arājyam tara sthitam tasmāt dānam satām pūjā apretya ananta phala pradā manvam tarā tum aghesyāt saptamīyā aśitītarā tithiḥ puṇyatamā proktā purāṇaiḥ akṣitā māgha māse site pakṣe saptamī koṭi bhāskarā tām upoṣya naraḥ puṇyām mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ sūrya grahaṇa tulya ahi śukla amā aghasya saptamī aruṇa udaya velāyām tasyām snānam mahā phalam tat merogam ca śokam ca bhāskarīham tu saptamī jananī sarva bhūtānām saptamī saptasaptike arka pattram yavāḥ puṣpam sugandham badarī phalam tad pattre tāmra pātra iva āyuktam ānīya taṇḍulam yajṣa sūtram sasim dūram da tvā ca argham su śobhanam sarva pāpam kṣayam yāti sapta janma kṛtam narakaiḥ pīḍyate etāvat rogaiḥ pāpaiḥ ca duḥkha daiḥ haviṣyam bhojayet annam śuddham ātapa taṇḍulaiḥ barjayet ca śilā ghṛṣṭam śṛṅgaveram tuśākakam tathā keśa kīṭa ādikam varjyam uṣṇa uda snānam eva ca anyat cana ācaret tatra dharmacim tām vinā avratī sauravratam mahā puṇyam purāṇaiḥ ditam ca mad bhogyam bhogyam labhate divi śāśvatam evam svarga kṣayāt deva rājā bhūmau mahā dhanī tathā svayam sukham bhogyam labhate divi śāśvatam mārogyam sampadam janmī bhāskarasya prasādāt mahā jayā iti vikhyātā yatra vijayā smṛtā syāt anantam syāt mahājayā bhedam uttama ābharaṇaiḥ yuktam sat vāham yaḥ dadāti ha samudraiḥ sapta juṣṭām bhūmim etya ari varjitām aśva hīnam capatra aṅgam vṛṣabhaiḥ vā api alaṅkṛtam hema māṣam dvi māṣam vā a dakṣiṇā vihita a budhaiḥ ratna bhāṇḍam mahā artham ca haimaiḥ eva kṛtam cayat tat svarṇam vā kevalam da tvā triviṣṭapa dhana īśvaraḥ svarga urvyoḥ īśa tām eti natam lakṣmīḥ vi mum cati arogī su prasanna ātmā adasyu jetā apratāpavān yāvat prabhāsate bhānuḥ tāvat pūjya tamaḥ hisaḥ māyām saptamīm kārayet satu iha abhīṣṭa phalam bhuktvā asuraiḥ ca eva prapūjyate arka aṅga saptamī vratam kṛtvā ca vidhivat budhaḥ pāpāt pūta ehā abhīṣṭam samprāpya muktim āpnuyāt lakṣaṇam ca pravakṣyāmi māsi māsi cayaḥ vidhiḥ divi māmadheya nakṣatre gṛhṇīyāt saptamīvratam puṃ nāmadheya nakṣatrāṇi etāni āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ paṣcamyām eka bhaktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam saptamyām upavāsam ca aṣṭamyām pāraṇam bhavet arka agram śuci gomayam yam phalam ca aśnu te mūlam naktam upoṣaṇam ca vidhivat kṛtvā eka bhaktam tathā kṣīram vā api aśanam ghṛta aktam iti ca proktāḥ krameṇa amunā kṛtvā vāsarasaptamīm dinakṛtaḥ prāpnoti abhīṣṭam phalam arka agram grāmāt pūrvottara diś gata arka viṭa pasya śākhā agra sthitam madhya pattra dvayam sa toyam dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam pātavyam madya aṅguṣṭhābhyām pala mātram dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam sa toyam pātavyam su maricam avraṇam apurātanam sthūlam avaśuṣkam ekam dantaiḥ a spṛṣṭam sa toyam pātavyam toyam brahma pitṛ aṅgulī mūla prasaram pātavyam phalaṃkharjūra nārikelānām anyatamam taiḥ a spṛṣṭam pātavyam ghṛta aktam iti ca āhāram mayūraḍim bha parimāṇam ātmanā dviguṇām chāyām yadā kurvīta bhāskaraḥ tadā naktam vijānīyāt na naktam niśi bhojanam tatas kuryāt vidhi ukta parimāṇakam sarva lakṣaṇa sampūrṇam sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitam mādityam ciṃ tayet devam pūjā kāle viśeṣataḥ tha mantraḥ ca ayam japyaḥ eṣa paraḥ proktaḥ saptamyām vijaya āvahaḥ bhū ca pāraṇā kāryā tathā aṣṭamyām viśeṣataḥ aṣṭamyām eva kartavyam navamyām na eva pāraṇam mahā vrate phalam na ca āpnoti navamyām pāraṇe kṛte pāraṇam tu aparāhṇa itu kaṭu tikta amla varjitam taṇḍulam śodhayet yatnāt tṛṇa bīja ādikam tyajet mudga māṣa tila ādīni ghṛtam ca parivarjayet brāhmaṇān bhojayet bhaktyā aśaktaḥ kṣīra ādi havyakaiḥ yathāśakti anna pānaiḥ ca janaiḥ ca nirāmiṣaiḥ dadyāt vibhajya ca anurūpatas imām ananta phala dām yaḥ kuryāt saptamīm naraḥ māsi māsi dvijaśreṣṭha vratam kṛtvā arka tuṣṭaye yaḥ kuryāt pāraṇam bhaktyā sūrya lokam sa gacchati kalpa koṭim vaset svarga itas yāti parām gatim bhāṣitam śam bhunā purā ha tasya vratasya paripālanāt śrāvayet vā api lokasya phalam tulyam prakīrtitam adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhagavan stvad prasādāt ca śrutam mepāvanam vratam uvāca maheśvaram bravīt vāra ādeḥ yat phalam nātha śrotum icchāmi tattvāt uvāca nakta āhāram haviṣyām kṛtvā svarga anna hīyate saptamyāḥ ca sat ācāram sarvam eva arkavāsare kurvataḥ prītim āpnoti sa gaṇaḥ parameśvaraḥ śūrasya sadṛśam yāti tithi vārasya pālanāt sarva kāma pradam puṇyam aiśvaryam roga nāśanam svarga dam mokṣa dam puṇyam raveḥ vārevratam hitam ravi vāra eṇa saṃkrām tyā saptamyā tad dineśive vrajet prāṇāt ahata vaktreṇa niḥsārya maṇḍale nyaset sarva rakta ābharaṇam dhyātvā a hastābhyām puṣpam vidhṛta saṅghrāya aiśānyām kṣipet mahi pradīpakam tatas japyam stutim mudrām namaskāram tu kārayet jaliḥ prathamā mudrā dvitīyā dhenukā smṛtā evam yaḥ pūjayet arkam ravi sāyujyam āvrajet raveḥ tasya prasādāt tumuktam vārāṇasī taṭe uvāca tvam devānām guruḥ ekaḥ tvam vyāpta rūpī maheśvaraḥ sarva jṣaḥ vara daḥ nityam sarveṣām prāṇinām prabhuḥ te kutas nātha tathā krodhaḥ viśeṣataḥ hi uvāca lokānām ca hita arthāya pṛthak bhūtā ayuge yuge sarvam kurmaḥ vayam putra brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ na asmākam bandha mokṣau cana akāryam kāryam eva vā ditaḥ māse māse tutapati ekaḥ dvādaśa tām vrajet mitraḥ mārgaśire māsi paupe viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ varuṇaḥ māgha māsa itu sūryaḥ vai phālguna itathā caitre māsi tapet bhānuḥ vaiśākhe tāpanaḥ smṛtaḥ māse tapet indraḥ āṣāḍhe tapateḥ raviḥ hiraṇyaretas āśvayuji kārtti ketu divākaraḥ iti ete dvādaśā ādityām āsi māsi prakīrtitāḥ ururūpā mahā tejā āyuṅgām tā anala varcasaḥ akṣayam labhate svargam sukham rājyam yaśaḥ kramāt ūm ṃ namaḥ sahasrabāhave ādityāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ timira nāśāya śrī sūryāya namaḥ namaḥ tvam ca brahmā tvam ca viṣṇuḥ rudraḥ tvam ca namaḥ namaḥ sarvagaḥ sarva bhūteṣu na hi kim cit tvayā avinā mādityaḥ bhāskaraḥ sūryaḥ arkaḥ bhānuḥ divākaraḥ ca svayam bhūḥ timirāśaḥ ca dvādaśaḥ parikīrtitaḥ nāmāni etāni sūryasya aśuciḥ yaḥ tu paṭhet naraḥ sarva pāpāt ca rogāt ca muktaḥ yāti parām gatim sadūra aruṇa vigrahāḥ yāni nāmāni mukhyāni tat śṛṇuṣva ṣaḍānana loka sākṣī tri lokeṣu vyoma adhipaḥ divākaraḥ agni garbhaḥ mahā vipraḥ svargaḥ sapta aśva vāhanaḥ priyam puṇḍarīkam mūlasthānam ca bhāvitam śṛṇu kārttika yatnena sarva pāpa haram śubham ūm ṃ indrāya namaḥ ūm ṃ viṣṇave namaḥ ca eva sarva vighna vināśanaḥ nāśayet sarva rogān ca lūtā visphoṭaka ādikān ca ye rogāḥ ca eva dāruṇāḥ tryahikam ca jvaram cāturthikam tathā kuṣṭham rogam kṣayam rogam kukṣi rogam jvaram tathā ca nānā roga āmayān s tathā sambhavāḥ mardayantaḥ mahā rogāḥ amardita avedanā ātmakāḥ mūlamantram pravakṣyāmi sarva kāma artha sādhakam bhavet sūryāvarta udakam yaḥ tu gṛhītvā tu krameṇa tu abhakteṣu anapatyeṣu pāṣaṇḍa laukikeṣu ca japyam ānetum naśyanti rogāḥ krūra grahāḥ tathā tis iyam vatsa sarva artha pratisādhakā nāstikāya na dātavya a deva brāhmaṇa niṃdake prātar utthāya yonityam kīrtayiṣyati mānavaḥ śarīra ārogya kṛt ca eva dhana vṛddhi yaśaskaraḥ dehaḥ yasya tuṣyet divākaraḥ nityam eva ca yaḥ paṭhet ravi sāṃnidhye saḥ abhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt putra arthī labhate putram kanyā arthī kanyakām labhet vidyā arthī labhate vidyām dhana arthī labhate dhanam śṛṇuyāt sam yutaḥ bhaktyā śuddha ācāra samanvitaḥ puṇya sthāneṣu tīrtheṣu paṭhet koṭi guṇam bhavet tapasvinām ca viprāṇām devānām agratas sudhīḥ yaḥ paṭhet pāṭhayet vā api sura loke mahīyate ti tad nāma aṣṭasaptatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca madhyadeśe svarāj samrāj bhadreśvara iti śrutaḥ tu pūjayet nityam subhāvena sadā khalu tatas bhiṣaj prayogāt ca lakṣaṇam dṛśyate purā ca mantriṇaḥ saḥ bravīt vacaḥ uvāca n eka revi prāduḥsaham loka garhitam tasmāt puṇyam mahā kṣetram yatra tyakṣyāmi vigraham mad mad mad mad para loka hitāya vai ūcuḥ parityakte tvayā arāṣṭre dharma śīlena dhīmatā naṣṭam jagat idam rājam s tasmāt naḥ vaktum arhasi mantraiḥ mahā devam yatnāt ārādhaya prabho uvāca kena upāyena vipra indrāḥ toṣayiṣyāmi bhāskaram amedhyena atha kuṣṭhena loka an aṅgarhitena ca adṛśyaḥ sarva bhūtānām garhitaḥ asmi dvijātayaḥ kim kariṣyāmi rājyam ca kim syāt ārādhanena tu dvijāḥ ūcuḥ ākārṣīt tasya sūryasya parama ārādhanam ca yat phalaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ arghaiḥ akṣata ātapa taṇḍulaiḥ japā puṣpa arka parṇaiḥ ca karavīra karam jakaiḥ audum mahiṣībhiḥ tathā ca arghaḥ bhoginībhiḥ samam tatas sarvaiḥ taḥpura sthaiḥ ca sa patnīkaiḥ ca rakṣibhiḥ arkaśām tibhiḥ ati ugraiḥ stotra mantra ādibhiḥ paraiḥ tathā arkāṅgavratam ca anyat kṛtam taiḥ su samāhitaiḥ kramāt samām samāsādya rogasyām taṅgāt nṛpaḥ bāṇaiḥ jāyābhiḥ ālabhyam arka parṇa anya puṣpakam evam eva mahā puṇyam kṛtvā sarva jana priyam sam tuṣṭaḥ bhūpam āgamya kṛpayā ācā abravīt vacaḥ yaḥ te manasi vartate sarveṣām vohita artha āyasa anugaḥpura vāsinām uvāca sarveṣām naḥ param svargam tvad sakāśe bhavatu iti uvāca amātyāḥ te dvijāḥ viprāḥ sa dārāḥ sa paricchadāḥ navīna yauvanāḥ samplavam sura drumaiḥ su sampūrṇaiḥ prāsādaiḥ druma kalpakaiḥ pramadābhiḥ mahā bhāga nṛtya gīta ādibhiḥ paraiḥ paṣca kalpām tareḥ ājām anu ādau tvam bhaviṣyasi amīte manuja abhūpa pura sthāḥ ca purodhasaḥ tathā a janapada sthāḥ ca ca tatra kīṭa ādayaḥ ye ca te pītāḥ sa suta ādayaḥ evam eva nṛpā viprā munayaḥ śam sita vratāḥ sūra svargam yayuḥ drutam kaiścid abhyarthitam vittam putra dārāḥ tathā aparaiḥ sukham svargam tathā ārogyam bhāskarasya prasādāt puṇya kūṭam idam bhadram yaḥ paṭhet mānavaḥ śuciḥ śṛṇoti saṃyataḥ martyaḥ saḥ ubhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt pāragaḥ sarva pāpānām bhāskarasya eva saṃsadi bhavet nityam śravaṇāt puṇyavān dhanī idam guhya ati guhyam ca bhāskareṇa pracāritam idam yamāya kathitam kṣitau vyāsena kīrtitam ca bhadreśvara ākhyānam nāma adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ca sādhanam naḥ vadat vijaiḥ teṣām keteravi ādayaḥ teṣām kathantaḥ saḥ katham priyam mad kāle deśe tu samprāpte darśanam tat śiva aśivam uvāca mahā aśivam cakurvanti viśva karma kṣayāya vai sūraḥ kāla om ca graheṣu ca yaḥ ha ā kṛṣṇena iti mantreṇa mūlakena atha śām taye huyāt ājya yuktābhyām abhīṣṭa phala hetave mad sarva rogāṇām vadha bandha vimocane maṃśitam ca chāgalam dadyāt sūrāya ādityavāsare saptamyām ca site pakṣe paṣcadaśyām tathā eva ca paramam ca amaram sattvam ābrahmastam bamātrake sambhāvayiṣyate sam hārām taṅkramāt sarvam utpatti sthiti kāraṇāt māṇa sargejanānām sa pātā viśvacaraḥ tanau mūrṣa anta sthaḥ sadā candraḥ dvis aṣṭa kalayā yutaḥ aharniśam sudhā vṛṣṭim dehe varṣati adhomukhaḥ mahā sattva anumātrakāḥ urvyām sasyāni puṣṇāti tathā sthāvara jaṅgamān etābhyām puṣpavadbhyām ca dhāritam janitam jagant tayoḥ ārādhanāt puṣṭiḥ sadā puṇyā aparārdhakā sādhayet sarva kāryāṇi sādhakaḥ sarvadā aśuciḥ adhamaḥ māyuḥ tasya kṣayam yāti narakam ca adhigacchati niṣkalaṅka kalā ādhāra gaṅgādhara śiromaṇe prakaroti naraḥ yaḥ tu saḥ abhīṣṭam phalam āpnuyāt huklapakṣe tathā akṛṣṇe triyāmāyām viduḥ budhāḥ ūṃ ūṃ ṃ somāya namaḥ iti japya mantraḥ prabhātejapanīyaḥ evam yaḥ pūjayet somam śrāvayet ca śṛṇoti vā iti soma pūjā sye dadhi pūrṇe ghṛte śive svarṇe vā rājate vāre saumye kṛṣṇa bhave budham param bhavati saubhāgyam pīyūṣāt adhikam bhṛśam strīṇām ca puruṣāṇām cana daurbhāgyam kadācana rūpa saubhāgya kāma ūham dadhi pūrṇam ca bhājanam tad sya pātra stham dehi saubhāgya rūpakam dvijāya vākya pūrveṇa dadyāt vimatsaraḥ naraḥ śaktitas dakṣiṇā deyā tathā vastra ādikam navam bhojya annam sarva sampūrṇam tām būlam su manoharam puṣpa mālā ādikam dadyāt rūpa saubhāgya hetave evam yaḥ kurute dānam soma uddiṣṭam dvijātaye ca nāma aśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca udbhavam ṣam tu janeṣu ca prabhāvam vaibhavam tejaḥ śrotum icchāmi tattvāt uvāca sambhavaḥ devaḥ kujātaḥ pṛthivīsutaḥ sattva sthaḥ sattva sampūrṇaḥ śūraḥ śakti dharaḥ bhuvi tīkṣṇaḥ krūragrahaḥ devaḥ lohitāṅgaḥ pratāpavān anena bharjitāḥ daityāḥ kravyādāya sura dviṣaḥ daśā
