yogāt ca manujāḥ udbhijjāḥ paśu pakṣiṇaḥ uvāca śam bhoḥ eṣa katham jātaḥ katham jātaḥ mahīsutaḥ guru mayī āpta bhāva itu vat aniḥsaṃśayam mukhāt uvāca hiraṇyākṣa kula idhīmān asurāṇām ca pārthivaḥ haka iti samākhyātaḥ daityaḥ sarva surām jātaḥ viṣṇu varā deva jātaḥ viṣṇu parākramaḥ tena eva nirjitāḥ devāḥ sa indrāḥ kratu bhujaḥ kramāt andhakena eva ca naḥ hṛtam rājyam sukham makhaḥ tasmāt tasya vadha upāyā ucyatām tat vidhīyatām tad pīyūṣasya ca bhakṣaṇāt kurve loka hita arthāya śraddhām kāma samanvitām tyaktvā ekām pārvatīm durgām sthiram tatas kruddhaḥ jagatsvāmī tam cavaiḥ ūpya tām nayet evam uktvā prajādhyakṣaḥ śraddhām kāma samanvitām māyām ca preṣayāmāsatam prati tatas viceṣṭitaḥ kāmāt yoṣā anveṣaṇa tatparaḥ sva dārān para yoṣām cana apaśyat vicikitsayā dṛṣṭam ca himavat pṛṣṭhe strī ratnam ca ati śobhanam dṛṣṭvā ca pārvatīm daityaḥ kāmasya vaśagaḥ bhavat jñāna lopāt tatas durgām grahītum tām sacā icchati umā ca koṭavī rūpam kṛtvā dehasya ca ātmanaḥ īśvarasya anti tām sa sārasaḥ tatas kāma vicetāḥ ca unmattīkṛta cetanaḥ na jahāti śivām dhātrīm pārvatīm daitya puṃgavaḥ tatas dhyānāt samāgamya militaḥ pārvatīm dhavaḥ dṛṣṭvā tam ca sa daitya indraḥ pragataḥ tu svam ālayam ca śam bhum jetum samutsukaḥ gaurīm eva samānetum kāma mohāt acetanaḥ etat śrutvā tu tridaśāḥ gatvā tam dina īritāḥ tatra daitya ācāryaḥ hi ajīvayat bhuḥ tadā avākyam naṃ dinam nijagāda aha gaccha daitya ālayam vīra drutam eva mama jṣayā paśyatām sarva daityānām daitya indrasya acasam sadi bhārgavam tam durātmakam labdhvā āca asmad sakāśam vaivihvalam ca anaya kṣaṇāt tatas ūnam pārvatīpatinā īritaḥ kāvyam taṅkum tale dhṛtvā daityānām puratas balāt mānayam tam ca tam daityāḥ jaghnuḥ praharaṇaiḥ śaraiḥ na śekuḥ te rujām kartum na dinaḥ bala śālinaḥ devānām agratas ūnam cakum tale gṛhītvā ābhārga vaṃśam bhura surāṇām aṅgurum ruṣā dudrāva śaṃkaram tatra ghoraiḥ praharaṇa ādibhiḥ tridaśāḥ ca tathā ākruddhāḥ tatas vidyādhara ādayaḥ prayayuḥ samaram tatra daityānām ca bhṛśam ruṣā śātakumbha maya aṅgaiḥ teśaraiḥ vajra samānakaiḥ taiḥ tad gātra āṇi nabhām sica hatvā ca pātayāmāsuḥ kāśyapāḥ sura sattamāḥ jagant vyāptam mahā sainyam vṛtam suraiḥ sarvaiḥ śastraiḥ pratyayitaiḥ kṣaṇāt śūla uddhṛtaḥ api su ciram avinaṣṭaḥ atha namra dhīḥ nītvā akṛtaḥ bhṛṅgīḥ iṭiḥ dvijaiḥ tatas devān samābhāṣya śukram udgīrṇavan śivaḥ śukraḥ śivam samābhāṣya gataḥ daityān mudā anvitaḥ evam bhaumaḥ samutpannaḥ ūharām śobhū samudbhavaḥ daśa ādi ariṣṭe ca tathā gocare niṣṭa rāśi ge trikoṇe maṇḍale ca eva rakta puṣpa anulepanaiḥ putrān sukham yaśaḥ ca eva kim bhūyas śrotum icchasi uvāca etat vaḥ kathitam śiṣya adharma ākhyānam śubha āvaham dvijātīnām puṇya dam ca sam sevyam ca śubha īpsubhiḥ yathāsukham ca gacchadhvam kṛtakṛtyā mama ajṣayā evam viśrāvya bhagavān vyāsaḥ satyavatī sutaḥ nirṇīya dharmam vividham śamyāprāsam agāt suta apiśraddhayā avatsajṣātvāt tattvam yathāsukham mudā lokān dharmam ca upadiśan prīṇayan jagantām gurum nārāyaṇam muni varam draṣṭum badarikāśrame iti śrī padmapurāṇe prathame sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe bhauma utpatti pūjanam nāma ekāśītitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ca pūjanam kathaya adhunā saumyaḥ krūraḥ grahaḥ jṣeyaḥ śubha aśubha pradaḥ nṛṇām śara ākāram maṇḍalam harinmaṇi samaiḥ varṇaiḥ cūrṇaiḥ kuryāt tu maṇḍalam pūjayet tatra gandha ādyaiḥ puṣpaiḥ dhūpaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ dānam ca vidhivat kuryāt daśāriṣṭe ca gocare karpūrāḥ ca eva mudgāḥ ca harit vastram harinmaṇiḥ suvarṇam ca yathāśakti dadyāt bodhana tuṣṭaye somaputra mahā prājṣa veda vedāṅga pāraga iti stutvā mahā rāja budham bhaktyā samāhitaḥ prāpnuyāt nikhilān kāmān somasūnu prasādāt guroḥ ca pūjanam proktam paṭṭa sa ākāra maṇḍale pīta varṇaiḥ su niṣpannaiḥ cūrṇaiḥ ājan su śobhanaiḥ daśa agocarayoḥ dauṣṭye dānam dadyāt ca śaktitas caṇaka dvi dalam ca eva pīta vastram suvarṇakam puṣpa rāgam tuviprāya dadyāt ca ariṣṭaśām taye bṛhaspate sura ācārya sarva śāstra viśārada tuṣṭa bhava saumya umam ādhunā evam kṛta itu rāja indra sva anukūlaḥ bhavet guruḥ bhārgavasya api vakṣyāmi pūjanam nṛpate adhunā yat kṛtvā sarva kāma āptiḥ samyak pum sām prajāyate paṣca koṇam samuddiṣṭam maṇḍalam bhārgavasya tu cūrṇakaiḥ śveta varṇaiḥ ca vidhinā a su dhiyā kṛtam pūjayet bhārgavam bhaktyā naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ raupyam ca dakṣiṇā dānam yathāśakti prakīrtitam daśa ādi ariṣṭe ca utpanne sitam aśvam pradāpayet taṇḍulāḥ śveta vastram ca raupyam danam eva ca pūram ca sugandha āḍhyam deyam dānam dvijātaye bhṛguputra mahābhāga dānavānām purohita dānena anenasam tuṣṭaḥ bhava sarva asura arcita tasya tuṣṭaḥ bhavati āśu bhārgavaḥ kuru nam danaiḥ śanais ca rasya pūjā artham maṇḍalam canara ākṛti kṛtvā ācūrṇaiḥ kṛṣṇa varṇaiḥ pūjayet tatra bhaktyāḥ yaiḥ gandhaiḥ ca puṣpaiḥ ca vastraiḥ ca api tathāvidhaiḥ loham ca dakṣiṇā dānam piṇyākam ca tilasya ca dānam śanais ca suvarṇam ca yathāśakti dadyāt nīlamaṇim tathā sūrya sūno mahā bhāga chāyā putra mahā bala adhas dṛṣṭebhava śane prasannaḥ asmāt pradānāt evam stutvā aśanim bhaktyā ayaḥ ca dadyāt dvijātaye rāhoḥ varṇa ādikam sarvam śani vat maṇḍalam tathā sūrya ākāram samuddiṣṭam tatra pūjā arka sūnu vat gomedam sarṣapāḥ ca eva tilā māṣāḥ ca kṛṣṇakāḥ mahiṣī ca tathā acchā godānam rāhoḥ prakīrtitam bhava tuṣṭaḥ mahā bhāga dānena anena suvrata ketoḥ maṇḍala kaṅkuryāt dhvaja ākṛti su śobhanam śani vat sakalam pūjā varṇa ādikam nṛpaiḥ saptadhānyam samuddiṣṭam sa svarṇam ketu dānakam evaṃkṛte sva anukūlau bhavetām ca nṝṇām nṛpa pradadyātām dhanam putrān sukham saubhāgyam eva ca mantraiḥ imam devāḥ tathāvidhoḥ śaneḥ ca ketoḥ ketum iti smṛtaḥ ete mantrāḥ samuddiṣṭāḥ a grahaṇām pūjanejape evaṃkṛte nṛpa śreṣṭha anukūlāḥ akhila āgrahāḥ etat mahā rāja mayā samastam te samuddiṣṭam ihakrameṇa śrutvā naraḥ sarva śruta artha sāram eti īśvarasya eva ca saṃnidhānam idam pavitram yaśasaḥ nidhānam idam pitṝṇām ativallabham syāt idam ca deveṣu amṛtāya kalpate puṇya āvaham pātakinām ca pum sām yaḥ śṛṇoti iha bhaktyā madhu murana kāreḥ arcanam vā atha paśyet yā edam śṛṇuyāt nityam ṛṣīṇām caritam śubham santi tretāyām jñānam eva ca abhayam sarva bhūtānām nāstidānam atas param dānam pradhānam śūdrasya tu iti āha bhagavān prabhuḥ dānena sarva kāma āptiḥ tasya saṃjāyate tapaḥ puṇyam pavitram āyuṣyam sarva pāpa vināśanam purāṇam etat kathitam tīrtha śrāddha anuvarṇanam śṛṇoti yaḥ paṭhet vā api śrī mānsam jāyate naraḥ idam mahā rāja agādi tubhyam mahā pātaka nāśanam ca sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam idam rājñ mayā te prakīrtitam purāṇasya ādi bhūtam ca navadhā sṛṣṭi pauṣkaram dvijebhyaḥ śrāvayet vidvān yaḥ ca vai śṛṇuyāt paṭhet pādma purāṇe sṛṣṭi khaṇḍe purāṇāvatāre nāma adhyāyaḥ sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam samāptam bhavatu atha śrī pādme mahā purāṇe dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍam prārabhyate śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ xcuḥ śṛṇu sūta mahābhāga sarva tattva artha kovida sandeham āgatam vidvas dāruṇam buddhi nāśanam kecid paṭhanti prahlādam purāṇeṣu dvijottamāḥ paṣca varṣa anvitena api keśavaḥ paritoṣitaḥ nihataḥ vāsudevena praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavām tanum uvāca kaśyapena purā jṣātam kṛtam vyāsena dhīmatā brahmanā kathitam pūrvam vyāsasya agre svayam prabhoḥ tam evam hi pravakṣyāmi bhavatām agratas dvijāḥ saṃdeha kāraṇam jātam chinnam devena vedhasā uvāca śṛṇu sūta mahā bhāga brahmaṇā paribhāṣitam jāta mātraḥ sarva sukham vaiṣṇavam mārgam āśritaḥ mahā bhāgavata śreṣṭhaḥ prahlādaḥ deva pūjitaḥ viṣṇunā saha yuddhāya sa putraḥ saṅga raṅgāt nihataḥ vāsudevena praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavām tanum sṛṣṭi bhāvam śṛṇuṣva tvam asya eva ca mahātmanaḥ saṃgaram prāpya putra ādyaiḥ viṣṇunā saha vīryavān praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavam tejaḥ samprāpya svena tejasā purākalpe mahā bhāga yathā jātaḥ sa vīryavān vṛttām tam tasya vīrasya pravakṣyāmi samāsatas paścime sāgarasya ante dvārakā nāma vai purī śivaśarmā iti vikhyātaḥ veda śāstra artha kovidaḥ tasya api paṣca putrāḥ tu babhūvuḥ śāstra kovidāḥ yajṣaśarmā vedaśarmā dharmaśarmā tathā eva ca paṣcamaḥ somaśarmā iti pitṛ bhakti parāyaṇaḥ na vidanti mahātmānaḥ tad bhāvena tu bhāvitāḥ teṣām tu bhaktim śivaśarmā dvijottamaḥ cintayāmāsa medhāvī niṣkarṣiṣye sura uttamān pitṛ bhakteṣu yaḥ bhāvaḥ na eteṣām manasi sthitaḥ yathā jānāmi aham ca atha kariṣye buddhi pūrvakam sat bhāvam cintayāmāsa aṣjana artham dvijottamāḥ upāyam brāhmaṇa śreṣṭhaḥ tapasaḥ tejasaḥ kila cakāra saḥ api upājṣaḥ māyayā brahma vittamaḥ teṣām agre tatas vyājam śivaśarmā avyadarśayat mahatā jvara rogeṇa mṛtā mātā vidarśitā taiḥ tu dṛṣṭa amṛtā mātā pitaram vākyam abruvan mad śarma upari bhavam putram bhakti parāyaṇam yajṣaśarmāṇam āhūya eti uvāca dvijottamaḥ uvāca anena api su tīkṣṇena śastreṇa niśitena vai tat kṛtam tena putreṇa yathā deśaḥ śrutaḥ pituḥ samāyātaḥ punar paścāt pitaram vākyam abravīt yathā ādiṣṭam tvayā atāta tat sarvam kṛtavan aham samādiśam amānyat cakārya kāraṇam adya ca tam ājṣāya mahā bhāgam pitṛ bhaktam saca dvijaḥ niścayam paramam jṣātvā advitīyasya vicintayan vedaśarmāṇam āhūya gacchatvam mama śāsanāt mohitaḥ māyayā ādarśita anārī sarva saubhāgyasam padā mama arthe kṛta niścayaḥ pitaram tam namaskṛtya tām uvāca gataḥ tatas tvām devi yācateta atas kāma bāṇa prapīḍitaḥ evam ākarṇitam tasya māyayā avedaśarmaṇaḥ jarayā āpīḍitasya api na eva icchāmi kadācana bhavam tam rūpa saubhāgyaiḥ guṇa ratnaiḥ alaṅkṛtam kim kariṣyasi tātena vṛddhena śṛṇu mānada uvāca na īdṛśam mām vadeḥ devī pitṛ bhaktim anāgasam pituḥ artham samāyātaḥ tvām aham prārthaye śubhe drāṃ stvam sa maheśvarān mahā bhāga darśaya sva tvam ātmanaḥ uvāca mayā āhūtāḥ samāyātāḥ indra ādyāḥ sura sattamāḥ uvāca yadi devāḥ prasād nāme prasāda sumukhā yadi bhaktim pādayoḥ pituḥ eva me evam astu surāḥ sarve yathā āyātāḥ tathāgatāḥ tam uvāca tathā a dṛṣṭvā a dṛṣṭam te tapasaḥ balam uvāca dhanyaḥ ūha madyasam jātaḥ muktaḥ ca eva ṛṇa trayāt sva śiraḥ devi dāsyāmi gṛhyatām gṛhyatām śubhe śitena tīkṣṇa dhāreṇa śastreṇa dvija sattamaḥ tava arthe preṣitam vipra putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā etat śiraḥ saṅgṛhāṇa nikṛttam ca ātmanā ātmanaḥ te arthe dvija śārdūla mām eva paribhuṅkṣva vai tasya taiḥ bhrātṛbhiḥ dṛṣṭam sāhasam vedaśarmaṇaḥ mad vepita aṅga tvam āpannāḥ te babhūvuḥ parasparam mṛta anaḥ dharma sādhvī sāmātā satya samādhinā ayam eva mahā bhāgaḥ pituḥ artha imṛtaḥ śubhaḥ dhanyaḥ ayam dhanya tām prāptaḥ pituḥ arthekṛtam śubham evam sambhāṣitam taiḥ tu bhrātṛbhiḥ puṇya cāribhiḥ samākarṇya dvijaḥ vākyam jṣātvā bhakti parāyaṇam nikṛttam ca śiraḥ tena putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā dharmaśarmāṇam āha athaśiraḥ etat pragṛhyatām iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarmacarite prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tat ādāya mahātmā sauniḥ jagāma tvarā anvitaḥ dharmam ākṛṣṭavan ca eva dharma śarmā tatas tadā samākṛṣṭaḥ tu vaidharmaḥ tapasā tasya dhīmataḥ dharmaśarmāṇam āyātā idam vacanam abravīt kasmāt tvayā a samāhūtaḥ dharmaśarman samāgataḥ tapaḥ pitṛ bhaktyātavabhrātā vedaśarmā mahā bhujaḥ tapasā anena tuṣṭaḥ smi pitṛ bhaktyā mahā mate evam ākarṇitam tena su vākyam dharmaśarmaṇā vaivasvatam mahātmānam sam uvāca mahā yaśāḥ bhaktim pituḥ pāda arhaṇe punar prasupta vat mahā prājṣaḥ dharmaśarmāṇam abravīt kvasā devī gatā bhrātar kva sa tātaḥ bhavet iti yathā pitrā aniyojitaḥ tatas hṛṣṭaḥ dharmaśarmāṇam abravīt mama adya eva mahābhāga śirasā jīvitena ca sam mukhībhava vaibhrātar kaḥ nyomā tvādṛśaḥ bhuvi bhrātaram ca evam ābhāṣya autsukaḥ pitaram prati gamanāya matim cakre dvau etau tu gatau tatra pitaram hṛṣṭa mānasau dvābhyām tatra samāsthāya śivaśarmāṇam uttamam dharmaśarmā atadā uvāca pitaram dīpti sam yutam tatas hṛṣṭaḥ bhaktim ca na kim cit abravīt tam tupunaścim tām upeyivān viṣṇuśarmāṇam ābhāṣīt vatsam eva canaṅkuru indra lokam vrajasva adya tasmāt ānaya ca amṛtam anayā akāntayā sārdham sthātum icchāmi īṃ pratam sāgarāt yat samutpannam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam sādhunā icchati imām eṣā ayathā enām tulabhāmi aham tathā akuruṣva aśīghram tvam anyathā anyam prayāsyati vṛddham jṣātvā avamanyeta iyam bālā asurūpiṇī evam ākarṇya tat vākyam pituḥ tasya mahātmanaḥ ha tadā uvāca pitaram dīpta tejasam evam ābhāṣya dharma ātmā a viṣṇuśarmā a mahā matiḥ pitaram tam namaskṛtya punar kṛtvā a pradakṣiṇam tarikṣa gataḥ ca āsīt gacchamānasya dhīmataḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarmacarite dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca prasthitaḥ tena mārgeṇa praviṣṭaḥ gaganām tare sa dṛṣṭaḥ devadevena sahasrākṣeṇa dhīmatā udyamam tasya vaijṣātvā cakre vighnam sura adhirāj menikām tām menikām tām mama śāsanāt samācarasva āsya śīghram gatvā avighnam sumadhyame tathā kuruṣva bhadram te yathā an āyāti me gṛham evam ākarṇya tad vākyam menikā prasthitā tvarāt uvāca rūpa audārya guṇa upetā sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitā samupasthitā tīgītam vīṇā svara upamam tena dṛṣṭā viśāla akṣā caturā cāru locanā indreṇa preṣitā ca eṣā anaca bhadra karā bhavet evam jṣātvā jagāma atha sa tvareṇa dvijottamaḥ tayā adṛṣṭaḥ tathā pṛṣṭaḥ kva yāsi asi mahā mate kāmacāriṇīm menikāviṣṇuśarmāṇam prati uvāca priyam punar kāma bāṇaiḥ prabhinnā aham tvām adya śaraṇaṃgatā yāvat hi tvam mayā adṛṣṭaḥ kāma ākulita cetasā dagdhā atāvat eva na saṃśayaḥ tapta aprasāda sumukhaḥ bhava bhavatyāḥ ca prajānāminā aham ca etādṛśaḥ śubhe śivaśarmaṇaḥ kāma ādayaḥ mahā doṣāḥ ādau eva vinirjitāḥ bhaja viśāla akṣe indra lokam vrajāmi aham niṣphalā menakā jātā pṛṣṭā devena vajriṇā bhīṣām darśayāmāsa nānā rūpām punar punar yathā anala enasam dagdhāḥ tṛṇānām sam cayā dvijāḥ abhavam malayaṃgatāḥ tu ghorāḥ tā dāruṇa abhīṣika abhīṣika advijāḥ sa vighnān darśayāmāsa sahasrākṣaḥ punar punar tejasā anāśayat vipraḥ svakīyena mahā yaśāḥ evam indrasya api mahātmanaḥ nāśayāmāsa medhāvī tapasaḥ tejasā api vā naṣṭeṣu teṣu vighneṣu dāruṇeṣu mahatsu ca tasya kṛtān vighnān dāruṇān bhīṣaṇa ākṛtīn atha kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ viṣṇuśarmā dvijottamaḥ indram indra lokāt aham ca indram pātayiṣyāmi na anyathā evam anyam kariṣyāmi devānām pālakam punar tāvat eva samāyātaḥ deva indraḥ pākaśāsanaḥ tvad samaḥ na asti ca aparaḥ mama aparādham tvam tum arhasi sattama viṣṇuśarmā atadā uvāca devarājam tathāgatam tejaḥ bhaṅgaḥ ūna karttavyaḥ brāhmaṇānām mahātmanām tenasam mad tapaḥ prabhāvena anyasmai tvam mahātmane dātu kāmaḥ tusam jātaḥ roṣa pūrṇena cakṣuṣā amṛtam dehi deva indra pitṛ bhaktim tathā acalām evaṃvidham varam dehi yadi tuṣṭaḥ asi śatru han evam dadāmi puṇyam ca amṛtasam yutam vipram amṛtam dattavan svayam sa kumbham dattavan stasmai prīyamāṇena ca ātmanā evam vipram visṛjya ca sahasradṛś tat dṛṣṭvā vipra tejaḥ su duḥsaham viṣṇuśarmā atataḥ gatvā pitaram vākyam abravīt tāta aindrāt samānītam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam etat vākyam mahat śrutvā śivaśarmā sutasya hi sutān sarvān samāhūya prīyamāṇena cetasā pitṛ bhaktāḥ sutāḥ yūyam mad vākya paripālakāḥ evam ābhāṣitam tasya śuśruvuḥ sarvasam matāḥ naḥ jīvatām mātā āgatāya ayam amam diram nīrujā bhavanāt devī prasādāt te suvratā bhavān pitā iyam mātā janma janmām tara īpitaḥ uvāca adya eva api mṛta a mātā bhavatām putra vatsalā jīvamānā suhṛṣṭā sā eṣyate na atra saṃśayaḥ evam ukte śubhe vākye ṛṣiṇā aśivaśarmaṇā teṣām mātā samāyāta aprahṛṣṭā vākyam abravīt striyaḥ loke mahā bhāgāḥ su puṇyāḥ puṇya vatsalāḥ puṇyān putrān prasūyeta sā nārī puṇya bhāginī pitṛ mātṛ pratārakam prāpnoti mad jāne kīdṛśaiḥ puṇyaiḥ eṣa bhartā asu puṇya bhāj yasya vīryāt mayā aprāptā yūyam putrāḥ tatas adhikāḥ evam puṇya prabhāvaḥ iyam bhavam puṇya vatsalāḥ jātāḥ pitṛ bhakti parāyaṇāḥ ekaika śodhikāḥ paṣcamayāprāptāmahā śayāḥ yajvānaḥ puṇya śīlāḥ ca tapaḥ tejaḥ parākramāḥ evam sam vardhitāḥ te tu tayā mātrā punar punar harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭāḥ praṇemuḥ mātaram sutāḥ ūcuḥ su puṇyaiḥ prāpyate mātā asat mātā su pitā kila pravartitā yasya a garbha udaram prāpya su puṇyaiḥ ca pravardhitāḥ śṛṇudhvam māmakāḥ putrāḥ suvaram puṇya dāyakam mayi tuṣṭe sutā bhogān anubhum jam tucā akṣayān ūcuḥ asmān preṣaya golokam vaiṣṇavam dāha varjitam gacchadhvam vaiṣṇavam lokam yūyam vigata kalmaṣāḥ mad prasādāt tapobhiḥ ca pitṛ bhaktyā anayā svayā eva mukte tu tena api su vākye ṛṣiṇā tatas śaṅkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ garuḍa ārūḍhaḥ āgataḥ sa putram śivaśarmāṇam iti uvāca punar punar putraiḥ sārdham samāgaccha caturbhiḥ puṇya kāribhiḥ anayā a bhāryayā a sārdham puṇyayā a pati kāmyayā uvāca amīgaccham tuputrām eva iṣṇavam lokam uttamam kam cit kālam anena api suputreṇa aṃ tyena somaśarmaṇā evam ukte śubhe vākye ṛṣiṇā asatya bhāṣiṇā tān uvāca atha deveśaḥ su putrān śivaśarmaṇaḥ viṣṇu rūpa dharāḥ sarve babhūvuḥ tad kṣaṇāt api śaṅkha cakra gadā dharāḥ sarva ābharaṇa saubhāgya a viṣṇu rūpa a mahā ojasaḥ hāra kaṅkaṇa śobhā āḍhyā ratna mālā abhiśobhitāḥ sūrya tejaḥ pratīkāśāḥ tejaḥ jvālābhiḥ āvṛtāḥ praviṣṭā avaiṣṇavam kāyam paśyataḥ śivaśarmaṇaḥ dīpam dīpāḥ yathā āyānti gatāḥ te vaiṣṇavam dhāma pitṛ bhaktyā dvijottamāḥ prabhāvam su satyam somaśarmaṇaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarma upākhyāne tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kaniṣṭham vākyam abravīt uvāca amṛtasya mahā kumbham rakṣa dattam mayā adhunā tīrtha yātrām prayāsyāmi anayā bhāryayā saha evam astu mahā bhāga kariṣyeḥ akṣaṇam śubham daśa varṣa pramāṇam tutapaḥ tepeniram taram kumbham rakṣati dharma ātma ādivārātra matam punar sahi samāyātaḥ śivaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ māyām kṛtvā mahā prājṣaḥ bhāryayā sahatam sutam tasya bhāryā ca tādṛśā mām sapiṇḍa upamau jātau dvau etau māyayā kṛtau samāgatau hitau dṛṣṭvā sarvatas hi su duḥkhitau kṛpayā aparayā āviṣṭaḥ somaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ tayoḥ pādam namaskṛtya bhaktyā anamitakam dharaḥ bhavādṛśaun apaśyāmi tapasā abhisamanvitam guṇa vrātaiḥ su puṇyaiḥ ca kim idam vartitam tvayi dāsa vat devatāḥ sarva āvartam te sarva dātava ādeśam prāpya vipra indra ākṛṣṭāḥ tejasā tava te aṅga ekena pāpena gadaḥ yam vedanā anvitaḥ jātobrāhmaṇa śreṣṭhatanm ekathaya kāraṇam iyam puṇyavatī mātāmahā puṇyā pativratā sā katham duḥkham āpnoti kim na asti tapasaḥ phalam tam deva vat guru vatsalā sā akatham duḥkham āpnoti kuṣṭha rogam su duḥkha dam uvāca mahā bhāga yat ipuṇyam iha icchasi evam ukte śubhe vākye somaśarmā mahā yaśāḥ śuśrūṣām vā akariṣyāmi yuvayoḥ puṇya yuktayoḥ mayā apāpena duṣṭena kṛpaṇena dvijottamaiḥ evam ābhāṣya duḥkhāt vātayoḥ duḥkhena duḥkhitaḥ śleṣma mūtra purīṣam ca ubhayoḥ paryaśodhayat pāda prakṣālanam cakre aṅgasam vāhanam tathā saumaśarmā mahā yaśāḥ tīrtham nayati dharma ātma askam dham āropya sattamaḥ tarpaṇam ca pitṝṇām tu devatānām tu pūjanam dvābhyām api sadharmā ātmā asa kārayati nityaśas sam jṣāpayati su prītau dvau etauca mahā gurū nityaśas vastra puṣpa ādikam sarvam tābhyām nityam prayacchati bhāgaḥ tābhyām api ca pūrayet mūlam payaḥ subhakṣya ādyam nityam eva dadāti asau tayoḥ tuvām nityam somaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ somaśarmāṇam āhūya pitā akutsa tiniṣṭhuraḥ sana evam nānāvidhaiḥ vākyaiḥ niṣṭhuraiḥ duḥkha dāyakaiḥ atāḍayat daṇḍa ghātaiḥ śivaśarmā asat āturaḥ sam tuṣṭaḥ sarva dāsa upi pitaram paripūjayet īkṣate amṛtam mad kṛte ca api ānītam viṣṇuśarmaṇā puṇya yuktaḥ sadharma ātma pitṛ bhakti paraḥ sadā māpitasya eva bhaktim dṛṣṭvā avicim mayāvaipūrvam iti uktam suputram yajṣasam jṣakam mātṛ khaṇḍān imān putra yatra tatra kṣipasva hi mad vākyam pālitam sāhasam tu kṛtam tena putreṇa vedaśarmaṇā nimeṣa mātram eva api sāhasam kārayet punar aparam satyasam pannam prabhāvam tapasaḥ punar nityam samārādhane pi adhikam tasmāt asya kṛtā kṛtā bhakti bhāvāt tathā asatyāt na eva putraḥ praṇaśyati māyayā ca nija aṅge api kuṣṭha rogaḥ nidarśitaḥ śleṣma mūtra malānām ca ghṛṇām na eva karoti ca vraṇān viśodhayet nityam sva hastena mahā yaśāḥ pādasam vāhanam dadyāt śaucam ca eva mahā matiḥ duḥsaham vacanam me dāruṇam sahate sadā bhartsane tāḍane ca eva sadā abhīṣṭa pravācakaḥ evam duḥkha samācāraḥ mama putraḥ mahā matiḥ duḥkhānām sāgaram manye bahu kleśaiḥ tu kleśitaḥ apaneṣyāmi aham duḥkham viṣṇoḥ ca eva prasādāt vicārya manasā vipraḥ śivaśarmā mahā matiḥ punar māyām cakāra atha kumbhāt apahṛtam payaḥ paścāt tam ca samāhūya somaśarmāṇam abravīt te haste mayā adattam amṛtam vyādhi nāśanam yena nīruj bhavāmi adya prasādāt viṣṇuśarmaṇaḥ evam ukte tadā vākye ṛṣiṇā aśivaśarmaṇā samutthāya tvarā yuktaḥ somaśarmā kamaṇḍalum tam ca riktam tatas dṛṣṭvā hi amṛtena vinākṛtam tāparaḥ bhūtvā somaśarmā su duḥkhitaḥ pituḥ agre ca vṛttām tam kathayiṣyāmi aham yadā tatas kopam prayāsyeta guruḥ me vyādhi pīḍitaḥ su ciram matiḥ yadi me satyam asti iti guru śuśrūṣaṇam yadi tapaḥ taptam mayā apūrvam nirvyalīkeṇa cetasā tadā ghaṭaḥ amṛta yutaḥ bhavatu eṣa na saṃśayaḥ tāvat ca amṛta pūrṇaḥ tu punar eva abhavat ghaṭaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā aharṣasam yuktaḥ somaśarmā amahā yaśāḥ gṛhāṇa tvam pitar ca imam payaḥ kumbham samāgatam yānaṃkuru mahā bhāga gadān muktaḥ bhava aciram etat vākyam mahā puṇyam satya dharma arthakam punar akṣaram harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭā idam vacanam abravīt iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe śivaśarma upākhyāne caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tapasā a dama śaucābhyām guru śuśrūṣayā tathā tyajāmi iva aikṛtam rūpam mattaḥ sukham avāpnuhi evam ukvāsutam vipraḥ udarśayāmāsatām tanum yathāpūrvam sthitau tau tu tathā sa dṛṣṭavan gurū tau mahātmanau sūryabim ba upamau ubhau tatas sutam samāmam tri aharṣeṇa mahatā anvitaḥ jagāma nija puṇyaiḥ ca yoga abhyāsena sattamaḥ praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavam dhāmasa muniḥ durlabham padam viṣṇoḥ tu cintanaiḥ nyāsa dhyāna jñānaiḥ stavaiḥ tathā na dānaiḥ tīrtha yātrābhiḥ dṛśyate madhusūdanaḥ samādhi jñāna yogena dṛśyate paramam padam mahā yogaiḥ yathā vipraḥ praviṣṭaḥ vaiṣṇavām tanum uvāca aśma loṣṭa samam menekām canam bhūṣaṇam punar mad a bhāga a bhāga a bhāga a bhāga a bhāga a bhāga sa sarvān viṣayām tyaktvā ekām tam api sevate yoga āsana samārūḍhaḥ niḥ āśā ūniḥ parigrahaḥ tasya prāpta amṛtyu kālasya vā etadā somaśarmāṇam anti ke mṛtyu kāle tusam prāpte prāṇayātrā pravartinaḥ śāligrāme mahā kṣetre ṛṣīṇām māna vardhane evam vidhaḥ mahā śabdaḥ karṇaram dhraṅgāt tadā jñāna dhyāna vilagnasya praviṣṭam daitya jam bhayam sa tvaram ca eva tad prāṇa āgatāḥ tasya mahātmanaḥ tasmāt daitya gṛhe jātaḥ hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutaḥ devāsure mahā yuddhe nihataḥ cakrapāṇinā su dṛṣṭam vāsudeva tvam viśva rūpa samanvitam yoga abhyāsena pūrveṇa jñānam āsīt mahātmanaḥ sasmāra pūrvakam sarvam caritam śivaśarmaṇaḥ prāk aham somaśarma ākhyaḥ praviṣṭaḥ udānavām tanum asmāt kāyāt kadāpuṇyam kevalam dhāma auttamam prayāsyāmi mahā puṇyaiḥ jṣāna ākhyaiḥ mokṣa dāyakam evam evam tā kṛtāpūrvam śrūyatām dvijasattamāḥ evam tuca samākhyātam sarva saṃdeha nāśanam uvāca rurude kamalā sā tu hata putrā ca kāminī priyā prahlādasya mahā śokaiḥ divārātrau praśocati pativratā mahā bhāgā kamalā nāma a tad priyā rodamānām divārātrau nāradaḥ tām uvāca ha mā aśucaḥ tvam mahābhāge putra artham puṇya bhāgini bhūyas sva lakṣaṇa upetaḥ tvad sutaḥ ca mahā matiḥ na prakāśyā tvayā devi su vārttā iyam cakasi acit karttavyam ajñāna bhāvaiḥ su gopī aṅkuru tvam sadā kamalāyāḥ ca uda retu janma asya anuttamam punar prahlāda iti ca vaināmatasya ākhyānam mahātmanaḥ bālyam bhāvaṅgataḥ viprāḥ kṛṣṇam eva vyacintayat mokṣam mokṣam yāsi ati jṣān ātma avaiṣṇavam dhām ca uttamam sṛṣṭyāḥ bhāvāḥ ahi anekaśas etat vaḥ sarvam ākhyātam yathāpṛṣṭam dvijottamāḥ vijayam devatānām mahat kṣayam xcuḥ sam jātam devānām śabda dhārakam uvāca prāptaḥ eṣa mahā bhāgaḥ yathā puṇyatamena ca ati naṣṭeṣu pāpeṣu govim dena mahātmanā tatas devāḥ sa gandharva anāga avidyādharāḥ tathā mad etat sarvam avadhāryatām kurukeśava rājānam puṇya dharmāṇam tvam indram loka śāsanam uvāca mad loke mahābhāgā vaiṣṇavena samanvitaḥ tejasā a brāhmaṇa śreṣṭhaḥ cira kālam nivāsitaḥ tasya kālaḥ prapūrṇaḥ ca mama loke mahātmanaḥ tejasā avaiṣṇavena eva bhavatām pāla kohisaḥ tathā pālakaḥ dhārakaḥ ca eva saca brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ kāraṇāt adityāḥ tanayaḥ ca eva suvrata ākhyaḥ mahā manāḥ uvāca deva avijayinaḥ sarve viṣṇunā saha sattamāḥ kaśyapam pitaram dṛṣṭum mātaram catatas gatāḥ ūcuḥ jalayaḥ sarve harṣeṇa mahatā anvitāḥ harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ devān vākyam uvāca saḥ uvāca yūyam vaisatya dharmeṇa vartamānāḥ sadā eva hi āvayoḥ ca prasādena tapasaḥ ca prabhāvāt tobhavam tastudeva tvam ca akṣayam padam varam eva dadāmi eṣām bahu prīti samanvitāḥ amara anirjarāḥ ca eva akṣayāḥ ca bhaviṣyatha sarva kāma samṛddha arthāḥ sarva siddhi samanvitāḥ deva anāgāḥ ca gandharva amad prasādāt mahā surāḥ uvāca pūrvam putravatī bhūta aprasādāt tava mādhavaiḥ sarve akṣayāḥ puṇya vatsalāḥ madhusūdanaiḥ tvam mamagarbhā ivasan ca evabhavān danaḥ tvayā aputreṇa nityam dāmi keśava uvāca tavyam mānuṣīm tanum tadā aham tava garbhā iva eva āsam yāsyāmi niścitam yuge dvādaśake prāpte bhū bhāra haraṇāya vai tava putraḥ bhaviṣyāmi sarva śastrabhṛtām varaḥ punar te yuge tadā sarva daitya vināśa arthe bhū bhāra haraṇāya ca mad bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ idānīm kuru kalyāṇimat vākyam dharmasam yutam evam sambhāṣitam śrutvā mahā harṣa samanvitā tatas tāḥ devatāḥ sarvāḥ ājagmuḥ sva sthānam eva hi te sarve nirātaṅkā mudā anvitāḥ uvāca aditiḥ kaśyapam prāha ṛtum prāpya manasvinī cintayitvā akṣaṇam vipraḥ tām uvāca manasvinīm tasya puṇya kṣaye jāte viṣṇu lokāt dvijottamāḥ puṇya garbham gataḥ vipra adityāḥ tu mahā tapāḥ indra tvam bhoktu kāma artham satya puṇyena karmaṇā dadhāra sā devī puṇyena tapasā kila tapaḥ tepe nirālasyau anavāsaṅga tā satī divyam varṣa śatam yātam tapam devamātri tapam tyatha tapaḥ tīvram duṣkaram devatā asuraiḥ tatas sā tapasā tenatejasā ca prabhā anvitā sūrya tejaḥ pratīkāśā dvitīya eva bhāskaraḥ śuśubhe sā ayathā dīptā aparamam dhyānam āsthitā rūpeṇa adhikatām yāta atapasaḥ tejasā atadā tapodhyāna parāsāca vāyubhakṣā tapasvinī adhikam śuśubhe devī dakṣasya tanayā tadā siddhāḥ ca ṛṣayaḥ sarve devāḥ ca api mahā ojasaḥ stuvanti tām mahā bhāgām rakṣanti ca su tatparāḥ pūrṇe varṣa śate tasya viṣṇuḥ tatra samāgataḥ tām uvāca mahā bhāgām aditim tapasā anvitām devi garbhaḥ susam pūrṇaḥ sūti kālaḥ pravartate evam ābhāṣya deveśaḥ sajagāma svakam gṛham sā devī kāle prāpte mahodaye sa a putram yuktam dvitīyam iva bhāskaram subhagam cāru sarva aṅgam sarva lakṣaṇa sam yutam catur bāhum mahā kāyam lokapālam sura īśvaram tejas jvālā samākīrṇam cakra padma suhastakam drabim bānukāreṇa vadanena mahā matiḥ rājamānam mahā prājṣam tejasā avaiṣṇavena ca pūrṇam caṃ drāsi aṅka mala īkṣaṇam ājagmuḥ te trayaḥ devāḥ ṛṣayaḥ vedapāragāḥ gandharvāḥ catatas nāgāḥ siddha avidyādharāḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ saptatedivyāḥ pūrva apara mahā ojasaḥ anye ca munayaḥ puṇyāḥ puṇya maṅgala dāyinaḥ mahātmānaḥ harṣa nirbhara mānasāḥ kṣīra ādyāḥ sāgarāḥ sarve nadyaḥ ca eva tathā amalāḥ tatas maṅgalaiḥ tu mahā utsāham cakruḥ sarve sura īśvarāḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsarāḥ saṅghā gandharvā lalitam jaguḥ deva brāhmaṇa a vedapāragāḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ ca rudraḥ ca vedāḥ ca eva samāgatāḥ sa aṅga upāṅgaiḥ ca sam yuktāḥ tasmin jāte mahā ojasi harṣeṇa nirbharāḥ sarve pūjayam taḥ mahā ojasaḥ brahma ādyāḥ ca trayaḥ devāḥ kaśyapaḥ utha bṛhaspatiḥ marutvant nāma te punar maghavān ścabiḍaujāḥ tvam pākaśāsana eti api cakruḥ ca devatāḥ sarvāḥ sam tuṣṭa āhṛṣṭa mānasāḥ snānam tu kārayāmāsuḥ sam skārāṇi mahā suraḥ āhūya daduḥ ābharaṇāni ca evam mudam tatas prāpuḥ sarve devāḥ mahā ojasaḥ puṇye tithau tathā ṛkṣe sumuhūrte mahātmabhiḥ tapaḥ cakāra tejasvī vasudattaḥ sureśvaraḥ ugreṇa tejasā āyuktaḥ vajra pāśa aṅkuśa āyudhaḥ uvāca ugram samastam tapasaḥ prabhāvam vilokya śukraḥ nijagāda gāthām lokeṣu kaḥ nyaḥ na bhaviṣyati iti yathā hi ca ayam ca su darśanīyaḥ mahātmā asam prāptam aiśvaryam iha eva divyam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe devāsure indra abhiṣekaḥ nāma paṣcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pasya ca bhāryā anyādanuḥ nāma tapasvinī taptāsam prāptā aditimam diram rodamānā praṇamya eva pāda padma yugam tadā bhavatī śata putrāṇām guṇinām api bhāmini mātā tvam asi kalyāṇiśum bha ādīnām mahātmanām kasmāt duḥkham tvayā a prāptam etat e kāraṇam vada hiraṇyakaśipu rājā hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā balaḥ yasyāḥ putrau mahātmānau mahā bala parākramau sarvam evam ābhāṣyatām devīm virarāma manasvinī paśyapaśya mahā bhāge sapatnyāḥ ca manoratham paripūrṇam kṛtam tena devadevena cakriṇā yathāpūrvam varaḥ dattaḥ hi adityai devi viṣṇunā tathā idānīm ca putra āyatasya ādatta uvaraḥ mahā n kaśyapāt viśrutaḥ jātaḥ trailokya pālakaḥ sutaḥ kanīyān vasudattaḥ ca tasyāḥ putraḥ ca sam prati padam su duṣprāpyam devaiḥ sārdham bhunakti ca kasmāt padāt paribhraṣṭaḥ mama aputraḥ mahā matiḥ anye ca dānavāḥ daityāḥ tejas bhraṣṭāḥ katham sakhe tasya tvam kāraṇam brūhi vistareṇa yaśasvini tām ābhāṣya aditiḥ vākyam virarāma su duḥkhitā devāḥ ca dānavāḥ sarve sa krodhāḥ saṅgaraṅga tāḥ devaiḥ ca viṣṇunā yuddha idam aputra a nipātitāḥ tathā ate imāmakāḥ putrāḥ nihatāḥ śaṅkha pāṇinā nāśitam marditam sarvam drāvitam vikalīkṛtam mama putra amṛtā devī bahuśas stavanam danāḥ tathā ate dānavāḥ sarve harim prāpya kṣayam gatāḥ evam etam hi vṛttām tam ditiḥ śuśrāva dāruṇam evam ābhāṣyatām devī mūrchitā nipapāta ha hā hā kaṣṭam idam jātam bahu duḥkham pratāpakam ruroda karuṇam sā atha putra śoka su pīḍitā tām dṛṣṭvā āsa muni śreṣṭhaḥ uvāca vacanam śubham tena evam śocanti tvadvidhāḥ kasya putra ahisam sārekasya devīsubām dhavāḥ nāstikasya iha kena api tat sarvam śrūyatām priye dakṣasya api sutāḥ yūyam sundaryaḥ ca eva māmakāḥ bhavatīnām aham bhartā a kāmanā pūrakaḥ śubhe kasmāt vairaṃkṛta akrūraiḥ asuraiḥ ajitātmabhiḥ śokaḥ hi nāśayet puṇyam kṣayāt puṇyasya naśyati mad doṣa prabhāvena dānavaiḥ amaraṇaṃgatāḥ deva animitta bhūtāḥ ca nāśitāḥ svena karmaṇā evam samāgaccha sukham prati evam uktvā mahā yogī tām priyām duḥkha bhāginīm viṣādāt ca nivṛttaḥ usauviḥ arāma mahā matiḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ satyam uktam tvayā anātha sarvam eva na saṃśayaḥ mahā duḥkhena sam taptā akariṣye prāṇamocanam uvāca śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi yathāśānti rbhaviṣyati dhavaḥ kasya dhavāḥ evam sam saṃ dhomāyā moha samanvitaḥ svayam eva pitā devī svayam dhavāḥ anācāreṇa pāpena nāśam yāti tathā dhruvam prayāti evam narodevi na saṃśayaḥ karmaṇā asatya hīnena mahā pāpena mohāt prāṇinām nityasam sthitaḥ bījam su saṃ sthitam yādṛśam tu bhavati eva tādṛśam phalam aśnute tava putrāḥ mahā bhāge tapaḥ śānti vivarjitāḥ evam ca duḥkham sukham tathā havāḥ mātma karma anusāreṇa sukham jīvanti jam tavaḥ bhagavant tattva jṣā anena paṇḍitāḥ paṣcabhūta ātmakam kāyam kevalam sam dhi jarjaram mitram kṛtam tena sarvam devi sukha āśayā sarva gaḥ sarva darśakaḥ catvāraḥ darśitāḥ tomahaujasaḥ paṣcamaḥ śvasanaḥ ca eva pūrvāṇām mitram eva ca vā satān dṛṣṭvā mahātmā vaijñānam ātmā samabravīt parasparam etān gatvā bravīhi tvam yūyam ke iti pṛcchaha hi tasya mahātmanaḥ tat āha ātmānam ārādhyam etaiḥ kim te prayojanam uvāca tomanasvinaḥ darśayāmi bhavyān etān pravakṣyāmi paṣcamām gatim āgatān dūta tvaṅga chabha jñāna kuśala u dūta karmaṇi uvāca tvam ātman śṛṇuma iva ākyam satyam satyam vadāmi aham eteṣām saṃgatiḥ tāta kāryā na eva tvayā akadā mad api śuddha ātman a kāryam śubham icchatā uvāca eteṣām saṅgatim jñān akasmāt vārayate bhavān tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi yāthātathyena paṇḍitaiḥ uvāca eteṣām saṅga mātrāt tu mahat duḥkham bhaviṣyati kārakāḥ jñānam ābhāṣya sahya ātma adhyānena saha saṅgāt uvāca tatas tatas ātmānam eva tam buddhim ūcuḥ samāhūya saṅgaccha ātmānam eva hi dūta tvam kuru kalyāṇi mama ātmanā saha paṣcatattvāḥ mahātmānaḥ viśvasya dhārakāḥ śubhāḥ evam ābhāṣitam teṣām aṅga tvā āha ātmānam eva tam aham buddhiḥ mahā bhāga bhavam tam samupāgatā dūta tve mahatām pārśvāt teṣām tvam vacanam śṛṇu bhavat maitrīm samicchanti akṣayām paṣca ātmakāḥ kuru maitrīm mahā su dūratas uvāca mayā ācāryaiḥ ātman na eteṣām vaisamāgamam eṣām sam bhaviṣyati tvam katham karma kariṣyati garbha vāsam nayiṣyanti bhavam tam na anyathā vibho dhruvam evam uktvā atam ātmānam virarāma mahā matim tatas tām āgatām buddhim ātmā provāca niścitaḥ aśobhanau evam śrutvā tatas buddhiḥ teṣām pārśve yaśasvinī samācaṣṭa samagram tat kathanam jñāna dhyānayoḥ tatas te paṣcakāḥ sarve ātmānam pratijagmire yasmāt śuddhaḥ asi loka īśa tasmāt tvām samupāgatāḥ uvāca yūyam paṣcaivasam prāptā amama maitram samicchatha cakathayam prabhāvam cakathayam uvāca nāsikā gamanaḥ gandhaḥ same bhṛtyaḥ mahā manāḥ uvāca aham ākāśakaḥ aham ākāśakaḥ prāptaḥ mama kāye prabhāvakam śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi para brahma svarūpiṇam tara avakāśaḥ ca śūnya sthānā iva sāmi aham tatra amātya autukarṇaumeśravaṇa artham pratiṣṭhitau uvāca paṣca rūpeṇa tiṣṭhāmi karomi evam śubha aśubham sparśam sam śrayate guṇam sthaḥ sadā anityam pāka yogam karomi mama taram sarvam dravya adravyam pradarśaye śukram tvac sam dhi sam sthitam evam mayā ātma vyāpāraḥ te agre kathitaḥ paraḥ amātyam rasanām viddhi rasa āsvāda karām parām uvāca tugam puṣṭim kāyasya apikaromi aham buddhi yuktā mahā bhāga tasya abhāvena bhāvitā deśika svāmin kārya kāye smin hanti ūcatuḥ kārya akārya ādikam śabdam lokaiḥ uktam śubha aśubham śṛṇuyāvaḥ sva kāyasthau satya asatye priya apriye paṣca rūpa ātmakaḥ vāyuḥ śarīre asmin vyavasthitaḥ tare ceṣṭām teṣām jānāmi tattvāt śīta uṣṇam ātapam varṣam vāyoḥ sphuraṇam eva ca sarvam jānāmi sam sparśam saṅga śleṣa ādikam nṛṇām evam evam eva hi ūcatuḥ tam sāreya ani rūpa aṇi bhavya abhavya ani sattama yadā a prerayate buddhiḥ tadā apaśyau anā anyathā mad vasāvaḥ kāya madhye vairūpam guṇam iha āvayoḥ evam vyāpāra sambandhaḥ kāya madhye mahā mate kṣāram amla ādikam sarvam nīrasam svādu cintaye indriyāṇām hi sarveṣām buddhiḥ eṣā apraṇāyakaḥ evam paṣca samāyātāni driyāṇi priye śṛṇu svīyāni yāni karmāṇi kathayanti punar punar atha buddhiḥ samāyātā atam uvāca mahā matim mad vihīnaḥ yadā ākāyaḥ tadā naśyati na anyathā tasmāt tvam mām samāsthāya vartayasva mahā mate ahaṃkarma mahā samāgatam tvām preṣayāmi aham tena pathā yena iha gacchasi evam ākarṇya tat sarvam ātmā aprovāca tān prati yūyam paṃ ca ātmakaiḥ yuktāḥ sarva sādhāraṇāḥ kila mad ca ātmakāḥ ūcuḥ tiṣṭhāmaḥ hi vayam sarve prasādāt tava tatra hi etasmāt kāraṇāt maitram icchāmaḥ te nityaśas uvāca hi prīti kāraṇāt vāryamāṇaḥ mahā bhāgaḥ jṣānena api mahātmanā dhyānena ca mahātmā asau teṣām saṃgatim āgataḥ paṣcatattva samāyuktaḥ kāyi tvam gatavan prabhuḥ yadā garbham samāyātaḥ viṣṭhā mūtra samākule ca ātmakān uvācasaḥ bho bhoḥ ca ātmakāḥ sarve śṛṇudhvam vacanam mama bhavatām sam prasaṅgena mahā duḥkhena mohitaḥ mad ca ātmakāḥ ūcuḥ tāvat sam sthīyatām rājan yāvat garbhaḥ prapūrayet paścāt nirgamanam tevai bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ naḥ hi bhavān svāmī kāya deśe vyavasthitaḥ teṣām tat vacanam śrutvā ātmā aduḥkhena pīḍitaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe devāsureśarīrakathanam nāma saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca abhipīḍitaḥ mādhi vyādhi samākram tohāhā bhūtaḥ vicetanaḥ duḥkhena mahatā āviṣṭaḥ jñānam āha prapīḍitaḥ uvāca mahā prājṣana kṛtam tumayā tadā hyānena vāryamāṇaḥ pi patitaḥ moha saṃkaṭe tasmāt rakṣa mahā prājṣa garbha vāsāt su dāruṇāt uvāca mayā tvam vāritaḥ hi ātman kṛtam vākyam na ca evam e ca ātmakaiḥ mahā krūraiḥ pātitaḥ garbha saṃkaṭe idānīm gaccha tvam dhyānam tasmāt sam prāpsyase sukham garbha vāsāt bhaviṣyaḥ te mokṣaḥ eva na saṃśayaḥ tasya tat vacanam śrutvā jṣātvā ajñānasya tattva tām dhyānam āhūya provāca śrūyatām vacanam mama tvām aham śaraṇam prāptaḥ dhyānam ām rakṣa nityaśas evam astu mahā prājṣa dhyānam āha mahā matim etat vākyam tatas śrutvā ātma avaidhyānam āgataḥ yadā ādhyānam gataḥ hi ātma a vismṛtam garbha jam bhayam sat dvābhyām sahitaḥ tatra ātma amoha vinākṛtaḥ ca ātmakam vapuḥ sūti kāle tu sam prāpte prājāpatye varānane vāyunā acalitaḥ garbhaḥ prāṇena api balīyasā yoniḥ vikāsam āyāti catur viṃ śa aṅgulam tadā māsam śāṅgulaḥ garbhaḥ tena pīḍā vijāyate evam sam pīḍyamānaḥ tumūrchayā mūrchitaḥ priye patitaḥ bhūmi bhāge tu jñāna dhyāna samanvitaḥ prājāpatyena divyena vāyunā sapṛthakkṛtaḥ bhūmi saṃ sparśa mātreṇa jñāna dhyāne tu vismṛte sam sāra bandhasam digdha ātma apriya tayā āsthitaḥ samanvitaḥ evam sam puṣyamāṇaḥ tu ātmāpam ca ātmakaiḥ saha nyāpitaḥ ūhīm sarvaiḥ viṣayaiḥ pāpa kāribhiḥ dhavānām tathā eva ca calitum calitum calitum na eva śakta usti tathā ātmā āsīt prabam jñāna vijñāna vibhraṣṭaḥ rāga dveṣa ādibhiḥ hataḥ prakṛtyā akarmaṇā abaddhaḥ mahā mūḍhaḥ vyajāyata uvāca evam mūḍhaḥ yat ātmā asau kāma krodha vaśaṅgāt lobha rāga ādibhiḥ sarvaiḥ vyāpṛtaḥ taiḥ durātmabhiḥ iyam bhāryā ahi ayam putra edam mitram idaṅgṛham evam sam sāra jālena mahā mohena bam jarayā avyādhibhiḥ ca eva saṃgrastaḥ ca ādhibhiḥ tathā evam ātmā āsam prataptaḥ duḥkha mohaiḥ su dāruṇaiḥ abhimānaiḥ māna bhaṅgaiḥ nānā duḥkhaiḥ ca khaṇḍitaḥ vṛddha tvena tathā devi śabala tvena pīḍitaḥ duḥkham cintayate nityam hāhā bhūtaḥ vicetanaḥ vaikalyena tathā aṅgānām vyāptaḥ devi dinedine sam sāre bhramamāṇena vairāgyam tatra darśitam tam tuṣṭam eva ca etāsām hi gataḥ madhyena bibheṣi anāvṛtaḥ uvāca indriya artha vaśevartī maryādā parivarjitaḥ uvāca puruṣasya niścitam vīta rāgaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ tam uvāca mahā matiḥ kleśitam sarva bhāvaiḥ ca teṣu teṣu parityajet atha lajjām pravakṣyāmi manas yā nirviśati alam paścāttāpa isusam līnaḥ sā alajjā parikathyate ekaḥ ca puruṣaḥ divyaḥ kasya kim cit nanāśayet atha lokān pravakṣyāmi ye tvayā parikīrtitāḥ yathā ca nidhāpayet bhrāmayitvā tu sūtreṇa nānā bhedān prakāśayet bhāṇḍānām tu sahasrāṇi sva icchayā mati sam sthitaḥ tathā ayam sṛjate dhātā nānā rūpāṇinā anyathā paścāt vināśam āyānti yena kena api hetunā sarva daiva sthitāya ca ye lokāḥ ca sanātanāḥ teṣām lajjā prakartavya anāvartam ākāśa vāyu tejām si pṛthvī cāpa śca paṣcamaḥ sthitāḥ sattvānām aṅga deśa iṣu paṣca etad iṣu su sam sthitāḥ strīṇām rūpam pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām sthāvareṣu ca sarveṣu jaṅgameṣu tathā bhavān bābhyām hṛd mām sasya adhikā avṛddhiḥ dṛṣṭā ca atra na saṃśayaḥ moha rūpam vidarśitam na bhavati eva sā nārī yā tvayā parikīrtitā līlayā akuruta idhātā vinodāya sat ātmanaḥ yathā anāryāḥ tathā pum saḥ jīvaḥ sarvatrasam sthitaḥ bhavān prakṛti sam yuktaḥ puruṣeṣu pradṛśyate kaḥ kasya kurute lajjām eva jṣātvā asukham vraja pravakṣyāmi sadā varānane tvacā ajarjaratām yātā ayasyā api aṅge vara ānane śvetaiḥ ca iva tathā keśaiḥ palitaiḥ ca samākulā bala hīnā atha dīnā api vyāpitā āvalinā tadā na iyam vṛddhā bhavet nārī param vṛddhā ca kathyate etasya alakṣaṇam proktam yuvatīm pravadāmi aham jṣā anena vardhate nityam jīva pārśve samāśritā proktā asau ṛddhāyuvatī iti ca nārī puruṣa lokeṣu sarva daiva pratiṣṭhitā mātaram vai pravakṣyāmi yā tvayā a parikīrtitā prāṇinām aṅga deśa iṣu sadā eva cetanā sthitā para jñāna pradāya ācasā prajṣā parikathyate prajṣā mātā samākhyātā a prāṇinām pālana ayasā sam sthitā sarva loka iṣu poṣaṇāya hitāya vā sumatiḥ nāma yā proktā sā mātā parikathyate sam sāra dvāra mārgāṇi yā nirūpāṇi nityaśas bhavanti mātaraḥ hi etāḥ bahu duḥkha pradarśakāḥ mātṛ rūpam samākhyātam anya tiṅkatevadāmi aham uvāca bhavān kohisam āyātaḥ mamasam tāpa nāśakaḥ vistareṇa samākhyāhi svarūpam ātmanaḥ svayam uvāca yasmāt kāmāḥ nivartam te nirāśāḥ sarve eva te yam duṣṭa tvāt na paśyanti karmāṇi etāni na anyathā yad samīpam hina āyāti āśā ca eva kadācana vīta rāgaḥ asmi bhadram dhavaḥ uvāca kīdṛśaḥ asau tava bhrātā avivekaḥ nāma nāmnaḥ tasya tvam lakṣaṇam brūhi bhrātuḥ ātmanaḥ eva ca uvāca tasya eva lakṣaṇam rūpam navadāmi te agratas bhrātuḥ tasya mahā bhāga āhvānam cakaromi aham bho bho vivekame bhrātar āvayoḥ tvam vacaḥ śṛṇu uvāca śānti kṣamābhyām sam yuktaḥ bhāryābhyām ca samāgataḥ sarva dṛś sarva go vyāpī sarva tattva parāyaṇaḥ dehānām ca sarveṣām yaḥ ripuḥ jñāna vatsalaḥ dhāraṇā dhīḥ ca dveputryau tasya eva hi mahātmanaḥ tasya yogaḥ sutaḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ mokṣaḥ yasya mahā guruḥ nirmalaḥ nirahaṃkāraḥ nirāśaḥ niṣparigrahaḥ sarva velā prasanna ātma āgata dvam dvaḥ mahā matiḥ sa vivekaḥ samāyātaḥ guṇa ratnaiḥ vibhūṣitaḥ samāyuktaḥ sa vivekaḥ samāgataḥ uvāca idam āhūtaḥ aham samāgataḥ tad bhrātar kāraṇam sarvam kathyatām himama agratas yam āśritya tvayā adya eva kṛtam āhvānam eva mama uvāca pumān sthitaḥ yaḥ puratas mahā pāśaiḥ tritaḥ mohasya bāṇaiḥ taḥ sam sārasya ca bandhanaiḥ sarvasya vyāpakaḥ svāmī ayam ātmā amamā eva ca tattvaiḥ samāviṣṭaḥ jñāna dhyāna vivarjitaḥ pṛcchatām enam ātmānam bhavān tattva iṣu paṇḍitaḥ hīta rāga vacaḥ śrutvā avivekaḥ vākyam abravīt bhuktam sukham svayam uvāca garbha vāsaḥ mahat duḥkham asahyam dāruṇam mayā bhuktam eva mahā prājṣa jñāna hīnena vai sadā dehe pi jñāna vibhraṣṭaḥ saḥ ham jātaḥ hi anekadhā mayā tāruṇyena kṛtā ākrīḍā bhuktā bhāryā hi anekaśas taptaḥ putra śoka ādibhiḥ tathā divārātraumahā dāmisukham kvacid evam duḥkha aisusam taptaḥ asmāt sam sāra jāla oghān mocaya adya su bandhanāt enam gaccha mahātmānam vīta rāgam sukha pradam niḥ saṃśayam tvayā adṛṣṭam nagnam ācāra varjitam nāśakaḥ evam ākarṇya śuddha ātma avīta rāgam gataḥ punar tam uvāca śvasan dīnaḥ śrūyatām vacanam mama tam mārgam mama darśaya punar gaccha vivekam hi sukha vārttā kṛtā tvayā vīta rāgeṇa puṇyena preṣitaḥ gatavan prabhuḥ tam uvāca mahātmānam vivekam śuddha sattamam sukham hi vīta rāgeṇa preṣitaḥ bhavat śaraṇam āpannaḥ urakṣasam sāra dāruṇāt vadiṣyati ha ātmā tathā uktaḥ saṃ prāptaḥ yatra jñānam pratiṣṭhitam bho bho jñāna mahā tejaḥ sarva bhāva pradarśaka haraṇam tvām aham prāptaḥ sukha mārgam pradarśaya uvāca te loka īśa tvam mām mayā adhyānena vaipūrvam vāritaḥ tvam punar punar ca ātmakānām saṅgena āpadam prāptavan bhavān ca sthitaḥ bhavat śaraṇam āyātam mām eva parirakṣaya evam sambhāṣitam tasya dhyānam ākarṇya tad vacaḥ uvāca punar ca āpitam ātmānam prahṛṣṭavān ātmavān stvam sthiraḥ bhūtvā nirātaṅkaḥ vikalpitaḥ tathā doṣān prajvalitvā anirvāṇam hi prayāsyati ekām tasthaḥ nirāhāra umita āśībhava sarvadā sam prāpsyase paramam sthānam tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe adhyātma varṇane aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca evam sambodhitaḥ tatra ātma dhyāna ādikaiḥ tadā tyaktu kāmaḥ sa tat kāryam ca ātmakam sa buddhimān nimittāni eva paśya eva prāpyatām stān prayāti saḥ nirlakṣyam patitam na eva paśyati evam mā ābhaja su priye thitaḥ ayam brahmā ayam rudraḥ hi ayam viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ ayam sṛjati viśvāni ayam pālayate prajāḥ sam harati eṣa dharma ātma adharma rūpī janārdanaḥ anena utpāditāḥ devāḥ dānavāḥ ca eva supriya devāḥ ca adharma nirmukta adharma hīnāḥ sutāḥ te dharmaḥ ūyam mādhavasya aṅgam sarva daivaiḥ ca pālitam tasya viṣṇuḥ sa dharma ātmā sarva daiva prasādavān yeṣām viṣṇuḥ prasannaḥ vaidharmaḥ taiḥ iha pālitaḥ bhagavantaḥ kāyam idam dharmam satyam hṛdayam eva ca yaḥ tau pālayate nityam tasya viṣṇuḥ prasīdati tasya viṣṇuḥ prakupyeta nāśayet ati vīryavān baiṣṇavaiḥ pālitam dharmam tapaḥ satyenasam sthitaiḥ teṣām prasannaḥ dharma ātma ārakṣām eva ṅkaroti ca adharmeṇa api pāpena vartitāḥ pāpa cetasaḥ sūditāḥ vāsudevena samare cakrapāṇinā yaḥ asau ātmā amaya uktaḥ pūrvam eva tava agratas saḥ yam viṣṇuḥ nasam dehaḥ dharma ātmā sarva pālakaḥ yaḥ svasthaḥ pāpam eva samāsthitaḥ tarebhū tvātava putrāḥ nipātitāḥ na eṣām mohaḥ tu kartavyaḥ bhavatyā vacanam śṛṇu kaśyapa ṣca muni śreṣṭham eva mā ābhāṣya duḥkhitā sam tyajya sam sthitā iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe sambodhanam nāma navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ xcuḥ tatas te dānavāḥ sarve hiraṇyakaśipu uttarāḥ yeṣām vṛttam anuttamam uvāca bhagna araṇāt tu te sarve bala hīnāḥ tu vai tadā bhaktyā praṇamyate sarve samūcuḥ kaśyapam tadā ūcuḥ devatānām mahā bhāga dānavānām tathā eva ca vayam ca dānavāḥ sarve bala vīrya parākramāḥ upāya jṣāḥ su dhīrāḥ ca audya mena samanvitāḥ tāta bala tejaḥ samanvitāḥ jayaḥ ca dṛśyate tāta deveṣu eva mahā have uvāca putrakāḥ hi vīrya nirvāpakaḥ tātaḥ mātā kṣetram idam sadā kim kuryāt viṣama arthe tu pitā putre ca vai tathā atra pradhānam karma eva mām eva buddhiḥ āśritā tapodhyāna samāyuktam sutāḥ tat proktam sarvadā eva na saṃśayaḥ balena parivāreṇa ābhijātyena putrakāḥ unnatā giri durga iṣu vṛkṣāḥ santi su putrakāḥ prāṇinām ca dharma eṣa suputrakāḥ adharmam āsthitam putra āyuṣmābhiḥ satya varjitaiḥ satya dharma tapaḥ bhraṣṭāḥ patitāḥ duḥkha sāgare devāḥ ca satya sampannāḥ śreyasā ca samanvitāḥ tapaḥ śānti dama upetāḥ su puṇyāḥ pāpa varjitāḥ yatra viṣṇuḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ jayaḥ tatra pradṛśyate teṣām sahāyaḥ sambhūtaḥ vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ yasya viṣṇuḥ sahāyaḥ ca tapaḥ ca eva balam tathā yūyam dharma vihīnāḥ tu tapaḥ satya vivarjitāḥ tapaḥ vinā mahā prājṣāḥ dharmeṇa yaśasā vinā prāpya āpya aindram padam putrāḥ tatas bhraṣṭāḥ bhavanti hi tasmāt yūyam putrāḥ samanvitāḥ avirodhena saṃ yukta ajñāna dhyāna samanvitāḥ evam vidhāya dā putraiḥ yūyam dhanyāḥ bhaviṣyatha parām siddhim tadā sarve prayāsyatha na saṃśayaḥ evam sambhāṣitāḥ te tu kaśyapena mahātmanā samākarṇya pituḥ vākyam dānavāḥ te mahā ojasaḥ praṇamya kaśyapam bhaktyā samutthāya tvarā anvitāḥ cakrire daityāḥ paraspara samāhitāḥ hiraṇyakaśipu rājātān uvāca atha dānavān tapaḥ ca eva kariṣyāmaḥ duṣkaram sarva dāyakam hiraṇyākṣaḥ tadā uvāca kariṣyet āruṇam tapaḥ tatas balena trailokyam grahīṣye na atra saṃśayaḥ vrajāmi evam na yujyate kartum yuṣmābhiḥ ditija īśvarāḥ viṣṇunā saha yat vairam tat vairam nāśa kāraṇam tam ārādhya hṛṣīkeśam sukham gacchanti mānavāḥ uvāca aham eva na kariṣye hareḥ ārādhanam kadā maraṇāt adhikam tam tumānayanti hi paṇḍitāḥ tam uvāca mahātmānam baliḥ pitāmaham punar dharma śāstreṣu yat dṛṣṭam munibhiḥ tattva vedibhiḥ rāja nīti yutam maṃ traṃ śatroḥ ca eva pradhānatas hīnam ātmānam ājṣāya ripum tam balinam dīpa chāyām samāśritya tamas vasati sarvadā sneham daśā gatam prekṣya dīpasya api mahā balam prakāśam yāti vegena tamaḥ ca vardhate punar sneham kṛtvā asuraiḥ sārdham dharma bhāvaiḥ sura dviṣaḥ pūrvam uktam sumam tram tu muninā ākaśyapena hi treṇa rāja indra kuru kāryam svam ātmavān tasya tat vacanam śrutvā prāha daityaḥ pratāpavān māna bhaṅgam tathā ātmanaḥ dhavāḥ sarve tam ūcuḥ naya paṇḍitam balinā uktam ca yat puṇyam devatānām priyaṅkaram māna karam proktam dānavānām bhayaṃkaram tapasā a nirjitya devān hariṣyāmaḥ svakam padam evam āmam tryate sarve nirākṛtya balim tadā evam te dānavāḥ sarve iti akta rāgāḥ su niścitāḥ kāma krodha vihīnāḥ ca nirāhārāḥ ajita klamāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe daityatapaścaryāvarṇanam nāma daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ xcuḥ idānīm śrotum icchāmaḥ suvratasyām ahātmanaḥ uvāca kathā prajṣā prabhāveṇa pūrvam eva yathāśrutā tathā viprāḥ pravakṣyāmi suvratasya mahātmanaḥ caritam pāvanam divyam vaiṣṇavam śreyaḥ āvaham bhavatām agratas sarvam viṣṇoḥ ca eva prasādāt pūrva kalpe mahā bhāgāḥ sukṣetre pāpa nāśane revā tīre supuṇye ca tīrthe iva amanasam jṣake kauśikasya kule jātaḥ somaśarmā dvijottamaḥ dāridreṇa sa duḥkhena sarva daiva prapīḍitaḥ tam tam uvāca tapasvinī tām mahā mate tāsamam eva hi tāyāḥ kāraṇam viprakathayasva mama agratas priyā vākyam samākarṇya somaśarmā abravīt priyām uvāca tam bhadrecim tā duḥkhasya kāraṇam tat sarvam tu pravakṣyāmi śrutvā ca eva avadhāryatām tathā putra vihīnaḥ ca etat duḥkhasya kāraṇam śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi sarva saṃdeha nāśanam lobhaḥ pāpasya bījam hi mohaḥ mūlam hi sadā chadma pākhaṇḍa śaurya īrṣyāḥ krūrāḥ kūṭāḥ ca pāpinaḥ māyā śākhā samāśritāḥ tṛṣṇā udakenasam dravaḥ priya yādṛśaiḥ ca phalaiḥ ca iva su phala ulobha pādapaḥ asya chāyām samāśritya yonaraḥ parituṣyate phalānām tu raseṇa api adharmeṇa tu pālitaḥ tasmāt tām tām parityajya pumān llobham na kārayet dhana putra kalatrāṇām ciṃ tām ekām na kārayet yaḥ hi vidvāḥ bhavet kām tam ūrkhāṇām patham eti hi su bhāryām ihavim dāmi katham putrān aham labhe punar caitanyam āyāti mahā duḥkhena pīḍyate sam sārena asti sambandhaḥ kenasā ardham mahā mate mitrāḥ cabām dhavāḥ putrāḥ pitṛ mātṛ sa bhṛtyakāḥ uvāca dhavāḥ dhinaḥ kecid kecid nyāsa apahārakāḥ lābha prada abhavam tyeke udāsīnāḥ tathā apare bhāryā pitāca mātāca bhṛtyāḥ sva jana bām dhavāḥ nyāsa apahāra bhāvena yasya yena kṛtam bhuvi nyāsasvāmībhavet putraḥ guṇavān arūpavān bhuvi yena eva apahratam nyāsam tasya gehe na saṃśayaḥ nyāsa apaharaṇāt duḥkham sada tvāt aruṇaṅgāt ca guṇavān arūpavān ca eva sarva lakṣaṇa sam yutaḥ svīyam dravyam samudgṛhya prītim utpādya ca uttamām yathā yena pradattam syāt nyāsasya haraṇāt purā duḥkham eva mahā bhāga dāruṇam prāṇa nāśanam tādṛśam tasya sauhṛdyāt putraḥ bhūtvā mahā guṇaiḥ alpa āyuṣaḥ tathā bhūtvā amaraṇam ca upagacchati duḥkham da tvā prayāti evam bhūtvā bhūtvā punar punar anena apahṛtam nyāsam madīyasya upakāraṇam dravya apaharaṇena api name prāṇa āgatāḥ kila tāsmi su bhṛśam ca adyakasya mama suta īdṛśaḥ piśāca tvam mayā adattam asya eva iti durātmanaḥ prayāti anena mārgeṇa duḥkham da tvā su dāruṇam evam nyāsam samuddhartuḥ putrāḥ kām vai sam sam sam te yatra tatra ca putrān pravakṣyāmi tvad agratas iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe suvrata upākhyāne ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ putram pravakṣyāmi te agratas maraṇam yasya gṛhītvā ayaḥ prayāti maraṇam kila artha dātā a sutaḥ bhūtvā bhrātā ca atha pitā a priyā mitra rūpeṇa varteta ati duṣṭaḥ sadā eva saḥ guṇam guṇam na eva prapaśyeta sa krūraḥ niṣṭhura ākṛtiḥ jalpate niṣṭhuram vākyam sadā eva sva janeṣu ca miṣṭam miṣṭam samaśnāti bhogān bhum jati nityaśas gṛha dravyam balāt bhuṅkte vāryamāṇaḥ sa kupyati xchātakarma ādibhiḥ bālye dravyam gṛhṇāti dāruṇaḥ punar vivāha sambandhān nānā bhedaiḥ anekadhā sarva eva hi na su khaṇḍaiḥ musalaiḥ ca iva sarva ghātaiḥ su dāruṇaiḥ mṛte tu tasmin pitari mātari eva ati niṣṭhuraḥ niḥsnehaḥ niṣṭhuraḥ ca eva jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ śrāddha karmāṇi dānāni na karoti ka daivasaḥ evaṃvidhāḥ ca vaiputrāḥ prabhavanti mahī tale pitaram mātaram ca eva krīḍamānaḥ ūhitāḍayet tāḍayitvā prayāti eva prahasya eva punar punar punar āyā ati sam trastaḥ pitaram mātaram prati pitaram mārayitvā ācamātaram catataḥ punar prayāti evam sa duṣṭa ātma apūrva vaira anubhāvāt atha atas sam pravakṣyāmi yasmāt labhyam bhavet priyam priyam kuryāt bālye lālana krīḍanaiḥ śrāddha karmāṇi sarvāṇi piṇḍa dāna ādikām kriyām ṛṇa traya anvitaḥ snehāt bhum jāpayati nityaśas yasmāt labhyam bhavet kām na saṃśayaḥ tvad ajṣa anena vidhinā kila udāsīnam pravakṣyāmi te agre priyasām te agre kathitam sarvam putrāṇām gatiḥ īdṛśā yathā putraḥ tathā bhāryā pitāmātā athabām dhavāḥ bhṛtyāḥ ca anye samākhyātāḥ paśavaḥ turagāḥ tathā hinaḥ tu amī gṛhītam na ṛṇam tena āvābhyām tuna kasyacid nyāsam eva nakasya api kṛtam vai pūrva janmani dhārayāva ūnakasya apiṛṇaṅkām taśṛṇuṣva hi evam tām anarthakīm kasya putrāḥ priyā bhāryā kasya sva jana bām dhavāḥ hṛtam na ca eva kasya api na eva dattam tvayā apunar evam tām anarthakīm kasya putrāḥ priyā bhāryā kasya sva jana bām dhavāḥ mahā mohenasam mūḍha amānavāḥ pāpa cetasaḥ anṛtam tasam sārasya hibandhanam evam sambodhitaḥ devyā bhāryayā apriyayā tadā punar prāha priyām bhāryām sumanām jñāna vādinīm uvāca śam icchanti sādhavaḥ satya paṇḍitāḥ tavaḥ ekaḥ tārayata ivam tāpa kārakāḥ sugarbhaḥ prāpyate puṇyaiḥ tasmāt puṇyam samācara uvāca puṇyasya ācaraṇam brūhi tathā janmāni apipriye su puṇyaḥ kīdṛśaḥ bhadrevat apuṇyasya lakṣaṇam pravakṣyāmi yathāpuṇyam śrutam mayā puruṣaḥ uvā athavā anārī yathā anityam ca vartate yathā puṇyaiḥ samāpnoti kīrtim putrān priyān dhanam puṇyasya eva vadāmi aham dānena niyamaiḥ ca api kṣamā śaucena vallabhaiḥ ahim sayā su śakti āca asteyena apivartanaiḥ yam yam cintayate prājṣaḥ tam tam prāpnoti durlabham uvāca kīdṛṅ mūrtiḥ tu dharmasya kāni aṅgāni ca bhāmini prītyā akathayam ekām te śrotum śraddhā pravartate adṛśya vartmā asatya ātmā an dṛṣṭaḥ deva dānavaiḥ tena dṛṣṭaḥ mahā dharmaḥ dattātreyeṇa vai sadā indra adhikena rūpeṇa praśastena bhaviṣyataḥ vāyubhakṣau nirāhārau sam jātau śubha darśanau daśa varṣa sahasram tu tāvat kālam tapas ūrjitam ca agniḥ sādhyate dvābhyām tāvatkālam dvijottamaiḥ tri kālam sādhitam tāvat nirāhāram kṛtam tathā tapasā ca eva karṣitaḥ atha dharmaḥ samāyātaḥ sva rūpeṇa ca vā etadā agnihotri sva rūpeṇa hi ātreyam hi samāgatāḥ sā acahya kalpanā etāḥ sarvāḥ samāyātāḥ strī rūpāḥ tu dvijottamaiḥ buddhiḥ prajṣā dayā śraddhā medhā satkṛti śām tayaḥ paṣcayajṣāḥ tathā puṇyāḥ sa aṅgāḥ vedāḥ tutāḥ tadā agnyādhāna ādayaḥ puṇyāḥ aśvamedha ādayaḥ tathā rūpa lāvaṇya sam yuktāḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitāḥ divya mālyām bara dharā divya gam dhānu lepanāḥ prati taḥ su rūpāḥ te tejas jvālābhiḥ āvṛtāḥ evam dharmaḥ samāyātaḥ parivāra samanvitaḥ tatra tiṣṭhati durvāsāḥ krodhanaḥ kāla vat tathā phalam uvāca sapta nāryaḥ pratiṣṭhanti surūpāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ ayam brāhmaṇa rūpeṇa sarva tejaḥ samanvitaḥ daṇḍa hastaḥ su prasannaḥ kamaṇḍalu dharaḥ tathā tava agre brahmacaryaḥ yam saḥ yam paśya samāgataḥ kapilam piṅgala akṣam ca satyam enam dvijottamaiḥ tādṛśam paśya dharma ātman vaiśvadeva sama prabham etam paśya mahā bhāga te pārśva samāgatam prasanna vāc dīpti yuktaḥ sarva jīva dayā paraḥ jaṭilaḥ karkaśaḥ piṅgaḥ hi ati tīvraḥ mahā prabhuḥ khaḍga hastaḥ dvijottamaiḥ abhiśām taḥ mahā puṇyaḥ nitya kriyā samanvitaḥ mayaḥ kamaṇḍalu kara udam ta kāṣṭha dhara udvijaḥ śauce eṣa samāyātaḥ bhavataḥ saṃnidhau iha ati sādhvī mahā bhāgā asatya bhūṣaṇa bhūṣitā sarva bhūṣaṇa śobhāṅgī śuśrūṣā iyam samāgatā ati dhīrā a prasanna aṅgā gaurī prahasita ānanā hastā iyam dhātrī padma netra asupadminī divyaiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ yuktā akṣamā prāptā dvijottamaiḥ yutā divya ratna kṛta aśobhā divya ābharaṇa bhūṣitā te śāntiḥ mahā prājṣa jñāna rūpā samāgatā para upakāra karaṇā abahu satya samākulā mita bhāṣā sadā eva asau a kalpāte samāgatā prasannā sā akṣamā yuktā sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā mad āsana asurūpā āsā śyāma varṇā a yaśasvinī ahim tā iyam mahā bhāgā abhavam tam taptakām canavarṇā aṅgā raktām baravilāsinī tā puṇya hastā tapasvinī muktā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyā anirmalā cāru hāsinī iyam śraddhā mahā bhāga paśyapaśya samāgatā bahu buddhi samākrām tā bahu jñāna samākulā subhogā āsakta rūpā āsā susthitā cāru maṅgalā sarva iṣṭa dhyāna sam yukta ālokamātrī ayaśasvinī sarva ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyā āpīna śroṇi payodharā sthitā haṃ sacam binī sarva ābharaṇa sambhūṣā su prasannā manasvinī śvetavastreṇasam vītāśata pattram tad karā a paṅkaja sthā rājamānā sadā eva hi eṣā aprajṣā mahā bhāgabhāgyavam tam samāgatā lākṣā rasa sama avarṇā suprasannā sadā eva hi mālā hāra keyūra bhūṣaṇā mudrikā kaṅkaṇa upeta ākarṇa kuṇḍala maṇḍitā pītena vāsasā devī sadā eva parirājate trailokyasya upakārāya poṣaṇāya advitīyakā yasyāḥ śīlam dvijaśreṣṭha sa daiva parikīrtitam sā iyam dayā asusam prāptā te pārśve dvijottamaiḥ iyam vṛddha amahā prājṣa bhāva bhāryā tapasvinī mama mātā dvijaśreṣṭha dharmā ūham tava suvrataiḥ eva ṃ paripālaya uvāca samāyātaḥ mad samīpam tusām tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi durvāsaḥ yadi manyase uvāca yena aham kupitaḥ deva tat idam kāraṇam śṛṇu dama śaucaiḥ su saṅkleśaiḥ śodhitam kāyam ātmanaḥ lakṣa varṣa pramāṇam vaitapaḥ caryā mayākṛtā evam tam uvāca mahā matiḥ mayi naṣṭe mahā prājṣa lokaḥ nāśam sameṣyati duḥkha mūlam aham tāta nikarśāmi bhṛśam dvija puṇyam eva prakurvāṇaḥ prāṇī prāṇān vimum ca ti uvāca tat sukham kaḥ vijānāti niścayam na eva paśyati tat śreyaḥ na eva paśyāmi anyāyyam hi kṛtam tava tad sukham kaḥ vijānāti ca anyāyam dharmam eva vā dharma śāstra uditam ca eva kṛtam sarvatra na anyathā samavalokayet yathā caurāḥ mahā pāpāḥ sva kāyena sahanti te duḥkhena dāruṇam tīvram tathā sukham katham nahi caranti hi pātakam tena pīḍām saham hi tad phalam daṇḍam ekam param dṛṣṭam dharma śāstra iṣu paṇḍitaiḥ uvāca evam nyāyam namanya iham tathā eva śṛṇu dharmarāj śāpa trayam pradāsyāmi kruddhaḥ aham tavana anyathā yadā ākruddhaḥ mahā prājṣamām eva hi kṣamasva ca na eva kṣamasi vipra indra dāsī putram himān kuru rājānam tu prakartavyam cāṇḍālam ca mahā mune durvāsāḥ ca tatas kruddhaḥ dharmam ca eva śaśāpa ha uvāca rājā abhavat vam dharmāt yad dāsī putraḥ cana anyathā gaccha cāṇḍāla yonim ca dharma tvam sva icchayā āvraja evam śāpa trayam dattvā āgataḥ asau dvija sattamaḥ anena api prasaṅgeṇa dṛṣṭaḥ dharmaḥ purā kila uvāca harmaḥ tu kīdṛśaḥ jātaḥ tena śaptaḥ mahātmanā tat rūpam tasya mama brūhi yadi jānāsi bhāmini bharatānām kule jātaḥ dharmaḥ bhūtvā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ yadā rājā hariḥ ca dro viśvāmitreṇa karṣitaḥ tadā ācāṇḍāla tām prāptaḥ sahidharmaḥ mahā matiḥ evam karma phalam bhuktam dharmeṇa api mahātmanā durvāsasaḥ hi śāpāt vaisatyam uktam te agratas śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe somaśarma ākhyāne somaśarma sumanāsam vāde dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kīdṛśam brahmacaryam ca yadi jānāsi bhāmini nityam satyeḥ ratiḥ yasya puṇya ātma atuṣṭi tām vrajet ṛtau prāpte vrajet nārīm svīyām doṣa vivarjitaḥ brahmacaryam mayā a proktam gṛhiṇām uttamam kila yatīnām tu pravakṣyāmi tat meni gadataḥ śṛṇu hi tu sarvadā bhāryā saṅgam varjayitvā dhyāna jñāna pratiṣṭhitaḥ yatīnām brahmacaryam ca samākhyātam tava agratas tat tapaḥ eva pravakṣyāmi tat mama nigadataḥ śṛṇu prāṇinām upakāra āyasam sthita audyama āvṛtaḥ tapa evam samākhyātam satyam eva vadāmi aham dṛṣṭvā amatiḥ nayasya syāt sa satyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ a dānam eva pravakṣyāmi yena jīvanti mānavāḥ grāsa mātram tathā ādeyam kṣudhā ārtāya na saṃśayaḥ tṛṇam śayyām cava canaṃgṛha chāyām su śītalām mad āsanam vacana ālāpam kauṭilyena vivarjitam devān pitṝn samabhyarcya evam dānam dadāti yaḥ prakuryāt mānuṣaḥ bhūtvā sa devaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ devānām brāhmaṇānām ca pūjāsu abhirata hiyaḥ upakāra iṣu puṇyeṣu niyamaḥ ayam prakīrtitaḥ pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām dvija sattama hisam sahiṣṇuḥ syāt sadharma ātmā an ahi rāgam prayāti ca evaṃkṣamā samākhyāta āśaucam eva vadāmi aham śaucam eva samākhyātam ahim sām tuvadāmi aham tṛṇam api vinā kāryaḥ chettavyam na vijānatā tam ahim sa anirataḥ bhūyāt yathā ātmani tathā pare eva prakṣyāmi śām tya a sukham samaśnute evam samākhyātā asteyam damanāt indriyāṇām vaimanasaḥ upi vikāriṇaḥ auddhatyam nāśayet teṣām hi śuśrūṣām tu pravakṣyāmi dharma śāstreṣu yādṛśī pūrva ācāryaiḥ yathā prokta tām eva pravadāmi aham vācā dehena manasā guru kāryam prasādhayet hi jāyate anugrahaḥ yatra śuśrūṣā sā nigadyate sadā evam eva vrajasvahi sarvam hi prāpyate ikām mahī tale bhāryāyāḥ tu vacaḥ śrutvā somaśarmā a su buddhimān punar provācatām bhāryām sumanām dharma vādinīm iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe dresumanas upākhyāne trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca evaṃvidham mahā puṇyam dharma vyākhyānam uttamam katham jānāsi bhadre tvam kasmāt ca eva tvayā aśrutam bhārgavāṇām kule jātaḥ pitāmama mahā mate cyavanaḥ nāma vikhyātaḥ sarva jñāna viśāradaḥ tasya aham priya kanyā vaiprāṇāt apica vallabhā sabhāsu ca munīnām tu devatāyataneṣu ca tena sārdham vrajāmi ekā krīḍamānā sadā eva hi kauśika anvaya sambhūtaḥ vedaśarmā mahā matiḥ pituḥ mama sakhiḥ daivāt aṭamānaḥ samāgataḥ duḥkhena mahatā āviṣṭaḥ cintayānaḥ muhur muhur samāgatam mahātmānam tam uvāca pitāmamaiḥ bhavam tam duḥkha sam taptam iti jānāmi suvrata kasmāt duḥkhībhavān jātaḥ tasmāt tvam kāraṇam vada etat vākyam tatas śrutvā acyavanasya mahātmanaḥ tam uvāca mahātmānam pitaram mama suvrataḥ yad as tad as mad bhāryā mahā sādhvī pātivratya parāyaṇā mahā amavam śona vidyate etasmin tare prāptaḥ kaścid siddhaḥ samāgataḥ mama pitrā tathā tena hi utthāya vedaśarmaṇā dvābhyām antargatam pṛṣṭam pūrva uktam ca yathā tvayā dharmeṇa prāpyate putraḥ dhanam dhānyam tathā striyaḥ tatas tena kṛtam dharmam sam pūrṇam vedaśarmaṇā uvāca ubhayayoḥ tetat sarvam tīrtha puṇya ādikaiḥ tathā divya rūpa dharāḥ bhūtvā gandharvāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tathā veda pāṭha samāyuktāḥ gīta jñāna viśāradāḥ tasya pārśvam samāyānti stutim kurvanti ca atulām tīrtham snāna artham dharma tatparaḥ mahā bhāga ica taḍāga ica yatra aśvatthaḥ uvaṭaḥ tathā brahmavṛkṣam ca tathā punar aśva sthānam samāśritya gaja sthāna gataḥ naraḥ aśokam cūta vṛkṣam ca samāśritya yadā āsthitaḥ sam nidhau brāhmaṇānām ca rāja veśma gataḥ uthavā raṇa bhūmim samāśritya pūrvam yatra mṛtaḥ bhavet mṛtyu sthānāni puṇyāni kevalam dharma kāraṇam prāpya tathā cāmarakam ṭakam evam sthānam samāpnoti yadā mṛtyum samāśritaḥ mātaram paśyate puṇyam pitaram canara uttamaḥ bhrātaram śreyasā āyuktam anyam sva jana bām dhavam tathā apuṇyaiḥ stūyamānam punar punar pāpiṣṭham na eva paśyeta mātṛ pitṛ ādikam punar gītam gāyanti gandharvāḥ stuvanti stāvakāḥ stavaiḥ tra pāṭhaiḥ tathā vipra āmātā snehena pūjayet matim evam dūtāḥ samākhyātāḥ puṇya sthānāni te vibho pratyakṣān paśyate dūtān hāsya sneha samāvilān tam māyate na atra saṃdehaḥ prasanna ātmā asatiṣṭhati jñāna vijñāna sam pannaḥ smaran devam janārdanam taiḥ sārdham tuprayāti evam sam tuṣṭaḥ ūhṛṣṭa mānasaḥ daśama dvāram āśritya ātmā tasya sa gacchati manoharam vimānam eva ca āyāti haya uvāgaja uttamaḥ bījyamānaḥ sa puṇya ātmā apuṇyaiḥ evam samam tatas tu dibhiḥ cāraṇaiḥ divyaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ vedapāragaiḥ yathā dāna prabhāvena phalam āpnoti tatrasaḥ ārāma vāṭikā madhye sa prayāti sukhena vai apsarobhiḥ samākīrṇaḥ divyābhiḥ maṅgalaiḥ yutaḥ devaiḥ sam stūyamānaḥ stu dharmarājam prapaśyati evam sa paśyatedharmam saumya rūpam mahā matim iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe dresumanas upākhyāne caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pāpinām maraṇam bhadre kīdṛśaiḥ lakṣaṇaiḥ yutam tat me tvam vistarāt brūhi yat i jānāsi bhāmini śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi tasmāt siddhāt śrutam mayā pāpinām maraṇa īkām tayādṛśam liṅgam eva ca mahā pātakinām ca eva sthānam ceṣṭām vadāmi aham viṣ mūtra amedhya sam yuktām bhūmim pāpa samanvitām satām prāpya su duṣṭa ātma aprāṇān duḥkhena amum ca ti cāṇḍāla bhūmim sam prāpya maraṇam yā ati duḥsthitaḥ pūrṇam āśritam pāpa kilbiṣaiḥ tām yāti su niścitam anyām pāpa samācārām prāpya mṛtyum sa gacchati mahā ceṣṭām pravakṣyāmi dūtānām tutam icchatām bhairavān dāruṇān ghorān ati kṛṣṇān mahodarān piṅga akṣān pīta nīlām śca ati śvetān mahā udarān ati uccān vikarālām sa vasā upamān raudra dam hāsyān sarpahastakān satān dṛṣṭvā āprakam peta khidyate ca muhur muhur nādavat ghorān mahā rāvān mahā mate mum dūtakāḥ hi baddhvā tathā udare nipātyam mriyamāṇasya yāca iṣṭātām eva pavadāmi aham para dravya apaharaṇam para bhāryā viḍam banam ṛṇam parasya sarva su aṅgṛhītam yat tu pāpibhiḥ ca yāni kāni ca pāpāni pūrvam eva kṛtāni ca mūlam te mahā pāpasya na anyathā pīḍābhiḥ dāruṇābhiḥ tukam ṭhoghuraghurāyate rodata ikam pate atyartham mātaram pitaram punar smarate bhrātaram tatrabhāryām putrān punar punar punar vismaraṇam yāti mahā pāpena mohitaḥ tasya prāṇān agacchanti bahu pīḍā samākulāḥ evam pīḍā samāyuktaḥ duḥkham bhuṅkta iti mohitaḥ tasya prāṇāḥ su daḥ khena mahā kaṣṭaiḥ pracālitāḥ apāna mārgam āśritya śṛṇukām ta prayānti te evam evam mugdhaḥ lobha moha samanvitaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe ākhyāne ākhyāne pāpa maraṇa vivakṣā nāma paṣcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ aṅgārasam caye mārge ghṛṣyamāṇaḥ hinīyate dahyamānaḥ sa duṣṭa ātmā āceṣṭamānaḥ punar punar yatra ātapaḥ mahā tīvra udvādaśa āditya tāpitaḥ nīyate tena mārgeṇa sam taptaḥ sūrya raśmibhiḥ parvateṣu eva durgeṣu chāyā hīneṣu durmatiḥ nīyate tena mārgeṇa kṣudhā tṛṣṇā prapīḍitaḥ sa dūtaiḥ hanyamānaḥ tugada ākhaḍgaiḥ paraśvadhaiḥ kaśābhiḥ tāḍyamānaḥ tunim dyamānaḥ tudūtakaiḥ tatas śīta maye mārge iva āyunā āsevyate punar tena śītena duḥkhī sa bhūtvā yāti na saṃśayaḥ ākṛṣyamāṇa udūtaiḥ tu nānā durgeṣu nīyate dakaḥ sarva pāpa samācāraḥ nīyate yama kiṃkaraiḥ yamam paśyati duṣṭa ātma akṛṣṇām jana caya upamam tam ugram dāruṇam bhīmam bhīma dūtaiḥ samāvṛtam mahiṣam devam dharmarājam dvijottamaiḥ nibham dhānulepanam rakta mālya kṛta ābhūṣaṅga dāhastam bhayaṃkaram evaṃvidham mahā kāyam yamam paśyatidurmatiḥ tam dṛṣṭvā asamanuprāptam sarva dharma bahiṣkṛtam tamaḥ duṣṭam pāpiṣṭham dharmakam ṭakam śāsayet tu mahā duḥkhaiḥ pīḍābhiḥ dāru mudgalaiḥ yāvat yuga sahasrām tam tāvatkālam prapacyate nārakām yāti vaiyonim kṛmi koṭiṣu pāpa kṛt maraṇam ca sa pāpa ātmā evam yāti su niścitam prāpya bhuṅkta ivaipātakam punar vaipunaḥ mārjāraśūkarīm yonim sarpa yonim tathā eva ca nānā bheda asu sarva asu tiryañc ṣu ca punar punar pāpa pakṣiṣu sam yāti anyāsu mahatīṣu ca cāṇḍāla bhilla yonim capulim dīṃ yā ati pāpa kṛt etat te sarvam ākhyātam pāpinām janma ca eva hi maraṇeśṛṇukām ceṣṭām teṣām su dāruṇām pāpa puṇya samācāraḥ tava agre kathitaḥ mayā iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām aindresumana upākhyāne hi adhyāyaḥ uvāca katham putra maham vim dyām yutam dāna dharma ādikam bhadre paratra iha na saṃśayaḥ tam uvāca evam kariṣye kalyāṇe tava vākyam na saṃśayaḥ evam uktvā jagāma āśu somaśarmā dvijottamaḥ vasiṣṭham sarva vettāram divyam tam tapatām varam tejaḥ jvālā samākīrṇam dvitīyam iva bhāskaram rājamānam mahātmānam brahmaṇyam ca dvijottamam bhaktyā a praṇamya vipra īśam daṇḍa vat ca punar punar tam uvāca mahā tejāḥ brahma sūnuḥ akalmaṣaḥ upāviśa āsane puṇye sukhena su mahā mate evam uktvā asayogīm draḥ punar prāha tapodhanam gṛhe putreṣu te vatsa dāra bhṛtyeṣu sarvadā masti mahā bhāga puṇyakarma sucā agniṣu sadā evam uktvā mahā prājṣaḥ punar prāha suśarmaṇam evam sambhāṣitam vipram virarāma sa kumbhajaḥ sahā uvāca mahātmānam vasiṣṭham tapatām varam bhagavan śrūyatām vākyam su prasannena cetasā etat mama saṃśayam tāta akasmāt pāpāt vadasva mama tayā aham preṣitaḥ tāta tava pārśvam samāturaḥ uvāca putra amitrāṇi atha bhrātā anye sva jana bām dhavāḥ pūrvam eva te agratas putrasya lakṣaṇam puṇyam te agre pravadāmi aham śuddhi vijñāna sam pannaḥ tapasvī vāc vidām varaḥ tad sarva śāstra vettā ca deva brāhmaṇa pūjakaḥ yājakaḥ sarva yajṣānām dātā atyāgī priyam vadaḥ taḥ dām taḥ suhṛd sadā evaṃguṇaiḥ ca sam yuktaḥ sa putraḥ sukha dāyakaḥ anye sambandha sam yuktāḥ śoka sam tāpa dāyakāḥ etādṛśeṇa kim kāryam phala hīnena tena ca māyānti yānti da tvā su dāruṇam pūrva janma kṛtam puṇyam yat tvayā a paripālitam tat sarvam hi pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām adbhutam punar uvāca mahā yutaḥ eka bhāryā sadā dveṣī bahu putraḥ hi a dattavān dānam na eva tvayā a dattam śāstram na eva pratiśrutam kṛtā na eva tvayā tīrthe yātrā ca eva mahā mate evaṃkṛtam tvayā a viprakṛṣi mārgam punar punar paśūnām pālanam sarva gavām ca eva dvijottamaiḥ mahiṣīṇām tathā aśvānām pālanam ca punar punar tasya vyayam tu tvayā akadā na dattam eva ca tu bhavatā dhanam eva ca go mahiṣī ādikam sarvam paśūnām sam citam tvayā miprasam citam vipulam tvayā takram ghṛtam tathā akṣīram vikrayitvā ātata udadhi duṣkālam tam vipramohitaḥ viṣṇu māyayā kṛtam mahā rgham eva atra annam brāhmaṇa sattama devānām pūjanam vipra bhavatā anakṛtam kadā mayā bhāryā vadati te sādhvī dinam enam samāgatam śvaśurasya śrāddha kālaḥ śvaśrvāḥ ca eva mahā mate tvam śrutvā tat vacaḥ tasya agṛham tyaktvā palāyase dharma mārgam na dṛṣṭam te śrutam na eva kadā tvayā hobhaḥ mātā pitā bhrātā lobhaḥ dhavāḥ tasmāt duḥkhībhavān jātaḥ daridreṇa atipīḍitaḥ dine dine mahā tṛṣṇā hṛdaye te pravardhate yadā yadā gṛhe dravyam vṛddhim āyāti te tadā tṛṣṇayā a dahyamāna stutayā tvam vahni rūpayā sahasram lakṣam mekoṭiḥ eva ca sam jātaḥ tṛṣṇāḥ na eva pragacchati te kāyam parityajya vṛddhim āyāti sarvadā anyam eva tu dravya āgamana kāraṇāt yam janam vādam dhātuvādam atas param pṛcchamānaḥ bhramasi ekaḥ tṛṣṇayā a parimohitaḥ praveśam vivarāṇām tucim tamānaḥ su pṛcchasi tṛṣṇā anala inasam dīpta uhā hā bhūtaḥ vicetanaḥ bhavat tat dravyam pṛcchamāneṣu vā tvayā tam kathitam na eva vṛttām tam prāṇān tyaktvā āgataḥ yamam evam sarvam mayā ākhyātam vṛttām tam tava pūrvakam su śīla ajñāna sam pannāḥ satya dharma ratāḥ sadā vinā viṣṇoḥ prasādena dārāḥ putrān na ca āpnuyāt iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ uvāca pūrva janma kṛtam pāpam tvayā ākhyātam ca memune tat sarvam kāraṇam brūhi jñāna vijñāna paṇḍita uvāca yat tvayā a ceṣṭitam pūrvam karma dharma āśritam dvija tat aham sam pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām yat imanyase brāhmaṇaḥ kaścid anaghaḥ sat ācāraḥ su paṇḍitaḥ bhramati sa medinīm aṭamānaḥ samāyātaḥ te geham mahā matiḥ yācitam sthānam ekam vaivāsa artham dvija sattama vaiṣṇavam brāhmaṇam puṇyam iti uvāca punar punar adya tīrtha phalam prāptam te aṅghri dvaya darśanāt gavām sthānam varam puṇyam nivāsāya niveditam aṅgasam vāhanam kṛtvā pādau ca eva pramarditau tau ca punar toyaiḥ snātaḥ pāda udakena hi sadyas ghṛtam dadhi kṣīram annam takram pradattavan evam sam toṣitaḥ vipraḥ tvayā āca sahabhāryayā putraiḥ sārdham mahā bhāgaḥ vaiṣṇavaḥ jñāna paṇḍitaḥ tu śuddhasya ikādaśī pāpa nāśanā tasmin dine susam prāptā asarva pātaka nāśinī yasyām devaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ yoganidrām pragacchati tām tām prāpya catataḥ lokāḥ tatyajuḥ buddhi paṇḍitāḥ sarva utsavam paramam cakruḥ gīta maṅgala vādanaiḥ stuvanti brāhmaṇāḥ sarvevedaiḥ stotraiḥ su maṅgalaiḥ evam mahā utsavam prāpya saca brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ paṭhitam brāhmaṇena vai bhāryā putraiḥ sutaiḥ sārdham śrutam dharmam anuttamam vratam etam kariṣyāmi iti niścita mānasaḥ bhāryā putraiḥ snānam kṛtam tvayā hṛṣṭena manasā vipra pūjitaḥ madhusūdanaḥ sarva upahāraiḥ puṇyaiḥ ca gandha dhūpa ādibhiḥ tathā rātrau jāgaraṇam kṛtvā nṛtya gīta ādibhiḥ tathā brāhmaṇasya prasaṅgeṇa nadyām snānam punar kṛtam pūjitaḥ devadeveśaḥ puṣpa dhūpa ādi maṅgalaiḥ bhaktyā praṇamya govim dam snāpayitvā punar punar tādṛśam dattam brāhmaṇāya mahātmane bhaktyā a praṇamya tam vipram dattā a tasmai su dakṣiṇā kṛtavan pāraṇam vipra putraiḥ bhāryā ādibhiḥ samam evam vratam samācīrṇam tvayā avai dvija sattama saṅgatyā a brāhmaṇasya eva viṣṇoḥ ca eva prasādāt bhavān brāhmaṇa tām prāptaḥ satya dharma samanvitaḥ bhūsurāṇām mahā prājṣam satya dharma samāvilam tasmai tu brāhmaṇāya eva vaiṣṇavāya mahātmane tasya dānasya bhāvenam iṣṭa annam upatiṣṭhati mahā mohaiḥ manaḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ hi dīneṣu anyeṣu vā tvayā tasya pāpasya bhāvena dāridram tvām upāviśat prasādāt tasya devasya viṣṇoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ tasmāt ārādhya govindam nārāyaṇam anāmayam prāpsyasi tvam param sthānam tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam pūrva janam akṛtam sarvam yat tvayā a pariceṣṭitam evam harṣeṇa yuktaḥ sa mahā anubhāvaḥ bhaktyā vasiṣṭham praṇipatya tatra mam trya vipram sajagāma geham tām prāpya bhāryām sumanām praharṣaḥ sarvam hi vṛttam mama pūrva ceṣṭitam tena eva vipreṇa tava prasādāt bhadra vasiṣṭhena vikāśa nītam adya eva moham parināśitam mama madhusūdanam ārādhayiṣye madhusūdanam hiyāsyāmi mokṣam paramam padam tat ākarṇya vākyam paramam tam su maṅgalam maṅgala dāyakam hi tam tam puṇyaḥ asi vipreṇa vibodhitaḥ asi iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe dresumana upākhyāne aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca prājṣaḥ sumanayā saha sattamaḥ tad kapilā saṃgame puṇye revā tīre su puṇya de snātvā atatrasa medhāvī tarpayitvā asurān pitṝn tapaḥ tepe suśām tātmā ajapat nārāyaṇam śivam treṇa dhyāna yuktaḥ mahā manāḥ sā ca sādhvī mahā bhāgā pativratā parāyaṇā sumanākām tam eva api śuśrūṣati tapaḥ nvitam dhyāyamānasya tasya api vighnaiḥ sam darśitam bhayam sarpa aviṣa ulbaṇāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ tatra yānti mahātmanaḥ tesomaśarmaṇaḥ eva siṃ pacakrire bhairavāḥ bhayam vidarśayan prāṇa nāśanam nānāvidha amahā bhīmāḥ siṃ hāḥ tatra samāgatāḥ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ daṃ da viṣṇoḥ dhyānāt sa dharma ātmānam acacāla mahā matiḥ mahā vighnaiḥ su sam rūḍhaiḥ cālitaḥ muni puṃgavaḥ evam na calate dhyānāt somaśarmā dvijottamaḥ jhaṃ jhā vātaiḥ ca śītena mahā vṛṣṭyā a su pīḍitaḥ bhaṃ bhārāva mahā bhīmaḥ siṃ hastatra samāgataḥ tam dṛṣṭvā abhaya vitrastaḥ sasmāra nṛharim dvijaḥ indranīla pratīkāśam pīta vastram mahā ojasam haram devam gadā paṅkaja dhāriṇam mahā mauktika hāreṇa indu varṇa anukāriṇā śrī vatsa aṅkena divyena hṛdayam yasya rājate sarva ābharaṇa śobha aṅgam śatapattra nibha īkṣaṇam bhrājamānam hṛṣīkeśam dhyānam tena kṛtam dhruvam tvam eva śaraṇam kṛṣṇa śaraṇa āgata vatsala śaraṇam tasya praviṣṭaḥ asmi kva āste bhayam mama eva hi yasmāt bhayāḥ pravartam tekṛtya ādika mahā balāḥ sarva bhaya prahartāram tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ pātakānām tu sarveṣām dānavānām mahā bhayam rakṣakaḥ viṣṇu bhaktānām tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ dārakāṇām sarveṣām dānavānām mahātmanām yaḥ gatiḥ kṛṣṇa bhaktānām tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ abhaya ubhaya nāśāya pāpa nāśāya jñānavān ekaḥ ca indra sva rūpeṇa tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ nirāmayaḥ nirānam daḥ tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ acalaḥ cālayet lokān apāpaḥ jñānam eva ca tam asmi śaraṇam prāptaḥ ubhayam kim eka riṣyati sādhūnām ca api sarveṣām pālakaḥ yaḥ hi anāmayaḥ masmi śaraṇam gataḥ yome mṛgendra rūpeṇa bhayam darśayate gratas tam aham śaraṇam prāptaḥ narasim haṃ namāmi aham gaja āsyam jñānasam pannam sa pāśa aṅkuśa dhāriṇam ca śaraṇam sugataḥ asmi aham hiraṇyākṣa prahartāram vārāham śaraṇam gataḥ vāmanam tam prapannaḥ asmi śaraṇa āgata vatsalam kubjāḥ pretāḥ kūṣmāṇḍaka ādayaḥ mṛtyu rūpa dharāḥ sarve darśayanti bhayam mama amṛtam tam papannaḥ usmi kim bhayam ā īkariṣyati śaraṇam tam prapannaḥ asmi bhayam kim ā kariṣyati tārakaḥ sarva lokānām nāśakaḥ sarva pāpinām tam aham śaraṇam prāptaḥ dharma rūpam janārdanam śaraṇam tasya gam tāsmi sadāgatiḥ ayam mama jhaṃ mama śaraṇam tam prapannaḥ asmi sadāgatiḥ ayam mama ca ati śītam ca ati varṣā ātapaḥ tāpa dāyakaḥ eṣām eṣām tasya aham śaraṇam gataḥ tad abhayada amamacālakāḥ eṣām śaraṇam prapannaḥ asmi hareḥ svarūpiṇām sadā yam sarva devam parameśvaram hi niṣkevalam jñāna mayam pradīpam madanti nārāyaṇam ādi siddham siddheśvaram tam śaraṇam prapadye iti dhyāyan stuvan ityam keśavam kleśa nāśanam bhaktyā tena samānītaḥ tad ātma hṛdaye hariḥ udyamam vikramam tasya sa dṛṣṭvā asomaśarmaṇaḥ māvis bhūya hṛṣīkeśaḥ tam uvāca prahṛṣṭavan saha hana śyāmam mahā udayam sarva ābharaṇa śobhā aṅgam sarva āyudha samanvitam divya lakṣaṇa sam pannam puṇḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇam pītena vāsasā yuktam rājamānam sureśvaram brahma ādīnām sudhātāram jagantaḥ asi a mahā yaśāḥ rūpa atītam jagadgurum harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ udaṇḍa vat śriyā āyuktam bhāsamānam sūrya koṭi sama prabham baddhām jali puṭaḥ bhūtvā tayā sumanayā saha jaya yogi īśa yogi indra jaya nāga aṅga śāyanaiḥ yajṣa yajṣa aṅga jaya yajṣa īśa jaya śāśvata sarvaga jaya jñānavatām śreṣṭha jaya tvam jñānanāyaka namaḥ maya padma palāśa akṣa padmanābhāyate namaḥ maya lakṣmī vilāsa aṅga namas veda mayāyate namaḥ kavi avahāya eva svadhā rūpāya te namaḥ svāhā rūpāya yajṣāya pāvanāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ te śārṅga hastāya haraye pāpa hāriṇe keśavāya parasmai eva namaḥ te viśva dhāriṇe namaḥ kṛpā karāya eva namaḥ harṣa mayāya te anantāya namaḥ nityam śuddhāya kleśa nāśine mad ānandāya namaḥ nityam śuddhāya kevalāya te namaḥ namaḥ pareśāya ajitāya amṛta ātmane kṣīra sāgara vāsāya namaḥ padmā priyāya te auṃkārāya ca śuddhāya acalāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ varāhāya mahā kūrmāya te namaḥ namaḥ vāmana rūpāya nṛsiṃhāya mahātmane matsyāya namaḥ rāmāya te namaḥ namaḥ kṛṣṇāya buddhāya namaḥ mleccha praṇāśine evam stutvā hṛṣīkeśam tam uvāca janārdanam guṇānām tu param pāram brahmā vetti na pāvana nirguṇam sa guṇam stotram mayā eva te keśava kṣama śabda apaśabdam mama te dāsaḥ asmi suvrata iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe dresumana upākhyāne ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ stotreṇa pāvanena api tuṣṭaḥ asmi vriyatām varaḥ yam yam icchasi kāmam tvam tam tam te pūrayāmi aham uvāca ekam darśayasva aparam sthānam acalam mokṣa dāyakam śatārakam putram divya lakṣaṇa sam yutam sarvajṣam sarva dam dām tam tapaḥ tejaḥ samanvitam deva brāhmaṇa lokānām pālakam pūjakam sadā deva mitram puṇya bhāvam dātāram jñāna paṇḍitam putram dāridram hara keśava evam astu dvijaśreṣṭha bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ mad prasādāt suputra stutava vam śapra tārakaḥ bhokṣyasi tvam varān bhogān divyām śca mānuṣān iha yāvat jīvasi vipra tvam tāvat duḥkham na paśyasi saṃśayaḥ sutīrthe maraṇam ca api yāsyasi tvam parām gatim evam varam hariḥ dattvā āsapriyāya dvijāyasaḥ tardha anaṅga taḥ devaḥ svapna vat paridṛśyate tadā asumanayā yuktaḥ somaśarmā dvijottamaḥ amarakam puṇyam karoti saḥ kapilā revayoḥ saṅge snānam kṛtvā āsan nirgataḥ dṛṣṭavan puratas vipraḥ śvetam ekam hi kujjaram su prabham sundaram divyam su madam cāru lakṣaṇam nānā ābharaṇa śobha aṅgam bahu lakṣmyā samanvitam karṇa nīlotpala yutam yutam nāga upari sthitaḥ divyaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛḍha su prabhaḥ divya lakṣaṇa sam pannaḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ tara dharaḥ divya gam dhānu lepanaḥ nāga ārūḍham prayām tam tam punar paśyati sattamaḥ siddha cāraṇa gandharvaiḥ stūyamānam su maṅgalam sa gajam sundaram dṛṣṭvā puruṣam divya lakṣaṇam vyatarkayat somaśarmā avismaya āviṣṭa mānasaḥ kaḥ ayam prayāti divya aṅgaḥ thānam prāpya suvrataḥ evam cintayataḥ tasya yāvat gṛham samāptavan praviśam taṅgṛha dvāram deva rūpam manoharam harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ somaśarmā dvijottamaḥ sva gṛham prati dharma ātmā a tvaramāṇaḥ prayāti ca gṛha dvāraṅga taḥ yāvat tāvat tam patitāni eva puṣpāṇi sauhṛdyāni mahā matiḥ divyāni vāsa yuktāni prāṅgaṇe dvija sattamaḥ svakīyam prāṅgaṇe dṛṣṭvā dūrvā akṣata samanvitam saḥ evam vismaya āviṣṭaḥ cintayānaḥ punar punar dadarśa sumanām prājṣaḥ divya maṅgalasam padam uvāca kena dattāni divyāni etāni ābharaṇāni ca śṛṅgāram rūpa saubhāgyam vastra alaṃkāra bhūṣaṇam tat me tvam kāraṇam bhadre kathayasva a viśaṅkitā evam sambhāṣyatām bhāryām virarāma dvijottamaḥ tasam āyātaḥ kaścid deva vara uttamaḥ hveta nāga samārūḍhaḥ divya ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ gam stūyamānaḥ samāyātaḥ deva gandharva cāraṇaiḥ yutāḥ sarva ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyāḥ sarvāḥ pūrṇa manorathāḥ tābhiḥ saha samakṣam mepuruṣeṇa mahātmanā catuṣkam pūritam ratnaiḥ sarva śobhā samanvitam tatra aham āsane puṇye sthāpitā brāhmaṇaiḥ kila vastra alaṅkāra bhūṣām me daduḥ te sarve eva hi ca puṇya daiḥ abhiṣikta asmitaiḥ sarva airam punar gatāḥ evam uktvā āgatāḥ sarve evam dṛṣṭam mayā eva hi tayā yat kathitam vṛttam samākarṇya mahā matiḥ vicintayitvā atha tadā somaśarmā mahā matiḥ tasmāt garbham mahābhāgāt adhāra vrata śālinī tena garbheṇa sā devī adhikam śuśubhe tadā yukta tejas jvālā samanvitā śaṅkhān dadhmuḥ mahā devāḥ gandharvāḥ lalitam jaguḥ atha brahma asuraiḥ sārdham samāyātaḥ dvijottamaḥ nāma kṛtvā tatas devāḥ jagmuḥ sarve mahā ojasaḥ tasya gehe mahā lakṣmīḥ dhana dhānya samākulā gaja aśva mahiṣī gāvaḥ kām canam ratnam eva ca yathā kubera bhavanam śuśubhe dhana sam cayaiḥ dhyāna puṇya ādikam karma cakāra dvija sattamaḥ tīrtha yātrā aṅgāt vipraḥ nānā puṇya samākulaḥ anyāni yāni puṇyāni dānāni dvija sattamaḥ cakāra tatra medhāvī jñāna puṇya samanvitaḥ evam sādhayate dharmam pālayet ca punar punar kārayāmāsa harṣeṇa mahatā kila putrasya putrāḥ sam jātāḥ sa guṇa a lakṣaṇa anvitāḥ sa teṣām puṇya karmāṇi somaśarmā ācakāra ha pautrāṇām tu mahā bhāgaḥ teṣām sukhena modate pratīkāśaḥ somaśarmā amahā matiḥ sā ca api śuśubhe devī sumanā puṇya maṅgalaiḥ putra pautraiḥ mahā bhāga ādāna vrataiḥ ca sam yamaiḥ atibhā ati viśāla akṣī puṇyaiḥ pativratā ādibhiḥ tāruṇyena samāyuktā yathā ṣoḍaśa vārṣikā modamānau mahātmānau dam patī cārumaṅgalau harṣeṇa ca samāyuktau puṇya ātmanau mahā udayau evam tayoḥ tu vṛttām tam puṇya ācāra samanvitam yathā tena samārādhya nārāyaṇam anāmayam iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe hi nāma viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ekadā avyāsa devaḥ asau brahmānam jagantaḥ patim suvrata ākhyānakam sarvam papraccha atīva vismitaḥ uvāca pārāśarya mahā bhāga śrūyatām puṇyam uttamam śaṅkha cakra dharam devam padmanābham su puṇya dam dhyāyate cintayet saḥ hi gīte jṣāne prapāṭhane krīḍati evam sa dāḍim bhaiḥ sārdham cabālaka uttamaḥ bālakānām svakam nāma hareḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ cakāra sahi medhāvī puṇya ātma apuṇya vatsalaḥ samāhvayati vaimitram hareḥ nāmnā mahā matiḥ tvam eva puruṣottamaiḥ samam eva pragam tavyam āvābhyām madhusūdana evam eva samāhvānam nāmabhiḥ ca hareḥ dvijaḥ krīḍane paṭhane hāsye śayane gīta prekṣaṇe karmasu tat dhyāyata itam ekam hi viśva nātham maheśvaram tṛṇe kāṣṭhe ca pāṣāṇe śuṣke sa ārdre hi keśavam paśyati evam daṅka mala īkṣaṇam madhye bhūmi madhye tu parvateṣu vaneṣu ca jale sthale ca pāṣāṇe jīveṣu eva mahā matiḥ haṃ haṃ paśyate vipraḥ suvrataḥ sumanāsutaḥ bāla krīḍām samāsādya ramati evam dine dine ca dhyāyanti veda vidvasaḥ satatam surārim yasya aṅga madhye sakalam hi viśvam sakala pāpa vināśanam ca vrajāmi śaraṇam madhusūdanasya ta vīryam prapaṭhanti nityam saṃ tam agādha durgam uttāraṇa artham akhilam śaraṇam prapadye yogīm saṃ śuddham prabhāvam akhilam satatam gāyāmi aham surasa gītaka tāla mānaiḥ śrī raṅgam ekam aniśam bhuvanasya devam ca dineśa tulya mānam dakam dam akhilam mahimā sametam sam pūrṇam eva kalā nidhānam tat gīta kauśalam ananya rasaiḥ pragāye yuktam sva yoga karaṇaiḥ paramārtha dṛṣṭim viśvam eva nityam karābhyām vādyamānaḥ tutālam tāla samanvitam bālakaiḥ saha modate evam krīḍā rataḥ nityam bāla bhāvena vā etadā tu suvrataḥ sumanā putraḥ viṣṇu dhyāna parāyaṇaḥ prāha mātā suvratam cāru lakṣaṇam paripīḍayet tām uvāca punar prājṣaḥ sumanā mātaram punar bhojana āsanam ārūḍhaḥ ūm iṣṭam annam prapaśyati idam annam svayam viṣṇuḥ ātmā ahi annam samāśritaḥ biṣṇuḥ anena annena tṛpyatu sthitaḥ malena anena puṇyena tṛptim āyātu keśavaḥ bhavaḥ ātma sva rūpeṇa tṛptaḥ tṛptim āyātu keśavaḥ pracintayet yoga nidrā anvitam kṛṣṇam tam aham śaraṇam gataḥ bhojana ācchādaneṣu evam āsane śayane dvijaḥ tāruṇyam prāpya dharma ātma a kāma bhogān vihāya vai yatrasiddheśvaram liṅgam vaiṣṇavam pāpa nāśanam ca dhyātvā ca eva maheśvaram brahmanā āvarddhitam devam narmadā dakṣiṇe taṭe iti śrī padmapurāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām bhūmi khaṇḍe aindresumana upākhyāne ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca praśnam ekam vada pūrva abhyāsena asam dhyāyan nārāyaṇam anāmayam kasyām jṣātau samutpannaḥ suvrataḥ pūrva janmani tat mām tvam sāṃ brūhi katham ārādhitaḥ hariḥ samāvilaḥ tatra rājā amahātejāḥ ṛtadhvaja sutaḥ balī tasya ātmajaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ rukma bhūṣaṇa viśrutaḥ sam bhāryā dharmapatnī yaśasvinī tasyām putram samutpādya sa ātma sadṛśam tatas tasya dharmāṅgadam nāma cakāra nṛpanam danaḥ pannaḥ pitṛ bhakti parāyaṇaḥ rukmāṅgadasya bhagavantām varaḥ su prasannaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ sa kāyaḥ vaiṣṇavam padam nītaḥ tu sarva dharma jṣaḥ vaiṣṇavaḥ sātvantām varaḥ tad aṅgadaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ prajṣā jñāna viśāradaḥ tatrasthaḥ vaimahāprājṣaḥ dharmaḥ saudharmabhūṣaṇaḥ māsa yuga sahasrām te dharmaḥ vaidharma bhūṣaṇaḥ tasmāt padāt paribhraṣṭaḥ viṣṇoḥ ca eva prasādāt
