garbha tvam ca śiśu tvam ca kaumāram ca niśāmaya vai huṇḍasya vacanam śrutvā śivasya tanayā punar uvāca dānava indram tam sādhvasena samanvitā aṣṭāviṃśatike prāpte dvāpara ākhye yuge tadā śeṣa avatāraḥ dharma ātmā vasudeva sutaḥ balaḥ revatasya sutām divyām bhāryām sacakariṣyati tad apijātā mahā bhāga kṛta ākhye hi yuga uttame balasya sā apriyā jātā arevatī prāṇasam mitā māyāvatī purā jātā gandharva tanayā varā tasya abhartā asamākhyātaḥ mādhavasya sutaḥ balī bhagavant nāma vīra īśaḥ yādava īśvara naṃ danaḥ tasmin yuge bhaviṣyeta bhāvyam dṛṣṭam purātanaiḥ vyāsa ādibhiḥ mahābhāgaiḥ jñānavadbhiḥ mahātmabhiḥ evam hi dṛśyate daitya vākyam devyā tadā uditam yadi asya diṣṭam eva asti śubham vā api aśubham dṛḍham devānām brāhmaṇānām ca vadana iyat subhāṣitam mad bhāgyāt evam ājṣātam nahuṣasya apitasya ca samāyogam vicārya evam devyā proktam śivena ca evam manaḥ sthitām tuṅkṣamaḥ mahā śāpena dhakṣyāmi itas gaccha mahā sura evam ākarṇya tat vākyam huṇḍaḥ vaidānavaḥ balī manasā acintayāmāsa katham bhāryā bhavet iyam samāgataḥ anyasmin divase prāpte māyām kṛtvā tamaḥ mayām divyam māyā mayam rūpam kṛtvā anāryāḥ tudānavaḥ māyayā a kanyakā rūpaḥ babhūva mamanam danaiḥ sā kanyā api varārohā māyā rūpā agamat tatas hāsya līlā samāyuktā yatra āste bhavanam uvāca vākyam snigdhā iva aśoka sundarīm prati kim artham kriyate bāle kāma śoṣaṇakam tapaḥ tat niśamya śubham vākyam dānavena api bhāṣitam māyā rūpeṇa channena sa abhilāṣeṇa sa tvaram ātma sṛṣṭi su vṛttām tam pravṛttam tu yathā purā tapasaḥ kāraṇam sarvam samācaṣṭa su duḥkhitā māyā rūpam na jānāti sauhṛdāt kathitam tayā uvāca sādhu śīla sama ācārā asādhu cārā amahā satī mama bhartā āhataḥ tena huṇḍena api durātmanā tasya nāśāya vaighoram tapasi ami mahat tapaḥ gaṅgā tīre vasāmi aham huṇḍena sakhī bhāvena mohitā śivanam samākṛṣṭā suvegena mahā mohena mohitā mānīta ātma gṛham divyam anaupamyam su śobhanam cana ākhyam mahā śivam tuṅga prāsāda sambādhaiḥ kalaśaiḥ daṇḍa cāmaraiḥ ca vāpī kūpa taḍāgaiḥ ca nadībhiḥ tu jalāśayaiḥ śobhamānam mahā ratnaiḥ prākāraiḥ hema sam yataiḥ sarva kāma samṛddha artham sam pūrṇam dānavasya hi dadṛśe sā puram ramyam aśokasundarī tadā sā uvāca dānava indrasya dṛṣṭa pūrvasya vā e tvayā tasya sthānam mahābhāge saḥ aham dānava puṃgavaḥ mayā tvam tu samānītā a māyayā varavarṇini tām ābhāṣya gṛham bham su śobhanam nānā veśmaiḥ samājuṣṭaṅka elāsa śikhara upamam niveśya sundarīm tatra dolāyām kāma pīḍitaḥ punar svarūpī daitya indraḥ kāma bāṇa prapīḍitaḥ tadā yam yam tvam vām tam dadmi na saṃśayaḥ tvam viśāla akṣi bhajam tam kāma pīḍitam uvāca na eva cālayitum śaktaḥ bhavān mām dānava īśvaraḥ bhavādṛśaiḥ mahā pāpaiḥ devaiḥ vā dānava adhamaiḥ duṣprāpyā aham nasam deha umā vadasva punar punar dānuja asā tapasā abhiyuktā jājvalyamāna amahata aruṣā ca sam taṅkālasya tī punar uvāca sādevī itam evam dānava adhamam ugram karma kṛtam pāpa ca ātma nāśana hetave śasya dīptā sva gṛham ānītā asuśikhā kṛṣṇavartmanaḥ yathā aśubhaḥ kūṭa pakṣi sarva śokaiḥ samudgataḥ gṛham tuviśateyasya tasya nāśam prayacchati tathā atehaṃgṛham prāptā atava nāśam samīhatī putrāṇām dhana dhānyasya śasya sām pratam jīvaṃkulam dhanam dhānyam putra pautra ādikam te sarvam tena āśayitvā aham yāsyāmi ca na saṃśayaḥ yathā tvayā aham ānītā acaram tīpa ramam tapaḥ tīnahuṣam cāyunam danam tathā tvām mama bhartā ca nāśayiṣyati dānava mad nimitte upāyaḥ ayam dṛṣṭaḥ devena vai purā satyā iyam laukikī gāthāyām gāyanti vidaḥ janāḥ yāsyase niraya sthānam para dāra abhimarśanāt su tīkṣṇam hi su dhāram tu su khaḍgam ca vighaṭṭati mām viddhi sām pratam yutaḥ satya ācārām dama upetām niyatām tapasi sthitām maṇiṃkṛṣṇa sarpasya jīvamānasya sām pratam taḥ hi yathā kālena preṣitaḥ bhavām stu preṣitaḥ mūḍha kālena kāla mohitaḥ tadā te īdṛśī jātā kumatiḥ kim na paśyasi ṛte tu āyu putreṇa samālokayata īhikaḥ evam ābhāṣayitvā ātaṅgaṅga atīraṅga tā asatī sa śoka a duḥkha sam vigna aniyata aniyama anvitā pūrvam ācaritam ghoram pati kāmanayā ātapaḥ te nāśa artham iccham punar yadā tvā nihatam duṣṭam nahuṣeṇa mahātmanā niśitaiḥ vajra saṃkāśaiḥ bāṇaiḥ āśīviṣa upamaiḥ gatāsum ca prapaśyāmi tadā āyāsyāmi aham patim evam su niyamam kṛtvā gaṅgā tīram anuttamam sam sthita āhuṇḍa nāśāya niścala āśivanam evam uktā mahā bhāgaśivasya tanayā āgatā tapaḥ cacāra tanvaṅgī huṇḍasya vadha hetave huṇḍaḥ api duḥkhitaḥ bhūtaḥ śāpa dagdhena cetasā cintayāmāsa sam tapta atīva vacana analaiḥ samāhūya amātyam taṅkam pana ākhyam atha abravīt tam tasyāḥ śāpa udbhavam mahat śaptaḥ asmi aśoka sundaryā aśivasya api su kanyayā yathā asatyāt vyalīkaḥ tu tasyāḥ śāpaḥ tathā kuru uvāca apahṛtya apriyām tasya āyoḥ ca apisamānaya prabhīṣaṇaiḥ pratīkṣasva anahuṣasya durātmanaḥ evam sam mam panenasa dānavaḥ uvāca mahā bhāga āyuḥ nāma kṣitīśvaraḥ sārvabhaumaḥ sa dharma ātmā satya vrata parāyaṇaḥ indra upendra samaḥ rājā tapasā yaśasā balaiḥ pṛthivyām sarva dharma jṣaḥ somavam śasya bhūṣaṇam cintayāmāsa dharma ātmā katham mama jāyate sutaḥ tām samāpede āyuḥ ca pṛthivīpatiḥ prīḍamānaḥ striyā sārdham madirā aruṇa locanaḥ samāvṛtaḥ aṅkeyuvatim ādhāya sarva yoṣit varām śubhām gāyate nṛtyate vipraḥ surām ca pibate bhṛśam vinā yajṣopavītena mahā yogi īśvara uttamaḥ puṣpa mālābhiḥ divyābhiḥ muktā hāra paricchadaiḥ dana aguru digdha aṅgaḥ rājamānaḥ muni īśvaraḥ tasya āśramam nṛpaḥ gatvā tam dṛṣṭvā dvija sattamam praṇāmam akarot mūrdhanā adaṇḍa vat su samāhitaḥ puratas bhaktyā atha dhyānam samāsthitaḥ evam varṣa śatam prāptam tasya bhūpasya sattamaiḥ niścalam sambhakti tatparam samāhūya uvāca idam kimartham brahmācāreṇa hīnaḥ asmi brahmatvam ekadā vara dānena meśaktiḥ anyam śuśrūṣa brāhmaṇam uvāca bhavādṛśaḥ mahā bhāganāsti brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ parameśvaraḥ brāhmaṇasya sva rūpeṇa bhavān vaigaruḍadhvajaḥ tvām aham śaraṇam prāptaḥ śaraṇa āgata vatsalaiḥ uddharasva hṛṣīkeśam āyān kṛtvā pratiṣṭhasi sam viśva nāyakam mama jagannātham bhavam tam madhusūdanam dehi pācitam mām sa bhojanam evam ākarṇya tad vākyam sacā āyūḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ atha prasanna cetāḥ sasam jātaḥ muni puṃgavaḥ dṛṣṭvā abhaktim prabhāvam ca guru śuśrūṣaṇam param uvāca nṛpa indram tam āyum paṇata mānasam uvāca bhavān dātā varam satyam kṛpayā muni sattama putram dehi guṇa upetam yutam deva vīryam su tejam ca ajeyam deva dānavaiḥ deva brāhmaṇa sambhaktaḥ prajāpālaḥ viśeṣataḥ yajvā dānapatiḥ śūraḥ śaraṇa āgata vatsalaḥ dātā bhoktā mahātmā ca veda śāstreṣu paṇḍitaḥ dhanurveda iṣu nipuṇaḥ śāstreṣu ca parāyaṇaḥ anāhatamatiḥ dhīraḥ saṃgrāmeṣu aparājitaḥ evaṃguṇaḥ surūpaḥ ca yasmāt vam śaḥ prasūyate mahā bhāgam amavam śapra dhārakam mahā ivam śakaraḥ puṇyaḥ sarva jīva dayā karaḥ ebhiḥ guṇaiḥ tusam yuktaḥ vaiṣṇavām śenasam yutaḥ rājā ca sārvabhaumaḥ ca aindratulyaḥ nareśvaraḥ bhūpa māha mahā yogī subhāryāyai pradīyatām evam uktvā a visṛjya eva tam āyum praṇatam puras māśīrbhiḥ abhinam tarddhānam adhīyata iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye prati dumatyā gṛham hṛṣṭaḥ praviveśa śriyā anvitam rājyam cakre sa medhāvī yathā svargepuram daraḥ sācaiḥ dumatī rājṣī garbha māpa phala aśanāt dumatyā mahābhāga svapnam dṛṣṭam anuttamam rātrau divā anvitam tāta bahu maṅgala dāyakam tam ca puruṣam sūrya sannibham muktā mālā anvitam vipram śveta vastreṇa śobhitam śveta puṣpa kṛtāmālātasya kam ṭhevirājate sarva ābharaṇa śobhā aṅgaḥ divya gam dhānu lepanaḥ catur bhujaḥ śaṅkha pāṇiḥ gadā cakra asi dhārakaḥ drabim ba anukāriṇā śobhamānaḥ mahā tejāḥ divya ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ hāra kaṅkaṇa keyūra nūpurābhyām virājitaḥ yaṃ drabim bānukārābhyām kuṇḍalābhyām virājitaḥ evaṃvidhaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ naraḥ kaścid samāgataḥ dumatīm śaṅkhena kṣīra pūrṇena śaśi varṇena bhāminī ratnakām cana baddhena sam pūrṇena punar punar śvetam nāgam varam mahā maṇi yutam dīptam dhāma jvālā samākulam punar dumatyā mahā yaśāḥ evaṃvidham mahā svapnam tayā adṛṣṭam suta uttamam samācaṣṭa mahā bhāgā āyum bhūmipati īśvaram samākarṇya mahā rājaḥ cintayāmāsa vaipunaḥ śaunakam su mahā bhāgam sarvajṣam jṣāninām varam uvāca mahā geham viśan dṛṣṭaḥ kim idam svapna kāraṇam uvāca varaḥ dattaḥ tu te pūrvam dattātreyeṇa dhīmatā mādiṣṭam ca phalam rājṣām su guṇam suta hetave su bhāryāyai mayā adattam iti rājṣaḥ uditam vacaḥ śrutvā uvāca mahā prājṣaḥ śaunakaḥ dvija sattamaḥ maiṣṇavām śenasam yuktaḥ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ svapnasya kāraṇam rājñ etat te kathitam mayā evam uktvā āsa rājānam śaunakaḥ gatavan gṛham harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ rājā abhūt priyayā saha iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre catur adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ca uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ gata āsānam dana vanam sakhībhiḥ saha krīḍitum tatra ākarṇya mahat vākyam apriyam tu tadā pituḥ cāraṇānām su siddhānām bhāṣatām harṣaṇena tu vīryaḥ viṣṇu tulya parākramaḥ kariṣyati maśāpam aśoka sundaryāḥ sasmāra ca purā kṛtam garbhasya nāśanāya eva en dumatyāḥ sa dānavaḥ ātmavān dumatyāḥ tu nityaśas yadā apaśyat tām rājṣīm rūpa audārya guṇa anvitām divya tejaḥ samāyuktām rakṣitām viṣṇu tejasā divyena tejasā āyuktām sūryabim bā upamām tutām tasyāḥ pārśve mahā bhāga rakṣaṇa artham sthitaḥ sadā dūrāt sa dānava uduṣṭaḥ tasyāḥ ca bahu darśayan nānā vidyām mahā ugrām ca bhīṣakām su vibhīṣakām garbhasya tejasā ayuktā rakṣitā viṣṇu tejasā manīpsitam na eva jātam huṇḍasya api durātmanaḥ evam varṣa śatam pūrṇam paśyamānasya tasya ca prasūtā asau ahi putram ca svarbhānoḥ tanayā tadā rātrau eva suta śreṣṭha tasyāḥ putraḥ vyajāyata tejasā atīva bhāti eṣa yathā sūryaḥ nabhastale uvāca tha dāsī mahā duṣṭā kācid sūtigṛha āgatā aśauca ācāra sam yukta a mahā maṅgala vādinī tasyāḥ sarvam samājṣa āyasa huṇḍa udānava adhamaḥ praviśya eva praviṣṭaḥ ca āyu mandire kām cana ākhya pure prāptaḥ svakīye dānava adhamaḥ samāhūya priyām bhāryām vipulām vākyam abravīt vadhasva enam mahā pāpam bāla rūpam ripum mama paścāt sūdasya vaihaste bhojana artham pradīyatām sūda hastāt mahābhāge paścāt bhokṣye na saṃśayaḥ kasmāt nirghaṇa tām yāti bhartā āma su niṣṭhuraḥ kasya kasmāt prabhakṣyeta kṣamā hīnaḥ su nirghṛṇaḥ iti evam cintayāmāsa kāruṇyena samanvitā sarvam eka araṇam brūhi tattvena danuja īśvara ātma doṣam ca vṛttām tam samāsena niveditam huṇḍena api durātmanā tayā ajṣātam tu tat sarvam kāraṇam dānavasya vai vadhyaḥ ayam bālakaḥ satyam na u vā abhartām ariṣyati ekalām dhrīm vākyam abravīt jahi enam bālakam duṣṭam ekale adya mahā nase ca rāja ādeśam kuruṣva adya pacasva enam hi bālakam evam ākarṇitam tena sūdena api mahātmanā rakṣitaḥ tu āyu putraḥ ca sa jahāsa punar punar tam tam samālokya sa sūdaḥ kṛpayā anvitaḥ pratyabhāṣata na eṣa vadhyaḥ tvayā asūda śiśuḥ eva mahā mate divya lakṣaṇa sam pannaḥ kasya jātaḥ su sat kule uvāca rāja lakṣaṇasam pannaḥ rūpavān kasya bālakaḥ kasmāt bhokṣyati duṣṭa ātma āhuṇḍaḥ ayam dānava adhamaḥ tat śaḥ pūrvam eva sukarmaṇā hanta enā atrasam dehaḥ yaḥ cakarma sahāyavān tatas tārakam pālakam karma rakṣate jāgrate hitat upakāra yutam yaḥ cakaroti śubha kṛt tadā kim karoti pitā mātā anye sva jana bāndhavāḥ uvāca yena eva karmaṇā ca eva rakṣitaḥ ca ayunam danaḥ tasmāt kṛpā anvitaḥ jātaḥ sūdaḥ karma vaśa anugaḥ sairam dhrīca tathājātā prerita atasya karmaṇā dvābhyām eva sutaḥ ca āyorakṣitaḥ cārulakṣaṇaḥ rātrau eva praṇītaḥ asau tasmāt gehāt mahā śrame mad a puṇya karmaṇā mahā parṇa kuṭī dvāre tasmin eva mahā śrame paścāt nikṣipya bālaka uttamam mām sam eva hi bhojayitvā asudaitye drohuṇḍaḥ hṛṣṭaḥ bhavat tadā mene itad āsuraḥ harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ sa huṇḍaḥ dānava īśvaraḥ prabhāte vimale jāte vasiṣṭhaḥ muni sattamaḥ bahis gataḥ hi dharma ātma ākuṭī dvārāt prapaśyati pūrṇam bālakam dṛṣṭvā divya lakṣaṇa sam yutam sam dupratīkāśam sundaram cāru locanam uvāca tu munayaḥ sarve yūyam āgatya bālakam kasya kena samānītam rātrau dvāra aṅgaṇa imama darpa koṭi saṃkāśam tu munayaḥ amalam mahā kautuka sam yukta āhṛṣṭāḥ dvijavarāḥ tatas samapaśyan sutam te tu āyoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ mad bhaga vasiṣṭhaḥ mahā putram samājṣātam caritreṇasamanvitam vṛttām tam tasya duṣṭasya huṇḍasya api durātmanaḥ karābhyām atha gṛhṇāti yāvat dvijaḥ vara uttamaḥ tāvat puṣpa su vṛṣṭim cacakruḥ devāḥ suta upari samālokya mad pūrṇam ṣaṣ aṅgam sa padakramam sarvāṇi eva ca śāstrāṇi adhītya dvijasattamāt matiḥ śastrāṇi astrāṇi divyāni grāha mokṣa yutāni ca jñāna śāstra ādikam nyāya rāja nīti guṇa ādikān ca evam sa sarva niṣpannaḥ nāhuṣaḥ ca ati sundaraḥ vasiṣṭhasya prasādāt cacāpa bāṇa dharaḥ bhavat iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye ṣaṣ adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mahā bhāgā svarbhānoḥ tanayā sutam apaśyam tīsubālam tam deva upamam anaupamam mahat kṛtvā āruroda varavarṇinī lakṣaṇaḥ tapasā ādāna yajṣaiḥ ca niyamaiḥ duṣkaraiḥ sutaḥ sam ca dāruṇaiḥ punar dattātreyeṇa puṇyena sam tuṣṭena mahātmanā dattaḥ putraḥ hṛtaḥ kena ruroda karuṇā anvitā hā putra vatsametātahā bāla guṇamam dira pradīyatām mahā somavam śasya sarvasya bhūṣaṇaḥ asi na saṃśayaḥ rāja su lakṣaṇaiḥ divyaiḥ sam pūrṇaḥ kamala īkṣaṇaḥ kena adya apahṛtaḥ vatsaḥ kim karomi kva yāmi aham nyāsa nāśaḥ kṛtaḥ kasya tasmāt putraḥ hṛtaḥ mama kim pūrva janma nipāpayā ratna apahāriṇī jāta a putra ratnam hṛtam mama prāptam mayā an asaṃdehaḥ putra śoka anvitam bhṛśam kim vā śiśu virodhaḥ tara imayā tasya pāpasya bhum jāmi karmaṇaḥ phalam īdṛśam yācamānasya ca eva agre vaiśvadevasya karmaṇaḥ kim vāpinā arpitam ca annam vyāhṛtibhiḥ hutam dvijaiḥ evam sudeva mānāt ca svarbhānoḥ tanayā tadā dumatī mahā bhāga śokena karuṇā ākulā hvala tu aṅga tā asatī niḥ śvāsāt mum camānā asau atsa hīnā ayathā ahi gauḥ mahā rājā sa śokena duḥkhena mahatā anvitaḥ tam śrutvā āhṛtam tam tatyāja pārthivaḥ yasmāt evam hṛtaḥ putraḥ tasmāt na asti na saṃśayaḥ dattātreyaḥ prasādena varam mama dattavan purā tāparaḥ rājā duḥkhitaḥ prārudat bhṛśam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre adhyāyaḥ atha asau nāradaḥ svargāt āyu rājānam āgataḥ mā āgatya kathayāmāsa kasmāt rājñ praśocase putra apaharaṇam te adya kṣemam jātam mahā mate deva ādīnām mahā rāja evam sarvajṣaḥ sa guṇaḥ bhūtvā sarva vijñāna sam yutaḥ sarva kalā abhisam pūrṇaḥ āgamiṣyati te sutaḥ bhāja gehe mahā rāja kālaḥ nītaḥ na saṃśayaḥ tasya āpyam tam tam sa vaikarttāmaha vīryaḥ mahā balaḥ evam ābhāṣya rājānam āyum deva ṛṣi sattamaḥ rājṣīm tat sarvam vinyavedayat ca eva prasādāt yena api a sauhṛtaḥ putraḥ sa guṇa ūm eva rānane śiraḥ tasya gṛhītvā tu punar eva āgamiṣyati iti āha nāradaḥ bhadra imā akṛthāḥ śokam eva ca tyaja ca enam mahā moham kārya dharma vināśanam bhartuḥ vākyam niśamya evam dumatī tatas harṣeṇa api samāviṣṭā a putrasya āgamanam prati yathā uktam devaṛṣiṇā tat tathā eva bhaviṣyati yasya prasādena mayā asu putraḥ prāptaḥ su dhīraḥ su guṇaḥ su puṇyaḥ evam uktvā atusā devī virarāma sudaḥ khitā āgamiṣyam tam ājṣāya nahuṣam tanayam punar iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nāhuṣa ākhyāne sapta uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ brahma putraḥ mahā tejāḥ avaśiṣṭhaḥ tapatām varaḥ nahuṣam tam samāhūya edam vacanam abravīt samākarṇya muneḥ vākyam nahuṣaḥ vanam āyayau tatra kim cit su vṛttām tam śuśrāva nahuṣaḥ balaḥ ayam eṣa sadharma ātmā anahuṣaḥ nāma vīryavān āyoḥ putraḥ mahāprājṣaḥ bālyāt mātrā viyojitaḥ kadā paśyati sā devī putra mim dumatī śubhā nāhuṣam nāma dharmajṣam hṛtam pūrvam tudānavaiḥ tapaḥ tepe nirālam vāśivasya tanayā avarā kāraṇāt anena api kadāsa ahi saṅga tā tu bhaviṣyati evam sām sārikam vākyam divicāraṇa bhāṣitam śuśrāva sahi dharma ātmā nahuṣaḥ vibhrama anvitaḥ sa gatvau anyam ādāya vasiṣṭhasya āśramam prati banyam nivedya dharma ātma avaśiṣṭhāya mahātmane baddhām jali puṭaḥ bhūtvā abhaktyānamitakam dharaḥ tam uvāca mahā prājṣam vasiṣṭham tapatām varam bhagavan śrūyatām vākyam apūrvam cāraṇa īritam eṣa vainahuṣaḥ nāmnā āyu putraḥ viyojitaḥ mātrā saha su duḥkhaiḥ tuiṃ dumati ahi dānavaiḥ evam ābhāṣitam taiḥ tu tat sarvam hi mayā śrutam kaḥ asau āyuḥ sa dharma ātmā kāsātim vadumatī śubhā aśokasundarī kā tā nahuṣetikaḥ vacyate etat mama saṃśayam jātam tat bhavān chettum arhati anyaḥ kaḥ api mahā prājṣaḥ kutra asau nahuṣa iti ca tat sarvam tāta me brūhi kāraṇa antaram eva hi uvāca āyu rājā sadharma ātmā saptadvīpā adhipaḥ balī bhāryā dumatī tasya satya rūpā a yaśasvinī bhūṣaṇam harasya kanyā suśroṇī guṇa rūpaiḥ alaṃkṛtā tad tad tad tad asubhagā cāru hāsinī tasya abhartā abhavān sṛṣṭaḥ dhātrā yogena niścitaḥ gaṅgāyāḥ tīram āśritya dhyāna yoga samāśritā huṇḍaḥ ca dānavem droyaḥ dṛṣṭvā ca ekākinīm satīm tapasā aprajvalam tām ca subhaga aṅkamala īkṣaṇām rūpa audārya guṇa upeta aṅka āma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ tām babhāṣe antikam gatvā mama bhāryā bhava iti ca evam sā tad vacaḥ śrutvā tam uvāca tapasvinī mā ahuṇḍa sāhasam kārṣīḥ mā ajalpasva punar punar a prāpya aham tvayā a vīra para bhāryā viśeṣāt purā sṛṣṭa āyu putraḥ mahā balaḥ nahuṣaḥ nāma medhāvībhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ śāpam evam ākarṇya tad vākyam kāma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ dire bhāga śaptaḥ asau dānava adhamaḥ sattva māyu sutaḥ vīra hṛtaḥ huṇḍena pāpinā sūdena rakṣitā udāsyā preṣitaḥ mama ca āśramam bhavam tam vana madhye ca dṛṣṭvā ācāraṇa kinnaraiḥ yat tu vaiśrāvitam punar hitam pāpa kartāram huṇḍa ākhyam dānava adhamam netrābhyām hi pṛ amum caṃ tīm aśrūṇi parimārjaya itas gatvā prapaśyatu aṅgaṅgā tīram mahā balam nipātya dānava indram taṅkārā gṛhāt samānaya etat te sarvam ākhyātam praśnasya asi ahi kāraṇam ābhāṣya nahuṣam vipraḥ virarāma mahā matiḥ muninā a prayuktam āścarya bhūtam tasyām tam ekaḥ parikartu kāma āyoḥ sutaḥ kopam atha ucakāra iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nāhuṣākhyāne aṣṭa uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nava adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ praṇipatya prasādya eva vasiṣṭham tapatām varam āmam tri aniḥ jagāma atha bāṇa pāṇiḥ dhanurdharaḥ a eṇasya mām sam su vipācya bhojitam bālaḥ tayā a rakṣitaḥ eva buddhyā āyoḥ su putraḥ sa guṇaḥ ca yuktaḥ tena eva māṃsena su saṃskṛtena mṛṣṭena pakvena rasa anugena tam eva daityam suharṣeṇa vyabhojayat tadā harṣeṇa api samāviṣṭaḥ jagāma aśoka sundarīm tām uvāca tatas tūrṇam kāma upahata cetanaḥ mām eva bhaja cāru aṅge bhuṅkṣva bhogān manonugān kim kariṣyasi tena tvam mānuṣeṇa gata āyuṣā prati uvāca samākarṇya śiva kanyā tapasvinī evam ākarṇya tad vākyam dānava uduṣṭa ceṣṭitaḥ tām uvāca viśāla akṣām prahasya eva punar punar jāta mātrasya bālasya nahuṣasya durātmanaḥ evam ākarṇya asau vākyam kopaḥ cakre su dāruṇam m anyathā tvām aham śapsye punar eva na saṃśayaḥ evam ākarṇitam tasyāḥ sūdena nṛpatim prati parityajya mahā rāja etām anyām samāśraya sūdena preṣitā udaityaḥ sa huṇḍaḥ pāpa cetanaḥ nirjagāma tvarā yuktaḥ sa svām bhāryām priyām prati ceṣṭitam na eva jānāti dāsyāsu udena yat kṛtam uvāca aśoka sundarī sāca mahatā atapasā kila taptā a kṛśībhūtā a tapasvinī tam tam dhyāyati punar punar upāya jṣāḥ sadā buddhyā udyamena api sarvadā sarvadā māyā upāyena yogena hṛtā aham pāpinā purā tathā saghātitaḥ putraḥ āyoḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati yam dṛṣṭvā daiva yogena bhavitāram anāmayam udyamena apipaśyeta kim vā anaśyati vāna vā kim vā asau yamaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kim vā a tad karma jam phalam bhāvi bhāvaḥ katham naśyet tatas vedaḥ pratiṣṭhati bhāvitaḥ devaiḥ saḥ katham ca anyathā bhavet evam eva mahā bhāga acintayam punar tanuḥ kāyaḥ pakṣābhyām hi vivarjitaḥ dvi bhuja uvam śa hastaḥ tuhāra kaṅkaṇa śobhitaḥ divya gam divya gam tām uvāca nirānam dām sa sutām śaṃkarasya hi kiṃnaram viṣṇu bhaktam mām preṣitam deva sattamaiḥ huṇḍena pāpa cāreṇa vadha artham tasya dhīmataḥ kṛtam eva akhilam karma hṛtaḥ ca āyu sutaḥ śubhe huṇḍaḥ evam vijānāti āyu putraḥ hṛtaḥ mayā tu viśāla akṣe iti jānāti vaiśubhe bhavatām śrāvayitvā ahi gataḥ saudānavaḥ adhamaḥ svena karma vipākena puṇyasya api mahā yaśāḥ svarjitasya mahā bhāgena āśam icchanti ghātakāḥ duṣṭa ātmānaḥ mahā pāpāḥ para tejas vidūṣakāḥ teṣām yaśaḥ vināśa artham dine dine nānāvidhaiḥ upāyaiḥ teviṣa śastra ādibhiḥ tatas ham tum icchanti tam puṇyam puṇya karma abhirakṣitam tam pīḍayanti mahā pāpān nānā bhedaiḥ bala āvilaiḥ puṇyasya api mahā bhāge puṇyavam tam su rakṣitam vaiphalyam yānti teṣām vaiupāyāḥ pāpinām śubhe tratam tra aṇimam tra aścaśastra agni viṣa bandhanāḥ rakṣayanti mahātmānam deva puṇyaiḥ su rakṣitam tāraḥ bhasma tām yānti sa vai tiṣṭhati puṇya bhāj māyuputrasya vīrasya śubhe tasmāt ca rakṣitaḥ vīraḥ nahuṣaḥ balinām varaḥ mā akṛthāḥ dāruṇam duḥkham mā ca śokam akāraṇam sahi jīvati dharma ātmā mātrā pitrā vinā avane yathā śaśī virājeta sva kalābhiḥ sva tejasā tvayā a sārdham striyā ca eva pṛthivyām eka bhūpatiḥ bhaviṣyati mahā yogī yathā svarge tu vāsavaḥ yayātim nāma dharma jṣam prajā pālana tatparam tathā kanyā śatam ca api rūpa audārya guṇa anvitam yāsām puṇyaiḥ mahā rāja aindra lokam prayāsyati yayātiḥ nāma dharma ātmā ātmajaḥ te bhaviṣyati prajāpālaḥ mahā rājaḥ sarva jīva dayā paraḥ uruḥ nāma tṛtīyaḥ ca caturthaḥ vīryavān yaduḥ evam putrāḥ mahā vīryāḥ tejasvinaḥ mahā balāḥ bhaviṣyanti mahātmānaḥ sarva tejaḥ samanvitāḥ yadoḥ ca eva sutā vīrāḥ siṃ ha tulya parākramāḥ teṣām nāma anibhadram tegadataḥ bhojaḥ ca bhīmakaḥ ca api aṃ dhakaḥ kuṣjaraḥ tathā mahā bhāga ātmā asatya ādhāraḥ bhaviṣyati ṣaṣṭhaḥ tuśrutasenaḥ caśrutādhāraḥ tusaptamaḥ tad daḥ ṣṭraḥ mahā vīryaḥ samare kāla jit balī yadoḥ vīryā yādava ākhyā varānane teṣām tu putrāḥ pautrāḥ te bhaviṣyanti sahasraśas sameṣyati mahā prājṣa stava bhartā aśubha ānane nihatya dānavam huṇḍam tvā eva pariṇeṣyati duḥkha jātāni sa uṣṇa ani netrābhyām hi patanti ca mārjayatimānadaḥ āyoḥ ca duḥkham uddhṛtya sva kulam tārayiṣyati sukhinam pitaram kṛtvā prajāpālaḥ bhaviṣyati etat te sarvam ākhyātam devānām kathanam śubhe tvam eva śṛṇu sundari parityajya lobham ca api śiva ātmajā iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nāhuṣa ākhyāne nava adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ daśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ āmam tryasa munīn sarvān vasiṣṭham tapatām varam tatas te munayaḥ sarve vasiṣṭha ādyāḥ tapodhanāḥ āśirbhiḥ abhinam dyainam āyuputram mahā balam mudā puṣpa vṛṣṭim pracakruḥ tenahuṣasya ca mūrdhani atha devaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ suraiḥ sārdham samāgataḥ dadau śastrāṇi ca astrāṇi sūrya teja upamāni ca tāni divyāni ca astrāṇi divya rūpa upamaḥ abhavat tā devatāḥ sarvāḥ sahasrākṣam atha abruvan danā udīyatām asmai nahuṣāya sura īśvara devānām matam ājṣāya vajrapāṇiḥ sva sārathim hūya mātalim tam tu ādideśa tatas dvijaiḥ mahātmānam uhyatām danena vai sacā uvāca sahasrākṣam kariṣyeta vaḥ śāsanam evam uktvā jagāma āśu hi āyu putram raṇa udyatam rājānam prati uvāca eva devarājasya bhāṣitam iti uvāca sahasrākṣaḥ tvā eva nṛpati īśvara hitvam dānavam saṅkhyetam huṇḍam pāpa cetanam samākarṇya sa rāja indraḥ sānam dapulaka udgamaḥ prasādāt devadevasya vasiṣṭhasya mahātmanaḥ dānavam sūdayiṣyāmi samara pāpa cetanam devānām ca viśeṣeṇa mama mamamāya apacāritam evam ukte mahā vākyenahuṣeṇa mahātmanā atha āyātaḥ svayam devaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ cakrāt cakram samutpāṭya sūryabim ba upamam mahat su vṛtta āram śubha āvaham tasmai śūlam su tīkṣṇam tejasā anvitam tena śūla vareṇa asau śobhate samara udyataḥ dvitīyaḥ śaṃkaraḥ ca asau tripura ghnaḥ yathā prabhuḥ brahmāstram dattavan brahmāvaruṇaḥ pāśam uttamam pratīkāśam śaṅkham ca nāda maṅgalam vajram indraḥ tathā śaktim vāyuḥ cāpam sa mārgaṇam śastrāṇi astrāṇi divyāni bahūni vividhāni ca hitaḥ ca api munibhiḥ tattva vedibhiḥ māruroha ratham divyam bhāsvaram ratna mālinam maṃ ṭāravaiḥ praṇadam ṭāsamākulam tapam stejasā tadvat daityānām mastakeṣusaḥ gam śīghram vegena yathā vāyuḥ sadāgatiḥ yatra asau dānavaḥ pāpaḥ tiṣṭhate sva balaiḥ yutaḥ tena mātalinā sārdham vāhakena mahātmanā iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nahuṣa ākhyāne daśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ devatānām varā nāryā uram bhā ādi apsarasaḥ tathā yutāḥ tatra yatra rājā asatiṣṭhati puram mahodayam nāma huṇḍasya api durātmanaḥ sa patākaiḥ mahā daṇḍaiḥ śobhamānam pura uttamam kailāsa śikhara ākāraiḥ sa unnataiḥ divam āsthitaiḥ prākāraiḥ ca mahā ratnaiḥ aṭṭālaka śataiḥ api parikhābhiḥ su pūrṇābhiḥ jalaiḥ svacchaiḥ praśobhitam su nārībhiḥ samākīrṇam puruṣaiḥ ca mahā prabhaiḥ nānā prabhāvaiḥ divyaiḥ ca śobhamānam mahā udayam rāja śreṣṭhaḥ mahā vīraḥ nahuṣaḥ dadṛśe puram puraprām tevanam divyam divya vṛkṣaiḥ alaṅkṛtam tat viveśa mahā vīra ūnam danam hi yathā amaraḥ praviṣṭaḥ drovana madhye sarit taṭe yuktāḥ divyān aryaḥ samāgatāḥ sūtāḥ ca māgadhāḥ sarve etam stuvanti nṛpa uttamam rājānam āyu putram tam bhrājamānam yathā aravim śuśrāva gītam madhuram nahuṣaḥ kiṃnara īritam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nahuṣa ākhyāne ekādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tat eva gānam ca sura aṅganābhiḥ gītam samākarṇya ca gītakaiḥ dhruvaiḥ samākulā ca apibabhūva tatrasā āśam bhu putrī paricintayānā āsanāt tūrṇam utthāya mahā utsāhena sam yutā tūrṇaṃgatā avarārohā tapas bhāva samanvitā tam dṛṣṭvā deva saṃkāśam divya rūpa sama prabham divya gam dhānu lipta aṅgam divya mālā abhiśobhitam divyaiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ vastraiḥ śobhitam tam yathā sūryam divya lakṣaṇasam yutam kim vā adevaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ gandharvaḥ vā bhaviṣyati anāga sutaḥ saḥ yat kim vā avidyādharaḥ bhavet deveṣu na eva paśyāmi kutas yakṣeṣu jāyate anayā alīlayā vīraḥ sahasrākṣaḥ upijāyate śam vācā ayam manobhavaḥ kim vā apituḥ sakhiḥ āmesyāt paulastyaḥ ayam dhanādhipaḥ evam evam rūpa guṇa adhipāsā sametya aram bhāsu mahā sakhībhiḥ uvāca tām śam bhusutām prahasya iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nahuṣa ākhyāne dvādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayodaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ Raṃ bho uvāca tapasaḥ kṣaraṇam syāt vaipuruṣasya api cintanāt tapasi memanas līnam nahuṣasya api kāmyayā cālayitum śaktāḥ deva asura mahā uragāḥ enam dṛṣṭvā mahā bhāge me manaḥ calate bhṛśam tum icchāmi aham gatvā evam utsuka tāṃ gatam tat me tvad kāraṇam brūhi yat yasti jñānam uttamam āyuputrasya bhāryā aham devaiḥ sṛṣṭā a mahātmabhiḥ Raṃ bho uvāca sarveṣu eva mahābhāge deha rūpeṣu bhāmini brahma jñāna rūpaḥ sanātanaḥ prakṛtim na eva jānāti jñāna vijñāna kīṅkalām ayam śuddhaḥ ca dharma jṣaḥ ātmā vetti ca sundari gaccham tyapi manaḥ tāpam enam dṛṣṭvā a mahā matim bhartā ayam āyu putraḥ te etat satyam na saṃśayaḥ anyam dṛṣṭvā a viśaṅketa puruṣam pāpa lakṣaṇam evam vidhiḥ kṛtaḥ devaiḥ satya pāśena baṃdhitaḥ evam ākarṇitam bhadre ātmanā atam ca sundari anyam bhāvam na jānāti āyu putram cavim evam prajānāti ātmā devaḥ sanātanaḥ draḥ nahuṣaḥ nāma vīryavān sutam etat te sarvam ākhyātam śāśvatam tvad manogatam huṇḍam hatvā amahā ghoram samara idānava adhamam tvām nayiṣyati sva sthānam āyoḥ ca gṛham uttamam hṛtaḥ daityena vīraiḥ dro nija puṇyena śeṣitaḥ pitṛ mātṛ vihīnaḥ tu gataḥ vṛddhim mahā vane evam ābhāṣitam śrutvā āram bhāyāḥ samudrajām satyam etat mayā adṛṣṭam su citram cāru hāsini manobhava samānam tupuruṣam divya lakṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā yathā sakhi tavyam āvābhyām sakhībhiḥ gṛham eva hi evam ābhāṣya sāram bhāga manāya upacakrame param gamanāya utsukām jṣātvā nahuṣasya anti kam prati uvāca nahuṣam vīra lakṣaṇam tasya anti kam susam prāpya preṣayāmāsatām sakhīm rūpiṇam kathayasva a kathām etām tava arthe āgata āyataḥ Raṃ bho uvāca evam uktvā āgatāram bhānahuṣam rājanam danam cāpa bāṇa dharam vīram dvitīyam iva vāsavam bhā aham samupāgatā śivasya kanyayā a vīra tayā aham paripreṣitā bhāryā rūpam varam śreṣṭham sṛṣṭam lokeṣu durlabham gandharvaiḥ pannagaiḥ siddhaiḥ cāraṇaiḥ puṇya lakṣaṇaiḥ svayam eva samāyātam strī ratnam tat mahā prājṣasam pūrṇam puṇya nirmitam sthitā evam bhajasva hi tvām ṛte sā avara āroha a puruṣam na eva yācate tu śrutvā avadhāritam vacaḥ pratyuttaram dadau ca atharam vacaḥ mama agre kathitam pūrvam vasiṣṭhena mahātmanā śrūyatām kāraṇam bhadre yathā saukhyam bhaviṣyati a hatvā dānavam huṇḍam na gacchāmi vara aṅganām mama bhāryā ānasam dehaḥ bhavatī vidhinā akṛtā mama arthe niścayam kṛtvā tapaḥ ācaritam tvayā hṛtā a tasmāt su pāpena bhavatī niyama anvitā tena dānavena adhamena vai bāla bhāva sthitaḥ devi pitṛ mātṛ vinākṛtaḥ tasmāt tam vaidānava adhamam paścāt tvām upaneṣye aham vasiṣṭhasya āśramam prati evam visarjitā tena sa tvaram sā āgatā punar ca samāsena tathā sarvam raṃ bhāsā dvija sattama tad aśoka sundarī sātu avadhārya subhāṣitam tasthau tatra tayā sārdham bhayā tadā bhartuḥ ca kīdṛśam vīryam iti paśyāmi vai sadā iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nahuṣākhyāne trayodaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ caturdaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ paricārakāḥ nahuṣasya api sam vādam raṃ bhayātu yathāśrutam huṇḍam sarvam subhāṣitam tam ākarṇya sa cukrodha dūtam vākyam atha abravīt gaccha sambhāṣata itayā sārddham puruṣaḥ śivakanyayā svāmi nirdeśam ākarṇya jagāma laghu dānavaḥ dhanuṣā divya bāṇaiḥ tu sabhāyām hi bhayaṃkaraḥ anayā aram bhayāte adya anyayā aśiva kanyayā tad tvaraṃga cham ātiṣṭhat duḥsahaḥ dānava adhipaḥ uvāca yaḥ asau āyus bali rājā saptadvīpā adhipaḥ prabhuḥ nahuṣam nāma vikhyātam deva brāhmaṇa pūjakam huṇḍena apahṛtam bālye svāminā tava dānavaiḥ sā iyam kanyā śivasya api daityena apahṛtā purā ghoram tapaḥ carati eṣā āhuṇḍasya api vadhāya ca yaḥ hama ādau hṛtaḥ bālaḥ tvayā ayaḥ sūtikāgṛhāt dāsyāḥ api kare dattaḥ sūdasya api durātmanā śrūyatām asya apihuṇḍa daityasya duṣṭasya pāpa karmaṇaḥ anyām śca dānavān ghorān nayiṣyeyam a sādanam mām eva viddhi pāpiṣṭha evam kathaya dānavam evam ākarṇya tat sarvam nahuṣasya mahātmanaḥ gatvā āhuṇḍam sa duṣṭa ātmā ācacakṣe asi abhāṣitam niśamya tad mukhāt tūrṇam cukrodha ditija īśvaraḥ kasmāt sūdena pāpena tayā dāsyāna ghātitaḥ saḥ iyam vṛddhim samāyātaḥ mayā a vyādhiḥ upekṣitaḥ atha enam ghātayiṣyāmi anayā aśiva kanyayā āyoḥ putraṅkhalam yuddhe bāṇaiḥ ebhiḥ śilā śitaiḥ evam sa cintayitvā atu sārathim vākyam abravīt turagaiḥ sādhubhiḥ śivaiḥ senādhyakṣam samāhūya eti uvāca sama āturaḥ sajjatām mama sainyam tvam śūrān nāgān prakalpaya sa ārohaiḥ turagān yodhān patākā chattra cāmaraiḥ evam ākarṇya tat tasya huṇḍasya api tatas laghuḥ senā adhyakṣaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ sarvam cakre yathāvidhi gam udyam tam samare vīram durāpam deva dānavaiḥ tejaḥ jvālā samākīrṇam dvitīyam iva bhāskaram uvāca sarve vṛṣuḥ tam śara uttamaiḥ khaḍgaiḥ pāśaiḥ mahā śūlaiḥ śaktibhiḥ tu paraśvadhaiḥ sam yuga itena nahuṣeṇa mahātmanā saṃ rabdhāḥ garjamānāḥ te yathā meghāḥ girau tathā tad vikramam samālokya āyu putraḥ pratāpavān vajra sphoṭa samaḥ śabdaḥ cāpasya api mahātmanaḥ nahuṣeṇa kṛtaḥ viprāḥ dānavānām bhaya pradaḥ mahatā atena ghoṣeṇa dānavāḥ pracakam pire paśmala āviṣṭa hṛdaya ābhagna sattva āmahā have iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nahuṣa ākhyāne caturdaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ paṣcadaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tatas tu asau sam yati rājamānaḥ samudyataḥ cāpa dharaḥ mahātmā mūlayati iha pādapān tathā eva rājāni jaghāna dānavān tathā sa rājā asurān mada utkaṭān anāśayat bāṇa varaiḥ su tīkṣṇaiḥ na śekuḥ dānavāḥ sarve bāṇa varṣam mahātmanaḥ mṛtāḥ kecid drutāḥ kecid kecid naṣṭa amahā havāt uvāca mahā tejam mahā prājṣam mahā dānava nāśanam nṛpanam sthitaḥ gatvā idam ābhāṣya tiṣṭha sthā iti ca āhave uvāca sthitaḥ asmi samare paśya tvām aham haṃ tum āgataḥ aham tvām tuhaniṣyāmi dānavam pāpa cetanam iti uktvā dhanuḥ ādāya bāṇān agni śikhā upamān chattreṇa dhriyamāṇena śuśubhe saḥ api sam yuge indrasya sārathim divyam mātalim vākyam abravīt turagān ścodayāmāsa mahā vāta java upamān utpetuḥ catatovāha aham bare chattreṇa om duvarṇena rathena api patākinā nabhastalam prāpya yathā sūryaḥ virājate atha huṇḍoḥ ratha sthaḥ api rājamānaḥ sva tejasā tadā āsīt mahā prājṣa dāruṇam bhīti dāyakam su bāṇaiḥ niśitaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ kaṅka pattraiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ taretadā sa viddhaḥ tu tadā bāṇaiḥ adhikam śuśubhe nṛpaḥ sa aruṇaḥ karamālābhiḥ udayam sa ca divākaraḥ sūrya vat śobhateḥ rāja a pūrva kālasya cām bare tasya dānavam vākyam abravīt tiṣṭha tiṣṭha kṣaṇam punar iti uktvā āturaṇe daityam jaghāna daśabhiḥ śaraiḥ devaiḥ ca cāraṇaiḥ siddhaiḥ kṛtaḥ śabdaḥ suharṣa jaḥ jaya jaya iti rāja indra śaṅkhān dadhmuḥ punar punar ca ma ādāya bāṇam āśīviṣa upamam sthīyatām sthīyatām yuddhena mṛtaḥ asmi tvayā āhataḥ ekaviṃśatibhiḥ bāṇaiḥ nahuṣam ca ahanat punar paṣcabhiḥ mātalim viddhvā rathanīḍam tu sapta tribhiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ dānavaḥ śikhi pattribhiḥ durātmanaḥ lāghavam tasya sam dṛṣṭvā a devatā vismayam gatāḥ tasya pauruṣam āpaśyasa rājā dānava uttamam śūra ūsi kṛtavidya ūsi dhīra ūsi raṇa paṇḍitaḥ iti ukvā dānavam tam tudhanuḥ visphārya bhūpatiḥ turagān pātayāmāsa caturbhiḥ tasya sāyakaiḥ daśabhiḥ chittvā śaraiḥ ca vidalīkṛtaḥ sarva aṅga iṣu catrim śadbhiḥ vivyādha danuja īśvaram hata aśvaḥ virathaḥ jātaḥ bāṇa pāṇiḥ dhanurdharaḥ dhāvamānasya huṇḍasya khaḍgam ciccheda bhūpatiḥ kṣurapraiḥ niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ ca rma cit cheda bhūpatiḥ atha huṇḍaḥ sa duṣṭa ātma a samālokya samam tatas mumoca laghu vikramaḥ bajra vegam samāyām tam dadṛśe nṛpatiḥ tadā mudgaram sva navam tam barāt tatas daśabhiḥ niśitaiḥ bāṇaiḥ kṣurapraiḥ ca sva vikramāt mudgaram patitam dṛṣṭvā daśa khaṇḍa mayam bhuvi khaḍgena tīkṣṇa dhāreṇa tasya bāhum vicicchide sa gadam patitam bhūmau sa aṅga daṅkaṭaka anvitam mahā rāvam tatas kṛtvā vajra sphoṭa samam tadā rudhireṇa apidigdha aṅgaḥ dhāvamānaḥ mahā have durnivāryaḥ samāyātaḥ pārśvam tasya ca bhūpateḥ nahuṣeṇa mahā śaktyā tāḍitaḥ hṛdi dānavaḥ patitaḥ sahasā bhūmau vajra āhata eva acalaḥ tasmin daitye gate bhūmau itare dānava āgatāḥ viviśuḥ kati durgeṣu kati pātālam āśritāḥ devāḥ praharṣam ājagmuḥ gandharvāḥ siddha cāraṇāḥ hate tasmin mahā pāpena huṣeṇa mahātmanā tām deva rūpām tapasā a pravardhitām sa āyu putraḥ pratilabhya harṣitaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nahuṣa ākhyāne paṣcadaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣoḍaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ harṣitā nahuṣam prāpya vikrām tam tam uvāca tapasvinī aham te dharmataḥ patnī devaiḥ diṣṭā a tapasvinī ham tapasi sthitā uvāca āram tu tām raṃ bhām tu manoramām tena eva ratha varyeṇa vasiṣṭhasya āśramam prati jagāma laghu vegena tābhyām saha mahā yaśāḥ tam āśrama gatam vipram samālokya praṇamya ca tayā sārdham mahā tejā harṣeṇa mahatā anvitaḥ yathā yuddham raṇejātam nihata udānava adhamaḥ nivedayāmāsa sarvam vasiṣṭhāya mahātmane yaśiṣṭhaḥ api samākarṇya nahuṣasya viceṣṭitam harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭa abhinam vivāham kārayāmāsa agni brāhmaṇa saṃnidhau mithunam preṣitam punar mātaram pitaram paśyat rutaṅga tvā mahā mate tvām ca dṛṣṭvā ahita imā mātā pitā sauta vasu vrata harṣeṇa vṛddhim āpnotu parvaṇi iva tu sāgaraḥ evam sam preṣitaḥ vīraḥ muninā brahma sūnunā namaskṛtya dvijendram taṅga tomātalinā tadā uvāca apsaras menikā nāma preṣitā a daivataiḥ tatas āyoḥ bhāryā su duḥkhena patitā aśoka sāgare tām uvāca mahā bhāgām devīm imim dumatīm prati mum caśokam mahā bhāge tanayam paśyasa snuṣam nihatya dānavam pāpam te putra apahārakam samāyām tam sabhāyām ca vīra śriyā samanvitam su vṛttam saṅgaretasya nahuṣeṇa yathākṛtam menikāyāḥ vacaḥ śrutvā harṣeṇa mahatā anvitā sa amṛtam su priyam proktam manaḥ protsāha kārakam evam ābhāṣyatām devī rājānam idam abravīt tava putraḥ mahā bāhuḥ samāyātaḥ hisām eva ivara apsarāḥ bhartāram eva mā ābhāṣya virarāma su harṣitā samākarṇya nṛpa indra stutām uvāca priyām prati purā proktam mahā bhāge muninā nāradena hi duḥkham tam nihatya suvīryeṇa dānavam ca eṣyate sutaḥ sam jātam satyam eva vaimuninā ābhāṣitam purā dattātreyaḥ muni śreṣṭhaḥ sākṣāt devaḥ bhaviṣyati huśrūṣitaḥ tvayā devi mayā ca tapasā purā putra ratnam tena dattam vaiṣṇavām śapra dhārakam sadā ahaniṣyati param dānavam pāpa cetanam maḥ suta uttamaḥ evam devīm dumatīm tadā harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ viṣṇum sasmāra vaipunaḥ bhaya apaham saukhya pradam narāṇām sat vaiṣṇavānām iha mokṣa dam param iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre nahuṣa ākhyāne ṣoḍaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptadaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nahuṣaḥ priyayā sārdham tayā ca evasaram bhayā nāgāhvayam puram prāptaḥ sarva śobhā samanvitam yuktam patākābhiḥ alaṃkṛtam nānā vāditra nādaiḥ ca baṃ dicāraṇa śobhitam deva rūpa upamaiḥ puṇyaiḥ puruṣaiḥ samalaṅkṛtam nārībhiḥ divya rūpābhiḥ gaja aśvaiḥ syaṃ danaiḥ tathā nānā maṅgala śabdaiḥ ca veda dhvani samākulam gīta vāditra śabdaiḥ ca vīṇā veṇu svanaiḥ tatas sarva śobhā samākīrṇam viveśa sapura uttamam veda maṅgala ghoṣaiḥ ca brāhmaṇaiḥ ca iva pūjitaḥ dadṛśe pitaram vīraḥ mātaram ca supuṇyakām harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ pituḥ pāda ona nāmasaḥ pādau punar punar nanāma bhakti ābhāvena ebhayayoḥ tā avarānanā ca eva api adarśayat namaskṛtvā samābhāṣya sva gurum danaḥ evam uktaḥ mahā bhāgaḥ dapulaka udgamaḥ uvāca adya eva vyādhayaḥ naṣṭāḥ duḥkha śokau ubhau gatau bhavataḥ darśanāt putra su tuṣṭyā āhṛṣyate jagant śoddharaṇam kṛtvā aham eva samuddhṛtaḥ uvāca parvaṇi prāpya eṃ vṛddhim yāti mahā bhāga tathā aham te darśanāt mākulā darśanāt te mahā prājṣa dhanyā jātā asmi mānada śiraḥ ca āghrāyatasya apivatsam dhenuḥ yathāsvakam abhinam dya sutam prāptam nahuṣam deva rūpiṇam ha ca arcayat devī puṇya aim dumatī tadā uvāca atha asaumātaram puṇyām devīm imim dumatīm sutaḥ kathayāmāsa vṛttām tam yathā āharaṇam ātmanaḥ sva bhāryāyāḥ tathā utpattim prāptim ca eva mahā yaśāḥ huṇḍena api yathā yuddham huṇḍasya api nipātanam mātā pitroḥ yathāvṛttam tayoḥ ānam harṣeṇa mahatau iṣṭau sam jātau pūrṇa mānasau jigāya pṛthivīm sarvām saptadvīpām sa pattanām pitre samarpayāmāsa vasu pūrṇām vasum dharām pitaram yājayāmāsa rājasūya ādibhiḥ tadā mahā yajṣaiḥ ca dānaiḥ ca vrataiḥ niyamasam yamaiḥ sudānaiḥ yaśasā apuṇyaiḥ yajṣaiḥ puṇya mahā udayaiḥ tusam pūrṇau kṛtau tautu pitarau cāyu sūnunā atha devāḥ samāgatya nāgāhvayam pura uttamam abhyaṣim cat mahātmānam nahuṣam vīra mardanam munibhiḥ ca su siddhaiḥ ca āyunā tena bhūbhujā śivakanyayā yuktaḥ divam jagāma dharma ātmā devaiḥ siddhaiḥ su pūjitaḥ puruṣaiḥ puṇya karma ākhyaiḥ īdṛśam puṇyam uttamam mahā bhāga kim anyaiḥ śoka kārakaiḥ yathā jātaḥ sa dharma ātmā anahuṣaḥ pitṛ tārakaḥ pulasya dharttā sarvasya nahuṣaḥ jñāna paṇḍitaḥ āyoḥ sutasya api śṛṇoti martyaḥ bhogān sa bhuktvā eti padam murāreḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne guru tīrtha māhātmye cyavana caritre nahuṣa ākhyāne saptadaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ netrābhyām aśrubim ca mahā jale puṣpāṇi divya rūpāṇi saugam ca davaḥ asthi carma avaśeṣaḥ tu jaṭā cīra dharaḥ punar hema varṇāni divyāni nītvā śivam samarcayet mate arcayitvā aśivam saḥ utha kasmāt paścāt pradevati śṛṇuvat sa pravakṣyāmi vṛttām tam devanirmitam caritram sarva pāpa ghnam viṣṇoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ yaḥ sauhuṇḍaḥ mahā vīryaḥ nahuṣeṇa hata raṇe nihatam pitaram śrutvā a sa amātyam sa paricchadam āyu putreṇa vīreṇa nahuṣeṇa balīyasā jānanti devatāḥ sarva aduḥsaham samara aṅgaṇe huṇḍa ātmajaḥ vihuṇḍaḥ tu trailokyam haṃ tumudyataḥ pituḥ vairam kariṣyāmi haniṣye mānavān surān evam samudyataḥ pāpī deva brāhmaṇakam ṭakaḥ upadravam samārebhe prajāḥ pīḍayatecasaḥ tasya eva tejasā dagdhāḥ devāḥ ca indra purogamāḥ haraṇam devadevasya jagmuḥ viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ ūcuḥ capa ahinaḥ nityam vihuṇḍasya mahā bhayāt śrī viṣṇuḥ uvāca tu devatāḥ sarvāḥ su sukhena maheśvarāḥ vihuṇḍam nāśayiṣyāmi pāpiṣṭham devakam ṭakam evam ābhāṣya tān devān māyām kṛtvā janārdanaḥ māyā mayam cakāra atha strī rūpaḥ ca guṇa anvitam cakāra rūpam atulam viṣṇoḥ māyā pramohinī vihuṇḍasya vadha arthāya rūpa lāvaṇya śālinī sa devānām vadha arthāya divya mārgam jagāmaha tetatomāyām apaśyat ditija īśvaraḥ tayā a vimohitaḥ daityaḥ kāma bāṇa kṛtām taraḥ ātma nāśam na jānāti kāla rūpām vara striyam tām dṛṣṭvā anava hema ābhām rūpa draviṇa śālinīm lubdhaḥ vihuṇḍaḥ uvāca vara aṅganām uvāca sapta koṭi mitaiḥ ca iva puṣpaiḥ pūjaya śaṃkaram teṣām puṣpa kṛtām mālām mamakam tadā aham supriyā bhāryā bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ uvāca ṣaṣ ani yāni puṇyāni divyāni ditija īśvaraḥ janāḥ pṛcchamānaḥ sa duṣṭa ātma a kāma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ kāmodakam drumam brūhikām tam puṣpa samanvitam uvāca kāmodaḥ tad hāsāt jajṣire daitya sugam dhī nivarāṇi api saṃśayaḥ hṛdyāni pīta puṣpāṇi saurabhena yutāni ca tena api ekena puṣpeṇa yaḥ samarcati śaṃkaram tasya īpsitam mahā kāmam sam pūrayatiśaṃkaraḥ tādṛśāṇi eva puṣpāṇi lohitāni mahanti ca sparśam na kārayet evam ākarṇitam tena vākyam śukrasya bhāṣitam uvāca sātu kutrāstika āmoda bhṛgunam uvāca kāmoda ākhyam puram tatra nirmitam viśvakarmaṇā kāmoda pattanena nārī divya bhogaiḥ alaṃkṛtā tathā ca ābharaṇaiḥ bhāti sarva devaiḥ su pūjitā tavyam pūjitavyā avara apsarāḥ upāyena apipuṇyena tām prahāsaya dānavaiḥ evam uktvā ātuyogīm sa śukra udānavam prati virarāma mahā tejāḥ sva kāryāya udyataḥ abhavat iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāne aṣṭādaśa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ekonaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yasyāḥ prahasanāt tāta suhṛdyāni bhavanti vai puṣpāṇi divya gam dhīni durlabhāni sura asuraiḥ kasmāt tu devatāḥ sarvāḥ pravām chanti mahā mate māyā ati hāsya puṣpaiḥ supūjitaḥ modā sā bhavet kātukasya putrī vara aṅganā hāsyāt tasyām ca kaḥ guṇaḥ tad kathām brūhi sakalām vistareṇa ca thuḥ sāgaram kṣīram amṛta artham samudyatāḥ mathanāt deva daityānām kanyā ratna catuṣṭayam varuṇena darśitam pūrvam somena eva tathā punar paścāt sam darśitam puṇyam amṛtam kalaśe sthitam pūrvam devānām hitam icchati tathā yad anya a tathā ākhyāta a kāma uda anya a pracakṣate tāsām madhyevarā śreṣṭhā pūrvam jātā amahā mate tasmāt jyeṣṭhā iti vikhyātā loke pūjyā sadā eva hi amṛtasya taraṃgāt cakāma udākhyā babhūva ha somaḥ rājā tathā alakṣmī jajṣāte amṛtāt api trailokya bhūṣaṇaḥ sa umaḥ sam jātaḥ śaṃkara priyaḥ mṛtyu roga harā jāta asurāṇām vāruṇī tathā icchatām amṛtāt utthitā devī kāmodā nāma puṇya dā prayāsyati viṣṇu prīti karā sā tu bhaviṣyati sadā eva hi tulasī nāma sā apuṇyā bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tayā asaha jagannāthoḥ amiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tulasyāḥ patram ekam yonītvā kṛṣṇāya dāsyati ham na itasya upakārāṇām kim asmai ca dadāmi aham evaṃkāmā uda nāmā asaupūrvam jātā a samudra jā tasyāḥ patanti vai amlānāni supuṣpāṇi yaḥ gṛhṇāti samudyataḥ pūjayet śaṃkaram devam brahmānam mādhavam tathā roditi eṣā yadā sācakena duḥkhena duḥkhitā tāni ca eva mahā bhāga hṛdyāni su mahanti ca śaṃkaram tasya duḥkham ca saṃtāpaḥ jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ puṣpaiḥ tu tādṛśaiḥ devān sakṛt arcati pāpa dhīḥ etat te sarvam ākhyātam kāma udākhyānam uttamam tyaiḥ eva dṛṣṭvā vikramasāhasam vihuṇḍasya apipāpasya udyamam sāhasam tadā nāradam preṣayāmāsa mohaya enam durāsadam nāradaḥ tu athasam śrutya vākyam viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ gacchamānam durātmānam kāmodām pratidānavam sām prataṅkena kāryeṇa kasya artham kena noditaḥ brahma ātmajam namaskṛtya prati uvāca kṛtām jaliḥ mahā varyam punar prāha kārya kāraṇam ātmanaḥ danasya vana uddeśa ikācid nārī vara ānanā tasya adarśana mātreṇa gataḥ ahaṃkāma vaśya tām pūjayasva mahā devam puṣpaiḥ tu sapta koṭibhiḥ tatas te supriyā bhāryā bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ tām aham kāmayiṣyāmi isim dhujām śuṇusām pratam manas ullāsaiḥ mahā hāsaiḥ hāsayiṣyāmi aham punar prītā asatī mahā bhāgā hasiṣyati punar punar tasmāt hāsyāt patiṣyanti divyāni kusumāni ca taiḥ tu devam umākām tam pūjayiṣyāmi sām tam tena pūjā pradānena tuṣṭaḥ dāsyati me phalam ha īśvaraḥ sarva bhūta īśaḥ śaṃkaraḥ loka bhāvanaḥ uvāca viṣṇuḥ asti sumedhāvī sarva daitya kṣaya āvahaḥ yena upāyena puṣpāṇi kāmoda ākhyāni dānavaiḥ gaṅgā toya iṣu divyāni patiṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ tāni tvam ca mohayitvā tatas punar tatas ca satu dharma ātmā cintayāmāsa vaipunaḥ katham aśrūṇi sā amum ced kena upāyena duḥkhitā tatas buddhiḥ samutpannā a kāma uda ākhyam puraṅgāt iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmodākhyāne ekonaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mās śa adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ puram divyam sarva deva samākulam prāpya praviveśa dvijottamaḥ tu tatas dṛṣṭvā sarva kāma samākulām tayā āsam pūjitaḥ vipraḥ su vākyaiḥ svāgata ādibhiḥ divya āsane samārūḍhaḥ tām papraccha dvijottamaḥ anāmayam capapraccha āśīrbhiḥ abhinam dyatām uvāca prasādāt bhavatām viṣṇoḥ sukhena vartayāmi aham kathayasva mahā prājṣa tvam praśna uttara kāraṇam mama aṅgemati nāśakaḥ supta yātu maya adṛṣṭaḥ svapnaḥ vaidāruṇaḥ mune avyaktaḥ a sauhṛṣīkeśaḥ saṃ sāram sagamiṣyati tadā prabhṛti duḥkhena vyāpitā aham mahā mate tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi bhavān jñānavatām varaḥ uvāca bhū svapna uttamaḥ hi puṇyasya phala dāyakaḥ anyat evam pravakṣyāmi svapnasya kāraṇam śubhe mahā vātām dolanaiḥ ca calam truṭam sūkṣmāḥ tasmāt udaka sam cayāt bahis eva patam śubhe punar layam prayām vai mad aśuddhaḥ viraktaḥ tu rāga dveṣa vivarjitaḥ paṣcabhūta ātmakānām ca muṣitvā eva su niścalaḥ ṣaḍviṃśati suta tvānām madhye ca eṣa virājate śuddha ātmā akevalaḥ nityaḥ prakṛteḥ saṅga tiṅgāt tad bhāvaiḥ vāyu rūpaiḥ ca calate sthāna toya dā tṛ ātma aśubham nāma tasya eva prakathyate payasaḥ ca yathā bhinnābhavam tyam bukaṇāḥ śubhe sahi pṛthvī sava evāyuḥ sacā api ākāśaḥ eva hi sa vaitoyam sa dīpyeta ete paṣca purākṛtāḥ manaḥ tejasaḥ bhūta amala rūpa amahātmanaḥ tasya api saṃgatim prāptāḥ ekatvam hi prayānti te sva ātma bhāva pradoṣeṇa nāśayanti varānane tatim paḍam anyam icchanti vāram vāram varānane teṣām krīḍā vihāraḥ yam sṛṣṭi sambandha kāraṇam punar bhūtiḥ punar hāniḥ tādṛśasya punar punar apām rūpasya dṛṣṭām tam tadvat eṣām na saṃśayaḥ tya apaḥ eva ca ātma ādayaḥ hi amībhadre nitya rūpāḥ na saṃśayaḥ piṇḍaḥ eva praṇaśyeta teṣām sam jātaḥ eva ca viṣayāṇām su doṣaiḥ sa rāga dveṣa ādibhiḥ hataḥ prāṇāḥ prayānti vaipiṇḍāt paṣcapam ca ātmakāt vija ca tṛ ātmā a yathā ca agneḥ sphuliṅgaḥ tu prakāśate tathā aprakāśam āyā ati dṛśya adṛśyaḥ prajāyate mad brahma sadā jāgarti nityaśas tara ātmā aprabaddhaḥ tu prakṛtyāḥ ca mahā guṇaiḥ tara ātma asukham vrajet paścāt sam jāyate nidrā tāmasī layava ṛddhinī merumullam tadā rātriḥ prajāyeta yāvat na udayate raviḥ tara ātmā prakāśate bhāvaiḥ tattva ātmakānām tu paṣcatattvaiḥ prapoṣitaiḥ pūrva janma sthitaiḥ piṇḍaiḥ am tṛ ātmā a pragṛhyate tara ātma avaidoṣaiḥ baddhaḥ praṇīyate śuṣka abhastrā yathā śvāsam kurutā iva āyu pūritā evaṃkāyaḥ pramugdhaḥ tu mṛta kalpaḥ prajāyate tatas nidrā mahā māyātasya aṅgeṣu prayāti sā tathā ca āsye nāsikā agre pratiṣṭhati thet hṛd gataḥ nābhi maṇḍale hi tu prabhāvāt ca audānaḥ nāma mārutaḥ prajāyate mahā tīvra abala rodham karoti saḥ tathā ca ātma āsusam lagnaḥ prāṇa vāyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ tṛ ātma prasaktaḥ tu prāṇa vāyuḥ śubha ānane pūrva janma arjitān vāsān smṛtvā tatra pradhāvati tatrasam sthaḥ mahā prājṣaḥ sva icchayā āramate punar evam nānāvidhān svapnān tarā ātmā aprapaśyati uttamām śca viruddhām śca karma yuktān prapaśyati girīm śca auccāvacān prapaśyati jalam nadīm taḍāgam ca payaḥ sthānā nipaśyati karma yuktaḥ varārohe lābha a lābha prakāśakaḥ tat bhāvyam ca varārohe viṣṇoḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati tad nimittam tvayā dṛṣṭaḥ duḥsvapnaḥ sa tu prekṣitaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe ekaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca na viduḥ devatāḥ sarvāḥ yasyām tam rūpam eva ca sāraḥ śṛṇu nāradaiḥ kasmāt prayāti sam sāram mama svāmī jagat patiḥ uvāca chṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi yat kṛtam tena cakriṇā yajṣa rakṣām karomi aham sitaḥ sarvaḥ sa yajṣaḥ pāpa cetanaiḥ sa yogīm śaśāpa bhṛguḥ eva tam daśa janmāni bhuṅkṣva tvam mad śāpa kaluṣīkṛtaḥ tad nimittam tvayā devi duḥsvapnaḥ parivīkṣitaḥ iti uktvā tāṅgataḥ vipraḥ brahma lokam sa nāradaḥ kṛṣṇasya api su duḥkhena duḥkhitā sā abhavat tadā ruroda karuṇam bāla ahāha iti vadatīm uhur tathā aśrūṇi duḥkhena apipramum cati tāni aśrūṇi pramuktāni gaṅgā toye patam ti api gaṅgā toye praphullāni vāhitāni prayānti vai dadṛśe dānava śreṣṭhaḥ viṣṇu māyā pramohitaḥ duḥkha jānina jānāti muninā a kathitāni api harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ parijagrāha saḥ asuraḥ sapta koṭibhiḥ daityaiḥ eṃ viṣṇu māyā pramohitaḥ atha kruddhā jagaddhātrī śaṃkaram vākyam abravīt śoka utpannāni padmāni gaṅgā toya gatāni vai ayam eṣa pragṛhṇāti kāma ākulita cetanaḥ pūjayet ca api duṣṭa ātma aśoka saṃ tāpa kārakaiḥ duḥkha jaiḥ śoka jaiḥ puṣpaiḥ tebhiḥ su śreyaḥ katham bhavet yādṛśena apibhāvena mām eva paripūjayet tādṛśeṇa api bhāvena asya siddhiḥ bhaviṣyati tad satya dhyāna vihīnaḥ uyam kāma udānyasta mānasaḥ sam jātaḥ pāpa cāritraḥ jahi devi sva tejasā evam ākarṇya tat vākyam śam bhoḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ asya eva saṃkṣayam śam śam bho kariṣyeta avaśāsanāt evam uktvā tatas devī tasya api vadha kāṅkṣayā kṛtvā amāyā mayam rūpam brāhmaṇasya mahātmanaḥ pūjayet śaṃkaram nātham su puṣpaiḥ pārijāta jaiḥ sametya dānavaḥ pāpaḥ divyām pūjām vināśayet su duḥkha ārtaḥ tad gataḥ bhāva tatparaḥ viṣṇoḥ ca eva mahā māyām pūrva dṛṣṭām sa dānavaḥ sasmāra dānavaḥ pāpaḥ kāma bāṇaiḥ prapīḍitaḥ tasyāḥ smaraṇa mātreṇa kam darpeṇa balīyasā kāla ākṛṣṭaḥ sa duṣṭa ātma aśoka jāta anita anisaḥ parigṛhya samāyātaḥ pūjana arthī maheśvaram devyā kṛtām hi pūjām ca su puṣpaiḥ pārijāta jaiḥ tām nirṇāśya su lobhena śoka jaiḥ paripūjayet netrābhyām tasya duṣṭasya bim davaḥ te aśru sambhavāḥ devī brāhmaṇa rūpeṇa tam uvāca mahā mate kaḥ bhavān pūjayet devam śoka ākula manāḥ sadā mastake śoka jānite apavitrāṇi me brūhi etam artham mama agratas uvāca padā sarva lakṣaṇa sam panna akāmasya āyatanam mahat tasyām ohenasam dagdhaḥ kāmena ākula tā aṅgāt teṣām puṣpa kṛtām mālām ṭhe parikṣipa koṭibhiḥ sapta saṅkhyātaiḥ pūjayasva maheśvaram tad artham pūjayāmi eva īśvaram phala dāyakam uvāca kvate bhāvaḥ kvate dhyānam kvate jñānam durātmanaḥ mad udāya avaram rūpam kīdṛśam vadasām kva labdhāni su puṣpāṇi tasya āhāsya udbhavāni ca uvāca bhāvam dhyānam na jānāmi na dṛṣṭa a sāmayā kadā gaṅgā toya gatāni eva parigṛhṇāmi nityaśas taiḥ aham pūjayāmi ekam śaṃkaram pravadāmi aham mama agre kathitam vipra śukreṇa api mahātmanā etat te sarvam ākhyātam yat ca pṛṣṭaḥ asmi sām pratam uvāca kāma udāra rodanāt jātaiḥ puṣpaiḥ tebhiḥ duḥkha sambhavaiḥ yādṛśeṇa api bhāvena puṣpaiḥ ca yādṛśaiḥ tvayā arcitaḥ devadeveśaḥ tādṛśam phalam āpnuhi divya pūjām vināśya evam śoka puṣpaiḥ prapūjasi asau doṣaḥ tava eva adya samutpannaḥ su dāruṇaḥ tasmāt daṇḍam pradāsyāmi bhuṅkṣva sva karma jam phalam tasya avākyam samākarṇya kāla kṛṣṭaḥ ubabhāṣatām re hanmi tvām iha khaḍgena anena api na saṃśayaḥ iti uktvā abrāhmaṇam tam sa niśitam khaḍgam ādade ham tu kāmaḥ sa duṣṭa ātmā abhyadhāvata dānavaḥ sā devī vipra rūpeṇa saṅkruddhā parameśvarī hanmi tvām iha khaḍgena anena api na saṃśayaḥ sva sthānam āgatam dṛṣṭvā a huṃkāram visasarja ha tena huṃkāra nādena patitaḥ dānava adhamaḥ niśceṣṭaḥ lokāḥ svāsthi aṅga tāḥ sarve duḥkha tāpa vivarjitāḥ etasmāt kāraṇāt vatsa sa strī vaiparidevati uvāca evam uktvā asu putram virarāma mahā prājṣaḥ kiṣcid na uvāca bhūpate iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre kāmoda ākhyāne ekaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvāviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca virarāma mahā prājṣaḥ kim cit na uvāca tān prati sthaḥ dvijaśreṣṭhaḥ tam uvāca mahā śukam kim vā adevaḥ atha gandharvaḥ kim vā avidyādharaḥ bhavān kasya śāpāt imām prāptaḥ yoniṃkīrasya pātakīm kasmāt te īdṛśam jñānam vartate ati driyam śuka kim vā ācchannena rūpeṇa anena api mahā mate bhramasi upaviśya āsane puṇya icchāyām āśraya śītalām na aham devaḥ ūna gandharvaḥ na aham vidyādharaḥ punar yaḥ ham vipra pravakṣyāmi tat meni gadataḥ śṛṇu kaśyapasya kule jātaḥ kaścid brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ sarva karma prakāśakaḥ rājamānaḥ śriyā vipraḥ ācāraiḥ tapasā atadā vasuśarma anāmaśarma adharmaśarma acatetrayaḥ aham mahā bhrātā a veda śāstra artha kovidaḥ punar tadvat ca āsīt guṇa adhikaḥ aham ekaḥ mahā mūrkhaḥ sam jātaḥ śṛṇu sattama sam jātaḥ kṣiti madhye tu na vidvān meguṇākaraḥ uvāca su duḥkhitaḥ evam ākarṇya tat tasya pituḥ vākyam mayā aśubham na aham tāta gamiṣyāmi guroḥ geham su duḥkha dam yatravaitāḍanam nityam bhrū bhaṅga ādi ca krośanam annam na dṛśyate tatra karmaṇā śṛṇu sattamaiḥ tasmāt duḥkham ayam diram bhokṣye svapsye prasādāt te kariṣye krīḍanam pitar ḍiṃ bhaiḥ sārdham sukhena api divārātram ataḥ mām uvāca sadharma ātma amūḍham jṣātvā su duḥkhitaḥ mā a putra sāhasam kārṣīḥ vidyā artham udyamam kuru yaśaḥ kīrtiḥ tathā atulā jñānam svargaḥ ca mokṣaḥ ca tasmāt vidyām prasādhaya pūrvam su duḥkha mūlā atu paścāt vidyā sukha pradā tasmāt sādhaya putra tvam vidyām guru gṛham vraja mama lajjā samutpannā jīva nāśa karā tadā tāparaḥ jātaḥ duḥkha śoka samākulaḥ katham vidyām aham jāne katham dāmi aham guṇān katham mama jāyate svargaḥ katham mokṣam vrajāmi aham devatāyatane duḥkhī upaviṣṭaḥ tu aham kadā mad bhāgyaiḥ preritaḥ kaścid siddha ekaḥ samāgataḥ nirāśraya ujita āhāraḥ sa dānam spṛhaḥ para brahmaṇisam līnaḥ jñāna dhyāna samādhimān tam aham sam śritaḥ viprajñāna rūpam mahā matim dīna rūpaḥ hi aham jātaḥ umam dabhāgyaḥ tathā punar tasya eva hi tam evam śrāvitam sarvam sarvajṣa tvam katham vrajet etad artham mahā duḥkhībhavāt mama agatiḥ sadā sacā uvāca mahātmā ame sarvam jñānasya kāraṇam iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmye cyavanacaritre dvāviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayoviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi jñāna rūpam tava agratas mānasya na asti ca eva asthi saṅgrahaḥ kena dṛṣṭam tu vaijñānam kāni liṅgāni tasya vai divā prakāśakaḥ sūryaḥ rātrau prakāśayet śaśī prakāśayet tad pad aṅkena vaidhāmnā dṛśyate śṛṇu sattamaiḥ navim danti hi mūḍhāḥ te mohitāḥ viṣṇu māyayā cakāya madhye sthitam jñānam dhyāna dīptam anaupamam tat padam tat padam dra sūrya ādibhiḥ na ca hasta pādau vinā ajñānam acakṣuḥ karṇa varjitam sarvam āghrāti vipra indraiḥ śṛṇoti evam na saṃśayaḥ sarvām dhakāra nāśane svarge bhūmau ca pātāle sthāne sthāne ca dṛśyate pāya madhye sthitam jñānam navim danti ku buddhayaḥ jñāna sthānam pravakṣyāmi yasmāt jñānam prajāyate prāṇinām hṛdaye nityam nihitam sarvadā dvijaiḥ kāma ādīn su mahā bhogān mahā moha ādikān tathā tattva mūlam idam jñānam nirmalam sarva darśakam amāśritaḥ prakāśakojṣānīsarvadarśībhaviṣyasi vetsyasi tvam tumat prasādāt na prakāśitam etat te sarvam ākhyātam ātma vṛttām tam eva hi kīra yonim katham prāptaḥ bhavān jñānavatām varaḥ tat me tvam kāraṇam brūhi sarva saṃdeha nāśanam sam sargāt jāyate pāpam sam sargāt puṇyam eva hi lubdhakena api pāpena kena api ekaḥ śukaḥ śiśuḥ cāṭukām tam paṭu vākyam samīkṣya ca gṛhītaḥ brāhmaṇa ekena mama prītyā samarpitaḥ mām eva m vadate ityādi cāṭukaiḥ vākyaiḥ mām eva paribhāṣayet nītaḥ śukaḥ biḍālena mama duḥkhasya hetave biḍālena hataḥ pakṣītena eva bhakṣitaḥ hisaḥ śrutvā amṛtyuṃgatam vipra śukam tam cāṭu kārakam mahatā a duḥkha bhāvena asukhena ati duḥkhitaḥ tasya duḥkhena mugdhaḥ asmi tīvreṇa api su pīḍitaḥ rāmacam śloka rājā ititam vipramohāt calita mānasaḥ tatas aham duḥkha sam taptaḥ sam jātaḥ svena karmaṇā mad mad api vipra indra śukasya vismṛtam tat mayā ajñānam siddhena api prakāśitam taptaḥ tam śukam cāṭu kārakam gadya padya mayaiḥ vākyaiḥ sam skṛta akṣara sam yutaiḥ tvām vinākaḥ camām vatsa bodhayiṣyati sām pratam pakṣirāja prasādi mām evamādi pralapya aham śokena api su pīḍitaḥ maraṇe yādṛśaḥ bhāvaḥ matiḥ ca āsīt ca yādṛśā tādṛśeṇa api bhāvena jātaḥ aham dvija sattama smṛtam pūrva kṛtam karma svayam eva viceṣṭitam mayā apāpena mūḍhena kim kṛtam hi akṛtātmanā tena meniḥ malam jñānam jātam vaisarvadarśakam taram viprakṣālitam nirmalaṅkṛtam tasmin kāle mṛtaḥ vipra tad bhāvena api bhāvitaḥ tādṛśaḥ asmi punar jātaḥ śuka rūpaḥ mahī tale maraṇe yādṛśaḥ bhāvaḥ prāṇinām parijāyate tādṛśāḥ syuḥ tu sattvāḥ te tad rūpāḥ tad parāyaṇāḥ tad guṇāḥ tad svarūpāḥ hi mṛtya kālasya vipra indra bhāvena api na saṃśayaḥ atulam prāptavan jñānam aham atra mahā mate mahā prājṣajṣānena api mahā mate sarvam vidāmi aham hi atrasam sthitaḥ api na saṃśayaḥ sam etat te sarvam ākhyātam śṛṇu bhārgavanam dana sthala jāt ca udakāt sarvam bāhyam malam praṇaśyati tara kṛtān pāpān guru tīrtham praṇāśayet sam sāra tāraṇāya eva jaṅgamam tīrtham uttamam uvāca mahā prājṣaḥ cyavanāya mahātmane tattvam prakāśayitvā atuvirarāma nṛpa uttamaiḥ na aham rājyasya prakāmaye uvāca mate tasmāt dānam prakartavyam mām uddiśya ca bhūpate yādṛśena api bhāvena mām uddiśya dadāti yaḥ tādṛśam tasya vaibhāvam satyam eva ṅkaromi aham ṛṣīṇām darśanāt sparśāt bhraṣṭaḥ tepa āpasam cayaḥ āgamiṣyasi yajṣām te imam adeham na saṃśayaḥ evam ābhāṣya tam venamam tarddha anaṅgataḥ hariḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne gurutīrtha māhātmya sam pūrti varṇane caturviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca param harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭaḥ cintayitvā nṛpa uttamaḥ samāhūya nṛpa śreṣṭham tam pṛthum madhura akṣaraiḥ tam uvāca mahātmānam harṣeṇa mahatā tadā tvayā aputreṇa bhūḥ loke tāritaḥ asmi supātakāt nīta aujjvala tām pṛtho mayā a vināśitaḥ doṣaiḥ tvayā a guṇaiḥ prakāśitaḥ yaja iham aśvamedhena dāsya idānāni anekaśas mad viṣṇu lokam vrajāmi adya sa kāyaḥ te prasādāt sambharasva mahā bhāga sambhārān stvam nṛpa uttama mama traya mahābhāga brāhmaṇān vedapāragān evam pṛthuḥ samādiṣṭaḥ venena api mahātmanā prati uvāca mahātmā āsavenam pitaram ādarāt mahā rāja bhuṅkṣva bhogān manonugān divyān vā amānuṣān puṇyān yajṣaiḥ yaja janārdanam dhanuḥ ādāya pṛthvīśaḥ sa bāṇam yatna pūrvakam ādideśa bhaṭān sarvān ghoṣadhvam bhū tale mama kariṣyanti cayat pāpam ājṣām venasya bhūpateḥ vadhyatām yajadhvam mānavāḥ sarva etad manaskāḥ a vimatsarāḥ evam śikṣām prada tva asaurājyam bhṛtya iṣu vena jaḥ mahā varṣa pra ṇam vainirāhāraḥ babhūva ha tapasā atasya vaituṣṭaḥ brahmā apṛthum uvāca ha uvāca pitāme kīrti vardhanaḥ samācarati yaḥ pāpam asya rājyenara adhamaḥ śiraḥ chettā bhavatu eṣa tasya devaḥ janārdanaḥ adṛṣṭaiḥ ca mahā cakraiḥ hariḥ śāstā bhavet svayam manasā a karmaṇā a vācā a kartum vām chatipātakam teṣām sirām sitruṭyam tuphalam pakvam yathā drumāt manye tvattaḥ śṛṇu sureśvara prajānām tathā akuruṣva deveśa varam dātum yadi icchasi evam astu mahā bhāga pitāte pūta tā aṅgāt viṣṇunā śāsitaḥ vatsa putreṇa api tvayā apṛtho evam pṛthum samuddiśya varam da tvā āgataḥ vibhuḥ pṛthuḥ eva samāyātaḥ rājya karmaṇi saṃ sthitaḥ vainyasya rājye vipra indrāḥ pāpam kaścid na ca ācaret iti ājṣā avartata etasya vainyasya api mahātmanaḥ sarva lokāḥ samācāraiḥ parivartanti nityaśas dāna bhogaiḥ te sarva dharma parāyaṇāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe vena upākhyāne caturviṃśati adhika adhyāyaḥ paṣcaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca venasya ajṣām susam prāpya pṛthuḥ parama dhārmikaḥ sambhārān nānā puṇyān nṛpa ātmajaḥ trya brāhmaṇān sarvān nānā deśa udbhavān api athavā inaiyāja asau aśvamedhena bhūpatiḥ hānāni adāt brāhmaṇebhyaḥ nānā rūpāṇi anekaśas jagāma vaiṣṇavam lokam sa kāyaḥ jagatīpatiḥ etat vaḥ sarvam ākhyātam caritram tasya bhūpateḥ sarva pāpa praśamanam sarva duḥkha vināśanam pṛthuḥ eva sadharma ātmā a rājā a pṛthvīm praśāsati etat te sarvam ākhyātam bhūmikham ṇḍam anuttamam prathamam sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam tu dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍakam bhūmikhaṇḍasya māhātmyam kathayiṣyāmi aham punar asya khaṇḍasya vaiślokam yaḥ śṛṇoti nara uttamaḥ yuktaḥ adhyāyam sam śṛṇute sudhīḥ tasya puṇyam pravakṣyāmi śrūyatām dvijasattamāḥ asya padmapurāṇasya paṭhamānasya nityaśas uvāca kasmāt kalauna jāyam te śṛṇvānasya ca padmajaiḥ narasya puṇya yuktasya nānā vighnāḥ su dāruṇāḥ tad phalam dṛśyate tātapurāṇe padmasam jṣake purāṇam ca api yat tadvat aśvamedha samam kila nabhum narāḥ pāpāḥ pāpa mārga iṣu sam sthitāḥ aśvamedha samam puṇyam nabhum kalau narāḥ yena śrutam idam puṇyam purāṇam padmasam aśvamedha ādayaḥ yajṣāḥ tasmāt naṣṭā mahā mate kalau yuge gatāḥ svarge sa vedāḥ sa aṅga sa svarāḥ yaḥ pannaḥ śraddhāvān bhagavat paraḥ śravaṇa artham mahā śraddhā pūrvam tasya prajāyate śṛṇvānasya narasya api mahā vighna ūnasam caret aśraddhā jāyate pūrvam pāṭhakasya narasya ca lobhaḥ ca jāyata etasya śṛṇvānasya dvijottamaiḥ preṣitaḥ viṣṇudevena mahā mohaḥ sa dāruṇaḥ akarot sa vināśam tu śṛṇvataḥ ca asi anityaśas dūṣakāḥ kutsakāḥ pāpāḥ sambhavanti dine dine tu subuddhena vighna rūpam mama adhunā sam jātam dṛśyate vyāsa tathā homam samācaret vaiṣṇavaiḥ ca mahā maṃ traiḥ viṣṇusūktaiḥ su puṇya daiḥ hariḥ arāṭa maṃtreṇa sahasra śīrṣakeṇa ca idam viṣṇu sumam treṇa ābrahmeṇa punar punar bṛhatsāmnā asumam treṇa dvādaśa akṣarakeṇa ca tila ājyaiḥ ca pālāśaiḥ samidhaiḥ api grahānām api karttavyam sthāpanam pūjanam dvijaiḥ pūjayet tatra ca mahā māyām caṇḍikām kṣetranāyakam tilaiḥ ca tam trasa mudyataiḥ yathā sambhāvikām tāta dakṣiṇām dhenu sam yutām tatas vighnāḥ praṇaśyanti purāṇam siddhim āpnuyāt tasya aṅge jāyate rogaḥ bahu pīḍā pradāyakaḥ bhāryā śokaḥ putra śokaḥ dhana hāniḥ prajāyate nānāvidhān mahā rogān bhum jatena atra saṃśayaḥ ekādaśīm susam prāpya pūjayet madhusūdanam ṣoḍaśaiḥ ca upacāraiḥ ca bhāva yuktena cetasā brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt yathā vitta anusāratas anvitam svayam kuryāt tatas prājṣaḥ bhojanam dhavaiḥ purāṇa sam hita apūrṇa aśrotavya adharma tatparaiḥ sa pādam lakṣam ekam tu brahma ākhyam puṣkaram śṛṇu dvijaiḥ lakṣasya ardham tatas kṛtsnam purāṇam padmasam tu sahasrābhyām dvābhyām eva tathā adhikam tretā yuge tathā aprāpte yadā āśroṣyanti mānavāḥ dvāviṃśati sahasrāṇi sam hitā padma sam jṣitā dvāpare kathitā vipra brahmanā paramātmanā dvādaśa aiva sahasrāṇām padma ākhyā sātu sam hitā tatparāḥ sam hitāsu eva vipra indra śeṣa ākhyāna pravistaraḥ dvādaśa eva sahasrāṇi nāśam yāsyanti sattamaiḥ bhūmikhaṇḍam naraḥ śrutvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate śrotavyam hi prayatnena padma ākhyam pāpa nāśanam prathamam sṛṣṭi khaṇḍam tu dvitīyam bhūmi khaṇḍakam tṛtīyam svargakhaṇḍam ca pātālam tu caturthakam paṣcamam ca uttaraṃkhaṇḍam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam yaḥ śṛṇoti naraḥ bhaktyā paṣca khaṇḍāni anukramāt mahā bhāgyena labhyam te paṣca khaṇḍāni bhūsurāḥ śrutāni mokṣa dāni syuḥ satyam satyam na saṃśayaḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe bhūmi khaṇḍe paṣcapaṣcāśat sahasra sam hitāyām vena upākhyāne paṣcaviṃśati adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ samāptaḥ ayam bhūmikhaṇḍaḥ dvitīyaḥ iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe dvitīyam bhūmikhaṇḍam samāptam atha śrī pādme mahā purāṇe tṛtīyam svarga khaṇḍam prārabhyate jagat janānām hṛdi saṃniviṣṭam tri kāla jṣā mahātmānaḥ nānā puṇya samāśrayāḥ mad dharmāraṇya ratāḥ ye ca daṇḍaka araṇya vāsinaḥ jaṃ bū mārgarata yeca yeca satya nivāsinaḥ ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ sa śiṣyā munayaḥ amalāḥ samupāyātāḥ śaunakan draṣṭum utsukāḥ tam pūjayitvā a vidhivat tena te ca su pūjitāḥ hi āsaneṣu vicitreṣu bṛsī ādiṣu yathākramam śaunakena pradatteṣu āsīnāḥ te tapodhanāḥ kṛṣṇa āśritāḥ kathāḥ puṇyāḥ parasparam atha abruvan kathām teṣu tatas teṣām munīnām bhāvitātmanām ājagāma mahā tejāḥ sūtaḥ tatra mahā dyutiḥ tān praṇamya yathā anayā ayam sataiḥ ca iva abhipūjitaḥ upaviṣṭam yathāyogyam śaunaka ādyāḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ tam papracchuḥ mahābhāgāḥ śaunaka ādyāḥ tapodhanāḥ ūcuḥ tvattaḥ śrutā mahā puṇyāḥ purā paurāṇikīḥ kathāḥ ca pravṛttāḥ sma kathāyām sakṣaṇāḥ hareḥ punar purāṇam ācakṣva hari vārttā samanvitam hareḥ anyā kathā sūta śmaśāna sadṛśā smṛtā tīrthānām puṇya dātṝṇām nāmāni kila kīrtaya kṣetrāṇi kāni puṇyāni ke ca pūjyāḥ śiloccayāḥ nadyaḥ ca kāḥ parāḥ puṇyāḥ nṛṇām pāpa harāḥ śubhāḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bhāgāḥ sādhu pṛṣṭam tapodhanāḥ tam praṇamya pravakṣyāmi purāṇam padmasam pārāśaryam parama puruṣam viśva vedya eka yonim śaśvat śāntam sva mati viṣayam śuddha tejaḥ viśālam veda vyāsam vitata yaśasam sarva dā aham namāmi yasya prasādāt vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇa kathām imām pravakṣyāmi mahā puṇyam purāṇam padmasam jṣitam sahasram paṣcapaṣcāśat ṣaḍbhiḥ khaṇḍaiḥ samanvitam tatra ādau ādikhaṇḍam syāt bhūmikhaṇḍam tatas param brahmakhaṇḍam ca tat paścāt tatas pātālakhaṇḍakam mam tad vṛttām tad āśrayam tasmāt pādmam iti ucyate budhaiḥ etat purāṇam amalam viṣṇu māhātmyam uttamam brahmā a tat nāradāya āha nāradaḥ mad guroḥ puras hitāḥ adhyāpayāmāsa muhur mām ati priyam ātmanaḥ sarva tīrtha abhiṣekam śraddhayā aparayā abhaktyā aśruta mātreṇa mukti daḥ aśraddhayā api śṛṇute labhate puṇya sam cayam tatra ādi khaṇḍam vakṣyāmi puṇyam pāpa vināśanam śṛṇvantu munayaḥ sarve sa śiṣyāḥ tu atraye sthitāḥ iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ uvāca maham tāvat kathayāmi dvijottamāḥ jṣāyate yena bhagavān paramātmā asanātanaḥ sṛṣṭa iṣu pralayāt ūrdhvam nityam niram janam śām tam nirmalam nitya nirmalam su accham yat kāṅkṣanti mumukṣavaḥ sarvajṣam jñāna rūpa tvāt anam tam ajam avyayam avināśi sadā asvaccham acyutam vyāpakam mahat prāptejṣātvātam jñāna rūpakam mad līnam vikāram ca tat sraṣṭum upacakrame tasmāt pradhānam udbhūtam tatas ca api mahant nabhūt sātvikaḥ rājasaḥ ca eva tāmasaḥ ca tridhā mahā n pradhānena āvṛtaḥ hi eva tvacā bījam iva āvṛtam vaikārikaḥ taijasaḥ ca bhūtādiḥ ca eva tāmasaḥ yathā pradhānena mahant mahatā asa tathā vṛtaḥ tatas sasarja śabda tanmātrāt ākāśam śabda lakṣaṇam śabda mātram tathā ākāśam bhūtādiḥ samam āvṛṇot śabda mātram tathā ākāśam sparśa mātram sasarja ha ākāśam śabda mātram tu sparśa mātram samāvṛṇot tatas vāyu vikurvāṇaḥ rūpa mātram sasarja ha sparśa mātra stuvai vāyu rūpa mātram samāvṛṇot jyotiḥ ca apivikurvāṇam rasa mātram sasarja ha sambhavanti bhām sirasa mātrāṇi tāni tu bhām sirūpa mātram samāvṛṇot vikurvāṇa anicām bhām sigandha mātram sasarjire tasmāt jātāmahī ca iyam sarva bhūta guṇa adhikā tasmin tasmin tu tanmātrāt tena tanmātra tā smṛtā tanmātrāṇi aviśeṣāṇi viśeṣāḥ kramaśas uparāḥ bhūta tanmātra sargaḥ yam ahaṃkārāt tu tāmasāt taijasānīm driyāṇi āhuḥ devāḥ vaikārikāḥ daśa ekādaśam manaḥ ca atra kīrtitam tat tvacim takaiḥ manas indriyāṇi paṣca atra paṣca karmendriyāṇi ca tāni vakṣyāmi teṣām ca karmāṇi kula pāvanāḥ śravaṇam tvac cakṣuḥ jihvā nāsikā ca eva paṣcamā pāyu upastham hasta pādau kīrtitā vāc ca paṣcamā ākāśa vāyu tejāṃsi salilam pṛthivī tathā śabda ādibhiḥ guṇaiḥ viprāḥ saṃyuktāḥ uttara uttaraiḥ nānā vīryāḥ pṛthak bhūtāḥ tatas te saṃhatim vinā na aśaknuvan prajāḥ sraṣṭum a samāgatya kṛtsnaśas eka saṅghāḥ sa lakṣyāḥ ca sam prāpya aikyam aśeṣatas puruṣa dhiṣṭhita tvāt ca pradhāna anugrahena ca mahat ādayaḥ viśeṣām tā aṇḍam utpādayanti te bhūtebhyaḥ ṇḍam mahā prājṣā vṛddham tat udakeśayam prākṛtam brahma rūpasya viṣṇoḥ sthānam anuttamam tatra avyakta svarūpaḥ sau viṣṇuḥ viśveśvaraḥ prabhuḥ sveda ja aṇḍam abhūt tasya jarāyuḥ ca mahīdharāḥ garbha udakam samudrāḥ ca tasya abhūt mahā ātmanaḥ tasmin aṇḍe bhavat sarvam sa deva asura mānuṣam yat padmam tat haima maṇḍam abhūt śrī keśava icchayā brahma rūpam samāsthāya jagant sruṣṭum pravartate sṛṣṭam capāti anuyugam yāvat kalpa vikalpanā ha ādi rūpeṇa rudra rupeṇa sam haret iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūcuḥ nadīnām ca nāmadheyāni sarvaśas tathā janapadānām ca ye ca anye bhūmim āśritāḥ pramāṇam ca pramāṇa jṣa pṛthivyāḥ kila sarvatas uvāca mahā prājṣa mahā bhūtāni saṅgrahāt jagatī sthāni sarvāṇi samāni āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ bhūmiḥ apaḥ tathā vāyuḥ agniḥ ākāśam eva ca guṇa uttarāṇi sarvāṇi teṣām bhūmiḥ pradhānāt śabda sparśaḥ ca ca paṣcamaḥ bhūmyāḥ ete guṇāḥ proktāḥ ṛṣibhiḥ tattva vedibhiḥ śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca vāyoḥ tu ākāśe śabdaḥ eva ca paṣcasu te sarva lokeṣu ye iṣu bhūtāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ anyonyam na ativartam tesāmyam bhavati vā etadā yadā atu viṣamībhāvam āviśanti parasparam anupūrvaśas sarvāṇi aparimeyāṇi tat eṣām rūpam aiśvaram yatra yatra hi dṛśyam tedhāvanti cabhautikāḥ teṣām manuṣyāḥ tarkeṇa pramāṇāni pracakṣate tyāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ tān na tarkeṇa sādhayet sudarśanam pravakṣyāmi dvīpam tu muni puṃgavāḥ parimaṇḍalaḥ mahā bhāgāḥ dvīpaḥ asau cakra saṃsthitaḥ sam pannaḥ dhana dhānyavān lavaṇena samudreṇa samam parivāritaḥ yathā hi puruṣaḥ paśyet ādarśe mukham ātmanaḥ evam sudarśanaḥ dvīpaḥ dṛśyate ca kramaṇḍalaḥ dviram sarva oṣadhim samādāya sarvatas parivāritaḥ apaḥ tatas śeṣaḥ saṅkṣepau ucyate ūcuḥ yāvān bhūmi avakāśaḥ yam dṛśyate śaśalakṣaṇe evam taiḥ kila pṛṣṭaḥ sa sūtaḥ vākyam atha abravīt uvāca prāc āyatāmahā prājṣāḥ ṣaṭ ete ratna parvatāḥ samudrau pūrva paścimau himavant himakūṭaḥ ca niṣadhaḥ ca naga uttamaḥ nīlaḥ ca vaiḍūrya mayaḥ śvetaḥ ca śaśi sannibhaḥ sarva dhātu pinaddhaḥ ca śṛṅgavant nāma parvataḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitāḥ teṣām antara viṣkumbhau yojanāni sahasraśas tatra puṇyā janapadāḥ tāni varṣāṇi sattamāḥ vasanti teṣām sattvāni nānā jātīni sarvaśas idam tu bhāratam varṣam tatas haimavatam param hemakūṭāt param ca eva hari varṣam pracakṣate prāc āyataḥ mahā bhāgāḥ mālyavant nāma parvataḥ tatas param mālyavataḥ parvataḥ gandha mādanaḥ ca yojanānām sahasrāṇi caturaśītiḥ ucchritaḥ adhastāt caturaśītiḥ yojanānām dvijottamāḥ ūrdhvam adhas ca tiryak ca lokān āvṛtya tiṣṭhati tasya pārśveṣu amī dvīpāḥ catvāraḥ saṃsthitāḥ dvijāḥ bhadrāśvaḥ ketumālaḥ ca jambūdvīpaḥ ca sattamāḥ uttarāḥ ca eva kuruvaḥ kṛta puṇya pratiśrayāḥ sa vai vicintayāmāsa sauvarṇān prekṣya vāyasān meruḥ uttama madhyānām adhamānām ca pakṣiṇām tam ādityaḥ anuparyeti satatam jyotiṣām varaḥ candramāḥ ca sa nakṣatraḥ vāyuḥ ca eva pradakṣiṇaḥ sa parvataḥ mahā prājṣa divya puṣpa samanvitaḥ bhavanaiḥ āvṛtaiḥ sarvaiḥ jāmbūnada mayaiḥ śubhaiḥ tatra deva gaṇāḥ viprāḥ gandharva asura rākṣasāḥ apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃyuktāḥ śaile krīḍanti sarvadā tatra brahmā ca rudraḥ ca śakraḥ ca api sura īśvaraḥ tumburuḥ nāradaḥ ca eva viśvāvasuḥ hāhā abhigamya amara śreṣṭham stuvanti vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ saptarṣayaḥ mahātmānaḥ kaśyapaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ tasmāt kuberaḥ ubhagavān ca turtham bhāgam aśnute tatas kalām śam vittasya manuṣyebhyaḥ prayacchati mahā karṇikāra vanam ramyam śilā jāla samucchritam tatra sākṣāt paśupatiḥ divya bhūtaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ umāsahāyaḥ bhagavant ramate bhūtabhāvanaḥ mālām karṇikāra mayām mālām bibhrat āpādalam tam ugra tapasaḥ siddhāḥ suvratāḥ satya vādinaḥ paśyanti na hi durvṛttaiḥ śakyaḥ draṣṭum maheśvaraḥ tasya śailasya śikharāt kṣīra dhārā dvijottamāḥ puṇyā puṇyatamaiḥ juṣṭā gaṅgā bhāgīrathī śubhā tayā ahi utpāditaḥ puṇyaḥ sa hradaḥ sāgara upamaḥ tām dhārayāmāsa tadā adurdharām parvataiḥ api śatam varṣa sahasrāṇi śirasā eva pinākadhṛk meroḥ tu paścime pārśve ketumālaḥ dvijottamāḥ jaṃ būkhaṇḍe tu tatra eva mahā janapadaḥ dvijāḥ māyuḥ daśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām tatra sattamāḥ suvarṇa varṇāḥ ca nara astriyaḥ ca apsarasām samāḥ anāmaya avīta śoka anityam mudita mānasāḥ gandhamādana śṛṅga iṣu kuberaḥ saha rākṣasaiḥ sam vṛta upsarasām saṅghaiḥ modate guhyaka adhipaḥ ekādaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām parama āyuṣaḥ tatra kṛṣṇa anara a viprāḥ tejoyukta mahā balāḥ striyaḥ ca utpala pattra ābhāḥ sarvāḥ su priya darśanāḥ nīlotpala dharam śvetam śvetāt hairaṇyakam varam varṣam airāvatam vipra a nānā janapada āvṛtam tare madhya gam ca eva hi āyus pramāṇam ārogyam dharmatas kāmatas arthatas samanvitāni bhūtāni teṣu sarveṣu sattamāḥ evam eṣām mahā bhāgāḥ parvataiḥ pṛthivī citā hemakūṭaḥ tu su mahān kailāsaḥ nāma parvataḥ hiraṇyaśṛṅgaḥ su mahān divyaḥ maṇi mayaḥ giriḥ tasya pārśve mahat divyam śubhram kāṣcana vālukam ramyam viṣṇusaraḥ nāma yatra rāja ābhagīrathaḥ samāḥ yūpa maṇi mayāḥ tatra kṣetrāḥ ca api hiraṇmayāḥ tatra iṣṭvā atu gataḥ siddhim sahasrākṣaḥ mahā yaśāḥ sraṣṭā abhūti patiḥ yatra sarva lokaiḥ sanātanaḥ yatas jāyatrabhūtaḥ samam tatas nara nārāyaṇau brahmā amanuḥ sthāṇuḥ ca paṣcamaḥ brahma lokāt apākrām tā saptadhā pratipadyate vaṭoda kāsā analinī pārvatī ca sarasvatī būnadī ca sītā ca gaṅgā sindhuḥ ca saptamā acim jṣā sā prabhāvaiḥ ca samanvitā dṛśya adṛśyā ca bhavati tatra tatra sarasvatī sapta gaṅgāḥ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutāḥ rakṣām siva i himavatī hemakūṭa ica guhyakāḥ sarpa anāgāḥ ca niṣadhe gokarṇam ca tapovanam deva asurāṇām sarveṣām śvetaḥparvatam ucyate mahā bhāgā devānām pratisam caraḥ iti etāni mahā bhāgāḥ sapta varṣāṇi bhāgaśas bhūtāni upaniviṣṭāni gatimanti dhruvāṇi ca teṣām mṛddhiḥ bahuvidhā dṛśyate deva mānuṣā aśakyam parisaṅkhyātum śraddheya ātu vibhūṣitā yām viprāḥ divyam enām śaśa ākṛtim pārśve śa śa sya dve varṣe ukteye dakṣiṇa uttare ca kāśyapadvīpaḥ eva ca yad karṇa dvīpa śilaḥ viprāḥ śrī mān malaya parvataḥ etat dvitīyam dvīpasyadṛśyateśaśi saṃsthitam iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūcuḥ meroḥ atha uttaram paścāt pūrvam ācakṣvasū tatas uvāca dakṣiṇena tu nīlasya meroḥ pārśve tathā uttare uttarāḥ kuravaḥ viprāḥ puṇyāḥ siddha niṣevitāḥ tatravṛkṣā madhuphalā anitya puṣpa phala upagāḥ dvijottamāḥ prakṣaranti sadā kṣīram tatra sarve amṛta upamam ca sūkṣma kāṣcana vālukā sarva ṛtu sukha sam sparśa a niṣphalāḥ ca tapodhanāḥ deva loka cyutāḥ sarve jāyante tatra mānavāḥ pannāḥ sarva su priya darśanāḥ mithunāni ca jāyante striyaḥ ca apsarasā upamāḥ teṣām te kṣīriṇām kṣīram pibanti amṛta saṃnibham ekam eva anurūpa pañca cakravāka samam dvijāḥ nirāmayāḥ ca te lokāḥ nityam mudita mānasāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi daśa varṣa śatāni ca jīvanti te mahā bhāgān aca anyonyam jahati uta bhāruḍa anāma śakunāḥ tīkṣṇatuṇḍā mahā balāḥ tān nirharam ca uttarāḥ kuravaḥ viprāḥ vyākhyātāḥ te samāsatas meru pārśvam aham pūrvam pravakṣyāmi yathātatham tasya mūrdhābhiṣekaḥ tu bhadrāśvasya tapodhanāḥ bhadraśāla vanam yatrakāla āmrāḥ ca mahā drumāḥ bhāgāḥ nityam puṣpa phalāḥ śubhāḥ drumāḥ ca yojana utsedhāḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitāḥ tatra te puruṣāḥ śvetāḥ tejaḥ yukta mahā balāḥ striyaḥ kumuda varṇāḥ ca sundaryaḥ priya darśanāḥ candra varṇāḥ ca tur varṇāḥ pūrṇa candra nibha ānanāḥ candra śītala gātrāḥ ca nṛtya gīta viśāradāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi tatra āyuḥ dvijasattamāḥ njam bū vṛkṣaḥ sanātanaḥ sarva kāma phalaḥ puṇyaḥ siddha cāraṇa sevitaḥ tasya nāmnā samākhyāta ujam būdvīpaḥ sanātanaḥ yojanānām sahasram ca śatam ca dvijasattamāḥ tathā mālyavantaḥ śṛṅge pūrve pūrva anugām takāḥ yojanānām sahasrāṇi paṣcāśat mālyavant dvijāḥ mahā rajata saṃkāśāḥ jāyante tatra mānavāḥ rakṣaṇa artham praviśanti divākaram māsaḥ tāni sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭiḥ eva śatāni ca ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭiḥ eva śatāni ca mad mad tāpa taptāḥ te viśanti śaśi maṇḍalam iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūcuḥ varṣāṇām ca eva nāmāni parvatānām ca sattama ye ca parvata vāsinaḥ uvāca varṣam ramaṇakam nāma jāyante tatra mānavāḥ pannāḥ sarve te priya darśanāḥ niḥ sapatnāḥ ca te sarve jāyante tatra mānavāḥ daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi śatāni daśa paṣca ca jīvanti te mahābhāgāḥ nityam mudita mānasāḥ varṣam hiraṇmayam nāma ayatra hairaṇvatīnadī yatra ca ayam mahā prājṣāḥ pakṣirāj pataga uttamaḥ mahā balāḥ tatrajana avipra amudita mānasāḥ ekādaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām te tapodhanāḥ jīvanti śatāni daśa paṣca ca śṛṅgāṇi ca pavitrāṇi trīṇi eva dvija puṃgavāḥ tatra svayam prabhā devī nityam vasati śaṇḍinī uttareṇa tu śṛṅgasya samudrām te dvijottamāḥ varṣam airāvatam nāma tasmāt śṛṅgavantaḥ param na tu tatra sūrya gatiḥ jīryam tena ca mānavāḥ candramāḥ ca sa nakṣatraḥ jyotiḥ bhūta eva āvṛtaḥ padma prabhāḥ padma varṇāḥ padma pattra nibha īkṣaṇāḥ padma pattra sugandhāḥ ca jāyante tatra mānavāḥ aniṣpanna anaṣṭa gandha anirāhāra ajita indriyāḥ trayodaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇām te dvijottamāḥ āyus pramāṇam jīvanti nara adhārmika puṃgavāḥ hariḥ tiṣṭhati vaikuṇṭhaḥ śakaṭe kanaka āmaye aṣṭa cakram bhūta yuktam manojavam agni varṇam mahā tejaḥ jāmbūnada vibhūṣitam sa prabhuḥ sarva bhūtānām vibhuḥ ca dvijasattamāḥ ca eva kartā ākārayitā tathā pṛthivī apaḥ tathā ākāśam vāyuḥ tejaḥ ca sattamāḥ sa yajṣaḥ sarva bhūtānām āsyam tasya hutāśanaḥ iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe paṣcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ ūcuḥ yat idam bhāratam varṣam puṇyam puṇya vidhāyakam tat sarvam naḥ samācakṣva tvam hinas buddhimān mataḥ uvāca te kīrtayiṣyāmi varṣam bhāratam uttamam pṛthoḥ ca prājṣa vainyasya tathā aikṣvākoḥ mahātmanaḥ yayātiḥ iram barīṣasya mām dhātuḥ nahuṣasya ca kuśikasya eva rājarṣeḥ gādheḥ ca eva mahātmanaḥ anyeṣām ca mahā bhāgāḥ kṣatriyāṇām balīyasām sarveṣām eva bhūtānām priyam bhāratam uttamam tatas varṣam pravakṣyāmi yathāśruta mahas dvijāḥ mahendraḥ malayaḥ sahyaḥ śuktimant ṛkṣavant api teṣām sahasraśas viprāḥ parvatāḥ te samīpatas sāravam sāravam citra sānavaḥ anye tu yeparijṣātā hrasvā hrasva upajīvinaḥ mleccha sadharmāṇaḥ te miśrāḥ puruṣāḥ dvijāḥ nadīm pibanti vimalām gaṅgām sindhum sarasvatīm godāvarīm narmadām ca bahūdām ca mahā nadīm śatadrum candrabhāgām ca yamunām ca mahā nadīm dṛṣadvatīm vitastām ca vipāpām svacchabālukām nadīm vetravatīm ca eva kṛṣṇām veṇīm ca nimnagām irāvatīm vitastām capayoṣṇīm devikām api bedasmṛtim vedaśirām tridivām sindhulākṛmim karīṣiṇīm citravahām trisenām ca eva nimnagām gomatīm dhūtapāpām cacam danām camahā nadīm kauśikīm tridivām hṛdyām nācitām rohita araṇīm rahasyām śatakum bhām ca sarayūm ca dvijottamāḥ carmaṇvatīm vetravatīm hastisomām diśam tathā mayoṣṇīm payoṣṇīm ca bhīmām bhīmarathām api ca apitāpīm śatamalām api nīvārām mahitām ca api suprayogām tathā nadīm sindhum vājinīm pura mālinīm pūrvābhirāmām vīrām ca bhīmām mālāvatīm tathā palāśinīm pāpa harām mahendrām paṭalāvatīm karīṣiṇīm asiknīm cakuśacīrīm mahā nadīm marutām pravarām menām tathā ca sevyām kāpīm ca sattamāḥ sadāvīrām adhṛṣyām cakuśacīrām mahā nadīm rathacitrām jyotirathām viśvāmitrāṅkapim jalām haphalīm ca eva kucīrām ambuvāhinīm vainadīm piṅgalām veṇām tuṅgavegām mahā nadīm madiśām kṛṣṇaveṇām ca tāmrām ca kapilām api dhenum sa kāmām vedasvām haviḥ srāvām mahā pathām śiprām ca picchalām ca eva bhāradvājīm ca nimnagām taurṇikīm nimnagām śoṇām bāhudām atha candramām durgāmam taḥśilām ca eva brahmamedhyām dṛṣadvatīm parokṣām atharohīm ca tathā ajam būnadīm api sunāsām tamasām dāsīm sāmānyām varaṇām asim nīlām dhṛtikarīm ca eva parṇāśām ca mahā nadīm mānavīm vṛṣabhām bhāsām brahmamedhyām dṛṣadvatīm etāḥ ca anyāḥ ca bahulā mahā nadyāḥ vijarṣabhāḥ maṃ dagām maṃ da vāhinīm brāhmaṇīm ca mahā gaurīm durgām api ca sattamāḥ citrotpalām citrarathām atulām rohiṇīm tathā dākinīm vaitaraṇīm kokām ca api mahā nadīm śuktimatīm anaṅgām ca tathā eva vṛṣasāhvayām ca tathā eva vṛṣaka tvayām kumārīm ṛṣi tulyām ca māriṣām ca sarasvatīm dākinīm su puṇyām ca sarva aṅgaṅgām ca sattamāḥ viśvasyamātaraḥ sarvāḥ sarvāḥ ca eva mahā phalāḥ tathā nadyaḥ su prakāśāḥ śata śotha sahasraśas iti etāḥ saritaḥ viprāḥ samākhyātāḥ yathāsmṛti cālāḥ śālva mātreya jāṅgalāḥ ca baudhāmālāḥ tathā eva ca matsyāḥ kuśaṭṭāḥ saugandhyāḥ kutsapāḥ kāśi kośalāḥ cedi matsya karuṣāḥ ca bhojāḥ sindhupulim dakāḥ uttamāḥ ca daśārṇāḥ ca m ekalāḥ ca utkalaiḥ saha ca eva na eka pṛṣṭha yugaṃdharāḥ bodhā madrāḥ kaliṅgāḥ ca kāśaya uparakāśayaḥ yaṭharāḥ kukurāḥ ca eva su daśārṇāḥ su sattamāḥ tayaḥ avam tayaḥ ca eva tathā eva aparakum tayaḥ tāmallakāḥ puṇḍrāḥ vidarbhā nṛpavāhikāḥ aśmakāḥ sottarāḥ ca eva goparāṣṭrāḥ kanīyasaḥ adhirājya kuśaṭṭāḥ ca malla rāṣṭrāḥ ca keralāḥ mālavāḥ ca upavāsyāḥ ca cakrā vakra ālayāḥ śakāḥ ca yakṛllomāṇaḥ eva ca mallāḥ sudeṣṇāḥ prahlādāḥ mahiṣāḥ śaśakāḥ tathā bāhlika vāṭadhānāḥ ca ābhīrāḥ kālatoyakāḥ aparām tāḥ parām tāḥ ca paṅkalāḥ ca rmacaṇḍikāḥ aṭavī śekharāḥ ca eva meru bhūtāḥ ca sattamāḥ upāvṛta anupāvṛtāḥ surāṣṭrāḥ kekayāḥ tathā tām āheyāḥ kakṣāḥ sāmudra niṣkuṭāḥ bahirgiri yoṅga maladā magadhā mālava ārghaṭāḥ sattvatarāḥ prāvṛṣeyāḥ bhārgavāḥ ca dvijarṣabhāḥ ca sudeṣṇa bhāsurāḥ tathā maka aniṣāda aniṣadhāḥ tathā eva ānarta naiṛtāḥ ca kum talā kuśakāḥ tathā tarigrahāḥ śūrasena āījikāḥ kalpakāraṇāḥ tila bhāga āma sārāḥ ca dakāḥ ca darvī camālavā darvā vātajāma rathoragāḥ balaraṭṭāḥ tathā viprāḥ sudāmānaḥ mumallikāḥ yathā karīkaṣāḥ ca eva kulim dāgandhikāḥ tathā manāyavaḥ daśāḥ pārśvaromāṇaḥ kuśabim davaḥ mācchāḥ gopāla kacchāḥ ca jāṅgalāḥ kuru varṇakāḥ kirātāḥ barbarāḥ siddhāḥ vaidehāḥ tāmraliptikāḥ pārvatīyāḥ ca sattamāḥ atha apare janapadāḥ dakṣiṇāḥ muni puṃgavāḥ draviḍāḥ keralāḥ prācyāḥ mūṣikāḥ bāla mūṣikāḥ karṇāṭakāḥ māhiṣakāḥ vikandhāḥ mūṣikāḥ tathā jhallikāḥ kuntalāḥ ca eva sauhṛdāḥ nala kānanāḥ kaukkuṭakāḥ tathā bolāḥ kokaṇāḥ maṇi vālakāḥ samaṅgā kanakāḥ ca eva kuṅkura aṅgāra māriṣāḥ vyūḍhakāḥ korakāḥ proṣṭāḥ saṅgavega dharāḥ tathā mālava amalarāḥ ca eva tathā eva aparavartakāḥ tathā musala astanavālāḥ ca jayāḥ ca tapanāḥ sūtapāḥ tathā bhāḥ ca vidarbhāḥ ca staṅgana aparataṅgakāḥ uttarāḥ ca apare mleccha ajana ahi muni puṃgavāḥ mahā ca sakām bojā dāruṇā mleccha jātayaḥ ca hūṇā pārasikaiḥ saha tathā eva ramaṇāḥ ca anyāḥ tathā ca daśamālikāḥ kṣatriya upaniveśāḥ ca vaiśya śūdra kulāni ca śūra ābhīrāḥ ca daradāḥ kāśmīrāḥ paśubhiḥ saha khāṇḍīkāḥ ca tuṣārāḥ ca padmagā giri gahvarāḥ ādreyāḥ sabhirāda ājāḥ tathā evastanapoṣakāḥ droṣakāḥ ca kaliṅgāḥ ca kirātānām ca jātayaḥ tomara āhanyamānāḥ ca tathā eva karabham jakāḥ ete ca anye janapadāḥ prācya udīcyāḥ tathā eva ca uddeśa mātreṇa mayā deśāḥ saṅkīrtitāḥ dvijāḥ iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svargakhaṇḍe ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ vac pramāṇam āyuṣaḥ sūta balam ca api śubha aśubham uvāca catvāri bhārate varṣe yugāni muni puṃgavāḥ kṛtam tretā dvāparam catiṣyam ca dvija sattaāḥ pūrve kṛta yugam nāma tatas tretā yugam dvijāḥ tad paścāt dvāparam ca atha tatas tiṣyaḥ pravartate puṃgavāḥ āyuḥ saṃkhyā kṛta yuge saṃkhyāta ahi tapodhanāḥ tathā trīṇi sahasrāṇi tretāyām āyuṣaḥ viduḥ mahā bala amahā sattvāḥ prajṣā guṇa samanvitāḥ prajāyante ca jātāḥ ca śataśas atha sahasraśas dvijāḥ kṛta yuge viprāḥ abalinaḥ priya darśanāḥ prajāyante ca jātāḥ ca munayaḥ vaitapodhanāḥ mahā utsāha a mahātmānaḥ dhārmikāḥ satya vādinaḥ priya darśa vapuṣmantaḥ mahā vīryā dhanus dharāḥ kṣatriyāḥ śūrasam matāḥ tretāyām kṣatriyāḥ tāvat sarve vai cakravartinaḥ mahā utsāha avīryavantaḥ paraspara vadha eṣiṇaḥ tejasām dhena saṃyuktāḥ krodhanāḥ puruṣāḥ kila lubdhāḥ ca ānṛtakāḥ ca eva bho dvijāḥ īrṣyā mānaḥ tathā krodhaḥ umāyā asūyā tathā eva ca tiṣyebhavanti bhūtānām rāgaḥ lobhaḥ ca sattamāḥ guṇa uttaram haimavatam har tatas param iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ vac būkhaṇḍaḥ tvayā a proktaḥ yathā vadiha sattamaḥ tattvāt mahā brūhi kuśa dvīpaḥ ca dhārmikam uvāca yaiḥ idam sam tatam jagat sapta dvīpān pravakṣyāmi śṛṇudhvam dvija puṃgavāḥ aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi
