tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tasmin sthāne purā daityaḥ hastī bhūtvā śiva antikam brāhmaṇān ham tum āyātaḥ yatra nityam upāsate teṣām liṅgāt mahā devaḥ prādurāsīt trilocanaḥ rakṣaṇa artham mahā devaḥ bhaktānām bhakta vatsalaḥ hatvā a gaja ākṛtim daityam śūlena avajṣaya aharaḥ vāsaḥ tasya akarot kṛttim kṛttivāsa īśvaraḥ tatas tatra siddhim parām prāptāḥ munayaḥ hi yudhiṣṭhira tena eva ca śarīreṇa prāptāḥ tat paramam padam mad a vidyeśvara a rudrāḥ śivāya ca prakīrtitāḥ kṛttivāseśvaram liṅgam sthitāḥ hi tvā kali yugam ghoram adharma bahulam janāḥ saṃśayaḥ sarva siddhānām etat sthānam vadanti hi yuge yuge ih yatra tā brāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ dhyāyanti hṛdaye devam sthāṇum sarva antaram śivam gāyanti siddhāḥ yena vasanti viprāḥ teṣām atha ekena bhavet vimuktiḥ ye kṛttivāsam śaraṇam prapannāḥ ārādhayanti prabhum īśitāram vārāṇasī madhya gatā munīm namaḥ bhavāya amala yoga dhāmne sthāṇum prapadye giriśam purāṇam smarāmi rudram hṛdaye niviṣṭam jāne mahā devam aneka rūpam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca snātvā tatra vidhānena tarpayitvā pitṝn nṛpa kaścid daityaḥ jagāma idam śārdūlaḥ ghora rūpa dhṛk mṛgīm ekām bhakṣayitum kapardīśvaram uttamam tatra sā bhīta hṛdayā kṛtvā kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam dhāvamānā su sambhrāntā vyāghrasya vaśam āgatā tām vidārya nakhaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ śārdūlaḥ sa mahā balaḥ jagāma ca anyam vijanam deśam dṛṣṭvā muni īśvarān mṛtamātrā casā bālā kapardī īśā agratomṛgī dṛśyata mahā jvālā vyomni sūrya sama prabhā trinetrā nīlakam kām kita mūrdhajā vṛṣa adhirūḍhā puruṣaiḥ tādṛśaiḥ evasam vṛtā puṣpa vṛṣṭim vimum canti khecarāḥ tad samam tatas bhūtvā na dṛṣṭā tatas dṛṣṭvā tadāḥ ca suḥ sura ādayaḥ smṛtvā eva aśeṣa pāpa oghāt kṣipram asi avimum cati kāma krodha ādayaḥ doṣāḥ vārāṇasī nivāsinām vighnāḥ sarve vinaśyanti kapardīśvara pūjanāt dhyāyatām ca atra niyatam yoginām śānta cetasām jāyate yoga siddhiḥ syāt ṣaṣ māsena na saṃśayaḥ brahmahatyā ādayaḥ yasya pūjanāt piśācamocane kuṇḍe snātaḥ syāt praśamaḥ yatas śam kukarṇa eti khyātaḥ pūjayāmāsa śaṃkaram puṣpa dhūpa ādibhiḥ stotraiḥ namaskāraiḥ pradakṣiṇaiḥ upāsīta atra yoga ātmā a kṛtvā dīkṣām tu na iṣṭhikīm kadācid āgatam pretam paśyati sma kṣudhā anvitam asthi carma pinaddhām niśvasam tam muhur muhur tam dṛṣṭvā sa muni śreṣṭhaḥ kṛpayā aparayā ayutaḥ mā bhavān kasmāt deśāt deśam imam śritaḥ tasmai piśācaḥ kṣudhayā āpīḍyamānaḥ abravīt vacaḥ tathā na kadācid kṛtam puṇyam alpam vā analpam eva ca ekadā bhagavant devaḥ vṛṣabha īśvara vāhanaḥ viśveśvaraḥ vārāṇasyām dṛṣṭaḥ spṛṣṭaḥ namaskṛtaḥ tadā acireṇa kālena paṣcatvam aham āgataḥ na dṛṣṭam tat mahā ghoram yamasya sadanam mune pipāsayā adhunā akrām namaḥ tubhyam tvām aham śaraṇam gataḥ iti uktaḥ śam kukarṇaḥ atha piśācam idam abravīt tādṛśaḥ na hi loke asmin vidyate puṇya kṛttamaḥ yat tvayā bhagavant pūrvam dṛṣṭaḥ viśveśvaraḥ śivaḥ mad ditaḥ bhūyas kaḥ anyaḥ tvad sadṛśaḥ bhuvi snānam kuruṣva aśīghram tvam asmin kuṇḍe samāhitaḥ yena imām kutsitām yonim kṣipram eva prahāsyasi smṛtvā kapardī īśvaram īśitāram cakre samādhāya manas uvagāham tadā avagāḍhaḥ muni saṃnidhāne ima māra divya ābharaṇa upapannaḥ adṛśyata arka pratimaḥ vimāneśa śām ka cihnīkṛta cāru mauliḥ mum vṛṣṭim kusuma ambu miśrām gandharva vidyādhara kiṃnara ādyāḥ sam stūyamānaḥ atha muni indra saṃghaiḥ avāpya bodham bhagavat prasādāt samāviśat maṇḍalam etat agryam trayī mayam yatra vibhāti rudraḥ dṛṣṭvā vimuktam sa piśāca bhūtam muniḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ manasā maheśam śam kukarṇaḥ uvāca tvā paratas parastāt goptāram ekam puruṣam purāṇam vrajāmi yogeśvaram īpsitāram ādityam agnim kapilā adhirūḍham tvām brahma sāram hṛdi saṃniviṣṭam hiraṇmayam yoginam ādimam tam vrajāmi rudram śaraṇam diviṣṭham sahasra pāda akṣi śiraḥ bhiyuktam sahasra rūpam tamasaḥ parastāt tam brahmapāram praṇamāmi śam bhum hiraṇyagarbha adhipatim trinetram yatra prasūtiḥ jagantaḥ vināśaḥ yena āvṛtam sarvam idam śivena tam brahmapāram bhagavant tam īśam praṇamya anityam śaraṇam prapadye aliṅgam āloka vihīna rūpam svayam prabhum citpatim eka rūpam yam yoginaḥ tyakta sa bīja yogāḥ labdhvā samādhim paramātma bhūtāḥ na yatra nāma ādi viśeṣa klṛptiḥ tam brahmapāram praṇataḥ asmi nityam svayam bhuvam tvā śaraṇam prapadye paśyanti anekam bhavataḥ sva rūpam tam brahmapāram praṇataḥ asmi nityam yatas pradhānam puruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ bibharti tejaḥ praṇamanti devāḥ nama amitam jyotiṣi sanniviṣṭam kālam bṛham tam bhavataḥ sva rūpam vrajāmi nityam śaraṇam guheśam sthāṇum prapadye giriśam purāṇam mama śivam prapadye dumaulim pinākinam tvā śaraṇam vrajāmi tad kṣaṇāt paramam liṅgam prādurbhūtam śiva ātmakam mānam damatyam tam koṭi jvālā agni saṃnibham śam kukarṇaḥ atha muktātmā a tad ātmā sarva gaḥ amalaḥ etat rahasyam ākhyātam māhātmyam tekaparddinaḥ yā emām śṛṇuyāt nityam kathām pāpa praṇāśinīm tyakta pāpa viśuddha ātma arudra sāmīpyam āpnuyāt iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe māhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca mahā rāja madhyameśam parātparam tatra pūrvam hṛṣīkeśaḥ viśvātmā devakī sutaḥ uvāsa vatsaram kṛṣṇaḥ sadā pāśupataiḥ yutaḥ ārādhayan hariḥ śam bhum kṛtvā apāśupatam vratam tasya tebahavaḥ śiṣyāḥ brahmacarya parāyaṇāḥ labdhvā tad vadanāt jñānam dṛṣṭavantaḥ maheśvaram tasya devaḥ mahā devaḥ pratyakṣam nīlalohitaḥ ye atra drakṣyanti deveśam snātvā devam pinākinam brahmahatyā ādikam pāpam teṣām āśu vinaśyati tyakṣyanti yeḥ matyāḥ pāpa karma ratāḥ api te yānti tad param sthānam na atra kāryā vicāraṇā dākinyām kṛta udakāḥ arcayitvā mahā devam madhyameśvaram īśvaram jñānam dānam tapaḥ śrāddham piṇḍa nirvapaṇam tu iha ekaikaśas kṛtam karma punāti āsaptamam kulam evam uktam mahā rāja māhātmyam madhyameśvare yaḥ śṛṇoti param bhakti āsayā ati paramam padam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe māhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca anyāni ca mahā rājatīrthāni pāvanāni tu mad anīhasam śṛṇuṣva yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ prayāgāt adhikam tīrtham prayāgam paramam śubham mahā tīrtham tīrtham ca eva ārṣabham param sunīlam ca mahā tīrtham gaurītīrtham anuttamam prājāpatyam tathā tīrtham svargadvāram tathā eva ca eva nārāyaṇa param tīrtham vāyutīrtham anuttamam jñānatīrtham param guhyam vārāham tīrtham uttamam yamatīrtham yathā puṇyam tīrtham sam mūrtikam śubham agnitīrtham mahā rājakalaśeśvaram uttamam nāgatīrtham somatīrtham sūryatīrtham tathā eva ca ghaṭotkacam tīrtha varam śrītīrtham ca pitāmaham tatra liṅgam purāṇīyam sthātum brahmā yathā gataḥ tadānīm sthāpayāmāsa viṣṇuḥ tailam lagam aiśvaram mayā ānītam idam liṅgam kasmāt sthāpitavan asi tasmāt pratiṣṭhitam liṅgam nāmnā tava bhaviṣyati bhūteśvaram tathā tīrtham tīrtham dharma samudbhavam gandharvatīrtham su śubham vāhneyam tīrtham uttamam daurvāsikam vyomatīrtham candratīrtham yudhiṣṭhira cintām gadeśvaram tīrtham puṇyam vidyādhareśvaram sārasvatam prabhāsam ca rudra karṇa hradam śubham kokila ākhyam mahā tīrtham tīrtham ca eva mahālayam upaśāntam śivaḥ ca eva vyāghreśvaram anuttamam trilocanam mahā tīrtham lokārkam ca uttara āhvayam tīrtham brahmahatyā vināśanam śukreśvaram mahā puṇya mānam dapuram uttamam evamādīni tīrthāni vārāṇasyām sthitāni vai na śakyam vistarāt vaktum kalpa koṭi śataiḥ api iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe māhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vārāṇasyāḥ ca māhātmyam tasyām tīrthāni ca prabho śṛṇu tatas gayām samāsādya brahmacārī samāhitaḥ yatra akṣayyavaṭaḥ nāma triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ mahā nadyām upaspṛśya tarpayet pitṛ devatāḥ tat puṇḍarīkam avāpnoti prabhātam iva śarvarī sarasi brahmanā tatra yūpa śreṣṭhaḥ samucchritaḥ yūpam pradakṣiṇam kṛtvā vājapeya phalam labhet tatra cihnam mahā rāja adya api hina saṃśayaḥ sa vatsāyāḥ padāni asya adṛśyante adya api bhārata teṣu upaspṛśya rāja indra padeṣu nṛpa sattamaiḥ yat kiṃcid aśubham pāpam tat praṇaśyati bhārataiḥ tatas gṛdhravaṭam gacchet sthānam devasya śūlinaḥ brāhmaṇena bhavet cīrṇam vratam dvādaśa vārṣikam itareṣām sarva pāpam praṇaśyati sāvitram tupadam tatra dṛśyate bharata ṛṣabha tatra samdhyām upāsīta brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśita vrataḥ upāstā ahi bhavet samdhyātena dvādaśa vārṣikī śukla kṛṣṇau ubhau pakṣau gayāyām yaḥ vaset naraḥ punāti āsaptamam rājñ kulam na asti atra saṃśayaḥ putrāḥ yadi api ekaḥ gayām vrajet yajeta vā aśvamedhena nīlam vā avṛṣam utsṛjet tatas phalgum vrajet rājam stīrtha sevī narādhipaiḥ tatas gaccheta rāja indra dharmapṛṣṭham samāhitaḥ rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām phalam prāpnoti bhārataiḥ tatas rājagṛham gacchet tīrtha sevī narādhipaiḥ tatra prāk agni puruṣaḥ śuciḥ naityakam bhuṣjate yaḥ tu maṇi nāgasya mānavaḥ daṣṭasya āśīviṣeṇa asya na viṣam kramate nṛpa tatra uṣya rajanīm ekām sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate hrade snātvā vrajeta paramām gatim tatra udapānaḥ dharmajṣa triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ tatra abhiṣekam kurvīta vājimedham avāpnuyāt janakasya tu rājarṣeḥ kūpaḥ tridaśa pūjitaḥ tatra abhiṣekam kṛtvā ca viṣṇu lokam avāpnuyāt gaṇḍakīm ca samāsādya sarva tīrtha jala udbhavām guhyakeṣu mahā bhāga modatena atra saṃśayaḥ karma dām siddha niṣevitām tatas viśālām āsādya nadīm trailokya viśrutām atha māheśvarīm dhārām samāsādya narādhipaiḥ divaukasām puṣkariṇīm samāsādya naraḥ śuciḥ atha māheśapadam gacchet brahmacārī samāhitaḥ māheśvara pade snātvā vājimedha phalam labhet tatra koṭiḥ tu tīrthānām viśrutā bharata ṛṣabhaiḥ kūrma rūpeṇa rāja indra asureṇa durātmanā hriyamāṇa āhṛtā rājan viṣṇunā a prabhaviṣṇunā tatra abhiṣekam kurvīta tīrtha koṭau narādhipaiḥ puṇḍarīkam avāpnoti viṣṇu lokam ca gacchati tatas gacchet nara śreṣṭha sthānam nārāyaṇasya ca yatra brahma ādayaḥ devāṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ śālagrāmaḥ eti khyātaḥ viṣṇoḥ adbhuta karmaṇaḥ samudrāḥ tatra catvāraḥ kūpe sannihitāḥ sadā yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ jātismara aupaspṛśya śuciḥ prayata mānasaḥ prāpnoti snātvā tatra na saṃśayaḥ gatvā bhate lokān upavāsāt na saṃśayaḥ tatas tu vāmanam gatvā sarva pāpa praṇāśanam kauśikīm tatra seveta mahā pātaka nāśinīm rājasū yasya yajṣasya phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ upoṣya rajanīm ekām agniṣṭoma phalam labhet tatra viśveśvaram dṛṣṭvā devyāsaha mahā dyutim kanyā āvasatham āsādya niyataḥ niyata aśanaḥ ye prayacchanti dānam aṇu api bhārataiḥ tat akṣayam iti prāhuḥ ṛṣayaḥ saṃśita vratāḥ niṣṭhā vāsam samāsādya triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam prayacchanti tatra āśramaḥ vasiṣṭhasya triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ tatra abhiṣekam kurvāṇaḥ vājapeyam avāpnuyāt devakūṭam samāsādya devarṣi gaṇa sevitam tatra siddhim parām prāpa viśvāmitraḥ atha kauśikaḥ yatra māsam vaset dhīraḥ kauśikyām bharata ṛṣabha kumāram abhigamya atha vīra āśrama nivāsinam dinyām ca samāsādya kūpam tridaśa sevitam urvaśītīrtham āsādya tathā somāśramam budhaḥ bhakarṇa āśrame snātvā pūjyate bhuvi mānavaḥ tathā kokāmukhe snātvā brahmacārī samāhitaḥ yat jāti smara tvam prāpnoti dṛṣṭam etat purātanaiḥ sakṛt nadīm samāsādya kṛtārthaḥ bhavati dvijaḥ ṛṣabhadvīpam āsādya sevya kraum ca niṣūdanam audyānakam mahā rājatīrtham muni niṣevitam brahmatīrtham samāsādya puṇyam brahmarṣi sevitam avāpnoti na asti atra tatas ca samāsādya bhāgīrathyām kṛta udakaḥ daṇḍārpaṇam samāsādya go sahasra phalam labhet lāviḍhikā antatas gacchet puṇyām puṇya niṣevitām iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe gayā ādi tīrtha māhātmya kathanam adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca atha samdhyām samāsādya savidyām tīrtham uttamam upaspṛśya naraḥ vidvāḥ bhavet na asti atra saṃśayaḥ rāmasya ca prasādena tīrtha rājam kṛtam purā samāsādya tri rātra upoṣitaḥ naraḥ gaṅgāyāḥ tu atha rāja indra sāgarasya ca saṃgame aśvamedham daśaguṇam pravadanti manīṣaṇaḥ prāpya ayaḥ snāti bhārataiḥ tri rātra upoṣitaḥ rājñ sarva kāmam avāpnuyāt tatas vaitaraṇīm gatvā nadīm pāpa pramocanīm hi virajam tīrtham āsādya virājati yathā śaśī prabhāveca kulam pūtvā sarva pāpam vyapohati ca saṅgame nivasan śuciḥ ca prabhave kuru puṃgava ṛṣabham tīrtham āsādya kośalāyām narādhipa samāsādya kālatīrtham upaspṛśet vṛṣabha ekādaśa guṇam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ puṣpavatyām upaspṛśya tri rātra upoṣitaḥ naraḥ tatas badārikātīrthe snātvā prayata mānasaḥ rāmatīrthe naraḥ snātvā vājimedha phalam labhet mahāparvatam samāsādya nadī tīram upaspṛśet tatra devahrade snātvā śuciḥ prayata mānasaḥ ṛṣabham parvatam gatvā a bhāṇḍeṣu sura pūjitam avāpnoti tatas gaccheta kāverīm vṛtām ṛpsa rasā aṅgaṇaiḥ atha gokamarṇa māsa ādya triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam bhūta yakṣāḥ piśācāḥ ca kinnarāḥ sa mahā uragāḥ siddha cāraṇa gandharvāḥ mānuṣāḥ pannagāḥ tathā saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ upāsante umāpatim madhya aśvamedham āpnoti gāṇapatyam ca vindati upoṣya dvādaśa rātram kṛtārthaḥ jāyate naraḥ nidarśanam ca pratyakṣam brāhmaṇānām narādhipaiḥ gāyatrīm paṭhate yaḥ karajaḥ dvijaḥ tasya sampadyate nṛpa abrāhmaṇasya a paṭhataḥ sāvitrī tu upanaśyati sam var tasya tuvi prarṣi vāpīm āsādya durlabhām yad bhāgībhavati subhagaḥ ca abhi jāyate tatas veṇām samāsādya tarpayet pitṛ devatāḥ mayūra ham vimānam labhate naraḥ tatas godāvarīm prāpya nitya siddha niṣevitām veṇāyāḥ saṃgame snātvā vājapeya phalam labhet brahmasthūṇām samāsādya tri rātra upoṣitaḥ naraḥ samāsādya brahmacārī samāhitaḥ tatas devahrade snātvā kṛṣṇaveṇā jala udbhave yatra kratu śataiḥ iṣṭvā devarājaḥ divam gataḥ agniṣṭoma śatam vindyāt gamanāt eva tatra tu mātrahrade snātvā bhavet jātismaraḥ naraḥ harabham gāśramam gatvā śukasya ca mahātmanaḥ daṇḍaka araṇyam āsādya mahā rājaḥ upaspṛśet mahātmanaḥ rāmatīrtham naraḥ snātvā bahu suvarṇakam saptagodāvarīm snātvā niyataḥ niyata aśanaḥ tum gaka araṇyam āsādya brahmacārī jita indriyaḥ vedān adhyāpayat tatra munīn sārasvataḥ purā tatra vedān praṇaṣṭām stumuneḥ āṅgirasaḥ sutaḥ upaviṣṭaḥ mahā ṛṣīṇām uttarīyeṣu bhārataiḥ aum kāreṇa yathā nyāyam samyak uccāritena aha ṛṣayaḥ tatra devāḥ ca varuṇaḥ agniḥ prajāpatiḥ pitāmahaḥ ca bhagavān devaiḥ saha mahā dyutiḥ bhṛgum niyojayāmāsa yājana arthe mahā dyutim tatas sacakre bhagavant ṛṣīṇām vidhivat tadā sarveṣām punar ādhānam deva dṛṣṭena karmaṇā devāḥ tribhuvanam yāta aṛṣaḥ ca yathā sukham tat araṇyam praviṣṭasya tum rāja sattama tat pāpam vinaśyate sadyas striyā vaipuruṣasya vā tatra māsam vaset dhīraḥ niyataḥ niyata aśanaḥ medhāvanam samāsādya pitṛ devān ca tarpayet agniṣṭomam avāpnoti smṛtim medhām ca vindati ātmānam sādhayet tatra girau kālam jarā nṛpaiḥ tatas gir ivaraśreṣṭhe citrakūṭe viśām pate dākinīm samāsādya nadīm pāpa vimocanīm atra abhiṣekam kurvāṇaḥ pitṛ deva arcaneḥ atas pumān tatra naraḥ śreṣṭha gamanāt eva sidhyati pradakṣiṇam upāvṛtya yaśaḥ sthānam vrajet naraḥ abhigamya mahā devam virājati yathā śaśī tatas upaspṛśya rāja indra kṛtvā acā api pradakṣiṇam niyata ātmā anaraḥ pūtaḥ gaccheta paramām gatim tatas gacchet kuru śreṣṭha śṛṃ gaverapuram mahat purā yaḥ tu na snātvā brahmacārī jita indriyaḥ tatas amum javaṭam gacchet sthānam devasya adhīmataḥ pradakṣiṇam upāvṛtya gāṇapatyam avāpnuyāt yatra brahma ādayaḥ deva ādiśaḥ ca sa digīśvarāḥ lokapālāḥ ca siddhāḥ ca niratāḥ pitaraḥ tathā tathā nāgāḥ suparṇāḥ ca siddhāḥ śukra dharāḥ tathā hariḥ ca bhagavant āste prajāpati puraskṛtaḥ tatra trīṇi api kuṇḍāni tayoḥ madhye na jāhnavī sarva tīrtha puraskṛtā yamunā gaṅga yā sārdham saṅga tā loka bhāvinī prayāgam jaghanasya antam upastham ṛṣayaḥ viduḥ prayāgam supratiṣṭhānam kambala aśvatarau ubhau tīrtham bhogavatī ca eva vedi proktā prajāpateḥ tatra vedāḥ ca yajṣāḥ ca mūrttimantaḥ yudhiṣṭhira prajāpatim upāsam tad ṛṣayaḥ ca mahā naghāḥ tatas puṇyatamam na asti triṣu lokeṣu bhārata prayāgam sarva tīrthebhyaḥ prabhāvena adhikam prabho mahā bhū api mūrdhaka ānamanāt vā api sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate tatra abhiṣekam yaḥ kuryāt saṅgame saṃśita vrataḥ puṇyam su mahat āpnoti rājasūya aśvamedhayoḥ eṣā ayajana bhūmiḥ hi devānām api tad kathā matiḥ utkramaṇīyā ateprayāga maraṇam prati parāḥ snātaḥ eva tat āpnoti gaṅgā yāmuna saṃgame tatra abhiṣekam yaḥ kuryāt saḥ aśvamedham avāpnuyāt daśāśvamedhikam ca eva gaṅgāyām kuru nandanaiḥ tatra tatra avagāhitā yadi akārya śatam kṛtvā akṛtam gaṅgā avasevanam sarvam dahati gaṅgā apastūla rāśim iva analaḥ sarvam kṛta yuge puṇyam tretāyām puṣkaram smṛtam dṛṣṭvā puṇyam prayacchati avagāḍha ācapītvā ācapunāti āsaptamam kulam yāvat asthi manuḥ yasya gaṅgāyāḥ spṛśate jalam yathā puṇyāni tīrthāni puṇyāni āyatanāni ca na gaṅgā sadṛśam tīrtham na devaḥ keśavāt paraḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ param na asti evam āha pitāmahaḥ siddha kṣetram ca vijṣeyam gaṅgā tīra samāśritam idam satyam dvijātīnām sādhūnām mānaseṣu ca muktim ca eva japet karṇeśa śiṣṭasya anuga tasya ca mahī śīrṣam idam guhyam sarva pāpa pramocanam śrīmat svargyam mahā puṇyam sapatna śamanam śivam medhājananam agryam vaitīrthavam śānukīrtanam mahīm vijayate rājāvaiśyaḥ dhanam avāpnuyāt mā śūdraḥ yā ati īpsitān kāmān brāhmaṇaḥ pāragaḥ paṭhan yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt nityam tīrtha puṇyam sadā aśuci jātismara tvam āpnoti nāka pṛṣṭhe ca modate bhiḥ deva kalpaiḥ ca kṛta anisukṛta eṣibhiḥ bhāvitaiḥ karaṇaiḥ pūrvam āstikyāt śruti darśanāt prāpyam śiṣṭa anudarśibhiḥ na akṛta una akṛtātmā acana aśuciḥ na ca taskaraḥ pitāmaha purogāḥ ca devāḥ sa ṛṣi gaṇāḥ tathā uvāca tvam ca dharmeṇa dharma jṣa nityam eva abhitoṣitāḥ dilīpa kīrtim mahatīm prāpsyase bhuvi śāśvatām uvāca evam uktvā abhyanujṣāpya vasiṣṭhaḥ bhagavān ṛṣiḥ prītaḥ prītena amanasā tatra iva antaradhīyata dilīpaḥ kuru śārdūla śāstra tattva artha darśanāt evam eṣā mahā bhāga pratiṣṭhāne pratiṣṭhitā tīrtha yātrā mahā puṇyā sarva pāpa pramocanā anena vidhinā ayaḥ tu pṛthivīm paryaṭiṣyati aśvamedha śatam sāgram phalam pretya eṣa bhokṣyate tatas ca aṣṭaguṇam pārtha prāpsyase dharmam uttamam dilīpaḥ pārtha nṛpatiḥ yathā pūrvam avāptavan mṛṣīn yasmāt tasmāt te aṣṭaguṇam phalam rakṣas gaṇa vikīrṇāni tīrthāni etāni bhārataiḥ idam devarṣi caritam sarva tīrtha anusam śritam ṛṣi mukhyāḥ sadā yatra vālmīkiḥ tu atha kaśyapaḥ asitaḥ devalaḥ ca eva mārkaṇḍeyaḥ atha gālavaḥ bharadvājasya śiṣyaḥ ca muniḥ uddālakaḥ tathā śaunakaḥ ca tapatām varaḥ durvāsāḥ ca muni śreṣṭhaḥ jābāliḥ ca mahā tapāḥ ete ṛṣi varāḥ sarve tvad pratīkṣyāḥ tapodhanāḥ ebhiḥ saha mahā bhāga tīrthāni etāni anuvraja prāpsyase mahatīm kīrtim yathā rājā amahābhiṣaḥ yathā yayātiḥ dharma ātmā yathā rājā apurūravāḥ tathā tvam kuru śārdūla svena dharmeṇa śobhase yathā yathā rāmaḥ ca viśrutaḥ yathā vai vṛtrahā sarvān sapatnān adahat purā trailokyam pālayāmāsa deva rāṭ vi gata jvaraḥ tathā śatru kṣayam kṛtvā tvam prajāḥ pālayiṣyasi svadharmeṇa arjitām urvīm prāpya rājīva locanaiḥ khyātim yāsyasi vīryeṇa kārtavīrya arjunaḥ yathā uvāca evam ābhāṣya rājānam nāradaḥ bhagavān ṛṣiḥ anujṣāpya mahā rājam tatra iva antaradhīyata yudhiṣṭhiraḥ api dharma ātmā ṛṣibhiḥ saha suvrataḥ mayā uktām ṛṣayaḥ sarve tīrtha yātrā āśrayām kathām yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt vā api samuktaḥ sarva pātakaiḥ mama asti vai iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe nānāvidha tīrtha kathanam nāma nāma navatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca evam uktāni tīrthāni viṣṇu dehāni suvratāḥ anyatama āsaṅgāt muktaḥ bhavati mānavaḥ tīrtha anuśravaṇam dhanyam dhanyam tīrtha niṣevaṇam pāpa rāśi nipāta ayana anya upāyaḥ kalau yuge kuryām tasya naśyanti tīrtha ālāpana mātrataḥ tīrthānām sevanāt deva sevitaḥ bhavati prabhuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ jagatkartā na asti tīrthāt param padam brāhmaṇaḥ tulasī ca eva aśvatthaḥ tīrtha saṣcayaḥ viṣṇuḥ ca parameśānaḥ sevyaḥ eva sadā nṛbhiḥ brāhmaṇānām viśeṣeṇa sevanam muni puṃgavāḥ sarva tīrtha avagāha ādeḥ adhikam viduḥ agrajāḥ tasmāt dvija padam sākṣāt sarva tīrtha mayam śubham bhajeta anudinam vidvāḥ tatra tīrtha adhikam bhavet ca gavām kuryāt pradakṣiṇam sarva tīrtha phalam prāpya viṣṇu loke mahīyate tasmāt duṣkṛta karmāṇi nāśayet tīrtha sevanāt yathā narakam yā ati karma bhogāt hi śāmyati pāpinām naraka ivāsaḥ sukṛtī svargam aśnute tasmāt pu niṣeveta tīrtham khalu vicakṣaṇaḥ vac suvrata idānīm śrotum icchāmaḥ prayāgasya viśeṣakam prayāgam tu purā proktam sam kṣepāt sūtayat tvayā viśeṣāt śrotum icchāmaḥ sūtanaḥ kathyatām iti uvāca sādhu pṛṣṭam mahā bhāgāḥ prayāgam pratisuvratāḥ ham tā aham tat pravakṣyāmi prayāgasya upavarṇanam mārkaṇḍeyena kathitam yat purā apāṇḍu sūnave bhārate tu yadā āvṛtte prāpta rājye pṛthāsute tasmin tasmin tīputraḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ taptaḥ ciṃ tayaṃ stu punar punar mā āsīt duryodhanaḥ rājā ekādaśa camūpatiḥ asmān sam tapya bahuśas sarve te nidhanam gatāḥ vāsudevam samāśritya paṣca śeṣāḥ tu pāṇḍavāḥ katham droṇam ca bhīṣmam ca karṇam ca eva mahā balam rājānaḥ nihatāḥ sarve ye ca anye śūra māninaḥ vinā arājyena kartavyam kim bhogaiḥ jīvitena vā dhik kaṣṭam iti sam ciṃ gataḥ niśceṣṭaḥ atha nirutsāhaḥ kiṃcid tiṣṭhati adhomukhaḥ tayānaḥ punar punar care vidhinā ayogam niyamam tīrtham eva vā yena aham śīghram āmucye mahā pātaka kilbiṣāt katham pṛcchāmi vaikṛṣṇam yena idam kāritam mahat dhṛtarāṣṭram katham pṛcche yasya putra śatam hatam pṛcche rudantaḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sarve bhrātṛ śoka pariplutāḥ ye ca tatra mahātmānaḥ sametāḥ pāṇḍava āśritāḥ ca eva ye ca tatra samāgatāḥ bhūmau nipatitāḥ sarveḥ rodamānāḥ samam tatas vārāṇasyām tu mārkaṇḍaḥ tena jṣātaḥ yudhiṣṭharaḥ yathā viklavam āpannaḥ urodamānaḥ su duḥkhitaḥ acireṇa eva kālena mārkaṇḍaḥ tu mahā tapāḥ hastināpura samprāptaḥ rājadvāre satiṣṭhati dvārapālaḥ apitam dṛṣṭvā kathitavan drutam tvām draṣṭu kāmaḥ mārkaṇḍaḥ dvāre tiṣṭhati asau muniḥ uvāca svāgatam te mahā prājṣa svāgatam te mahā mune adya me pitaraḥ tṛptāḥ tvayi dṛṣṭe mahā mune hāsana aupasthāpya pāda śauca arcana ādibhiḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ mahātmā vaipūjayāmāsatam munim tatas tam ūce mārkaṇḍaḥ pūjitaḥ aham tvayā a vibho tena vā aviklavībhūtaḥ kathayasva mama agratas uvāca naḥ ca eva yat vṛttam rājyasya arthe mahā mune uvāca śṛṇu rājñ mahā bāho yatra dharmaḥ vyavasthitaḥ na eva dṛṣṭam raṇe pāpam yudhyamānasya dhīmataḥ kim yasya viśeṣataḥ tat eva hṛdaye kṛtvā tasmāt pāpam tatas yudhiṣṭhiraḥ rājā a praṇamya śirasā munim pṛcchāmi tvām muni śreṣṭha sadā traikālya darśanam uvāca śṛṇu rājñ mahā bhāga yat mām pṛcchasi bhārata evam sām khyam ca yogam ca tīrtham ca eva yudhiṣṭhira kim punar brāhmaṇaiḥ puṇyaiḥ kīrtitam vaipurā vibho prayāga gamanam śreṣṭham narāṇām puṇya karmaṇām iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe catvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca katham prayāga gamanam narāṇām tatra kīdṛśam mṛtānām kā āgatiḥ tatra snātānām ca eva kim phalam mayā getubrūhi teṣām cakim phalam uvāca purā ṛṣīṇām viprāṇām kathyamānam mayā aśrutam ā prayāgāt pratiṣṭhānāt dharmakī vāsukī hradāt kambala aśvatara aunāga aunāgāḥ ca bahumūlikāḥ etat prajāpati kṣetram triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam atra snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ tatra brahma ādayaḥ deva ārakṣām kurvanti saṅga tāḥ anye ca bahavaḥ tīrthāḥ sarva pāpa praṇāśanāḥ na śakyāḥ kathitum rājñ bahu varṣa śataiḥ api saṃkṣepeṇa pravakṣyāmi prayāgasya ca kīrtanam ṣaṣṭiḥ dhanuḥ sahasrāṇi parirakṣanti jāhnavīm yamunām rakṣati sadā savitā sapta vāhanaḥ prayāgam tu viśeṣeṇa svayam rakṣati vāsavaḥ maṇḍalam rakṣati hariḥ devaiḥ sahasusam matam tam vaṭam rakṣate nityam śūlapāṇiḥ maheśvaraḥ sthānam rakṣati vaidevaḥ sarva pāpa haram śubham prayāga smaramāṇasya sarvam āyāti sam kṣayam darśanāt tasya tīrthasya nāma saṃkīrtanāt api mṛttikā labhanāt vā api naraḥ pāpāt vimucyate madhye tu jāhnavī prayāga itu praviṣṭasya pāpam kṣarati tad kṣaṇāt yojanānām sahasreṣu gaṅgām smarati yonaraḥ paśyati avagāhya capītvā ācapunāti āsaptamam kulam satya vādī jita krodhaḥ ahim sām param āsthitaḥ manasā ciṃ ti tān kāmān samyak prāpnoti puṣkalān brahmacārī vaset māsam pitṛ devān ca tarpayet mā llabhate kāmān yatra tatra abhi jāyate tapanasya sutā devī triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā samāgatāḥ mahā bhāgāḥ yamunā yatra nimnagāḥ tatra sannihitaḥ nityam sākṣāt devaḥ maheśvaraḥ duṣprāpam mānuṣaiḥ puṇyam prayāgam tu yudhiṣṭhira deva dānava gandharvāḥ ṛṣayaḥ siddha cāraṇāḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan prayāgasya māhātmyam punar eva tu yam gatvā sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ ārtānām ca daridrāṇām niścita vyavasāyinām sthānam muktvā prayāgam tu kadācana āsādya tu parityajet dīpta kāṣcana varṇa ābhe vimāne sūrya varcasi īpsitān labhate kāmān vadanti ṛṣi puṃgavāḥ vara aṅganā samākīrṇaiḥ modate śubha lakṣaṇaiḥ tatra svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇa karmā ādivaḥ cyutaḥ deśa sthaḥ yat iva araṇye videśe yat iva gṛhe sa brahma lokam āpnoti vadanti ṛṣi puṃgavāḥ sarva kāmaphalā vṛttāmahī yatra hiraṇmayī strī sahasra ākule ramya imam dākinyāḥ taṭe śubhe modate ṛṣibhiḥ sārdham sva kṛtena ihakarmaṇā tatas punar punar bhavati ihana saṃśayaḥ karmaṇā a manasā vācā a satya dharma pratiṣṭhitaḥ suvarṇam maṇi muktām vāyadi dhānyam pratigraham sva kārye pitṛ kārye iva a devatā abhyarcane api vā evam tīrthena gṛhṇīyāt puṇyeṣu āyataneṣu ca kapilām pāṭalā varṇām prayāgeyaḥ prayacchati svarṇa śṛṅ gīṃ raupya khurām cailakam ṭhīṃ payasvinīm prayāge śrotriyam sādhum grāhayitvā yathāvidhi śuklām bara dharam śāntam dharma jṣam vedapāragam sā gauḥ tasmai ca dātavyā gaṅgā yamunā saṃgame ca yāvat romāṇitasya agoḥ santi gātreṣu sattama dadyāt putrān dārān tathā bhṛtyān gauḥ ekā pratitārayet tasmāt sarveṣu dāneṣu go dānam tu viśiṣyate kuruta iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca yathā prayāgasya mune māhātmyam kathitam tvayā tathā tathā pramucye aham sarva pāpaiḥ na saṃśayaḥ uvāca balīvarda samārūḍhaḥ śṛṇutasya api yat phalam yaḥ tu putrān tathā bālān snāpayet pāyayet tathā yathā tmanaḥ tathā sarvān dānam vipreṣu dāpayet mohāt vā āgacchet yānenayaḥ naraḥ niṣphalam tasya tat tīrtham tasmāt yānam parityajet na paśyati yamam ghoram narakam tena karmaṇā yutān samāśritya ayaḥ tu prāṇān parityajet tatra te dvādaśa ādityāḥ tapam te rudram āśritāḥ tadā ca ekārṇavam jagant tvapit yatra iva vaiviṣṇuḥ jāyamānaḥ punar punar deva dānava gandharva ṛṣayaḥ siddha cāraṇāḥ sadā sevanti tat tīrtham gaṅgā yamunā saṃgame tatra brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ diśaḥ ca eva diś īśvarāḥ lokapālāḥ ca sādhyāḥ ca pitaraḥ lokasam matāḥ tathā nāgāḥ ca siddhāḥ ca suparṇāḥ khecarāḥ ca ye saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ nāgāḥ vidyādharāḥ tathā hariḥ ca bhagavān āste prajāpati puraskṛtaḥ prayāgam rāja śārdūla triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam tatas puṇyatamam na asti triṣu lokeṣu bhārataiḥ śravaṇāt tasya tīrthasya nāma saṅkīrtanāt api mṛttikā ālambhanāt vā api naraḥ pāpāt pramucyate tatra abhiṣekam yaḥ kuryāt saṅgame saṃśita vrataḥ tulyam phalam avāpnoti rājasūya aśvamedhayoḥ daśa tīrtha sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi koṭayaḥ tathā parāḥ sā gatiḥ tyajataḥ prāṇān gaṅgā yamunā saṅgame ye prayāgam na samprāptāḥ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam evam dṛṣṭvā prayāgam paramam padam mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ śaśām kaivarāhuṇā kambala aśvatarau nāgau yamunā dakṣiṇe taṭe tatra snātvā sarva pātakaiḥ naraḥ tārayate sarvān daśa atītān daśa aparān kṛtvā abhiṣekam tu na saḥ aśvamedha phalam labhet triṣu lokeṣu bhārataiḥ ca eva tu sāmudram pratiṣṭhānam tu viśrutam uttareṇa pratiṣṭhānāt bhāgīrathyāḥ tu pūrvatas urvaśī puline ramye vipule haṃsa pāṇḍure ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi varṣa śatāni ca tatas svarga paribhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇa karmā ādivas cyutaḥ urvaśī sadṛśīnām tu kanyānām labhate śatam gavām śata sahasrāṇām bhoktā bhavati bhūmipa bhuktvā tu vipulān bhogān labhate punar kuśa āsana dharaḥ nityam niyataḥ sam yata indriyaḥ suvarṇa alam kṛtānām tunārīṇām labhate śatam mahā bhogapatiḥ bhavet daśa grāma sahasrāṇām bhoktā bhavati bhūmipaḥ dhana dhānya samāyuktaḥ dātā bhavati nityaśas sa bhuktvā avipulān bhogān stat tīrtham smarate punar upoṣya yoga yuktaḥ ca brahma jñānam avāpnuyāt tu prāṇān parityajet tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇa karmā adivaścyutaḥ tuvarṇa maṇi muktā āḍhye kule bhavati rūpavān daśāśvamedhakam tatra tīrtham tatra aparam bhavet kṛtvā abhiṣekam tu na saḥ aśvamedha phalam labhet dhana āḍhyaḥ rūpavān dakṣaḥ dātā bhavati dhārmikaḥ bhū bhū bhū yatra tatra avagāhyate kurukṣetrāt daśaguṇā yatra yatra gaṅgā mahā bhāgā bahu tīrtha tapodhanā siddha kṣetram na atra kāryā vicāraṇā kṣitau tārayate martyān nāgām stārayate api adhas stena sātri pathā smṛtā yāvat asthīni gaṅgā yānti sthanti tasya dehinaḥ tīrthānām tuparam tīrtham nadīnām uttamānadī mokṣa dā sarva bhūtānām mahā pātakinām api durlabhā tatra snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ sarveṣām ca eva bhūtānām pāpa upahata cetasām pavitrāṇām pavitram yāmam galānām camaṅgalam maheśvara śiras bhraṣṭā sarva pāpa hara aśubhā iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye tricatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ catuḥ ca tvārim śaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājñ prayāgasya māhātmyam punar eva tu mānasam nāma tat tīrtham gaṅgāyām uttara taṭe tri rātra upoṣitaḥ bhūtvā sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt vipadyate bahu varṣāṇi rāja indra ṣaṣ sahasrāṇi bhuṣjate tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ kṣīṇa karmā ādivaḥ cyutaḥ suvarṇa maṇi muktā āḍhye jāyate sa mahā kule tīrtha sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi tīrtha śatāni ca māghe māsi gamiṣyanti gaṅgā yamunā saṃgame ahīnām gohyarogaḥ ca paṣca indriya samanvitaḥ yāvanti roma kūpāni tasya gātrasya dehinaḥ tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ jam būdvīpa patiḥ bhavet sa bhuktvā avipulān bhogān bhajate naraḥ jala praveśam yaḥ kuryāt saṃgame loka viśrute ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭi varṣa śatāni ca adhas sirāḥ tuyas jvālām ūrdhva pādaḥ pibet naraḥ śatam varṣa sahasrāṇi svarga loke mahīyate bhuktvā tu vipulān bhogān bhajate naraḥ śatam varṣa sahasrāṇām soma loke mahīyate tatas svargāt paribhraṣṭaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ bhuktvā tu vipulān bhogān bhajate punar bhagavant nāma tīrtham tat paramam smṛtam eka rātra uṣitaḥ bhūtvā ṛṇaiḥ sarva pramucyate avāpnoti sūrya lokam avāpnoti iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye catuḥ ca tvārim śaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca brūhi bhagavan tatra kīdṛśam uvāca śṛṇu rājñ prayāga itu anāśaka phalam vibho prāpnoti puruṣaḥ dhīmān śraddadhānaḥ ca yādṛśam ahīnām go virogaḥ ca paṣca indriya samanvitaḥ kulān itārayet rājñ daśa pūrvān daśa aparān uvāca etat mama saṃśayam brūhi param kautūhalam hime uvāca śṛṇu rājan mahā vīra yudh uktam padmayoninā aśrutam paṣca yojana vistīrṇam prayāga syatu maṇḍalam vyatītān puruṣān sapta bhaviṣyān ca caturdaśa evam rāja indra sadā śraddhā paraḥ bhavet aśraddadhānāḥ puruṣāḥ pāpa upahata cetasaḥ uvāca snehāt vā a dravya lobhāt vā aye tu kāma vaśam gatāḥ katham tīrtha phalam teṣām katham puṇyam avāpnuyuḥ vikrayam sarva bhāṇḍānām kārya akāryam a jānataḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājñ mahā guhyam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ yathā diṣṭam svayam bhuvā him sakaḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ bha ghātakānām tu prayāge śṛṇu tad phalam tri kālam eva snāyīta āhāram bhaikṣyam ācaret tribhiḥ māsaiḥ pramucyeta prayāgāt tu na saṃśayaḥ evam sadā bhavati bhogavān tāritāḥ pitaraḥ tena narakāt prapitāmahāḥ uvāca uvāca janma diṣṭyā atetāritam kulam praṇāśanam uvāca yamunāyām tu kim puṇyam kim phalam tu mahā mune etat me sarvam ākhyāhi yathā dṛṣṭam yathā śrutam uvāca tapanasya sutā devī triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā samāgatā mahā bhāgā yamunā yatra nimnagā yena eva niḥ sṛtā gaṅgā tena eva yamunā gatā yojanānām sahasreṣu kīrtanāt pāpa nāśinī tatra snātvā ca pītvā ca yamunāyām yudhiṣṭhira tanāt labhate puṇyam dṛṣṭvā bhadrāṇi paśyati avagāḍha ācapītvā ācapunāti āsaptamam kulam tatra sa yāti paramām gatim agni tīrtham iti khyātam yamunā dakṣiṇe taṭe tatra snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ evam tīrtha sahasrāṇi yamunā dakṣiṇe taṭe uttareṇa pravakṣyāmi ādit yasya mahātmanaḥ tīrtham tuvirajam nāma yatra devāḥ sa vāsavāḥ upāsatesma saṃdhyām tu nityakālam yudhiṣṭhira devāḥ sevanti tat tīrtham ye ca anye viduṣaḥ janāḥ śraddadhāna paraḥ bhūtvā kurutīrtha abhiṣecanam anye ca bahavaḥ tīrthāḥ sarva pāpa harāḥ śubhāḥ teṣu snātvā divam yānti ye mṛtāḥ te apunarbhavāḥ kevalam śreṣṭha bhāvena gaṅgā sarvatra pūjyate yāvat jīva kṛtam pāpam tat kṣaṇāt eva naśyati yaḥ tu idam ca śṛṇoti vā iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe yamunā māhātmye paṣcacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śrutam me brahmaṇā proktam purāṇe puṇya sammitam tīrthānām tu sahasrāṇi śatāni niyutāni ca sarva puṇyāḥ pavitrāḥ ca gatiḥ ca paramā smṛtā pṛthivyām naimiṣam puṇyam antar ikṣecapuṣkaram prayāgam api lokānām kurukṣetram viśiṣyate gatim ca paramām divyām bhogān ca eva yathā īpsitān etam me saṃśayam brūhi yathā dṛṣṭam thā a śrutam uvāca sarva etena idam bhāṣitam mayā śṛṇu prayāgamāhātmyam yathā dṛṣṭam yathā śrutam yathā eva anyat mayā adṛṣṭam purā rājan yathā śrutam śāstram pramāṇam kṛtvā tu pūjyate yogam ātmanaḥ prayāga itu mṛtasya idam sarvam yathā yathā sarveṣu bhūteṣu evam sarveṣu lokeṣu prayāgaḥ pūjyate budhaiḥ kaḥ hi deva tvam āsādya mānuṣa tvam cikīrṣati anena eva anumānena tvam jṣāsyasi yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ yathā puṇyam apuṇyam vā tathā eva kathitam mayā uvāca śrutam tat yat tvayā a proktam vismitaḥ aham punar punar tadā ca tad karmaṇām phalam tāni karmāṇi pṛcchāmi punar yebhiḥ prāpyate mahīm uvāca mahā bāho yathā ukta karmaṇā mahī gām agnim brāhmaṇam śāstram kāṣcanam salilam striyaḥ na eteṣām ūrdhva gamanam evam āha prajāpatiḥ gacchanti narakam ghoram yenarāḥ pāpa kāriṇaḥ hasti aśvam gām anaḍvāham maṇi muktā ādi kāṣcanam anena karmaṇā ayuktāḥ pacyam tena narake adhamāḥ evam yogam ca dharmam ca dātāram ca yudhiṣṭhira niruktam tu pravakṣyāmi yathā yam svayam āpnuyāt iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājñ prayāgasya māhātmyam punar eva tu naimiṣam puṣkaram ca eva gotīrtham sindhusāgaram purukṣetram gayā ca eva gaṅgāsāgaram eva ca ete ca anye ca bahavaḥ ye ca puṇyāḥ śiloccayāḥ pare sthitān ityam evam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ trīṇi ca api agnikuṇḍāni yeṣām madhye tu jāhnavī prayāgāt abhiniṣkrām sarva tīrtha puraskṛtā tapanasya sutā devī triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā gaṅgā yamunayā sārdham sam sthita āloka bhāvinī prayāgam rāja śārdūla kalām na arhanti ṣoḍaśām tisraḥ koṭayaḥ ardha koṭīca tīrthānām vāyuḥ abravīt prayāgam samadhiṣṭhānam kambala aśvatarau ubhau tatra devāḥ ca yajṣāḥ ca mūrtimantaḥ yudhiṣṭhira pūjayanti prayāgam ca tapodhanāḥ yajam te kratubhiḥ devān tathā tatas puṇyatamaḥ na asti triṣu lokeṣu bhārataiḥ daśa tīrtha sahasrāṇi tisraḥ koṭayaḥ tathā pare yatra gaṅgā mahā bhāgā sadeśaḥ tat tapovanam siddha kṣetram gaṅgā tīra samāśritam iti satyam dvijātīnām sādhūnām ātmajasya vā suhṛdām ca japet karṇeśiṣyasya anuga tasya vā mahā ṛṣīṇām idam guhyam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt nityam tīrtham puṇyam sadā aśuciḥ mātismara tvam labhate nāka pṛṣṭhecamodate prāpyam śiṣṭa artha darśibhiḥ tvayā tu samyak pṛṣṭena kathitam pitaraḥ tāritāḥ sarvetāritāḥ ca pitāmahāḥ prayāga sya tu sarve te kalām na arhanti ṣoḍaśām evam jñānam ca yogam ca tīrtham ca eva yudhiṣṭhira iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca kathā sarvā tu iyam proktā prayāgasya mahā mune uvāca śṛṇu rājñ pravakṣyāmi proktam sarvam idam jagant brahmā viṣṇuḥ tathā īśānaḥ devatā prabhuḥ avyayaḥ brahmā sṛjati bhūtāni sthāvaram jam gamam cayat tāni etāni paraḥ loke viṣṇuḥ pālayati prajāḥ īśvaraḥ sarva bhūtānām yaḥ uttareṇa pratiṣṭhānāt idānīm brahma tiṣṭhati maheśvaraḥ vaṭe bhūtvā tiṣṭhate parameśvaraḥ tatas devāḥ sa gandharvāḥ siddhāḥ ca parama ṛṣayaḥ rakṣanti paramam nityam pāpa karma parāyāyaṇān ye tu ca anye ca tiṣṭhanti nayānti paramām gatim uvāca api āha me yathā tattvam yathā eṣām tiṣṭhate śrutam kena vā kāraṇe na eva tiṣṭhanti loka saṃmatāḥ uvāca prayāge nivasanti ete brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ kāraṇam tu pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu tattvam yudhiṣṭhiraiḥ paṣca yojana vistīrṇam prayāga syatu maṇḍalam tiṣṭhanti rakṣaṇa arthāya pāpa karma nivāraṇāḥ tasmin pāpam narake pātayiṣyati evam ca prayāgesa maheśvaraḥ sapta dvīpāḥ samudrāḥ ca parvatāḥ ca mahī tale tiṣṭhanti dhriyamāṇāḥ ca yāvat ā bhūta samplavam prajāpateḥ idam kṣetram prayāgam iti viśrutam etat puṇyam pavitram ca prayāgam tu yudhiṣṭhira iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāgamāhātmye adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhrātṛbhiḥ sahitāḥ ca yāḥ vāsudevaḥ api tatra iva kṣaṇena abhyāgataḥ tadā pāṇḍavaiḥ sahitaiḥ sarva pūjyamānaḥ sa mādhavaḥ sarvaiḥ punar eva mahātmabhiḥ tatas svasti iti ca uktvā a vaikṣaṇāt āśramam āgataḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ api dharma ātmā bhrātṛbhiḥ sahitaḥ tu saḥ mahā dānam dadau ca atha dharmaputraḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ yaḥ tu idam kalyam utthāya paṭhata iva a śṛṇoti vā uvāca nityam yajṣa rataḥ bhūtvā prayāge vigata jvaraḥ prayāgam sam smaran nityam saha asmābhiḥ yudhiṣṭhira svayam prāpsyasi rāja indra svarga lokam tu śāśvatam pratigrahāt upāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭaḥ niyataḥ śuciḥ mama kāra nivṛttaḥ ca sa tīrtha phalam aśnute akopanaḥ ca rāja indra satya vādī dṛḍha vrataḥ ātma upamaḥ ca bhūteṣu sa tīrtha phalam aśnute ṛṣibhiḥ kratavaḥ proktāḥ devaiḥ ca api yathā kramam mahīpate bahu upakaraṇaḥ yajṣaḥ nānā sambhāra sambhramaḥ mahā ṛṣīṇām paramam guhyam idam bharata sattamaiḥ tīrtha abhigamanam puṇyam yajṣaiḥ api viśiṣyate daśa koṭi sahasrāṇi triṃśat koṭayaḥ tathā pare māgha māsetu gaṅgāyām gamiṣyanti nara ṛṣabhaiḥ punar drakṣyasi rāja indra yajamānaḥ viśeṣataḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe prayāga māhātmyam mahā buddha nāma ūnapaṣcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ vac bhavatā akathitam sarvam yatim kacid pṛṣṭam eva ca idānīm apipṛcchāmaḥ ekam vada mahā mate eteṣām khalu tīrthānām sevanāt yat phalam labhet uvāca yogaḥ kila proktaḥ varṇānām dvija pūrvaśas nānāvidha umahā bhāgāḥ tatra ca ekam viśiṣyate hari bhaktiḥ vacasā a girā hari reva samārādhyaḥ sarva deva īśvara īśvaraḥ hari nāma mahā mantraiḥ naśyet pāpa piśācakam hareḥ pradakṣiṇam kṛtvā asakṛt api amala āśayāḥ sarva tīrtha samāplāvam labham teyan asaṃśayaḥ pratimām ca hareḥ dṛṣṭvā sarva tīrtha phalam labhet viṣṇu nāma param japtvā sarvam aṃ tra phalam labhet āghrāya pracaṇḍam vikarālam tat yamasya āsyam na paśyati sakṛt praṇāmīkṛṣṇasya mātuḥ stanyam pibet na hi hari pāda manaḥ yeṣām tebhyaḥ nityam namaḥ namaḥ pulkasaḥ śvapaca uvāpiyaḥ ca anye mleccha jātayaḥ te api vai dyā mahā bhāgāḥ hari pāda eka sevakāḥ kim punar brāhmaṇāḥ puṇya bhaktāḥ rājarṣayaḥ tathā punāti bhuvanam vipra ākaṅga ādi salilam yathā tasya ālāpāt apibhaktyāḥ brahmahatyā ādibhiḥ pāpaiḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ hareḥ pradakṣiṇam kurvan uccais tad nāma kṛt naraḥ kara tāla ādi samdhānam su svaram kala śabditam hari bhakti kathām uktvā ākhyāyikām śṛṇuyāt cayaḥ kim punar tasya pāpānām āśaṅkā muni puṃgavāḥ tīrthānām ca param tīrtham kṛṣṇa nāma mahā ṛṣayaḥ tīrthīkurvanti jagatīm gṛhītam kṛṣṇa nāma yaiḥ tasmāt muni varāḥ puṇyam na atas parataram viduḥ martyaḥ yama śoka vināśanaḥ ye mahā viṣṇum avyaktam devam vā api maheśvaram ekībhāvena paśyanti na teṣām punar udbhavaḥ tasmāt anādinidhanam viṣṇum ātmānam avyayam te yānti narakān ghorām stu gaṇayet dhīraḥ mūrkham vā apaṇḍitam vā api brāhmaṇam keśava priyam śvapākam vā āmocayati nārāyaṇaḥ svayam prabhuḥ nārāyaṇāt paraḥ na asti pāpa rāśi dava analaḥ kṛtvā apipātakam ghoram kṛṣṇa nāmnā avimucyate svayam nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ sva nāmni jagantām guruḥ manaḥ abhyadhikām śaktim sthāpayāmāsa suvratāḥ phalānām gauravāt ca api te yānti narakam bahu tasmāt harau bhaktimān syāt hari nāma parāyaṇaḥ pūjakam pṛṣṭhatas akṣet nāminam vakṣasi prabhuḥ hari nāma mahā vajram pāpa parvata dāraṇe tau eva dhanyau ākhyātau yau tu pūjā karau karau aho lokāḥ atitarām daiva doṣeṇa vaṣcitāḥ nāma uccāraṇa mātreṇa mukti dam na bhajanti vai maṣcitāḥ te ca kaluṣāḥ strīṇām saṅga prasaṅgāt pratiṣṭhanti ca lomāni yeṣām na u kṛṣṇa śabdane te mūrkhāḥ hi akṛtātmānaḥ putra śoka ādi vihvalāḥ rudanti bahula ālāpaiḥ na kṛṣṇa akṣara kīrtane jihvām labdhvā api loke asmin kṛṣṇa nām japet na hi tasmāt yatnena vaiviṣṇum karma yogena mānavaḥ karma yoga arcitaḥ viṣṇuḥ prasīdati evanān yathā tīrthāt api adhikam tīrtham viṣṇoḥ bhajanam ucyate sarveṣām khalu tīrthānām snāna pāna avagāhanaiḥ tasmāt bhajadhvam munayaḥ kṛṣṇam parama maṅgalam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe viṣṇu bhakti praśaṃsanam adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhū ūcuḥ katham yena asau bhagavant īśaḥ samārādhyaḥ mumukṣubhiḥ tat vada akhila lokānām rakṣaṇam dharma saṃgraham tam karma yogam vadanaḥ sūta mūrti mayaḥ iti śuśrūṣavaḥ viprāḥ bhavat agre vyavasthitāḥ uvāca evam eva purā pṛṣṭaḥ vyāsaḥ satyavatī sutaḥ ṛṣibhiḥ agni saṃkāśaiḥ vyāsaḥ tān āha tat śṛṇu uvāca śṛṇudhvam mṛṣayaḥ sarve vakṣyamāṇam sanātanam mad āmnāya siddham akhilam brāhmaṇa artham pradarśitam hi ṛṣīṇām śṛṇvatām pūrvam manuḥ āha prajāpatiḥ sarva vyādhi haram puṇyam ṛṣi saṅghaiḥ niṣevitam samāhita dhiyaḥ yūyam śṛṇudhvam gadataḥ mama garbha aṣṭame aṣṭame iva abde sva sūtra ukta vidhānāt daṇḍīca mekhalī sūtrī kṛṣṇa ajina dharaḥ muniḥ bhikṣā āhāraḥ guru hitaḥ vīkṣyamāṇaḥ guroḥ mukham kārpāsam upavīta artham nirmitam brahmanā purā brāhmaṇānām trivṛt sūtram kauśam vā a vastram eva vā sadā upavītī ca eva syāt sadā ābaddha śikhāḥ dvijaḥ tat eva paridhānīyam śuklam tāntavam uttamam uttaram vāsaḥ kṛṣṇājinam śubham uddhṛtya dakṣiṇam bāhum savya bāhau samarpitam upavītam bhavet nityam nivītam kam ṭha sajjane savya bāhum samuddhṛtya dakṣiṇetu dhṛtam dvijāḥ prācīnāvītam iti uktam pitrye karmaṇi yojayet agni āgāre gavām goṣṭhe homa tapye tathā eva ca svādhyāye bhojane nityam brāhmaṇānām ca saṃnidhau mahā gurūṇām ca saṃdhyayoḥ sādhu saṃgame upavītībhavet nityam vidhiḥ eṣa sanātanaḥ maum jī trivṛt samām śliṣṭām kuryāt vipra sya mekhalām mum thinā ekena vā tribhiḥ dhārayet vaiṇava pālāśau daṇḍau keśa antikau dvijaḥ yajṣa arha vṛkṣa jam vā atha saumyam avraṇam eva ca sāyam prātar dvijaḥ samdhyām upāsīta asamāhitaḥ kāmāt lobhāt bhayāt mohāt tyaktvā enām patitaḥ bhavet agni kāryam tatas kuryāt sāyam prātar prasanna dhīḥ snātvā santarpayet devān ṛṣīn pitṛ gaṇān tathā abhivādana śīlaḥ syāt nityam vṛddheṣu dharmataḥ na atevācyaḥ pūrva akṣara plutaḥ na abhivādyaḥ sa vidvasā yathā śūdraḥ tathā eva saḥ savyena savyaḥ sa praṣṭavyaḥ dakṣiṇena tu dakṣiṇaḥ laukikam vaidikam vā api tathā dhyātmikam eva vā avāpya aprayataḥ jñānam tam pūrvam abhivādayet na udakam dhārayet bhaikṣyam puṣpāṇi samidhaḥ tathā evam vidhāni ca anyāni nadā iva artheṣu karmasu brāhmaṇam kuśalam pṛcchet kṣatrabandhum anāmayam vaiśyam kṣemam samāgamya śūdram ārogyam eva ca upādhyāyaḥ pitā jyeṣṭhaḥ bhrātā trātā ca bhītyāḥ mātulaḥ śvaśuraḥ ca eva mātāmaha pitāmahau saḥ atra guravaḥ smṛtāḥ mātā mātāmahī gurvī pituḥ mātuḥ ca sodarāḥ śvaśrūḥ pitāmahī jyeṣṭhā dhātrī ca guravaḥ striyaḥ tu guru vargaḥ ayam mātuḥ pituḥ dvijāḥ anuvartanam eteṣām manaḥ vāc kāya karmabhiḥ na etaiḥ upaviśet sārdham vivadet na ātma kāraṇāt jīvita artham api dveṣāt gurubhiḥ na eva bhāṣaṇam gurūṇām api sarveṣām paṣca pūjya aviśeṣatas teṣām ādyāḥ trayaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ teṣām mātā su pūjitā jyeṣṭhaḥ bhrātā acabhartā capaṣca ete guravaḥ smṛtāḥ ātmanaḥ sarva yatnena prāṇatyāgena vā punar pūjanīya aviśeṣeṇa paṣca ete bhūtim icchatā yāvat pitā ca mātā ca dvau etau nirvikāriṇaḥ tāvat sarvam parityajya putraḥ syāt tad parāyaṇaḥ pitāmātā aca su prītau syātām putra guṇaiḥ yadi sa putraḥ sakalam dharmam prāpnuyāt tena karmaṇā na asti mātṛ samam daivam na asti pitṛ samaḥ guruḥ tayoḥ nityam priyam kuryāt karmaṇā amanasā girā tābhyām ananujṣātaḥ dharmam anyam samācaret dharma sāraḥ samuddiṣṭaḥ pretya nam ta phala pradaḥ samyak ārādhya vaktāram visṛṣṭaḥ tad anujṣayā yaḥ bhrātaram pitṛ samam jyeṣṭham mūḍhaḥ avamanyate puṃsām vartma nisṛṣṭena pūjyaḥ bhartā tu sarvadā mātulān ca pitṛvyān ca śvaśura an ṛtvijaḥ gurūn tat asau aham iti brūyāt pratyutthāya abhivādayet a vācya udīkṣitaḥ nāmnā ayavīyāḥ apiyaḥ bhavet abhivādyaḥ ca pūjyaḥ ca śirasā ānamyaḥ eva ca brāhmaṇa kṣatriya ādyaiḥ ca śrī kāmaiḥ sa ādaram sadā na abhivādyāḥ ca vipreṇa kṣatriya ādyāḥ katham cana jñāna karma guṇa upetāḥ yadi api ete bahuśrutāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ sarva varṇānām svasti kuryāt iti śrutiḥ savarṇena savarṇānām kāryam eva abhivādanam guruḥ agniḥ dvijātīnām varṇānām brāhmaṇaḥ guruḥ patiḥ ekaḥ guruḥ strīṇām sarvatra abhyāgataḥ guruḥ mānyasthānāni paṣca āhuḥ pūrvam pūrvam guru uttarāt ca yatra syuḥ saḥ atra māna arhaḥ śūdraḥ api daśamīm gataḥ thādeyaḥ brāhmaṇāya striyai rājṣevicakṣuṣe vṛddhāya bhāra bhagnāya rogiṇe durbalāya ca bhikṣām āhṛtya śiṣṭānām gṛhebhyaḥ prayataḥ anvaham nivedya guruve aśnīyāt vāgyataḥ tad anujṣayā mātaram vā a svasāram vā a mātuḥ vā a bhaginīm nijām bhikṣeta abhikṣām prathamam yāca enam na vimānayet sajātīya gṛheṣu eva sārvavarṇikam eva vā veda yajṣaiḥ ahīnānām praśastānām sva karmasu hetu anya gehānām pūrvam pūrvam vivarjayet sarvam vā a vicaret grāmam pūrva uktānām asaṃbhave samāhṛtya tu bhaikṣya annam yāvadartham amāyayā bhuṣjīta prayataḥ nityam vāgyataḥ ananya mānasaḥ maikṣya eṇa vartinaḥ vṛttiḥ upavāsa samāsmṛtā dṛṣṭvā hṛṣyet prasīdet ca det ca sarvaśas prāc mukhaḥ annāni bhuṣjīta sūrya abhimukham eva vā na adyāt udak mukhaḥ nityam vidhiḥ eṣa sanātanaḥ prakṣālya pāṇi pādau ca bhuṣjānaḥ dvis upaspṛśet śuddhe deśe samāsīnaḥ bhuktvā ca dvis upaspṛśet iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe karmayoga kathanam nāma ekapaṣcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhuktvā a pītvā aca suptvā aca snātvā rathyā upasarpaṇe madhya avalomakau spṛṣṭvā vāsaḥ viparidhāya ca retas mūtra purīṣāṇām utsarge anṛta bhāṣaṇe tathā catvaram vā a śmaśānam vāsam ākramya dvijottamaḥ caṇḍāla mleccha sambhāṣe strī śūdra ucchiṣṭa bhāṣaṇe ucchiṣṭam puruṣam dṛṣṭvā bhojyam ca api tathāvidham bhojane saṃdhyayoḥ snātvā pītvā a mūtra purīṣayoḥ ha āgata uvāca met suptvā asakṛt sakṛt atha anyatas agneḥ gavām atha alam eva vā strīṇām atha ātmanaḥ sparśe nīlīm vā a paridhāya ca upasparśet jalam vā ārtam tṛṇam vā a bhūmim eva ca keśānām ca ātmanaḥ sparśe vāsasaḥ tasya ca an uṣṇābhiḥ a keśābhiḥ a duṣṭābhiḥ ca dharmataḥ hi śauce apsu sarvadā cāmet āsīnaḥ prāñc udañc mukhaḥ śiraḥ vā āmukta keśa śikhaḥ api vā a kṛtvā a pādayoḥ śaucam mārgāt ūna śuciḥ bhavet sa upānatka upānah stha uvāna uṣṇīṣī ca ācamet budhaḥ na ca eva varṣa dhārābhiḥ na tiṣṭhan uddhṛta udakaiḥ na eka hasta arpita jalaiḥ vinā sūtreṇa vā punar pādukā āsana sthaḥ vā bahis jānuḥ atha api vā na a vikṣitābhiḥ phena ādyaiḥ upetābhiḥ atha api vā śūdra aśuci kara unmuktaiḥ nakṣārābhiḥ tathā eva ca na ca evām gulibhiḥ śabdam na kuryāt na anya mānasaḥ na pāṇi kṣubhitābhiḥ vāna bahis gandhaḥ eva vā hṛd gābhiḥ pūyate vipraḥ kaṃ ṭhyābhiḥ kṣatriyaḥ śuciḥ prāśitābhiḥ tathā vaiśyaḥ strī śūdrau sparśa toṃ a tatas paṃ brāhmam vacyate madhye āṃ guṣṭha deśinyaiḥ pitṝṇām tīrtham ucyate paścāt prājāpatyam pracakṣate am guli agram smṛtam daivam tat eva ārṣam prakīrtitam mūlena daivam ārṣam syāt āgneyam madhyatas smṛtam tris prāśnīyāt apaḥ pūrvam brāhmena prayataḥ tatas sam mṛjyām guṣṭha mūlena mukham vā samupaspṛśet guṣṭha anāmikābhyām spṛśet netra dvayam tatas tarjanyam guṣṭha yogena spṛśet nāsāpuṭa dvayam kaniṣṭhām guṣṭha yogena śravaṇe samuspṛśet sarvāsām atha yogena hṛdayam spṛśet vaiśirasaḥ tadvat guṣṭhena ām saka dvayam tris bhastu prītāḥ tena āsya devatāḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ maheśaḥ ca bhavam tī iti anuśuśruma gaṅgā ca yamunā ca eva prīye te parimārjanāt sam spṛṣṭayoḥ locanayoḥ prīyete śaśi bhāskarau te spṛśet nāsāpuṭa dvayam karṇayoḥ spṛṣṭayoḥ tadvat prīyete ca anila analau sam te sarva devatāḥ mūrdhani sam sparśanāt ekaḥ prītaḥ sa puruṣaḥ bhavet na ucchiṣṭam kurvate vaktre vipruṣā om gelaganti yāḥ spṛśanti bim davaḥ pādauya ācāmayataḥ parān bhūmipām phala mūle ca ikṣu daṇḍena doṣam prāha vaimanuḥ yat yat dravyam samādāya bhavet uccheṣaṇa anvitaḥ syāt tat sam spṛśya ācamet iha kṛtvā a mūtram purīṣam vā a dravya hastaḥ na duṣyati nidhāya dakṣiṇe karṇe brahmasūtram udak mukhaḥ ahani kuryāt śakṛt mūtram rātrau ced dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ antar dhāya mahīm kāṣṭaiḥ pattraiḥ loṣṭa tṛṇena vā prāvṛtya ca śiraḥ kuryāt viṣ mūtrasya visarjanam chāyā kūpa nadī goṣṭha caityām bhaḥ pathini bhasmasu agnau ca eva śmaśāneca viṣ mūtram na samācaret na gomayena kāṣṭha iva mahā vṛkṣe atha śādvale tuṣām gāra kapāleṣu rājamārge tathā eva ca na udyāne apām samīpa iva anoṣare nagara āśaye na ca eva abhimukhaḥ strīṇām guru brāhmaṇayoḥ gavām ma na jyotīm ṣi nirīkṣan vāna vā pratimukha uthavā mṛttikām kūlāt lepa gandha apakarṣaṇām kuryāt atandritaḥ śaucam viśuddhaiḥ uddhṛta udakaiḥ na āharet mṛtikām vipraḥ na āharet mṛtikām vipraḥ śulām nasa kardamām mārgāt na ūṣarāt deśāt śauca śiṣṭām parasya ca tathā upaspṛśet tatas nityam pūrva uktena vidhānāt iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe karma yoga kathane adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca evam daṇḍa ādibhiḥ yuktaḥ śauca ācāra samanvitaḥ adhyāpanam kuryāt vīkṣyamāṇaḥ guroḥ mukham nityam udyata pāṇiḥ syāt sādhu ācāraḥ su sam yatas san āsīta abhimukham guroḥ pratiśravaṇa sambhāṣā īśa yāna ūna samācaret mukhaḥ nīcais śayyā āsanam ca asya sarvadā guru sannidhau na ca eva asya anukurvīta gati bhāṣaṇa ceṣṭitam udakum bham kuśān puṣpam samidhaḥ asya āharet sadā mārjanam lepanam gānām vaisamācaret pādukā upānahau api mākrāmet āsanam ca āsya chāyā ādīn vā kadācana sādhayet daṃ ta kāṣṭha ādīn labdham ca asmai nivedayet tat hasitam ca eva kaṃ ṭha prāvaraṇam tathā yathā kālam adhīyīta yāvat avimanas guruḥ māsīnaḥ adhas guroḥ pārśve sevām ca su samāhitaḥ māsane śayane yānena eva tiṣṭhet kadācana ca māsīta guruṇā sārdham śilā phalaka nauṣu ca jita indriyaḥ syāt satatam vaśya ātmā akrodhanaḥ śuciḥ madhurām hita kāriṇīm gandha mālyam rasam kalpam śuktim prāṇi vihim sanam kāmam lobham bhayam nidrām gīta vāditra nartanam marjanam parīvādam tathā udakum bham sumanasaḥ go śakṛt mṛttikā kuśān māharet yāvat annāni bhaikṣyam ca aharahar ca ret sarva bhavet gīta ādi nispṛhaḥ mā ādityam na ādityam vaisamīheta na ācaret tad dhāvanam ekāntam aśuci strībhiḥ śūdra ādyaiḥ abhibhāṣaṇam guru ucchiṣṭam bheṣaja annam prayum jītana kāmāt mala apakarṣaṇam snānam na ācaret hi kadācana laukikam vaidikam vā api tathā dhyātmikam eva vā tam na druhyet kadācana natvā abhisṛṣṭaḥ guruṇā asvān gurūn abhivādayet vidyā guruṣu etat eva nitya a vṛttiṣu yogiṣu bālaḥ sam mānayet mānyān śiṣṭa uvā yadi karmaṇi utsādanam ca gātrāṇām snāpana ucchiṣṭa bhojanaḥ guru vat pratipūjyāḥ ca savarṇa guru yoṣitaḥ asavarṇāḥ ca sampūjyāḥ pratyutthāna abhivādanaiḥ janam snāpanam ca gātra utsādanam eva ca guru patnī āna kārya āṇi keśānām ca prasādhanam bhūmau asau aham iti bruvan viproṣya pāda grahaṇa pūrvakam ca abhivādanam mātṛṣvasā mātulānī śvaśrūḥ ca atha pitṛṣvasrī sampūjya aguru patnī vat samāsta aguru bhāryayā bhrātṛ bhāryāḥ ca saṅgrāhyā savarṇā ahani ahani api viproṣya tu upasaṅgrāhyāḥ jṣāti sambandhi yoṣitaḥ pituḥ bhaginyām mātuḥ ca jāyasyām ca svasari api mātṛ vat vṛttim ātiṣṭhet mātā atābhyaḥ garīyāḥ evam ācāra sampannam ātmavam tam adām bhikam yat vedam adhyāpayet dharmam purāṇām saṃvatsara uṣite śiṣye guruḥ jñānam a nirdiśan tasya yaḥ yasya vasataḥ guruḥ ācārya putraḥ śuśrūṣuḥ jñāna daḥ dhārmikaḥ śuciḥ dhakta unnada umbudaḥ sādhuḥ adhyāpya ādaśa dharmāt tathā adrohaḥ medhāvī guru kṛt naraḥ māptaḥ priyaḥ atha vidhivat ṣaṣ adhyāpyāḥ dvijātayaḥ yatas nityam adhīyīta audaṅmukhaḥ upasaṅgṛhya tad pādau vīkṣyamāṇaḥ guroḥ mukham adhīṣva bho iti brūyāt virāmaḥ astu iti ca āramet prāc kūlān paryupāsīta pavitraiḥ ca eva pāvakaḥ prāṇāyāmaiḥ tribhiḥ pūtaḥ tatas om kāram arhati brāhmaṇaḥ praṇavam kuryāt ante api vidhivat dvijāḥ kuryāt adhyāpanam nityam sa brahmāṣjali pūrvatas sarveṣām eva bhūtānām vedaḥ cakṣuḥ sanātanaḥ adhīyīta api ayam nityam brāhmaṇyāt dhīyate anyathā adhīyīta ṛcaḥ nityam kṣīra āhuti āsa devatāḥ prīṇāti tarpayan kālam kāmaiḥ hūtāḥ sa daivatāḥ yajūm dadhnā prīṇāti devatāḥ sāmāni adhīte prīṇāti ghṛta āhutibhiḥ anvaham atharva aṅgirasaḥ nityam madhu āprīṇāti devatāḥ taiḥ tarpayate surān prātar ca sāyam prayataḥ naityakam vidhim āśritaḥ samadhīyīta sahasra paramām devīm śata madhyām daśa avarām gāyatrīm ca eva vedān ca tulayā atolayat prabhuḥ ekatas ca turaḥ veda gāyatrīm ca tathā ekatas om kāram āditas kṛtvā vyāhṛtīḥ tad anantaram tatas adhīyīta sāvitrīm ekāgraḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ purākalpe samutpannāḥ bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar sanātanāḥ mahā vyāhṛtayaḥ tisraḥ sarva aśubha nibarhaṇāḥ pradhānam puruṣaḥ kālaḥ viṣṇu brahma maheśvarāḥ sattvam rajaḥ tamaḥ tisraḥ kramāt vyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ yogaḥ sārāt sāra udāhṛtaḥ yaḥ adhīte ahani ahani etām gāyatrīm vedamātaram brahmacārī sayāti paramām gatim māsasya paurṇamāsyām dvijottamāḥ māṣāḍhyām proṣṭhapadyām vā veda upākaraṇam smṛtam yat sūrya yāmya gamanam māsān vipra ūrdhva paṣcamān adhīyīta aśucau deśe brahmacārī samāhitaḥ puṣye tu cham kuryāt bahis utsarjanam dvijaḥ māsi śuklasya vā aprāpte pūrvāhṇe prathame ahani mānavaḥ susamūhane tat tat tat akālikam anadhyāyam eteṣu āha prajāpatiḥ etān abhyudinān vidyāt yadā a prāduṣkṛta agniṣu tadā avidyāt anadhyāyam anṛta oca abhra darśane etān akālikān vidyāt anadhyāya anṛtau api sa jyotiḥ syāt anadhyāyaḥ śeṣe rātrau yathā divā nitya anadhyāyaḥ eva syāt grāmeṣu nagareṣu ca dharma naipuṇya kāmānām pūti gandhe ca nityaśas ucchiṣṭaḥ śrāddha bhuj ca eva manasā pinacim tayet tri aham nakārayet brahma rājṣoḥ āhoḥ ca sūtake yāvat eka anna niṣṭhā āsyāt sneha alopaḥ ca tiṣṭhati śayānaḥ prauḍha pādaḥ ca kṛtvā ca iva avasakthikām na adhīyīta āmiṣam jagdhvā śūdraśrāddha annam eva ca amāvāsyā caturdaśyoḥ paurṇamāsī aṣṭamīṣu ca upākarmaṇi ca utsarge tri rātram kṣapaṇam smṛtam tāsu ca rātriṣu mārgaśīrṣe tathā pauṣa imāgha māse tathā eva ca tisraḥ aṣṭakāḥ samākhyātāḥ ākṛṣṇa pakṣeṣu sūribhiḥ śleṣmātakasya chāyāyām śālmaleḥ madhukasya ca tri rātram kṣapaṇam smṛtam chidrāṇi etāni viprāṇām anadhyāyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ santi rākṣasāḥ teṣu tasmāt etān vivarjayet ekām ṛcam atha ekam vā ayajuḥ sāmān iva apunar na aṣṭakā ādyāsu adhīyīta mārutā ica abhidhāvati anadhyāyaḥ tunām geṣu na itihāsa purāṇayoḥ tathā na dharma śāstreṣu anyeṣu sarvāṇi etān nivarjayet eṣa dharmaḥ samāsena kīrtitaḥ brahmacāriṇaḥ brahmanā abhihitaḥ pūrvam ṛṣīṇām bhāvitātmanām mūḍha ūna sambhāṣyaḥ vedabāhyaḥ dvijātibhiḥ na veda pāṭha mātreṇa santuṣṭaḥ vai bhavet dvijaḥ pāṭha mātra avasāna stupam kegauḥ iva sīdati sa saṃmūḍhaḥ śūdra kalpaḥ pātra tām na prapadyate yuktaḥ paricaret enam āśarīra vimokṣaṇam adhīyīta tathā nityam brahma niṣṭhaḥ samāhitaḥ sāvitrīm śata rudrīyam vedām tān ca viśeṣataḥ abhyaset satatam yuktaḥ bhikṣā aśana parāyaṇaḥ etat vidhānam paramam purāṇam purā mahā ṛṣi pravara abhipṛṣṭaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe svarga khaṇḍe adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca vedam vedau tathā vedān vedām gāni tathā dvijāḥ tatas snāyāt dvijottamaḥ gurave tu dhanam dattvā snāyīta tad anujṣayā tīrṇa vratā utha yukta ātmā aśaktaḥ vā snātum arhati vaiṇavīm dhārayet yaṣṭim antar vāsaḥ tathā uttaram yajṣopavīta dvitayam sa udakam ca kamaṇḍalum chattram ca uṣṇīṣam amalam pādukā ica api upānahau śuciḥ yatra kām cana ādvipraḥ ūna raktām bibhṛyāt srajam mad bara dharaḥ nityam sugandhaḥ priya darśanaḥ tam na raktam ulbaṇam ca anya dhṛtam vāsona kuṇḍalam upavītam alam kāram darśayan kṛṣṇam ājinam na apasavyam na apasavyam vāsaḥ ūna vikṛtam vaset manaḥ āharet vidhivat dārān sadṛśān ātmanaḥ śubhān rūpa lakṣaṇa saṃyuktān yoni doṣa vivarjitān āharet brāhmaṇaḥ bhāryām śīla śauca samanvitām ṛtu kāla abhigāmī syāt yāvat putraḥ abhi jāyate ṣaṣṭhī aṣṭamīm paṣcadaśīm dvādaśīm ca caturdaśīm mā ādadhīta vivāha agnim juhuyāt jātavedasam etāni snātakaḥ nityam pāvanāni ca pāvayet akurvāṇaḥ patati āśu narakān ati bhīṣaṇān kuryāt gṛhyāni kāryāṇi saṃdhyā upāsanam eva ca sakhyam sama adhikaiḥ kuryāt upeyāt īśvaram sadā kurvīta ātma hitam nityam sarva bhūta anukam deśa vāc buddhi sārūpyam ācaran vicaret sadā yena asya pitaraḥ yātāḥ yena yātāḥ pitāmahāḥ tena yāyāt satām mārgam tena gacchan na duṣyati nityam svādhyāya śīlaḥ syāt nityam yajṣa upavītavān tat sāvitrī jāpa nirataḥ śrāddha kṛt mucyate gṛhī bhavet satyam ca eva damaḥ śamaḥ adhyātma nitya tā jñānam etat brāhmaṇa lakṣaṇam etasmāt na pramādyeta viśeṣeṇa dvijottamaḥ anya manyu samutthānām doṣāṇām marṣaṇam kṣamā sva duḥkheṣu eva kāruṇyam para duḥkheṣu sauhṛdam dayā iti munayaḥ prāhuḥ sākṣāt dharmasya sādhanam caturdaśānām vidyānām dhāraṇā ahi parārthāt dharma kāryāṇi kurvīta hi etat vijñānam ucyate yathā bhūta apramādam tu satyam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ damaḥ śarīra uparatiḥ śamaḥ adhyātmam akṣaram vidyā yatra gatvā an aśocati sākṣāt eva hṛṣīkeśaḥ tat jñānam iti kīrtitam na hi deham vinā viṣṇuḥ puruṣaiḥ vidyate paraḥ bhūtānām priya kārī asya anna para droha karma dhīḥ tā kuryāt taiḥ ca vaset iti śrī pādme mahāpurāṇe svarga khaṇḍe catuḥ paṣcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca syāt sarva bhūtāni na anṛtam vā vadet kvacid na ahitam vācyam na stenaḥ syāt kadācana tṛṇam mṛdam vā ajalam eva ca pratigṛhṇīyāt na śūdrāt patitāt api na ca anyasmāt aśaktaḥ ced niṃ ditān varjayet budhaḥ prāṇān apaharati evam yācakaḥ tasya durmateḥ na deva dravya hārī syāt viśeṣeṇa dvijottamaḥ manaviṣam viṣam iti āhuḥ brahma svam viṣam ucyate puṣpam śāka udakam kāṣṭham tathā mūlam phalam tṛṇam adattāni canasteyam manuḥ prāha prajāpatiḥ gṛhītavyāni puṣpāṇi deva arcana vidhau dvijaḥ tṛṇam kāṣṭham phalam puṣpam prakāśam vā īharet budhaḥ tilam udgaya va ādīnām muṣṭiḥ grāhyā pathi sthitaiḥ na dharmasya apadeśena pāpam kṛtvā vratam caret bhanam tat tat tat tat tat tat tatra tatra deva drohāt guru drohaḥ koṭi koṭi guṇa adhikaḥ jana apavāda ūnāstikyam tasmāt koṭi guṇa adhikam gobhiḥ ca daivataiḥ vipraiḥ kṛṣyā rāja upasevayā yānti yā nihīna anidharmāt yānti brāhmaṇa atikrameṇa ca anṛtāt pāradāryāt ca tathā yasya bhakṣaṇāt tathā eva ca mahā brahma rājya icana vaset napā khaṇḍa janaiḥ vṛte yatra yatra svabhāvāt tatra vā an ivaset dvijaḥ ardha kośam nadī kūlam varjayitvā dvijottamaḥ na mūrkhaiḥ na avaliptaiḥ ca na anyaiḥ jāyā avasāyibhiḥ aika śayyā āsane īpam ktiḥ bhāṇḍe pakva anna miśraṇam ekādaśa samuddiṣṭāḥ doṣāḥ sām karyasam sthitāḥ pāpam sam kramate nṛṇām ekapam kti upaviṣṭa ayena spṛśanti parasparam bhasmanā akṛta maryādā natānām sam karaḥ bhavet dvāreṇa stam bha mārgeṇa ṣaḍbhiḥ paṃ ktiḥ vibhidyate na kuryāt śuṣka vairāṇi vivādam na ca paiśunam para kṣetregām caram na ca ācakṣīta karhicit manasam vaset sūcakena nakam vaimarmaṇi spṛśet na sūrya pariveṣam vā na indra cāpam parāhnikam parasmai kathayet vidvāḥ śaśinam vā atha kāṣcanam ātmanaḥ pratikūlāni pareṣām na samācaret tithim na udakyām abhibhāṣetana aśucim vā a dvijottamaḥ na deva guru viprāṇām dīyamānam tu vārayet na ca ātmānam set vā apara nim dām ca varjayet mahā nim dām devanim dām prayatnena vivarjayet yaḥ ca eva veda anvānim date dvijaḥ na tasya niṣkṛtiḥ dṛṣṭā śāstreṣu iha muni īśvarāḥ dayet vā agurum devam vedam vāsa upabṛm haṇam kalpa koṭi śatam sāgram raurave pacyate naraḥ tūṣṇīm āsīta nim dāyām na brūyāt kacid uttaram na kuryāt vā ekadācana na pāpam pāpinām brūyāt apāpam vā a dvijottamaḥ nṛṇām mithyā abhiśastānām patanti aśrūṇi rodanāt tāniputrān paśūn ghnanti teṣām mithyā abhiśam sinām dṛṣṭam vaiśodhanam vṛddhaiḥ nāsti mithyā abhiśam sane na īkṣeta udyam tam ādityam śaśinam vā animittāt na astam yāntam na vāri stham na upaspṛṣṭam na madhya gam tirohitam samīkṣetan ādarśa ādi anugāminam striyam īkṣeta puruṣam vā kadācana mū purīṣam vānacasam sṛṣṭa maithunam tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat tat
