āvṛtam yasmāt jagant vṛtam tena sakalam hariṇā aśubhe sṛṣṭam punar tathā sarga itasmāt nārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde mantrārthopadeśaḥ nāma ṣaḍviṃśati adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca īśvarasya svarūpam ca tad vibhūti guṇān tathā tat viṣṇoḥ paramam dhāma vyūha bhedān tathā hareḥ uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi svarūpam paramātmanaḥ vibhūti guṇa saṅghātam tad avasthā ātmakam hareḥ yaḥ paraḥ puruṣaḥ viṣṇuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ udāhṛtaḥ saḥ īśvaraḥ ca jagatām parama ātmā sanātanaḥ viśvatas pāṇi pādaḥ ca cakṣuṣmān viśvatas prabhuḥ viśvāni bhuvanān yasmin dhāmāni paramāṇi vai dhārayan saḥ api atyatiṣṭhet manāṃsi ca manīṣiṇām evam bahu svarūpaḥ san śrīpatiḥ puruṣottamaḥ parama īśvara ṛyā saha bhoga artham divya maṅgala rūpavān bṛhat śarīraḥ agni samāna rūpaḥ śriyā asau jagatām jananyā sva jyotsnayā candraḥ iva amṛta aṃśuḥ ayam ca jagat īśvaryā kumāraḥ nitya yauvanaḥ bhogena krīḍayā viṣṇoḥ vibhūti dvaya saṃsthitiḥ tripād vyāptiḥ pare dhāmni pādaḥ asya iha abhavat punar tripād vibhūtiḥ nityā syāt anityam pādam aiśvaram nityam tad rūpam īśasya pare dhāmni sthitam śubham acyutam śāśvatam divyam sadā yauvanam āśritam nityam sambhogam īśvaryā śriyā bhūmyā ca saṃvṛtam nityā eva eṣā jagat mātā viṣṇoḥ śrīḥ anapāyinī yathā sarva gataḥ viṣṇuḥ tathā lakṣmī śubha ānane īśānā sarva jagantaḥ viṣṇu patnī sadā śivā sarvatas pāṇi pāda antā sarvatas akṣi śiras mukhī nārāyaṇī jagat mātā samasta jagat āśrayā yat apāṅga āśritam sarvam jagat sthāvara jaṅgamam sarvasya ādyā mahā lakṣmīḥ triguṇā parameśvarī lakṣya alakṣya svarūpā sā vyāpya kṛtsnam vyavasthitā śūnyam tat akhilam viśvam vilokya parameśvarī śūnyam tat akhilam svena pūrayāmāsa tejasā sā lakṣmī dharaṇī ca eva nīlā devī iti viśrutā ādhāra bhūtā jagantaḥ pṛthivī rūpam āśritā lakṣmī rūpa tvam āpannā dhana vāc rūpiṇī hi sā evam devī svarūpā sā jagantaḥ śrīḥ śrītā harim samasta vidyā bhedāḥ syuḥ lakṣmī rūpāḥ varānane śrī rūpam akhilam sarvam tasyāḥ hi vapuḥ ucyate saundaryam śīla vṛttam ca saubhāgyam strīṣu saṃsthitam tasyāḥ rūpam ca girije sarvāsām mūrdhani yoṣitām yasyāḥ kaṭākṣa āyatama ugra dṛṣṭyā lakṣmī śrīḥ kamalā vidyā mātā viṣṇu priyā satī bhutānām īśvarā nityā sahyā sarva gatā śubhā tad ananta āloka mātā bhūḥ nīlā sarva sukha pradā rukmiṇī ca tathā sītā sarva vedavatī śubhā satī sarasvatī gaurī śāntiḥ svāhā svadhā ratiḥ nārāyaṇī varārohā viṣṇoḥ nitya anapāyinī etāni puṇya nāmāni prātar utthāya yaḥ paṭhet hiraṇya varṇām hariṇīm suvarṇa rajataḥ srajām candrām hiraṇmayīm lakṣmīm viṣṇoḥ anapagāminīm gandha dbārām durādharṣām nitya puṣṭām karīṣiṇīm jīvarīm sarva bhūtānām tām iha upahvaye śriyam evam ṛksaṃhitāyām tustūyamānā maheśvarī sarva aiśvarya sukham prādāt śiva ādīnām divaukasām asya īśāna ahi jagantaḥ viṣṇu patnī sanātanā yat apāṅga āśritam sarvam jagant sthāvara jaṅgamam yasya vakṣasi sā devī prabhā agnau iva tiṣṭhati sākṣāt akṣaraḥ puruṣaḥ avyayaḥ sa vainārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān vātsalya guṇa sāgaraḥ svāmī su śīlaḥ subhagaḥ sarvajṣaḥ sarva śaktimān nityam sampūrṇa kāmaḥ ca naisargika suhṛd sakhiḥ bhṛpā pīyūṣa jaladhiḥ śaraṇam sarva dehinām karuṇākaraḥ śrīmate viṣṇave tasmai dāsyam sarvam karomi aham deśa kāla ādi avasthāsu sarvāsu kamalāpateḥ iti sva rūpa saṃsiddham sukham dāsyam avāpnuyāt śrīmat nārāyaṇaḥ svāmī jagatām prabhuḥ īśvaraḥ mātā pitā sutaḥ bandhuḥ nivāsaḥ śaraṇam gatiḥ tad yaḥ asau nirguṇā eti uktaḥ śāstreṣu jagat īśvaraḥ atra api prākṛtam rūpa maṇḍasya eva vināśanam prākṛtānām hi rūpāṇām anitya tvam tathā ucyate tad artham devadevasya viṣṇoḥ līlā adhikāriṇaḥ lokaiḥ caturbhiḥ daśabhiḥ sāgaraiḥ dvīpa saṃyutaiḥ paripūrṇam idam ramya maṇḍam prakṛti sambhavam daśa uttara guṇa upetam sapta āvaraṇasam vṛtam kalā kāṣṭha ādi rūpeṇa ayaḥ kālam parivartate tāvanti rātri varṣāṇi brahmanaḥ avyakta janmanaḥ vahninā sarva ātmānaḥ tathā viṣṇoḥ prakṛtau viniveśitāḥ aṇḍa āvaraṇa bhūtāni prakṛtau layam āpnuyuḥ sā sarva jagat ādhārā prakṛtiḥ hari sam śritā krīḍā artham devadevena sṛṣṭā māyā jagat mayā avidyā prakṛtiḥ māyā guṇatraya mayā sadā sarga sthiti layānām sā a hetu bhūtā asanātanā yoganidrā mahāmāyā prakṛtiḥ triguṇa anvitā ca viṣṇoḥ līlā vikāriṇaḥ sthānam nibiḍa dhvāntam avyayam ūrdhvam tu sīmni virajāniḥ sīmā adhas sanātanā tayā ādṛtam jagant sarvam sthūla sūkṣma ādi avasthayā evam sarvāṇi bhūtāni prakṛti antar gatāni vai tatas śūnyam idam sarvam prakṛti antar gatam mahat evam prakṛti rūpāya avibhūti rūpam uttamam tripād vibhūti rūpam tu śṛṇu bhūdhara nandini mad ga sveda janita toyaiḥ prasrāvitā aśubhā tasyāḥ pāre pare vyomni tripād bhūtiḥ sanātanā amṛtam śāśvatam nityam anantam paramam padam śuddham sattva mayam divyam akṣaram brahmaṇaḥ padam evamādi guṇa upetam tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam tat bhāsayate sūrya ūna śaśām kaḥ na pāvakaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ paramam dhām aśāśvatam nityam acyutam na hi varṇayitum śakyam kalpa koṭi śataiḥ api hareḥ padam varṇayitum na śakyam mayā ca dhātrā ca muni indra saṃghaiḥ yat akṣaram veda guhyam yasmin tat viṣṇoḥ paramam dhāma sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ akṣaram śāśvatam divyam devi cakṣuḥ iva ātatam jṣā anena śāstra mārgeṇa vīkṣyate yogi puṃgavaiḥ aham brahmā ca devāḥ ca na jānanti mahā ṛṣayaḥ sarva upaniṣadām artham dṛṣṭvā vakṣyāmi suvrate viṣṇoḥ pade hi parame pade tat sa śubha āhvayeḥ yatra gāvaḥ bhūri śṛgāḥ āsate su sukhāḥ prajāḥ atra āha tat param dhāma gopa veṣasya śārṅgiṇaḥ ādhāraḥ brahmaṇaḥ lokaḥ śuddha sattvaḥ sanātanaḥ bhūmim te asmin śāśvate pade tasthatuḥ jāgarūke asmin yuvnau śrī sanātanau yatas svasārau yuvatī bhū nīle viṣṇu vallabhe atra pūrve ye ca sādhyāḥ viśvedevāḥ sanātanāḥ te ha nākam mahimānaḥ sacante śubha darśanāḥ tatra vijṣāninaḥ viprāḥ jāgṛvāṃsaḥ samindhate tat padam jṣāninaḥ viprāḥ yānti saṃvāsam icchavaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ paramam dhāma mokṣaḥ iti abhidhīyate tat prāpya na nivartante tasmāt mokṣaḥ udāhṛtaḥ mokṣam param padam divyam amṛtam viṣṇu mandiram akṣaram paramam dhām vaikuṇṭham śāśvatam padam nityam ca paramam vyoma sarva utkṛṣṭam sanātanam tasya tripād vibhūteḥ tu rūpam vakṣyāmi vistarāt iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśat sa asrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde tripād vibhūti kathanam nāma adhyāyaḥ śrī mahā devaḥ uvāca tripād vibhūteḥ lokāḥ tuasam khyātāḥ prakīrtitāḥ śuddha sattva mayāḥ sarve brahma ānanda sukha āhvayāḥ sarve nitya a nirvikāra a heya rāga ādi varjitāḥ sarve hiraṇmayāḥ śuddhāḥ koṭi sūrya sama prabhāḥ kāma krodha vivarjitāḥ nirantar sāma gāna paripūrṇa sukham śritāḥ sarveveda mayaiḥ divyaiḥ puruṣaiḥ strībhiḥ āvṛtāḥ śruti smṛti purāṇa ādi rūpa sthāvara saṃyutāḥ sarvam varṇayitum śakyam namayā āloka vistṛtam niḥśreyasam ca nirvāṇam kaivalyam mokṣaḥ ucyate mahātmānaḥ mahābhāgāḥ bhagavat pāda sevakāḥ nānā janapada ākīrṇam vaikuṇṭham tat hareḥ padam maṇikām cana citra āḍhya prākāraiḥ toraṇaiḥ vṛtā catur dvāra samāyukta aratna gopura sam vṛtā caṇḍa ādi dvārapālaiḥ ca kumuda ādyaiḥ ca rakṣitā caṇḍa pracaṇḍau prāñc dvāri yāmye bhadra subhadrakau vāruṇyām jaya vijayau saumye dhātṛ vidhātarau puṇḍarīkaḥ athavā manaḥ sarva netraḥ su mukhaḥ su pratiṣṭhitaḥ ete diś patayaḥ proktāḥ puryām atra śubha ānane koṭi vaiśvānara prakhya gṛha paṅktibhiḥ āvṛtā maṇi prākāra sam yuktam ratna toraṇa śobhitam divya apsaras gaṇaiḥ strībhiḥ sarvatas samalam kṛtam hi itu maṇḍapam divyam rājasthānam mahā ucchrayam māṇikyaḥ tam bha sāhasra juṣṭam ratna mayam śubham divyaiḥ muktaiḥ samākīrṇam sāma gāna upaśobhitam dharma jñāna mahā aiśvarya vairāgyaiḥ pāda vigrahaiḥ mad yajuḥ sāma ca atharvaiḥ rūpaiḥ nityam vṛtam kramāt śaktiḥ ādhāra śaktiḥ ca cicchaktiḥ ca sadāśivā dharma ādi devatānām ca śaktayaḥ parikīrtitāḥ kūrmaḥ ca nāga rājaḥ ca vainateyaḥ trayīśvaraḥ dāsī sarva mantrāḥ ca pīṭha rūpa tvam āsthitāḥ sarva akṣara mayam divyam yogapīṭham iti smṛtam tad madhye karṇikāyām tu sāvitryām śubha darśane īśvarā sahadeva īśaḥ tatra āsīnaḥ paraḥ pumān indīvara dala śyāmaḥ koṭi sūrya prakāśavān yuvā kumāraḥ snigdhaḥ ca komala avayavaiḥ vṛtaḥ prabuddhaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ subhrū latā yuga aṅkitaḥ su nāsaḥ su kapola āḍhyaḥ su śrotra mukha paṅkajaḥ muktāphala ābha danta āḍhyaḥ sa smita adhara vidrumaḥ kāśaḥ su smita ānana paṅkajaḥ taruṇa āditya varṇābhyām kuṇḍalābhyām virājitaḥ mandāra pārijāta āḍhya kavarīkṛta keśavān hāra svarṇa sraj āsakta kambu grīvaḥ virājitaḥ haskam dhanibhaiḥ proccaiḥ pīnaiḥ aṃ saiḥ virājitaḥ ta bhujaiḥ caturbhiḥ upaśobhitaḥ aṅgulīyaiḥ cakaṭakaiḥ keyūraiḥ parimaṇḍitaḥ bāla arka koṭi saṃ kāśaiḥ kaustubha ādyaiḥ subhūṣaṇaiḥ bāla ātapa nibha ślakṣṇa pīta vastra samanvitaḥ nānā ratna vicitrām ghriḥ kaṭakābhyām virājitaḥ divya candana liptām mālā vibhūṣitaḥ gṛhīta śaṅkha cakrābhyām udvāhubhyām virājitaḥ vāma aṅke saṃsthitā devī mahā lakṣmī maheśvarī hiraṇyavarṇā hariṇī suvarṇa rajata srajā sarva lakṣaṇa sampanna ayauvana aram bha vigrahā ratna kuṇḍala sam divya candana liptām gīta divya puṣpa upaśobhitā talā bhrūḥ su nāsā su śroṇī pīna unnata payodharā musaṃ kāśā su smita ānana paṅkajā taruṇa āditya varṇābhyām kuṇḍalābhyām virājitā taptakām canavarṇā ābhā taptakām canabhūṣaṇā hastaiḥ caturbhiḥ sam yukta akanakām buja bhūṣitā nānā vicitra ratna āḍhyā kanakām buja mālayā hāra keyūra kaṭakaiḥ aṅgulīyaiḥ ca śobhitā evam nitya anapāyinyā mahālakṣmyā maheśvaraḥ pārśvayoḥ dharaṇī nīle samāsīne śubha āsane aṣṭa dikṣu dala agreṣu vimalā ādyāḥ ca śaktayaḥ tathā eva ca prahvī satyā tathā īśānā śaktayaḥ paramātmanaḥ gṛhītvā ācāmarān divyān sudhākara sama prabhān divya apsaraḥ gaṇāḥ paṣcaśata saṃkhyāḥ ca yoṣitaḥ antar pura nivāsinyaḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitāḥ padma hastāḥ ca tāḥ sarvāḥ koṭi vaiśvānara prabhāḥ sarva lakṣaṇa sampannāḥ śītām śu sadṛśa ānanāḥ tābhiḥ parivṛtaḥ rājā āśuśubhe paramaḥ pumān ananta vihagādhīśa senānī ādyaiḥ sureśvare tad vyūha bhedān lokān ca vakṣyāmi girije śubhe madhya ālokaḥ tu yāmyām saṃkarṣaṇa ālayaḥ tathā rati lokaḥ tu vāyavyām udīcyām aniruddha bhūḥ mānyām śāntilokaḥ syāt prathama āvaraṇam smṛtam keśava ādi caturviṃśati amī lokāḥ tatas kramāt dvitīya āvaraṇam proktam vaikuṇṭhasya śubha āhvayam matsya kūrma ādi lokāḥ tu tṛtīya āvaraṇam śubham satya acyuta ananta durgā viṣvaksena gajānanāḥ śaṅkha padma nidhī lokāḥ caturtha āvaraṇam śubham mad yajus sāma atharvāṇaḥ loka ādikṣu mahatsu ca paṣcama āvaraṇam proktam akṣayam sarva vāc mayam śaṅkha cakra gadā padma khaḍga śārṅga halam tathā ca tathā lokāḥ sarva śastra astra saṃyutāḥ bhavat āvaraṇam proktam mantra astra mayam akṣaram aindra pāvaka yāmyāni nairṛtam vāruṇam tathā vāyavyam saumyam aiśānam saptamam munibhiḥ smṛtam sādhyāḥ marut gaṇāḥ ca eva viśvedevāḥ tathā eva ca te vai prākṛta loke asmin anityāḥ tridaśeśvarāḥ te ha nākam mahimānaḥ sacante iti vai śrutiḥ divyābhiḥ mahiṣībhiḥ ca rājate vibhuḥ īśvaraḥ māsayate sūryaḥ ūna śam śām kaḥ na pāvakaḥ yat gatvā ananivartam te yoginaḥ sam śita vratāḥ tat gamyam śāśvatam sthānam prapattyā a vaisanātanam uvāca sādhu uktam paramam svarga svarūpam bhavatā prabho tripād vibhūtau bhagavant īśvaryā parameśvaraḥ tam īśvaram mahāmāyā prakṛtiḥ jagat āśrayā kṛtām jalipuṭā abhūtvā tuṣṭāva parameśvaram uvāca ca namaḥ bhagavante te vāsudevāya śārṅgiṇe sarva deva svarūpāya viṣṇave jiṣṇave namaḥ acyutāya avikārāya śuddha sattva svarūpiṇe namaḥ hiraṇyagarbhāya jṣānāya paramātmane sarva bhūta ātmane tubhyam sarva bhūta āśrayāya ca brahmaṇe jyotiṣe tubhyam namaḥ te viśva rūpiṇe namaḥ śuciṣade tubhyam haṃsāya paramāya ca saṅkarṣaṇāya rudrāya sarva bhūta dharāya ca hayagrīvāya dīptāya kālāya haraye namaḥ namaḥ te śam kārāya ca avyaktāya namaḥ tasmai viṣṇave loka sākṣiṇe pūrṇa ṣāḍguṇya mūrtaye ananta guṇa pūrṇāya namaḥ sarva artha dāyine namaḥ te vāsudevāya paṣca avasthā svarūpiṇe namaḥ paṣca nava vyūha bheda rūpāya te namaḥ avikārāya śuddhāya heya pratibhaṭāya ca namaḥ namaḥ te jagantām kleśa hāriṇe tvam eva sarva loka nāma āśrayaḥ puruṣottamaḥ mad saṃsthāḥ cetanāḥ sarve nirādhāra anirāśrayāḥ hīna deha a nirākārāḥ sarva indriya vivarjitāḥ sarva anuṣṭhāna rahitāḥ satatam duḥkha bhoginaḥ teṣām lokān ca dehān ca dātum arhasi keśava līlā vibhūtim sarvajṣa yathā pūrvam prakalpaya mayā āsam mohitam paśya līlā artham parameśvara prākṛta aṇḍam mayā sārdham sṛjasva puruṣottamaiḥ mām adhiṣṭhāya līlām vai kartum arhasi māciram śrī mahā devaḥ uvāca evam uktaḥ tayā devyā māyayā parameśvaraḥ tasyām niveśya māyāyām jagant sraṣṭum pracakrame saḥ eva bhagavant viṣṇuḥ prakṛtau praviveśa ha tasṛjat prakṛtau brahma bhūta ādi mahat āśrayam mahataḥ puruṣāt asmāt aham kāraḥ abhyajāyata aham kārāt tuvā etasmāt guṇatrayam ajāyata tribhyaḥ guṇebhyaḥ tanmātrām asṛjat viśvabhāvanaḥ tanmātrebhyaḥ abhyajāyam tam ahābhūtāni tad kṣaṇāt om kāraḥ prathamam jātaḥ brahmanaḥ triguṇa ātmanaḥ mākāśāt abhavat vāyuḥ vāyoḥ agniḥ ajāyata agneḥ apaḥ samudbhūtāḥ adbhyaḥ ca pṛthivīmatā ākāśa ādīni bhūtāni sṛṣṭāni eka uttarāṇi vai da sparśaḥ ca rūpaḥ ca rasaḥ gandhaḥ ca tad guṇāḥ eka uttara guṇān sṛṣṭvā tān ādāya mahā prabhuḥ teṣām vimiśraṇam kṛtvā jagadaṇḍam mahattaram tasmin na sṛjat puruṣottamaḥ sṛṣṭaḥ tatra karma anurūpeṇa tridaśa ādiṣu yoniṣu saṃsthitāḥ prakṛtau pūrva ātmanaḥ prabhavanti hi iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe parama vyoma ādi varṇanam nāma pañcaviṃśati adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca brahma ādi tridiva śreṣṭhāḥ katham jātāḥ sanātanāḥ ca vistareṇa tad asvame bubhuvaḥ sṛṣṭāḥ yathā kramam tāsām madhye asṛjat brahmā agādha jalam arṇavam asmin ekārṇavībhūte jala māyā vaṭa chade mādāya sarva bhūta aniyoga nidrām yayau hariḥ tayā aremeciram kālam māyayā madhusūdanaḥ tasyām tu janayāmāsa kāla ātmānam anuttamam kalā kāṣṭha ādi bhūta aye pakṣa māsa ādi rūpiṇaḥ tasmin kāle hareḥ nābhi paṅkajam mukula ākṛti tuṣṭāva ayoganidrāyām śayānam parameśvaram mad bhūṣaṇa bhūṣāya śrīmate viśva rūpiṇe jagat hitāya kṛṣṇāya govindāya namaḥ namaḥ pradhāna kāla rūpāya puruṣāya īśvarāya ca namaḥ prapaṣca rūpāya niṣprapaṣca svarūpiṇe nārāyaṇāya viśvāya viśveśāya namaḥ namaḥ śrī bhū līlā adhipataye brahmaṇe paramātmane namaḥ stu vāsudevāya viśvarūpāya śārṅgiṇe trayī nāthāya haraye viśvanātha svarūpiṇe ananta kalyāṇa guṇa paripūrṇāya te namaḥ vṛtam sarvam jagannātha prapaṣca isacarācaram tvam eva kāraṇam kartā akāryam ca triguṇa udbhavam sraṣṭā dhyātā avidhātā a ca tvam eva parameśvaraḥ deva tvayi sthita ālokāḥ samādhiṣṭhāḥ sanātanāḥ hi uvāca evam uktaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ brahmanā parameśvaraḥ niyamya yoga nidrām tām jagant sraṣṭum pracakrame lokān sarvān tadā ahi apsu gata maṇḍam hiraṇmayam sapta dvīpān samudrām tān medinī bhūdharaiḥ yutān saha eka aṇḍa kaṭāhena nābhi padme asṛjat prabhuḥ tad aṇḍa madhye ca āsthānam īśvaraḥ kṛtavan hariḥ atha nārāyaṇam kaḥ tu dadhyau adhyātma cetasā te tasya bhālāt tu sveda bim te tasya bhālāt tu sveda bim durajāyata dus budbuda ākāraḥ pṛthivyām apatat kṣaṇāt tryakṣaḥ triśūla hastaḥ aham jaṭā mukuṭa maṇḍitaḥ kim karomi iti deveśam avocam vinaya anvitaḥ tatas nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ mām iti aham udā anvitaḥ hāram bhīma darśanam sākṣāt saṃkarṣaṇām śenasam hāra arthe vara ānane tasmāt nārāyaṇāt devi utpannaḥ asmi bhayam karaḥ tu sam hāre punar eva janārdanaḥ netrābhyām asṛjat candra sūryau dhvām tāpa hāriṇaḥ diśaḥ ca sṛjat nāsābhyām varuṇam mitram asṛjat paṅkaja īkṣaṇaḥ bāhubhyām akhilān devān sa sādhyān sa marut gaṇān tvaci śailān samudrān ca go ādyāḥ paśavaḥ tathā mukhatas brāhmaṇaḥ sṛṣṭaḥ bāhubhyām kṣatriyaḥ tathā ūruvoḥ vaiśyaḥ tatas padbhyām śūdraḥ ca eva majāyata viśvarūpeṇa deveśaḥ yasya antaram adhiṣṭhitaḥ tasmāt sarva jagat prāṇaḥ viṣṇuḥ eva sanātanaḥ saḥ eva avyakta rūpaḥ san paramātmā avyavasthitaḥ paripūrṇaḥ asau vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ triguṇāt ātmanaḥ rūpaḥ caturddhā kurute jagant pradyumnasya aṃśa bhāgaḥ asau brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ manūnām pārthivānām ca kālasya ca janasya ca saṃkarṣaṇaḥ mahā viṣṇuḥ vidyā bala samanvitaḥ matsyaḥ kūrmaḥ varāhaḥ ca narasiṃhaḥ atha vāmanaḥ rāmaḥ rāmaḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca buddhaḥ kalkī ca te daśa ete tu vibhava avasthā brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ parikīrtitam sā hi avasthā hareḥ asya śṛṇuṣva girije śubhe śveta dīpam svarūpam tu kṣīrasāgaram uttamam tad āvaraṇa madhyetu vaikuṇṭham kāraṇam śubham nānā maṇi mayam divyam vimāna koṭibhiḥ yutam yat uktam paramam dhām tādṛś lakṣaṇa saṃsthitam catur dvāra samāyuktam hema prākāra toraṇam caṇḍa ādi dvārapāla ādyaiḥ kumuda ādyaiḥ ca rakṣitam nānā maṇi mayaiḥ divyaiḥ gṛhaiḥ paṅktibhiḥ āvṛtam prāsādaiḥ koṭibhiḥ vṛtam puṃbhiḥ trībhiḥ ca śobhitam striyaḥ ca puruṣāḥ ca asmin sarva lakṣaṇa śobhitāḥ sama rūpāḥ ca śrī viṣṇoḥ sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitāḥ mantra aṣṭa akṣara saṃsiddhā bhaktyā ṣoḍaśa rūpayā gatvā asmin na nivartante viṣṇunā saha saṃsthitāḥ śubhāḥ tad samāna sukham nityam prāpnuvanti manīṣiṇaḥ yathā saumitri bharatau yathā saṅkarṣaṇa ādayaḥ sarva bandhana nirmuktāḥ hari dāsāḥ nirāmayāḥ lokāḥ punarāvṛtti lakṣaṇāḥ bahu āyāsa phala ādevī jani nāśaka hetavaḥ yathā svarga saṃsthān narān dṛṣṭvā akṣīṇe karmaṇi devatāḥ kupitāḥ pātayanti evasam sṛtau kārya bandhane anityam kuṭi duḥkha miśram satatam sam smaret viṣṇum sarva duḥkha ogha nāśanam nāma uccāraṇa mātreṇa prāpnuvanti param padam tasmāt tu vaiṣṇavam lokam gauri samprārthayet sudhīḥ sa sarva jñāna guṇavān arakṣati eva na saṃśayaḥ tasmāt aṣṭa akṣaram mantram japtvā sukhataram śubham samprāpnoti param lokam vaiṣṇavam sarva kāma dam hariḥ tatra ca ādhāra śakti ādi dhṛte pīṭhe hiraṇmaye tad karṇikāyām su ramyāyām lakṣmī bīja śubha akṣare divyena nārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān āsīnaḥ paṅkaja āsane tasya dakṣiṇake pārśve jaganmātrī hiraṇmayī gṛhītvā a cāmarān divyān divya mālya vibhūṣaṇā vasu pātram gaṃ svarṇa padmam dhṛtam karaiḥ nānā ābharaṇa sam bara bhūṣitā itarābhyām dhṛtam devyā dhānya pātra yugam tathā gṛhītvā cāmarān divyān śaktayaḥ vimala ādikāḥ dala agra iṣu samāsīnāḥ sarva lakṣaṇa śobhitāḥ tāsām madhye samāsīnaḥ bhagavant acyutaḥ hariḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā padma pāṇibhiḥ divya bhūṣaṇaiḥ gada hāra ādyaiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ ūpaśobhitaḥ prātar udyat sahasrām śukuṇḍalābhyām virājitaḥ śrīmat aṣṭa akṣaram mantram siddhānām vai manīṣiṇām gamyam tat vaiṣṇavam lokam na itareṣām kathaṃcana iti evam prathamam vyūham kathitam te varānane dvitīyam vaiṣṇavam lokam śṛṇu vakṣyāmi suvrate yaḥ ayam nitya eti khyātaḥ loka agryaḥ vaiṣṇavaḥ smṛtaḥ tam lokam vipulam puṇyam śuddham sattva mayam śubham madhyāhna sūrya sāhasra yugapad bhāsitam tadā mama brahma ādi devānām na draṣṭum api śakyate sarvam kalpadruma vanaiḥ paripūrṇam samam tatas nirantar sāmabhiḥ ca kūjitaiḥ kokila ādibhiḥ ūhyamānaiḥ gandharvṛkṣaiḥ puṣpakaiḥ apiśobhitam ūna ṣoḍaśa varṣa abdaiḥ divya nārī naraiḥ vṛtam sarva lakṣaṇa śobhā āḍhyaiḥ divya kalpa vibhūṣaṇaiḥ gāyanti parama ānandam kṛṣṇasya caritam mahat padma īkṣaṇāḥ padma hastāḥ śubhāḥ divya sraj vasana upetāḥ krīḍanti sma su yoṣitaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā padma dharā bhūṣaṇa bhūṣitāḥ sragviṇaḥ pīta vasanāḥ puruṣāḥ tatra saṃsthitāḥ an anya sparśanāt tatra krīḍamānayoḥ nānā puṣpa vimāna ādyaiḥ sarvatas sa malam kṛtam tad madhye kalpavṛkṣasya chāyāyām kamalāsane am keśubha āstaraṇa sam vṛte divya gandha su śobhā āḍhyaiḥ nānā puṣpa paricchadaiḥ mahā īśvarā asaha deva īśaḥ vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ tudhām kāśaḥ divya ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ suvarṇa śubhra yugala ślakṣṇa nāsām cita ānanaḥ snigdha āyata su lāvaṇya kapolābhyām virājitaḥ nīla kuñcita keśa āḍhyaḥ rakta abja dala locanaḥ dāra ketakī jātī kairavīkṛta śekharaḥ snigdha bimba phala ābha oṣṭhaḥ susmita ānana paṅkajaḥ anarghya mauktika ābhāsa dam tad āvali virājitaḥ haricandana liptām gaḥ kastūrī tilakām kitaḥ mapā kusuma sam kāśa karapallava śobhitaḥ hrīvatsa kaustubhābhyām ca śobhitaḥ pṛthu vakṣasā muktā mayaiḥ su śobhā āḍhyaiḥ divya sragbhiḥ alam kṛtaḥ bāla arka sadṛśa jyotsnā pīta vastreṇa veṣṭitaḥ rakta utpala nibha ślakṣṇa śubhrām ghri kara paṅkajaḥ mām gābhyām bāhu yugma virājitaḥ itarābhyām śriyaḥ gātram āśliṣyan nija vakṣasi śliṣyat vidyut latā udgītha śita abhrā eva rājate sapta jām būnada ślakṣṇa śubhām ghri yugapam jakaḥ atra krīḍati deveśaḥ vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ taptakām canasam kāśā sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā dāra pārijāta ādi divya puṣpa virājitā saṃnibhā pīna unnata stanābhyām ca pīḍanti hari vakṣasi mada hāra ādyaiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ upaśobhitā mārūḍha yauvanā anityam sarva loka īśa sundarā bhavate sarva loke ismin sarva kāma pradaḥ nṛṇām tra aṣṭa śaktayaḥ lakṣmyāḥ tanavaḥ paritas sthitāḥ ramā ca rukmiṇī sītā padmā padmālayā śivā su lakṣaṇā su śīlā ca rati kāma pradāḥ ca tāḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā padma śārṅga ādyaiḥ hetibhiḥ tathā paritas puṣkara ākāraiḥ tam lokam parirakṣate evam dvitīya rūpam ca samyak te śubha darśane saṃkṣepāt mayā proktam na śakyam vistareṇa hi te prāpnuvanti satatam śāśvatam śubham akṣayam na prāpyam vaiṣṇavam lokam vinā dānena kutracid tasmāt dāsyam hareḥ bhaktam bhajeta ananya mānasaḥ tṛtīyam tu param vyūham śṛṇu vakṣyāmi pārvati toya abdheḥ uttaram kūlam śvetadvīpe mahā mate saṃdarśanāya yogānām sanaka ādi mahātmanām sanakaḥ ca sanandaḥ ca tṛtīyaḥ ca sanātanaḥ sanat kumāra jātāḥ ca voḍhuḥ paṣca śikhaḥ tathā viraktāḥ sarva bhogeṣu śuddhāḥ sattva guṇāḥ sadā nara nārāyaṇa ādyāḥ ca śvetadvīpe vasanti ye teṣām saṃdarśana arthāya tatra sam nihitaḥ hariḥ śubhrām śukoṭi sam kāśena nānā ratna maya ujjvale tatra udyānāni ramya aṇi pārijāta samā ivai sam tānaka latā ākīrṇam candana druma maṇḍitam tad madhye nagarī ramyā nāmnā ca airāvatī śubhā tā bahu prāsādasam kulā bāla sūrya nibhaiḥ tuṃ gaiḥ prāsādaiḥ bahubhiḥ vṛtam tad madhye maṇḍapam divyam maṇikām cana śobhitam candana aguru karpūra kum kumā āmoda vāśitam nānā kusuma śobhā āḍhyaiḥ vitānaiḥ samalam kṛtam divya apsaras samākīrṇam sāma gāna upaśobhitam tad madhye karṇikāyām tu samāsīnaḥ janārdanaḥ muddha jām būnada prakhyaḥ muktā hāra vibhūṣitaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā padma śakti hasta catuṣṭayaḥ hāra keyūra kaṭakaiḥ aṅgulīyaiḥ ca śobhitaḥ sam tānaka nibhaiḥ śubhraiḥ nakha paṅkti virājitaḥ mahā abda vayaḥ rūpa yauvanena virājitaḥ yukta kumena sugandhinā racitena ūrdhva puṇḍreṇa sīmam tena upaśobhitaḥ mathita amṛta phena ābha śukla vastra su veṣṭitaḥ muktā mayābhyām śubhrābhyām kuṇḍalābhyām virājitaḥ hasta sthitā devī tasya divya svarūpiṇī tasya iva sadṛśā lakṣmīḥ śīla suṣṭu guṇa ādibhiḥ malkasam kāśā yauvanāram bha śobhitā sarva lakṣaṇa sampanna ataptakām cana bhūṣaṇā catur bhujaiḥ virājantī keyūra aṅgada bhūṣitā muktā hāra virājanti imam cita śīrṣa jā mad mauktikā divya kum gī padma mālā upaśobhitā mātuluṅgam darpaṇam hema paṅkajam tasya itāḥ sadṛśāḥ tatra śaktayaḥ paritohareḥ īśāvāsyā mahādevī jāhnavī kamala ālayā sāvitrī sarva gā padmā śaktayaḥ parikīrtitāḥ śraddhā medhā dhṛtiḥ prajṣā dhāraṇā śāntiḥ eva ca śruti smṛtiḥ dhṛtiḥ medhā vṛddhiḥ buddhiḥ manīṣiṇī dāsyaḥ te itāḥ śriyaḥ proktāḥ yasya kārikāḥ sādhyā marut gaṇāḥ ca eva sevam te nitya devatāḥ prāsādeṣu vimāneṣu vaneṣu nagareṣu ca tad prasāda upalabdha iṣu bhogeṣu atra anuram jitāḥ bhīḍam nitya aheya niṣphala varjitāḥ te viṣṇu mantra japtāraḥ satatam śraddhayā anvitāḥ prāptum ca śakyam girije viṣṇu lokam sanātanam bhaktyā ca ananyayā a prāptum śakyam viṣṇu padam nṛṇām tanam nāma mātram ca dhyāyat mantram japet sadā evam uktam tṛtīyam tu vyūhantu paramātmanaḥ svarūpam tava suśroṇi yathā proktam purātanaiḥ divaukasām rakṣaṇa artham dugdha abdhau parameśvaraḥ sudhām śu koṭiśam kāśaḥ sahasrākṣeṇa śobhite divya āsana samāsīnaḥ padmanābhaḥ acyutaḥ hariḥ nīla jīmūta sam kāśaḥ padma pattra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ vivasvat koṭi saṃkāśa kirīṭena virājitaḥ nānā ratna ujjvalat divyam kuṇḍalābhyām virājitaḥ bāla arka sadṛśa jyotsnā pīta vastreṇa veṣṭitaḥ sphurat rakta aravim dābha hastām ghri tala śobhitaḥ hāra keyūra kaṭakaiḥ aṅgulīyaiḥ virājitaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā śārṅga khaḍga hastaiḥ vibhūṣitaḥ su puṣpa phala śākhā āḍhya kalpavṛkṣaiḥ virājitaḥ viśvasya janma maraṇa nābhi paṅkaja śobhitaḥ haricandana liptām gaḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ dāra pārijāta ādi divya puṣpaiḥ manoramaiḥ su snigdha nīla kuṭilaka varīkṛta keśavān ślakṣṇa unnata su nāsām sa jānu yugma virājitaḥ maṇi vidruma śākhā āḍhya nūpura aṅghri virājitaḥ aśoka puṣpa saṃ kāśa rakta uṣṭha mukha paṅkajaḥ ārūḍha yauvanaḥ śrīmān komala avayava ujjvalaḥ śaraṇyaḥ sarva lokānām sarva loka phala pradaḥ sadṛśā tasya devī tu rūpa śīla guṇa ādibhiḥ taptakām canasam kāśātaptakām canabhūṣaṇā taruṇī rūpa lāvaṇya akānti śīla guṇa anvitā hasta abdhi phena sam kāśa śubha vastreṇa veṣṭitā dāra ketakī jātī puṣpa arcita śiroruhā śobhitā nānā varṇa su śobhā āḍhya ākarṇabhūṣaṇa bhūṣitā pravāla sadṛśa jyotsnā rakta dhārā su vismitā tanu madhya aviśāla akṣī pīna unnata payodharā catur hastaiḥ virājantī sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā udvāhubhyām dhṛtā devī hema padma yugam śubham itarābhyām samāśliṣya bhartāram nibiḍam sthitā mad tridaśān tridaśaiḥ nirīkṣitāḥ tayā devyā dhanyāḥ te satatam śive tatra idevā vimāna sthāḥ siddha cāraṇa kiṃnarāḥ gāyanti satatam devī mānam da aśru pariplutāḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ tatra īśaḥ devānām abhayam dadau devānām abhayam dattvā sarva deva īśvaraḥ hariḥ rākṣasān hantum ārebhe jagant sam rakṣaṇāya vai dhanya asi kṛtakṛtya asi bhakta asi puruṣottame mahā varṇanam nāma ekonatriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ triṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhagavant yatra deveśaḥ rākṣasān madhusūdanaḥ vistareṇa samākhyāhi mama prītyā maheśvaraiḥ uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi vaibhavam svastha mānasā matsya kūrma ādi yat rūpam avatāra ātmakam hareḥ dīpāt utpādyate dīpaḥ yathā vat tat bhaviṣyati para avasthā para īśasya sa vyūha a vibhava ādayaḥ uktāḥ deva avatārāḥ tu vividha ākārakāḥ śubhāḥ paramātmanaḥ bhṛgum marīcim atrim ca dakṣam kardamam eva ca marīciḥ bhagavān tatra janayāmāsa kaśyapam kaśyapasya abhavaṣ jāyāḥ ca catasraḥ śubha darśane aditiḥ janayāmāsa devān tu śubha darśanān ditiḥ ca rākṣasān putrān tāmasān su mahā asurān śambūkaḥ tu hayagrīvaḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā balaḥ hiraṇyakaśipuḥ jambhaḥ mayā adyāḥ su mahā tapāḥ brahmānam mohayitvā asau vedāḥ jagrāha vīryavān saḥ atha praviveśa mahā arṇavam na adhītam na vaṣaṭkāram varṇa āśrama vivarjitam tatas prajāpatiḥ devaḥ sarva deva gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ gatvā a dugdhām budhim devam tu stau aśaraṇam gataḥ tvam eva sarva lokānām āśrayaḥ puruṣottamaḥ bhūtādiḥ tvam mahat bhūtam bhūta saṅghasya kāraṇam tvam eva kāraṇam āśrityaramata dhāma ātmavān tvam ādi bhūtaḥ ca antaḥ tvam tvam vāyuḥ sarva gaḥ mahān tvam apaḥ sarva jagatām jīvanam parameśvaraḥ tvam bhūmiḥ jagat ādhāraḥ bhūdharaḥ tvam mahāmate tvayā eva prerita ālokāḥ ca iṣṭam te sādhu asādhuṣu daityena upadrutā avedāḥ praviṣṭā amahat arṇavam vedāḥ ca eva hi sarveṣām dharmāṇām paritas sthitiḥ nitya tṛptiḥ bhaviṣyati tasmāt vedān samānetum tvam eva arhasi keśavaiḥ śrī mahā devaḥ uvāca evam uktaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ brahmanā parameśvaraḥ tam daityam su mahā ghoram mākaram rūpam āsthitaḥ tuṇḍa agreṇa vidārya atha jaghāna amara pūjitam tam hatvā sarva vedān ca sa aṅga upāṅga samanvitān anyonya miśritāḥ vedāḥ grasitāḥ tena rakṣasā vyaktāḥ bhagavatā tena vyāsa rūpeṇa dhīmatā pṛthak bhūtā samam vedā vyāsena eva mahātmanā evam matsya avatāreṇa rakṣitāḥ sarva devatāḥ kṛtvā nirātaṅkam aho ramā dhavaḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ sura siddha saṅghaiḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣcapaṣcāśat sahasra saṃhitāyām tad uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde matsyāvatāra varṇanam nāma triṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tat vakṣyāmi priya samyak śṛṇuṣva ekāgra cetasā atri putraḥ mahā tejāḥ durvāsāḥ iti viśrutaḥ pracaṇḍaḥ sarva lokānām kṣobha kārī mahā tapāḥ mama aṃśa bhūtaḥ brahmarṣiḥ sarveṣām bhaya daḥ sadā uṣitaḥ tatra varṣam tu kinnarībhiḥ sa pūjitaḥ tasmin kāle mahā tejā gaja ārūḍham maheśvaram dadarśa sarva devaiḥ tam pūjyamānam śacīpatim tat ca dṛṣṭvā sa hṛṣṭa ātmā durvāsāḥ su mahā tapāḥ mādāya devatā adhīśaḥ tām srajam gaja mūrdhani kareṇa ādāya āyatām mālām mada udriktaḥ tatas gajaḥ pīḍayitvā atha cikṣepa saṃsthitām dharaṇī tale tatas kruddhaḥ mahā tejāḥ durvāsāḥ rakta locanaḥ uvāca tasmāt trailokya śrīḥ naṣṭā bhavatu eva na saṃśayaḥ iti śaptaḥ tatas śakraḥ jagāma sva puram punar tatas śrīḥ jagantām dhātrī īkṣaṇāt antar dadhe svayam antar ddhānam gatā alakṣmīḥ tadā anaṣṭam jagat trayam yat apām gā āśritam sarvam jagant sthāvara jaṅgamam tasyām antar dhānavatyām sarvam naṣṭataram bhavat brahma ādi tridaśāḥ sarve gandharva ayakṣa kiṃnarāḥ daityāḥ ca dānāva anāga amanuṣya arākṣasāḥ tathā paśavaḥ pakṣiṇaḥ kīṭāḥ sarve sthāvara jaṅgamāḥ tayā alakṣmyā jaganmātrā te sarvena avalokitāḥ cukruśuḥ gata cetasaḥ nava varṣa jaladharaḥ nava varṣa jaladharaḥ sarveśuṣkāḥ jalāśayāḥ sarve te pādapa aśuṣkāḥ phala puṣpa vivarjitāḥ tadā devāḥ sa gandharvāḥ daitya dānava rākṣasāḥ kṣudh pipāsā ardditāḥ ājagmuḥ brahmānam amita ojasam ūcuḥ bhagavant kṣudh pipāsābhyām pīḍitam hi jagat trayam kṣudh pipāsā ardditāḥ sarve deva dānava mānavāḥ trātāram sarva loka īśam bhavam tam śaraṇam gatāḥ trātum arhasi deveśa kṣudh pipāsā arditān janān iti teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā sarva loka pitāmahaḥ uvāca parama prītaḥ tān sarvān pratimāna daḥ śṛṇudhvam devatāḥ sarve daitya gandharva mānavāḥ ha krodham avāptavan tasmāt krodhena tena idam naṣṭam lokatrayam surāḥ tad asau roṣa parīta ātmā akrodhena kaluṣīkṛtaḥ bhavatu iti āha durmatiḥ tad śāpāt jagantām antar ddhānam gatā devī jaganmātrī mahā īśvarā yat apāṅga īkṣita ālokāḥ bhavanti sukhitāḥ tathā duḥkha bhāginaḥ eva hi tatra nārāyaṇam devam arccayāmaḥ sanātanam bhṛgu ādi munibhiḥ sārdham prayayau kṣīrasāgaram kṣīrābdhau uttara taṭe brahma rudra ādi devatāḥ mahā bhairava samarcayāmāsuḥ pauruṣeṇa vidhānāt japan aṣṭa akṣaram mantram pauruṣam sūktam eva ca teṣām samdarśane tasthau stūyamānaḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ tam dṛṣṭvā jagantām īśam śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam pīta vastram catur bāhum puṇḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇam bhitam tatas provāca bhagavant kṛpayā sarva devatāḥ tad daḥ asmi varam devaiḥ avṛṇīdhvam iti ca bravīt iti śrutvā tadā sarve devāḥ brahma purogamāḥ ūcuḥ idam vacam īśvaram ūcaḥ kṣudh pipāsā arditam sarvam sa deva asura mānuṣam tasmāt bhavam tam śaraṇam yātāḥ sma puruṣottamaiḥ uvāca atri sūnoḥ muneḥ śāpāt antar dhānam gatā aramā kaṭākṣa darśanāt tasya ā jagat aiśvarya saṃyutam tasmāt yūyam surāḥ sarva śiva brahma purogamāḥ utpāṭya mama daram śailam nidhāya kṣīrasāgaram daram ghargharam kṛtvā sarparājena veṣṭitam utpadyate ca sā alakṣmīḥ jagat sam rakṣaṇāya vai tayā a hṛṣṭāḥ mahābhāgāḥ bhaviṣyatha saṃśayaḥ dhārayāmi aham eva adrim vṛtaḥ mama aśaktyā asurān sarvān praviśya ca balīyasaḥ iti uktāḥ devatāḥ sarvāḥ hariṇā kāma lakṣaṇe sādhu sādhu iti deveśam ūcuḥ brahma purogamāḥ saṃstūyamānaḥ bhagavant acyutaḥ sura sattamaiḥ antar dadhe tatas śrīmān sarva loka namaskṛtaḥ iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde durvāsasaḥ śāpa kathanam nāma ekatriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ dvātriṃśat adhi dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mad bhairavaḥ uvāca tatas sura gaṇāḥ sarva dānava ādyāḥ mahā balāḥ utpāṭya mama daram śailam cikṣipuḥ payasām nidhau tatas nārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān bhagavant bhūtabhāvanaḥ yam śailam dadhāra amita vikramaḥ an ādi madhya anta vapūḥ viśva rūpaḥ sanātanaḥ adhārayat giri varam sampūjya jagat īśvaraḥ tatas deva asurāḥ sarve kṣīrasāgaram sarppa rājenasam veṣṭya ghargharam dara acalam utpādana artham lakṣmyāḥ ca sarve eva mahā ṛṣayaḥ upoṣya niyamam kṛtvā ajepuḥ śrī sūktam eva ca ekādaśyām tu śuddhāyām budhau upoṣya ṛṣayaḥ sarve japtam śrī mantram uttamam kām kṣamāṇāḥ caye japtum lakṣmī nārāyaṇam harim dhyātvā samarcayāmāsuḥ dvijāgryā muni sattamāḥ samabhūt tatra prathamam kālakūṭam mahā viṣam mahā pīḍam mahā ghoram sam varta agni sama prabham dṛṣṭvā pradudruvuḥ sarve bhaya ārtāḥ deva dānavāḥ tatas tān vidrutān dṛṣṭvā bhaya ārtān sura sattamān tatas tān abruvam vākyam aham tatra śubha īkṣaṇe aham āhārayiṣyāmi kālakūṭam mahā viṣam sādhu sādhu iti vākyaiḥ mām tu praṇatā bhṛśam tat ṛṣṭvā ameghasam kāśam prādurbhūtam mahā viṣam dhyātvā nārāyaṇam devam hṛdaye garuḍadhvajam udaya āditya sam kāśam śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam śrī bhūmi sahitam devam taptakām cana kuṇḍalam nāma rūpam mahāmantram japtvā alakṣmyā samanvitam tat abhavat jīrṇam lokasam hāra kārakam tasya mṛtyu bhayam nāsti viṣa roga agni jam mahat ca api tasya nāstikim anyatas iti nāma trayeṇa eva pītam devi mayā aviṣam tatas prahṛṣṭāḥ tridaśāḥ tuṣṭuvuḥ mām su vismitāḥ mām praṇamya punar deva amam thuḥ kṣīrasāgaram jyeṣṭhā devī samutpannā ratna sraj vāsasā āvṛtā tām abruvam stutedevīm sarva deva gaṇāḥ bhṛśam ūcuḥ yeṣām gṛha antareramye kalahaḥ sampravartate tat te sthānam prayacchāma uvasa tatra aśubha anvitā paruṣam bhāṣaṇat nityam vadam ti anṛta vādinaḥ svapanti mala cetasaḥ teṣām kapāla keśa bhasma asthi tuṣām gārāni yatra tu tatra te satatam sthānam bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tatra vasa aśubhe nityam kalinā asaha nityaśas a kṛtvā a pādayoḥ śaucam yaḥ tu ācāmati durmatiḥ tam bhajasva mahādevi kaluṣeṇa bhṛśam vṛtam tuṣām gāraka pāla aśma vālukā vastra carmabhiḥ dantadhāvana kartāraḥ bhaviṣyanti nara adhamāḥ ramasva a kalinā ādeviteṣām veśmasu nityaśas tila piṣṭam kalam jaṃ cakaliṅgam śigru gṛm janam chatrākam viḍvarāham ca bilvam kośātakī phalam alābum capalāṇḍum nara adhamāḥ teṣām gehe hi avasthānam iti ādiśya surāḥ sarve jyeṣṭhām ca kali vallabhām punar camam cakruḥ kṣīrābdhim su samāhitāḥ tatas ca vāruṇī devī samutpannā aśubha ānane tām jagrāha su locanām tatas surā samutpannā sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā yasya bhāryā abhūt sarva lakṣaṇa śobhitā tatas apsaras gaṇāḥ divyāḥ gandharvāḥ ca mahā ojasaḥ jajṣire rūpa sampannāḥ madhu gāyana tatparāḥ etān sarvān sahasrākṣaḥ jagrāha prīta mānasaḥ tatas prahṛṣṭa vadanaiḥ tūyamānā mahā ṛṣibhiḥ utpannā aśrīḥ mahālakṣmī sarva loka īśvarā śubhā bāla arka koṭisam kāśā kanakām gada bhūṣitā buja samāsīnā sarva lakṣaṇa śobhitā mad pattra viśāla akṣā nīla kum cita mūrdhajā divya candana liptām gīta īditya puṣpaiḥ alam kṛtā catur hastā viśāla akṣī pūrṇā du sadṛśa ānanā vasu pātram gaṃ svarṇa padma yugam śubham vibhrāṇā hasta kamalaiḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaiḥ a mlāna paṅkajām mālām dhārayan sthale dadṛśuḥ tām mahādevīm sarva loka hita eṣiṇīm īśvarām sarva bhūtānām mātaram padma mālinīm nārāyaṇīm jagaddhātrīm nārāyaṇa hṛd ālayām tām vilokya mahā lakṣmīm prahṛṣṭāḥ sarva devatāḥ avādayantaḥ paṭahān divideva gaṇāḥ bhṛśam vavarṣuḥ puṣpa varṣāṇi vana devyoniḥ antaram jaguḥ gandharva patayaḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsaras gaṇāḥ tāḥ prasannāḥ ca diśaḥ daśa śītaraśmiḥ udabhūt kṣīrasāgare mayaḥ somaḥ mātuḥ bhrātā a sukha āvahaḥ nakṣatra adhipatiḥ ca abhūt candraḥ vailoka mātulaḥ tatas jāyā hareḥ puṇyā tulasī loka pāvanā samutpannā jagaddhātrī pūjā artham śārṅgiṇaḥ hareḥ tatas prahṛṣṭa manasaḥ sarve devāḥ divaukasaḥ tam śailam pūrvavat sthāpya paripūrṇa manorathāḥ stutvā nāma sahasreṇa jepuḥ śrī sūkta sam hitāḥ tatas prasannā āsā devi sarvān devān uvāca ha uvāca varam vṛṇīdhvam bhadram vaḥ vara dāham sura uttamāḥ ūcuḥ śriyam namra ātma mūrtayaḥ ūcuḥ mahā bhava nitya anapāyinī trailokyam pālaya devī nityā tvam parameśvarī yat apām gā āśritam sarvam jagant sthāvara jaṅgamam mātā rudra ādi devānām aiśvaryam tvad kaṭākṣāt iti uktā a daivataiḥ sarvaiḥ lokamātāmaha īśvarā evam astu iti tān devān prāha nārāyaṇa priyā tatas nārāyaṇaḥ śrīśaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ tathā eva āvirabhūt brahmā apūrvavat kṣīrasāgare tatas pratuṣṭuvuḥ devāḥ namaskṛtvā janārdanam ūcuḥ sarve prahṛṣṭa vadanāḥ śubhāḥ ūcuḥ gṛhāṇa devīm sarva īśa mahi ṛṣi tava vallabhām jagat sam rakṣaṇa arthāya lakṣmīm anapagāminīm nānā ratna maye divye pīṭhe bāla arka sam nibhe niveśya devīm devam da aśru pariplutāḥ divya ambaraiḥ divya mālyaiḥ nānā ratna vibhūṣitaiḥ lakṣmyā asahasam āsīnam arcayāmāsuḥ acyutam aprākṛtaiḥ phalaiḥ divyaiḥ arcayāmāsuḥ īśvarām amṛtāt utthitā devī tulasī komalā śubhā tayā aśrī pāda yugalam arcayāmāsuḥ am jasā pradakṣiṇa trayam kṛtvā namaskṛtvā muhur muhur taṣṭuvuḥ tutibhiḥ deva āharṣa pūrṇa aśru viklavāḥ abhīṣṭān pradadau tebhyaḥ varān devyāsaha prabhuḥ tatas su hṛṣṭāḥ sura mānuṣa ādya alakṣmī kaṭākṣa arppita dṛṣṭi pūtāḥ sukham param prāpuḥ anāmayā bhṛśam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde lakṣmyutpattiḥ nāma dvātriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ mad bhairavaḥ uvāca tatas provāca bhagavant surān ca eva mahā munīn devyā saha prahṛṣṭa ātmā sarva loka hitāya vai uvāca śṛṇudhvam munayaḥ sarve devatāḥ ca mahā valāḥ akādaśī mahā puṇyā sarva upadrava nāśinī lakṣmī saṃdarśana arthāya bhavadbhiḥ samupoṣitā tasmāt tu sarvadā puṇyā dvādaśī mama vallabhā adya prabhṛti ye lokāḥ uṣitāḥ pūrva vāsare dvādaśyām udita ibhānau śraddhayā aparayā ayutāḥ ye pūjayanti mām bhaktyā atulasyā ca śriyā saha na arccayanti cayā iva emām dvādaśyām puruṣottamam pāpa karmāṇaḥ mama māyā vimohitāḥ tān pāpān viṣaya mama pūjā parāṅmukhān kṣipati ajasram saṃsāra imā āyāmam a duratyayā evam uktvā tu bhagavān paramātmā sanātanaḥ kṣīrābdhau śeṣa paryaṅke vimāne sūrya saṃnibhe darśana artham surāṇām ca tatra sannihitaḥ abhavat tatas sura gaṇāḥ sarve kūrma rūpam sanātanam bhaktyā a sampūjayitvā atha tuṣṭuvuḥ hṛṣṭa mānasāḥ tatas prasannaḥ ubhava gān kūrma rūpī janārdanaḥ uvāca mad varam vṛṇīdhvam deveśāya tvad manasi vartate tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve kūrma rūpam janārdanam ucuḥ sarve harṣa nirbhara mānasāḥ ūcuḥ śeṣasya diggajānām ca sahāya artham mahā bala evam astu iti hṛṣṭa ātmā bhagavant loka bhāvanaḥ dhārayāmāsa dharaṇīm sapta dvīpa samāvṛtām tatas devāḥ sa gandharva ādaitya dānava mānuṣāḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ anujṣātāḥ svar lokān pratipedire siddhāya mānuṣāḥ ca eva yoginaḥ muni sattamāḥ puraskṛtya bhaktyā aparamayā yutāḥ ekādaśī ām upoṣya atha bhaktyā ca eva janārdanam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde ekādaśyupavāsakathanam nāma uvāca bhagavan śrotum icchāmi dvādaśyāḥ ca vidhānakam viṣṇoḥ pūjā vidhānam ca kartavyam tatra vai prabho ekādaśyāḥ prabhāvam ca sarva pāpa haram nṛṇām mayi prītyā maheśvaraiḥ uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi dvādaśyāḥ ca vidhānakam tasyāḥ smaraṇa mātreṇa santuṣṭaḥ syāt janārdanaḥ ekādaśyām tu prāptāyām samupoṣya iha mānavaḥ sarva pāpa vinirmuktāḥ yānti viṣṇoḥ param padam sapta janma arjitam pāpam jñānāt ajñānāt kṛtam madhya eva layam yāti dvādaśyām hari pūjanāt aśvamedha sahasrāṇi vājapeya śatāni ca ekādaśī upavāsasya kalām na arhanti ṣoḍaśām dharma dā hi artha dā ca eva kāma dā mokṣa dā kila sarva kāma dughā nṝṇām dvādaśī vara varṇinī ekādaśī samam kiṃcid pāpa trāṇam na vidyate ekādaśī samam kiṃcid vratam na asti śubha īkṣaṇe sa kara stham mahā rājyam tyaktvā bhaikṣyam tu yācate ekādaśa indriyaiḥ pāpam yat kṛtam bhavati priye raṭanti iha purāṇāni bhūyas bhūyas varānane abhakṣyam sarvadā proktam kim punar śukla kṛṣṇayoḥ varṇānām āśramāṇām ca sarveṣām vara varṇinī ekādaśī upavāsaḥ tu kartavyaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ekādaśyām ca prāptāyām mātā pitroḥ mṛte ahani dvādaśyām tu pradātavyam na upavāsa dine kvacid garhita annam na vā aśnanti pitaraḥ ca divaukasaḥ ekādaśyām na bhoktavyam surām vā na pibet kvacid tasmāt ekādaśīm śuddhām upavāsam samācaret daśamī miśritām tām tu prayatnena vivarjayet aruṇa udaya velāyām daśamī miśritā bhavet tām tyaktvā advādaśīm śuddhām upoṣya iha a vicārayan kalāyām vidyamānāyām sūryasya udayanam prati trayodaśyām tathā devi dvādaśīparividyate tathā ca dvādaśī śuddhā vidhīyate aruṇa udaya velāyām kṛtyam sarvam samācaret kalāyām api dvādaśyām pāraṇam tatra ca uditam śuddhām ekādaśīm ca api tyajet atra na saṃśayaḥ kalā api ekādaśī yatra dvādaśyām uditeravau sarvām ekādaśīm tyaktvā tatra iva upavaset dvijaḥ sāyam ādyam tayoḥ ahnoḥ sāyam prātar tu madhyame daśamyām eka bhaktaḥ tu nārī saṃgama varjitaḥ dhātrī phala anuliptām gaḥ snānam saṃdhyām samācaret pākhaṇḍinam vikarma stham patitam śvapacam tathā na avaloket na sambhāṣet na spṛśet tatra vaiṣṇavaḥ avaiṣṇavaḥ tu yaḥ vipraḥ sa pāṣaṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ śikhopavīta tyāgī ca vikarma sthaḥ iti īritaḥ mahā pāpa upapāpābhyām yuktaḥ patita ucyate rātrau sampūjya deveśam jāgaram ca samācaret gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ tathā dīpaiḥ vastraiḥ ābharaṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ pūjay jagantām īśam lakṣmyā saha janārdanam dīpān nīrājayet tatra vāram aṣṭa uttaram śatam śatapattra kṛtām mālām tābhyām samyak nivedayet dhūpam dīpam ca naivedyam tāmbūlam ca samarpayet śarkarā sahitam divyam pāyasa annam samarpayet yuktam tāmbūlam ca nivedayet pradam kṣiṇe namaskāram kṛtvā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ huyāt vahnau śatam aṣṭa uttaram tathā pratyṛcam puruṣasūktena lakṣmīsūktena pāyasam brāhmaṇān bhojayet bhaktyā svayam jīta vāgyataḥ purāṇa ādi prapāṭhena kṣapayet tat dinam mahat kṣiti śāyī brahmacārī tasyām eva niśi svapet evam sampūjyamānam sa dvādaśyām kamalā patiḥ ha kṣaṇāt prasannaḥ bhagavant sarva abhīṣṭa pradaḥ dhruvam iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe umā maheśvara saṃvāde dvādaśīmāhātmyam nāma paṣcatriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī pārvatī uvāca pāṣaṇḍānām ca saṃvādam varjayet iti yat tvayā te yādṛśāḥ samākhyātāḥ kaiḥ liṃ ṅgaiḥ cihnitā bhuvi ye anyam devam paratvena vadanti ajñāna mohitāḥ nārāyaṇāt jagannāthāt te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ ṛte vanastha āśramāt ca jaṭā valkala dhāriṇaḥ avaidika kriyā upetāḥ te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ tathā rahitāḥ ye dvijāḥ devi te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ śruti smṛti udita ācāram yaḥ tu na ācarati dvijaḥ sa pāṣaṇḍī iti vijṣeyaḥ sarva lokeṣu garhitaḥ vinā vai bhagavat prītyā te vai pāṣaṇḍinaḥ smṛtāḥ sa pāṣaṇḍī iti vijṣeyaḥ svatantraḥ sarva karmasu yaḥ tu nārāyaṇam devam brahma rudra ādi daivataiḥ samam anyaiḥ nirīkṣeta sa pāṣaṇḍī bhavet sadā vāsudevam na jānāti sa pāṣaṇḍī bhavet dvijaḥ kim atra bahunā uktena brāhmaṇāḥ ye api avaiṣṇavāḥ na te praṣṭavyāḥ na vaktavyāḥ na draṣṭavyāḥ kadācana uvāca mayiprītyā asamācakṣvasam śayaḥ vartate bhṛśam strī cāpalyena deveśa pṛcchāmi tvā mahāmate uvāca hi uvāca śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi yat guhyam parama adbhutam purāsu āyam tare mahābalā amahāvīryā mahāvīrā mahaujasaḥ tad sarva viṣṇu ratāḥ śuddhāḥ sarva pāpa vivarjitāḥ trayī dharma vṛtāḥ sarve bhagna aindra purogamāḥ viṣṇoḥ samīpam āgamya bhaya ārtām śaraṇam gatāḥ ūcuḥ ajeyān sarva devān āntapaḥ nirddhūta kalmaṣān uvāca iti ākarṇya hariḥ vākyam devānām ca bhayānakam tān samāśvāsya dikpālān mām āha puruṣottamaḥ uvāca tvam hi rudra mahā bāho mohana artha isura dviṣām pāṣaṇḍa ācaraṇam dharmam kuruṣva sura sattama tāmasāni purāṇāni kathayasva ca tān prati mohanāni ca śāstrāṇi kuruṣva ca mahāmate kāṇādam gautamam śaktim upamanyum ca jaiminim kapilam ca eva durvāsam mṛkaṇḍum ca bṛhaspatim bhārgavam jāmadagnyam ca daśa etān tāmasān ṛṣīn bhāva śaktyā samāviśya kurvatā jagantaḥ śivam tvad śaktyā ca niviṣṭāḥ te tamasā udriktayā bhṛśam tāmasāḥ te bhaviṣyanti saṃśayaḥ hitāḥ tathā pāśupatam śāstram tvam eva kuru satkṛtaḥ kāla śaiva pāṣaṇḍa mahā śaiva ādi bhedataḥ alakṣyam ca matam samyak veda bāhyam nara adhamāḥ tvām para tvena vakṣyanti sarva śāstreṣu tāmasāḥ teṣām matam adhiṣṭhāya sarve daityāḥ sanātanāḥ bhaveyuḥ te mad vimukhāḥ kṣaṇāt eva na saṃśayaḥ tāmasānām mohana artham pūjayāmi yuge yuge uvāca tasmāt nāśāya mama nātha bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ tatra śakyam mayā kartum tat kṛtyam hare adhunā tvad ājṣā api ca na ullaṅghyā etat duḥkhataram mahat evam ukta itatas devi samāśvāsya camām punar hariḥ devatānām hita arthāya kuruṣva vacanam mama hṛdaya imām samādhāya japa mantram mama avyayam mahā mantram tārakam brahma ucyate ye japanti himām bhaktyā teṣām muktiḥ na saṃśayaḥ mām ga śārṅga iṣu dharam sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitam bhasma asthi dhāraṇāt yat tu sambhūtam kilbiṣam tvayi maṅgalam tat abhūt sarvam mad mantra uccāraṇāt śubhāt tarpitaḥ nāśayiṣyāmi pāpam sarvam surottamaiḥ manasā eva arccaya hṛd imām nātham puruṣottamam hanta kurumat prītyā sarvam etat śubham te visṛṣṭāḥ te tatas devāḥ nivṛttāḥ sva āśramam yayuḥ tatas umām prārthayāmāsuḥ devāḥ aindra purogamāḥ indra ādayaḥ ūcuḥ śīghram kuru hitam deva yathā uktam hariṇā adhunā uvāca devatānām hita arthāya vṛttim pāṣaṇḍinām śubhe kapāla carma bhasma asthi dhāraṇam tat kṛtam mayā tāmasāni purāṇāni yathā uktam viṣṇunā aśubhe pāṣaṇḍa śaiva śāstrāṇi yathoktam kṛtavan aham anaghe imam matam avaṣṭabhya duṣṭāḥ sarve carākṣasāḥ bhagavat vimukhāḥ sarve babhūvuḥ tāmasa āvṛtāḥ bhasma ādi dhāraṇam kṛtvā mahā ugra tapasā āvṛtāḥ mām eva pūjayām cakruḥ mām sa asṛj candana ādibhiḥ tad viṣaya āsaktāḥ kāma krodha samanvitāḥ tadā sarva dharma paribhraṣṭāḥ kāleyām gatim puraskṛtya kṛtam bhasma asthi dhāraṇam bāhya cihnam idam devi mohana arthāya vidviṣām atha antar hṛdaye nityam dhyātvā devam janārdanam sahasra nāma sadṛśam viṣṇoḥ nārāyaṇasya tu ṣaṣ akṣaram mahā mantram raghūnām kula vardhanam etat te sarvam ākhyātam tvayā pṛṣṭam śubha ānane iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe pāṣaṇḍotpatti varṇanam nāma paṣcatriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ xc-ṣaṭtriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tāmasāni ca śāstrāṇi samācakṣva mama anagha teṣām nāma anikramaśas samācakṣva asura īśvaraiḥ śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi tāmasāni yathā kramam teṣām smaraṇa mātreṇa mohaḥ syāt jṣāninām api prathamam hi mayā eva uktam śaivam pāśupata ādikam mad śaktyā veśitaiḥ vipraiḥ proktāni ca tatas śṛṇu kaṇādena tu samproktam śāstram vaiśeṣikam mahat dhiṣaṇena tathā proktam cārvāka mati garhitam daityānām nāśana arthāya viṣṇunā buddha rūpiṇā mayā eva kathitam devi kalau brāhmaṇa rūpiṇā apārtham śruti vākyānām darśayan loka garhitam pareśa jīva pāra aikyam mayā tu pratipādyate brahmanaḥ asya svayam rūpam nirguṇam vakṣyate mayā veda arthavat mahā śāstram māyayā yat avaidikam mayā eva kalpitam devi jagantām nāśa kāraṇāt mad ājṣayā jaimininā pūrvam vedam apārthakam nirīśvareṇa vādena kṛtam śāstram mahattaram śāstrāṇi ca eva girije tāmasāni nibodha mama purāṇāni ca vakṣyāmi tāmasāni yathā kramāt brāhmam pādmam vaiṣṇavam ca śaivam bhāgavatam tathā tathā eva nāradīyam tu mārkaṇḍeyam tu saptamam āgneyam aṣṭamam proktam bhaviṣyam navamam tathā daśamam brahma vaivartam liṅgam ekādaśam śubha darśane sāttvikāni purāṇāni vijṣeyāṇi śubhāni vai brahmāṇḍa brahma vaivartam mārkaṇḍeyam tathā eva ca bhaviṣyam vāmanam brāhmam rājasāni nibodha mama sāttvikāḥ mokṣa dāḥ proktāḥ rājasāḥ sarvadā aśubhāḥ tathā eva smṛtayaḥ proktāḥ ṛṣibhiḥ triguṇa anvitāḥ sāttvikāḥ rājasāḥ ca eva tāmasāḥ śubha darśane yāsiṣṭham ca eva hārītam vyāsam pārāśaram tathā bhāradvājam kāśyapam ca sāttvikāḥ mukti dāḥ śubhāḥ yājṣavalkyam tathā ātreyam taittiram dākṣame vacaḥ yātyāyanam vaiṣṇavam ca rājasām svarga dāḥ śubhāḥ gautamam bārhaspatyam ca sāṃvartam ca yamam smṛtam sākhyam ca auśanasam ca iti tāmasāḥ niraya pradāḥ tāmasāḥ narakāya eva varjayet tān vicakṣaṇaḥ śeṣām ca prabhava avasthām hareḥ vakṣyāmi te śṛṇu iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe tāmasa śāstra kathanam nāma ṣaṭtriṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī rudraḥ uvāca hiraṇyaka hiraṇyākṣau kāśyapeyau mahā balau tasmin praviṣṭa yogi indrān sanaka ādīn mahā balau sanaka ādayaḥ ūcuḥ iti śāpam tayoḥ dattvā tatra tasthuḥ muni īśvarāḥ devaḥ tam artham jṣātvā acata an āhūyacatau api tau ca utthāya abravīt tatra bhagavant bhūtabhāvanaḥ uvāca ha tau mahā vīryau aparādham mahātmanām na atikramaṇīyam idam bhavadbhyām dvārapālakau iti uktau tau mahā vīryau abrūtām parameśvaram jaya vijayau ūcatuḥ cira kālam mahīm tu mānada tasmāt vaira āya janmāni vid hivām cavrajāvahe iti uktvā dvārapālau tau pūrvam jātau mahā balau hiraṇyakaśipuḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ kaniṣṭhakaḥ apramāṇa śarīraḥ sa hiraṇya akṣaḥ mahā uddhataḥ utpāṭya bāhu sāhasraiḥ pṛthivīm sa mahīdharām sa sāgarām dvīpa yutām sarva prāṇi samanvitām utpāṭya śirasā a kṛtvā praviveśa rasātalam tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve cukruśuḥ bhaya pīḍitāḥ prayayuḥ tatas tat adbhutam jṣātvā śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ vārāha rūpam āsthāya viśva rūpam janārdanaḥ bhujaḥ daityam jaghāna parameśvaraḥ cūrṇita mahā gātra umā māra ditija adhamaḥ patitām patitām dhara dṛṣṭvā adaḥ ṣṭrayā uddhṛtya pūrvavat saṃsthāpya dhārayāmāsa śeṣa īkūrma vapuḥ tadā tam dṛṣṭvā devatāḥ sarve kroḍa rūpam mahā harim ūcuḥ namaḥ sthiti svarūpāya sarva yajṣa svarūpiṇe yad yad as tad tvad kāla rūpiṇe aum kārāya namaḥ te yajurveda svarūpiṇe namaḥ te veda vedāṅga sāṅga upām gāya te namaḥ namaḥ te veda viduṣe viśiṣṭa eka svarūpiṇe mad bhū līlā adhipataye jagatpitre namaḥ namaḥ iti ādi stutibhiḥ stutvā devam vārāha rūpiṇam samarcyamānaḥ taiḥ devaiḥ teṣām iṣṭam varam dadau īpsitām labhate bhūmim ciram sasya phala anvitām etat te sarvam ākhyātam vārāha vaibhavam haraiḥ haṃ tathā vakṣye śṛṇu devi varānane iti śrī pādme mahā purāṇe paṣca paṣcāśat sāhasrāyām saṃhitāyām uttara khaṇḍe varāhāvatārakathanam nāma triṃśat adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhrātaram nihatam jṣātvā hiraṇyakaśipuḥ tatas tapaḥ tepe mahā daityaḥ meroḥ pārśve ca mām prati divya varṣa sahasrāṇi vāyu bhakṣaḥ mahā balaḥ śubhe tatas prahṛṣṭa manasā tam avocam mahā asuram tatas provāca daiteyaḥ mām prasannam śubha ānane uvāca deva asura manuṣyāṇām gandharva uraga rakṣasām paśu pakṣi mṛgāṇām ca siddhānām vai mahātmanām yakṣa vidyādharāṇām ca kinnarāṇām tathā eva ca sarveṣām eva rogāṇām āyudhānām tathā eva ca sarveṣām ṛṣi mukhyānām avadhya tvam prayaccha me sarvān ca yajṣa bhāgān ca svayam eva agrahīt balāt trātāram na adhigacchanti devatāḥ tena nirjitāḥ tasya iva kiṅkarāḥ sarve gandharvāḥ deva dānavāḥ yakṣāḥ ca nāgāḥ siddhāḥ ca sādhyāḥ ca vaśa vartinaḥ uttānapādasya sutām kalyāṇīm nāma kanyakām tasyām jātaḥ mahā tejāḥ prahlādaḥ daitya rāj śubhe sarva avasthāsu kṛtyeṣu manas vāc kāya karmabhiḥ na anyam jānāti deveśāt prasanna ātmā sanātanāt adhītya sarva vedān ca śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca tam pariṣvajya bāhubhyām tanayam śubha lakṣaṇam uvāca prahlāda cira kālam tvam guru gehe niveśitaḥ yat uktā guruṇā vidyā tat mama ācakṣva suvrata iti pṛṣṭaḥ sva pitrā vai prahlādaḥ janma vaiṣṇavaḥ prāha daitya īśvaram prītyā vacanam kaluṣa apaham uvāca yaḥ vai sarva upaniṣadām arthaḥ puruṣaḥ īśvaraḥ tam vai sarva gatam viṣṇum namaskṛtvā bravīmi te iti viṣṇu stutim śrutvā daitya rāj vismaya anvitaḥ uvāca tam gurum roṣāt kim tvayā uktam mama ātmaje kim artham uktavan jāḍyam akāryam brāhmaṇa ucitam aśrāvyam mada mitrasya stavam etam mama agratas bālena api kṛtam tu etat tvad prasādāt dvija adhama iti uktvā paritas vīkṣya daitya rāj krodha mūrcchitaḥ iti rāja vacaḥ śrutvā sa babandha bhṛgoḥ sutam badhyamānam gurum dṛṣṭvā prahlādaḥ brāhmaṇa priyaḥ uvāca pitaram tātaiḥ idam mama na uktavan bravītha mama agratas tam sarva rakṣakam devam tyaktvā sarva īśvaram harim katham pāṣaṇḍam āśritya pūjayāmi ca śaṃkaram indīvara dala śyāmam padma pattra āyata īkṣaṇam śrīvatsa lakṣita uraskam sarva
