samācaret prājṣaḥ gaṅgānārāyaṇam smaran evam snātvā tu gaṅgāyām gātram vastreṇa mārjayet paridheyām barām būni gaṅgā srotasi na tyajet tad danta dhāvanam kuryāt gaṅgāgarbhe vicakṣaṇaḥ puṇyam na gaṅgā snāna jam labhet yatra tām yatra tām rātri vāsam parityajya gaṅgāyām snānam ācaret bāhya bhūmim a gatvā ayaḥ gaṅgāyām snānam ācaret sthāne sthānena yet budhaḥ tatas sthira manāḥ kuryāt vidhinā a tarpaṇa adhikam tu pitaraḥ tasya tiṣṭhanti sam tuṣṭāḥ tridaśālayam samāpya snāna karmāṇi gaṅgāyām samupoṣitaḥ dānam deva arcanam ca eva jayaḥ anyāḥ cakriyāḥ tathā tāsām kṣayaḥ tāsām na vidyate samāpya snāna karmāṇi gaṅgāyām samupoṣitaḥ kṛta paṣca mahā yajṣaḥ gaṅgā pūjām samācaret gaṅgāyāḥ pratimām devyāḥ śrī viṣṇoḥ pratimām tathā jāhnavī pratimā abhāvāt nālikera udakān iva nikṣipet jāhnavī toye jāhnavīm hṛdisam smaran divyaiḥ gaṃ dhaiḥ ca dīpaiḥ ca ghṛta pūrṇa samujjvalaiḥ dhūpaiḥ su vāsitaiḥ ca eva nānā puṣpa manoharaiḥ pādya argha ācamanīyaiḥ ca tāmbūlaiḥ khādira anvitaiḥ stavaiḥ gaṅgām viṣṇum ca pūjayet tatas sampūjitām devīm viṣṇum ca parameśvaram kṛ bhokṣyāmi jahnutanaye śaraṇam mama bhava anaghe evam saṃ kalpya matimān karmaṇā a manasā a girā rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt jita nidraḥ ati harṣitaḥ phala āhāraḥ bhavet adhas prātar gaṅgām ca viṣṇum ca punar abhyarcya jaimine viprāya dakṣiṇām dadyāt vibhavasya anurūpatas tatas sa bandhubhiḥ sārdham pāraṇam svayam ācaret tīrtha upavāsam evam yaḥ kurute jāhnavī taṭe janma antara arjitaiḥ pāpaiḥ vimuktaḥ viṣṇu rūpadhṛk kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca tatas nārāyaṇa ādeśāt brahma lokam sa gacchati tāvatkālam brahma loke sthitvā brahma kṣayāt tatas avāpnoti anyaiḥ bahu bhāṣitaiḥ tāvatkālam śiva pure sthitvā vaipuṇyavān naraḥ tena puṇya ātmanā sārdham vaset eka āsane tatas tatra bhuktvā akhilān kāmān kalpa koṭi śata avadhi punar āgatya pṛthivīm cakravartī nṛpaḥ bhavet pālayitvā aciram pṛthvīm sukham mṛtyum avāpnuyāt bhūyas saḥ evam āruhya vimānam su mahā yaśāḥ paramam jñānam āsādya durlabham mokṣam āpnuyāt hnavī tīra yātrāyām daivāt yasya bhavet pathini mad tāsaḥ api param andhām agacchet na saṃśayaḥ satya dharmaḥ nāma rājā adhārmikaḥ ca priyam vadaḥ tretā dvāpara saṃdhau cababhūva kṣiti maṇḍale vijayā nāma mahiṣī tasya bhūmipateḥ abhūt sapta varṣa sahasrāṇi bhuktvā vasumatīm imām cit prāpta kālaḥ asau sa dāraḥ paṣcatām gataḥ tau dṛṣṭvā dharmarājaḥ api citraguptam uvāca ha mūlāt vicārayāmāsa prāha ceti kṛtāṣjaliḥ etayoḥ sakalam karma śṛṇu rājñ vadāmi aham śubham vā api aśubham karma yat etābhyām kṛtam bhuvi yat cit asya anayā upāyam vadāmi tat aham śṛṇu na ekaḥ adātṛ asitaḥ vyāghraiḥ kaścid ekaḥ mṛgaḥ prabho banāt jīvana rakṣā artham āgataḥ asi asabhām prati tam āyāntam samālokya bhūyas ayam prāpta kautukaḥ jaghāna ha mṛgam rāja aśaraṇa āgatam api amum tasmāt sa dāraḥ bhūpaḥ ayam daṇḍanīyaḥ tvayā prabho saṃśayaḥ śaraṇa āgata rakṣām yaḥ prāṇaiḥ apidhanaiḥ api kurute tasya puṇyam niśāmaya sa dāraḥ asau mahīpatiḥ asi tulyāni pattrāṇi yatas teṣām ca śākhinām asipattravanam prāhuḥ atas tat vaimanīṣiṇaḥ sa dāraḥ narakam bheje vyāghrabhakṣya āhvayam tatas bhavet ca bhakṣyaḥ vyāghreṇa vyāghra bhakṣyaḥ tatas smṛtaḥ yuga koṭi sahasrāṇi sthitvā tatra sa bhūpatiḥ sa dāraḥ ajani pāpām gataḥ kṣitau atha ekadā tena pathā puṇya aham prāpya mānavāḥ gacchanti jāhnavī tīram tām stau dadṛśatuḥ dvija mohāt yat sarvam pāpam karma kṛtam mayā adya api karmaṇā atena duḥkham āvām na amum ca ti tyaktvā śarīram gaṅgāyām muktāḥ syuḥ pāpinaḥ api ca kā ayuktiḥ brūhitām kām tetitīrṣuḥ duḥkha sāgaram marṣābhvī tad vacaḥ śrutvā prāha iti vinaya anvitā uvāca duḥkham na śakyate soḍhum svāmin etat radrutam kuru tatas patī viprasmṛtvā gaṅgām śubha pradām sahasā acakratuḥ yātrām maraṇāya upaharṣitau apaśyat pāpa kṛt kṣveḍaḥ kāla sarpa ubhayam karaḥ prāptakālau yuva antatas nūnam aham āsam purā rāja asatya dharma āhvayaḥ kṣitau iyam ca vijayā nāma mahiṣī sam sthitā amama mayā a durātmanā a mohāt nidṛtaḥ śaraṇam gataḥ tena eva karmaṇā abhuktam ciram duḥkham yama ālaye bhoktum sva karmaṇaḥ śeṣam bheka yonau striyā saha saḥ aham yātaḥ asmi pāpena kṛtam karma na amum satyam āvām jigāmiṣu uparaman dhāma pannaga tyaja aviveka tām sarpa naraka kleśa dāyinīm āvām sam sukham kiyat āvayoḥ hṛdaye viṣṇuḥ tava api hṛdaye hariḥ atas eva tvayā sārdham śatru tākā bhujam gama prāṇi hiṃsā na kartavyā kadāpi ca vicakṣaṇaiḥ āyuḥ putrāḥ ca dārāḥ ca sampadaḥ ca yaśām sica hiṃsā da tvā manuṣyāṇām haret duṣṭaḥ vidhiḥ svayam tapobhiḥ kim tapobhiḥ vā kim dānaiḥ kim ucā adhvaraiḥ hiṃ sa iti varṇa dvitayam yasya asti hṛdaye sadā yaḥ prāṇi him sakaḥ martyaḥ saḥ eva hari him sakaḥ sarva prāṇi śarīra sthaḥ bhagavant kamalāpatiḥ ātmānam bahudhā sṛṣṭvā bhagavant bhūtabhāvanaḥ saṃsāra kautuka āgāre krīḍet śiśuḥ iva svayam śarīriṇaḥ śarīram hi nilayaḥ paramātmanaḥ asvayam viṣṇuḥ atas hiṃsā vivarjayet para prāṇa vināśena ca ātma tuṣṭiḥ vidhīyate kṣayaḥ dhīmān na ātma parijñānam kadācid kurute na hi am haviṣṇuḥ asauviṣṇuḥ iti cetasi bhāvayet para duḥkhena yaḥ duḥkhī sukhīyaḥ ca para śriyā saṃsāre asmin savijṣeyaḥ sākṣāt eva hariḥ svayam dhik astu tat sukham nṝṇām mohavam cita cetasām sukhān iva api duḥkhān id iyam teyā nijam tave te bhuvi mānavāḥ yadā asyāt para hiṃsā yām nūnam menā atipātakam tadā akatham ahosṛṣṭā eva idhasā abhakṣya bhakṣakau kim tu sarva iṣu bhakṣya iṣu hiṃsā sambhāvyate na hi nārāyaṇaḥ viśva rūpaḥ satyam etat na saṃśayaḥ sṛjati svayam ātmānam ātmānam rakṣati svayam parasmān eva atti sṛṣṭiḥ evam vidhā hareḥ śaktaḥ aham kim vām haṃ tum vidhiḥ sampratipreṣayāmāsa kārye ismin mām svayam hariḥ sadā adya hanti hetum vidhāya mām uvāca gaṅgā gaṅgā iti jalpam taumahatyā a kṣudhayā a pathi yātrāyām pāde pādejanau imau aśvamedha ākhya yajṣānām prāptavam tau mahā phalam etayoḥ sadṛśaḥ na asti śatakratuḥ aham yatas nija adhikāreṇa eva anyam avalam daraḥ arghya hastaḥ pādacārī vṛtaḥ devaiḥ samāyayau atha rambhā urvaśī ca eva sundaryaḥ anyāḥ ca harṣitāḥ ayam puṇya ātmanām śreṣṭha urasa jṣaḥ atyanta sundaraḥ āyātaḥ amum kariṣyāmi sva vaśam sevitaiḥ svakaiḥ kācid kām cit vadati etat jānāmi sakalām kalām atas tā aham asya bhūpateḥ kācid kām cit iti brūyāt te śakraḥ pivaśaḥ mama kim atra citram vaśagaḥ bhūpālaḥ ayam bhaviṣyati bhartā mama ayam capatiḥ mama ayam svāmī mama ayam mama anāthaḥ eṣaḥ uccāvacam vipraniśamyata āsām jagāda kācid guṇinī rasajṣā saudāsyakām tām nṛpatiḥ svayam yām bhajati ayam kim kalahena nāryaḥ mājagmuḥ hṛdaya utsāhaiḥ sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitāḥ nṛpati śreṣṭha sa dāram gata kalmaṣam pādya ādyaiḥ pūjayāmāsuḥ prāha iti capuram daraḥ bherī mṛdam gama dhurīḍim ḍimānaka niḥsvanaiḥ karakam kaṇa nādaiḥ cakara tāla svanaiḥ tathā jaya śabdaiḥ ca devānām nākaḥ śabda mayaḥ abhavat deva aṅganā cāru hasta śveta cāmara mārutaiḥ bījitaḥ sa ratha ārūḍhaḥ sa dāraḥ tridivam yayau dattavan nija āsana ardham śubhaḥ uvaikṣa yaśaḥ kayā ratham āruhya vaikuṃ yayau bhagavat ājṣayā paramam jñānam āsādya asat āraḥ mokṣam āptavan māhnavī tīra yātrāyām śarīram tyajataḥ pathini gaṅgāyām snānam ācaret tadā tadā akṣayam puṇyam tadā tadā akṣayam puṇyam gaṅgā sarvāṇi pāpāni nāśayanti iti niścayaḥ punar punar pāpam na ca gaṅgā punāti tam pāpa buddhim parityajya gaṅgāyām lokamātri yat puṇya gaṅgā snānāt tu mānavānām bhavet dvija āsārāṇām bhūmireṇoḥ sam khyām kartum tu śakyate bhāgīrathī guṇāḥ tena śakyāḥ vaktu na ca dvijaiḥ vicārya sarva śāstrāṇi tvadīyāni mayā ucyate gaṅgā ābhasi sakṛt snātvā mokṣam āpnoti mānavaḥ snānam kūpa jale api yaḥ tu kurute gaṅgām vicintya prabhum devānām sakala ārta śoka durita trāsa ogha gaṅgā gaṅgā prasādāt dvijaiḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre gaṅgāmāhātmyena vamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ māhātmyam etat gāṅgāyāḥ tvad prasādāt śrutam mayā uvāca śṛṇu lakṣmī pateḥ vatsa saparyā phalam uttamam yat śrutvā mānavāḥ sarve labham te jñānam uttamam vipra dvādaśa māseṣu māgha ādiṣu sanātanaḥ pūjitavyaḥ vidhānaiḥ yaiḥ śṛṇu tān nivadāmi aham māghe māsi samāyāte sarva māsa uttame śubhe miṣam maithunam ca eva tyājayet vaiṣṇava uttamaḥ prātar śuklām bara dharaḥ kṛta paṣca mahā adhvaraḥ saparyām ārabhet viṣṇoḥ sthira cittaḥ hi mānavaḥ mad ati ślathaiḥ ca danaiḥ ca viṣṇoḥ aṅgāni lepayet prakṣālitāni pātrāṇi jala hīnāni kārayet snāpayitvā jagannātham īṣat uṣṇena vāriṇā salilaiḥ īṣat uṣṇaiḥ ca prasnāpayati keśavam sarvam śeṣeya ati hareḥ gṛham yatnāt prakṣālya pātrāṇi kṛtvā śuddhāni vāribhiḥ yaḥ pūjayet jagannātham tasya puṇyam niśāmaya te yuga sahasrāṇi tiṣṭhet keśava mandiram prabhāte viśva saṃdhyāyām puratas cakrapāṇeḥ tam sthāpayet vahnim niḥ dhūmam vaiṣṇavojanaḥ tasya tasya vāraṇa arthāya sāyam prātar ca vaiṣṇavaḥ māghe viṣṇu agratas vahnim jvālayet tad phalam śṛṇu yathā eva ātmā tathā viṣṇuḥ samdehaḥ na atra vidyate tam devadeveśam tam kopari keśavam ātmanaḥ kurute martyaḥ yathā śīta nivāraṇam yaḥ tu māgha imāsi janārdanam tasmai deva uttamaḥ viṣṇuḥ sam tuṣṭaḥ na dadāti kim tathā śīta kṣayam kuryāt divya vastreṇa cakriṇaḥ uddhṛtya koṭi puruṣān sa yāti cakriṇaḥ padam paṣcamyām dvija sattama ekādaśyām ca paṣcamyām hari pūjā viśeṣāt tasya puṇya phalam vacmi śṛṇu vaiṣṇava jaimine teviṣṇu puram gatvā a manu antar a catuṣṭayam bhuṃ kte manoramān bhogān prasādāt cakrapāṇeḥ punar āgatya dharaṇīm cakravartī nṛpaḥ bhavet bhum su ciram mṛta uyāti hareḥ gṛham paṣcamyām vā api saptamyām ekādaśyām ca jaimine aśaktaḥ vaiṣṇavaḥ dadyāt paramānnam murāraye sarvam murāraye eka aham api yaḥ māghe viṣṇave daitya jiṣṇave sa pūpam pāyasam dadyāt na tasya durlabhaḥ hariḥ tat akṣayam bhavet puṃsaḥ saḥ kaḥ api na asti atra saṃśayaḥ māghe māsi kṛtam karma śubham vā aśubham eva vā yāvanti te cakrapāṇaye tāvat yuga sahasrāṇi sthīyate viṣṇu mandiram māghe māsi viśeṣeṇa pavitram keśava priyam phalam phalam pakapuṣpasya bravīmi aham viśeṣataḥ ākarṇayat vija śreṣṭha sa itihāsam anuttamam suvarṇaḥ nāma bhūpālaḥ balavān sarva śāstra vid māryā āvarteṣu sarveṣu babhūva vipra varcasā rāja śriyā vidyā yāca vayasācasa bhūpatiḥ pākhaṇḍa mantriṇām vākyaiḥ vinā doṣaiḥ api dvija tena rājñ sādaṇḍyam te sādhavaḥ janāḥ anyāya upārjitam vittam gīta vādya ādibhiḥ vṛtaḥ samastam nāśayāmāsa yajṣa dāna vivarjitaḥ tuṣṭim sarvadā apāpam ohitaḥ na cakāra atitheḥ pūjām sadā apāpa parāyaṇaḥ hayauca mandirāt nityam sa bhūpaḥ pāpam diraḥ kṛtāni tena pāpāni yāni anya anya vivekinām api varṣa śataiḥ śaktaḥ sam khyātum eka dāsa mahīpālaḥ kāmena parimohitaḥ ma gāma veśyā nilayam niśīthe durita āśayaḥ tam āyāntam tatas dṛṣṭvā bhūpālam ujjvala āhvayā prakṣālya tad pāda yugam bhṛṃ gārā salilaiḥ ca sā mam ceniveśayāmāsa dorbhyām āliṅgyatam nṛpam tad prema amṛta dhārābhiḥ siktaḥ asau pṛthivīpatiḥ tatas sā gaṇikā prītyā hasantī nava yauvanā puṣpa mālā puṣpam ekam tasmāt bhūpati hastāt papāta dharaṇī pṛṣṭhe gandha vyāpta digantaram tat cyutam kusuman dṛṣṭvā āsa rājā atyanta sambhramāt namaḥ nārāyaṇāya iti jagāda oṃkāra pūrvakam nārāyaṇāya iti vākyāt sarvāṇi pātakāni ca svarṇa puṣpa pradānena tasya naṣṭāni bhūbhujaḥ grāmīṇāḥ atha sarve api samāgatya ati durjaye tasyām eva niśāyān tam jaghnuḥ veśyā gṛhe sthitam netum tam atha bhūpālam sarva pātakinām varam kim karān preṣayāmāsa kruddhaḥ vaivasvataḥ bhṛśam tena ājṣaptāḥ tatas dūtāḥ pāśa mudgara pāṇayaḥ ativegāt samāyātāḥ krodhasam rakta locanāḥ udyamam cakrire netum yamadūtāḥ svam ālayam tatas nārāyaṇa preṣyāḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharāḥ māyāta agaruḍa ārūḍhāḥ tam netum pṛthivīpatim tritam bhūpam viṣṇukim karāḥ jaghnuḥ cakraiḥ gadābhiḥ ca yama dūtān mahā balāḥ tathā rājā ratha ārūḍhaḥ tulasī mālya bhūṣitaḥ pīta kauśeya vāsāḥ ca svarṇa alam kāra bhūṣitaḥ veda vedāṅga pāragaiḥ viṣṇu dūtaiḥ parivṛtaḥ hareḥ sālokyam āyayau atha utthāya svayam viṣṇuḥ caturbhiḥ dīrgha bāhubhiḥ tam ālim gitavan bhūpam proktavan śca dvijottamaiḥ uvāca nṛpate kuśalam brūhi sarva puṇya ātmanām vara nityam tasya anupālyaḥ aham samebhrātā samepitā mad iti mad nāma kadācid yaḥ smerat naraḥ prakāśaya adbhutam tātakim rājā uvāca sarvam eva dayā sindho tvayā adattam na saṃśayaḥ pāpinā api mayā a prāptam tava sthānam su durlabham snehāt niveśayāmāsa bhūpālam tat niśāmaya tatas suvarṇa alam kāraiḥ viśvakarma vinirmitaiḥ cakāra maṇḍalam tasya svayam eva dayā mayā toṣitaḥ sa mahīpālaḥ viṣṇunā ati sahiṣṇunā evam pratidinam tasthau sa rājā viṣṇu mandiram prajānām pālanam cakre sa rāja adharma tad paraḥ pūjayāmāsa satatam bhaktyā aparamayā hariḥ maraṇam jāhnavī jale samāsādya yayau mokṣam prasādāt cakrapāṇeḥ uvāca janāḥ paka puṣpeṇa pūjitaḥ bhagavant hariḥ te api yānti param dhāma vimuktāḥ sarva pātakaiḥ jagāma amokṣam kṛpayā murāreḥ viśva arṇavam nimnam imam vitīrya divyaiḥ sugandhaiḥ kanaka prasūnaiḥ nārāyaṇam padma dala āyata akṣam iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca tam aham vacmi vipra ṛṣe śṛṇu vatsaiḥ samāhitaḥ bhasām bahis deśam vrajet prājṣaḥ śīrṣam ācchādya vāsasā tatra udañci diśi maunī yajṣasūtrāṇi karṇayoḥ kṛtvā upaviṣṭaḥ prājṣaḥ tumala mūtram visarjayet devatāyatane mārge goṣṭheṣu ca tvareṣu ca rathyāyām kṛṣṭa bhūmau ca darbha mūle tathā aṅgaṇe taṭinī puline caitya vṛkṣa mūle tathā vane taḍāga vāpī garbheṣu mala mūtram ca na tyajet ravim candramasam ca eva dvijān gāḥ ca diśaḥ daśa mala mūtram tyajet yāvat tāvat prājṣaḥ na paśyati mūṣika ādyaiḥ ca bila abhyantar avartinīm mṛdam ca eva na gṛhṇīyāt śauca hetave yat jalāt jalam samānīya śaucam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ pādam kurute budhaḥ dakṣiṇa abhimukhaḥ rātrau kruryāt prājṣaḥ bahis kriyām śiraḥ prāvṛtya vastreṇa tatas śaucam samācaret pādayoḥ kṛta śauca kriyaḥ prājṣaḥ tasya dhāvanam ca eva daśana ācchādana ādibhiḥ dakṣiṇa abhimukhaḥ bhūtvā paścima abhimukhaḥ tathā madhyamā anāmikābhyām ca vṛddhām guṣṭhena ca dvijaiḥ tasya dhāvanam kuryāt na tarjanyā kadācana aśvattha vaṭa vṛkṣāṇām dhātryā kaithikayā budhaḥ nirāśāḥ pitaraḥ yānti tasya devāḥ sura ṛṣayaḥ tasya dhāvanam kuryāt yaḥ madhyāhna aparāhṇayoḥ tasya pūjām na gṛhṇanti devatāḥ pitaraḥ jalam snāna kāle puṣkariṇyām yaḥ kuryāt danta dhāvanam tatas jṣeyaḥ sacā ḍālaḥ yāvat gaṅgām na paśyati tat dam pitaraḥ bhuktvā gacchanti duḥkhinaḥ tān vāsasārasanām tathā anena vidhinā a kṛtvā dīrghadarśī bahis kriyām tatas devagṛha dvāre ca upaviṣṭaḥ budhaḥ śuciḥ smaret nārāyaṇam tam parameśvaram rāma śyāma tano viṣṇo nārāyaṇa dayā maya pītām bhava hanumant kamala īkṣaṇa deva indra vāsudeva kṛpām kuru śam khapāṇi cakrapāṇi padmahasta hara āpadaḥ lakṣmīvilāsa vaikuṃṭha hṛṣīkeśa surottamaiḥ hara param brahma param dhāma śaraṇam mebhava avyayaiḥ ittham kṛtvā dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ śrī viṣṇu smaraṇam budhaḥ maddhām jaliḥ iti brūte praviśya nilayam gataḥ prabho nidrām tyaktvā salakṣmīkam cintayet nija cetasā tatas kṛtacchadam divyam pātram ca jala pūritam mukha prakṣālana arthāya dadyāt kṛṣṇāya vaiṣṇavaḥ īśvaram vartana arthāya sevate sevakāḥ yathā yathā īśvarasya sa bhayāḥ sevām kurvanti ceṭakāḥ nija icchayā anayā viṣṇum nirbhayaḥ pūjayet naraḥ atas eva dvija śreṣṭha tvarayā a kamalāpateḥ kartavya a sarva da sevā pum sā akaivalyam icchunā nirmālyam rātri vastram cagaṃ dhaṃ paryuṣitam tathā hareḥ uttāraya idam gāt prabhātā iva aiṣṇavaḥ janaḥ sam kuryāt śanais śanais prājṣaḥ sam mārjanyā a pariiṣkrayām tāvat manvantar sthet viṣṇu gṛhenaraḥ tat param dhāma kim anyaiḥ bahu bhāṣitaiḥ tasmin smaret nārāyaṇam prabhum tasya puṇyam aham vacmi sam kṣepāt śṛṇu jaimine tāvat kalpa sahasrāṇi tiṣṭhet viṣṇu gṛhe sukhī sam mārjanam kṛtvā upalepanam tadā viṣṇu gṛhe ca api dharmapatnīm niyojayet bhrātaram bhaginīm vā api devāgāre niyojayet hareḥ saparyā vastūni saptadhā śuddha vāribhiḥ prakṣālayet tridhā avāpi svayam eva atiyatnāt amlena tāmra pātrāṇikām sya pātrāṇi bhasmanā vahninā loha pātrāṇi śudhyanti na atra saṃśayaḥ dhana āḍhyaḥ loha pātra sthaiḥ yaḥ snāpayati vāribhiḥ nārāyaṇam jagannātham tasya tuṣṭā ūna keśavaḥ ajṣānāt vā api ced tarhi gaṅgā snānena śuddhi ati sampadi brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha kartavyaḥ niyamaḥ sadā vipattau niyamaḥ nāstiśāstreṣu iti viniścayaḥ yatnāt prakṣālitaḥ śaṅkhaḥ yadā bhūmim spṛśet punar ittham prakṣālya yatnena pūjā dravyāṇi cakriṇaḥ gṛhītvā snāna vastūni snāna artham sarasīm vrajet a kṛtvā snāna karmāṇi gṛham āyāti yaḥ punar yaḥ tu nārakībhavet snāna artham sarasīm gatvā amala mūtram karoti yaḥ tatas kṛtvā vidhānena snānam ca tarpaṇa ādikam svakīyam gṛham āgacchet smaret nārāyaṇam budhaḥ tatas caprām gaṇevipra prakṣālya caraṇa dvayam praviśet devatāgāram śuciḥ brāhmaṇa sattamaḥ a prakṣālita pāda uyaḥ praviśet nilayam janaḥ sam vatsara kṛtam puṇyam tasya naśyati tad kṣaṇāt snānam kṛtvā samāgatya prām gaṇeṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ tasmāt prakṣālya caraṇau praviśet devatāgṛham upaviśya pāda yugmam budhaḥ savyena pāṇinā yatnāt prakṣālayet vipraiḥ tathā pāṇi dvayam punar pādena pādam vipra indraiḥ tathā dakṣiṇa pāṇinā yaḥ ca prakṣālayet mūḍhaḥ tam lakṣmīḥ tyajati dhruvam atha upaviṣṭaḥ matimān keśava arcanam ārabhet mṛga carma āsane śuddha vyāghra carma āsane api vā puṣpa āsane ica upaviṣṭaḥ pūjayet kamalāpatim pāṣṭha āsane dvijaḥ vidvāḥ na kuryāt viṣṇu pūjanam hi tvat dhṛta apṛithva sarve lokāḥ tvayā ādhṛtāḥ iti uktvā āsanam āstīrya vaset nārāyaṇa arcakaḥ kuryāt viṣṇu pūjanam mantra pūtam su vāsitam snāpayet kamalā kāntam kamalā sahitam prabhum hṛṣīkeśam pūjayet mānavaiḥ udvijaiḥ labhate tat tat eva āśu prasādāt kamalāpateḥ mad kha ābhā vetu vipra indra su gam dhi toyakam budhaḥ pātre snāpayet keśavam budhaḥ tatas devam snāpayitvā āsam sthāpya ca varāsane tulasī kāṣṭhapam keca cakriṇaḥ dehapālanam alam kṛtaḥ mahā viṣṇuḥ prasannaḥ na dadāti kim tad yāmyām ṛtyām madhusūdanaḥ mān ūrdhvam ca śrī dharaḥ prabhuḥ mūrtiḥ kṛpā mayaḥ ye vighna kārakāḥ sarve pūjā kāle bhavanti ha dūram gaccham tu te sarve hari nāma astra tāḍitāḥ ittham digbandhanam kṛtvā tatas prahvaḥ kṛtām jaliḥ kurute mayā ārabdhām imām pūjām devadeva janārdanaiḥ tiṃ ddhiṃ prāpaya nirvighnām prasīda parameśvaraiḥ pa nyāsa ādikam kṛtvā adhyāyet nārayaṇam hṛdā navīna megha sam kāśam pum ḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇam pītām bara dharam devam smita cārutara ānanam bhujam barhis baśreṇi baddha śikhaṇḍa dhṛta kuṇḍalam tam diśaḥ daśa āvṛtam gopa nārībhiḥ cāruvṛtam dāvanesthitam evam sam cintya deva īśam govindam sarva kāma dam tatas ca āvāhanam kuryāt bhakti bhāvena vaiṣṇavaḥ mad bhagavant sarva pradāyine pādya arghya ācamanīyāni tatra dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ pūjayet sarva deveśam śrī kṛṣṇam devakī sutam namaḥ matsyāya kūrmāya varāhāya namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ rāmāya rāmāya rāmāya baline namaḥ namaḥ buddhāya śuddhāya sa kṛpāya namaḥ namaḥ nārāyaṇāya kṛṣṇāya govindāya ca śārṅgiṇe dāmodarāya devāya deva devāya te namaḥ hṛṣīkeśāya śāntāya vyomapādāya vai namaḥ mādhavāya sureśāya viṣṇave paramātmane aum namaḥ garuḍāya iti mantreṇa eva vicakṣaṇaḥ namaḥ śaṅkhāya cakrāya gadāyai ca namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ padmāya khaḍgāya nandakāya namaḥ namaḥ iti sampūjya deveśam sa dāram ca sa vāhanam sa āyudham ca tatas mantram japet aṣṭa akṣaram budhaḥ nija bhaktyā tatas japtvā mantram aṣṭa akṣaram budhaḥ dhūpam dīpam ca tāmbūlam devadevāya viṣṇave anyāni api upahārāṇi pradadyāt vaiṣṇavaḥ janaḥ yaḥ tu dhūpam dvija śreṣṭha danāgaru vāsitam saḥ gacchet viṣṇu bhavanam vimuktaḥ pāpa koṭibhiḥ dadyāt guggulu vāsitam ghṛtena dīpam yaḥ dadyāt tila tailena vā punar nimeṣāt sakalam tasya pāpam harati keśavaḥ yaḥ tu tāmbūlam cakrapāṇaye iha bhuktvā akhilān bhogān padam tathā jāti phala ādibhiḥ harayet atvā svargam āpnoti mānavaḥ maṅkhe kṛtvā ātu pānīyam kuryāt viṣṇu pradakṣiṇām vakṣyamāṇena mantreṇa jaiminā ivaiṣṇavaḥ janaḥ mantreṇa anena yaḥ kuryāt nārāyaṇa prakṣiṇām tasya puṇya phalam vacmi sam kṣepāt śṛṇu jaimine brahmahatyā ādi pāpa aniyāniyāni mahān ti ca tāni tāni praṇaśyanti pradakṣiṇa pade pade yāvat pādam naraḥ bhaktyā āgacchet viṣṇu pradakṣiṇe tāvat kalpa sahasrāṇi viṣṇunā asaha modate hari pradakṣiṇā yāvat padam gacchet śanais śanais pradakṣiṇīkṛtya sarvam saṃsāre yat phalam bhavet harim pradakṣiṇīkṛtya tasmāt koṭi guṇam phalam pradakṣiṇīkṛtya yaḥ tu nārāyaṇa agratas nalam ghayet somasūtram pradakṣiṇa ākāra tayā āvāra ekam yaḥ harim vrajet yaḥ tu vāra dvayam viprakuryāt viṣṇu pradakṣiṇām padam avāpnoti tri dinena atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ tu kuryāt vāra dvayam janaḥ praviśet bhrāmayet sa udakam śaṅkham keśava upari jaimine pātakam tad śarīra stham bhasmībhavati tad kṣaṇāt śirasyam jalim ādhāya praṇamet yojanārdanam bhūmau nipātya sarvām gaṃ harim praṇamatām nṝṇām prabhāvam yāvat bhū reṇubhiḥ nṛṇām bhūṣitam syāt kalevaram tatas keśava nirmālyam vaiṣṇavebhyaḥ pradīyate vaiṣṇavān tān pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu sattama jaimine śukaḥ sūtaḥ tathā vyāsaḥ nāradaḥ kapilaḥ muniḥ tathā krūra uddhavau api tathā eva anye api vaiṣṇavāḥ nirmālyam vāsudevasya gṛhṇam tu sarva kāma dam nikṣipet bhuvi vaiṣṇavaḥ tatas tu hari nirmālyam svayam gṛhṇāti bhaktyāḥ sa vijṣeya udvija śreṣṭha sākṣāt eva hariḥ svayam durlabham viṣṇu naivedyam nirmālyam pāpa nāśanam sarve tulasī chadana ghrāṇam āghrāyayaḥ abhinam dati kṛtām jaliḥ tatas mantram udīrayet yā iyam sva śaktyā deva indra tava pūjā kṛta āmayā tatas pāda udakam prājṣaḥ mahāviṣṇoḥ parātmanaḥ samasta pātaka dhvaṃsi gṛhṇīyāt bhakti bhāvāt kaṇa mātram vahet yaḥ tu viṣṇoḥ pāda udakam śubham spṛśet pāda udakam viṣṇoḥ gaṅgā snāna phalam bhavet akāla maraṇam nāsti nāsti vyādhi bhayam tathā yaḥ spṛśet pāda salilam keśavasya amahātmanaḥ pāpa vyādhi vināśa artham viṣṇu pāda udaka auṣadham tat śarīra stham kṣaṇāt eva tu naśyati tathā eva pātakam sarvam viṣṇu pāda udakena ca yutam brahmahatyā ādibhiḥ pāpaiḥ vimuktaḥ viṣṇu rūpadhṛk teviṣṇu puram gatvā viṣṇu nāsaha mudate spṛṣṭvā tat bhavet adhikam phalam aśva koṭi pradānena tat phalam prāpya tejanaiḥ sapta dvīpām mahīm da tvā dvijebhyaḥ yat phalam labhet tad phalam labhate martyaḥ viṣṇu pāda udakam spṛśan spṛṣṭvā tat bhavet adhikam phalam dīrghikā śata dānena yat puṇyam parikīrtitam tasmāt api adhikam puṇyam labhet pāda udakam spṛśan bhavati bhū naivedya śeṣam yaḥ sarva pāpa vināśanam bhum jataḥ hari naivedyam dāsī iva vaśagā bhavet acireṇa eva tam viṣṇuḥ nayati sva antanum prati na eva id yasya mahā viṣṇoḥ guṇam kim kathayāmi aham vidhi hīnām api śreṣṭhām pūjām śrī kamalāpateḥ pūjitaḥ api na tuṣṭaḥ syāt yadi bhaktiḥ na tiṣṭhati tāvat deva phala avāptiḥ tasya na asti atra saṃśayaḥ abhaktyāya a hareḥ pūjā kriyate bhuvi mānavaiḥ sa āpūjā brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha pūjā kāle bhavet kila jñāna mūlam hareḥ bhaktiḥ bhakti mūlam jagatpateḥ pūjā mokṣa druma utpattau mūlam ārādhanam hareḥ tat akṣayam bhavet sarvam śraddhā yukta akhila akriyā bhaktyā ayaḥ pūjayet viṣṇum vāri mātram api dvija saṃsthānam labhate viṣṇoḥ yatas bhakta vaśaḥ hariḥ sāram hareḥ pūjanam eva vipra tasmāt manuṣyaḥ nija maṅgala eṣī bhaktyā yajet kṛṣṇam ananta mūrtim iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre hari pūjā vidhiḥ nāma ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca phālgune brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha śrī kṛṣṇam sura vanditam phalam tasya pravakṣyāmi iyataḥ samyak niśāmaya sthānam sarva pāpa vivarjitaḥ yuga koṭi sahasrāṇi bhuktvā ābhogam hareḥ gṛhe yaḥ tu yacchati kṛṣṇāya śiśirega upamūrtaye yaḥ dugdha laḍḍukān dadyāt keśavāya mahātmane nirmalām śarkarā yacchet yaḥ tu kṛṣṇāya bhaktimān yaḥ tu yacchati kṛṣṇāya phalam tasya niśāmaya te hareḥ gṛham yā ati ratham āruhya śobhanam ajṣānāt brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha dadyāt ced nārakībhavet harayet āḍima phalam tatra yāvanti dāḍima phale tāvat manvantar viṣṇoḥ gṛhe tiṣṭhati bhāgyavān phālgune māsi yaḥ dadyāt haraye guḍa piṣṭakam ha vājimedha sahasra kṛt madhunā āsnāpayet yaḥ tu nārāyaṇam anāmayam caitrake jagantām īśam kṛṣṇanti lakapuṣpakaiḥ haiḥ jula puṣpeṇa sarva deva śiromaṇim bhiḥ su gam dhībhiḥ vasam te yaḥ tu pūjayet tam vandate samutthāya svayam ca acireṇa eva labhate sakalam vām chitam janaḥ śāṃ ḍilyā khaṇḍa pattraiḥ ca dhattūraiḥ ca arka puṣpakaiḥ yaḥ arcayet viṣṇum īśam ca sa saṃsāra abdhi pāragaḥ śakra ādyāḥ tridaśāḥ sarve vandam aharniśam yaḥ dadyāt caitraka imāsi bhaktyā gopāla rūpiṇe parityajet prāptaḥ samācaret snānam mādhava imāsi vaiṣṇavaḥ prabhāte pūjayet viṣṇum pūrva ukta vidhinā a dvija vaiśākhe snāpayet viṣṇum puṣpa vāsita vāriṇā mad as as as as as as as as as dadāti viprarṣe prasannaḥ parameśvaraḥ tasya khyātum kaḥ samarthaḥ astipam ḍitaḥ tuṣṭaye eka aham api yaḥ pūjām vaiśākhe kurute hareḥ paṣ varṣam harim pūjitvā yat phalam labhate sa tat viṣṇum aśvattha rūpiṇam kuryāt saḥ api yāti param sthānam vimuktaḥ koṭi pātakaiḥ aśvattha mūlam viprarṣe yaḥ ubadhnāti śilā ādibhiḥ saḥ apiyāti param sthānam āyus bṛddhiḥ na saṃśayaḥ tatra tīrthāni sarvāṇi tristrota ādīni jaimine yatra aśvattha taruḥ tiṣṭhet ekaḥ upi śākhinām varaḥ aśvattham pūjayet yaḥ tu saḥ eva viṣṇu pūjakaḥ avajṣānāt dvija śreṣṭha yaḥ aśvattham hanti mūḍha dhīḥ hari mūrtiḥ prakīrtitaḥ tasmāt tṝṇām trātākaḥ apina vidyate aśvattham paśyataḥ vipraspṛśataḥ paratas tathā yaḥ tasya jihvām churikayā asvayam tati preta rāj aśvattha śākhām ekām yaḥ su alpām apinihanti vai tad koṭi brahmahatyānām phalam āpnoti mānavaḥ yat pāpam brahmahatyāyām guru strī gamanena ca surā pāne tathā steye nyāsa apaharaṇe api ca yat pāpam bhrūṇahatyāyām go hatyāyām dvijottamaiḥ strī hatyāyām ca yat pāpam para strī gamane tathā śaraṇa āgata hatyāyām hatyāyām suhṛdaḥ tathā yat pāpam dāyām harivāsara bhojane tat pāpam prāpya tejanaiḥ tad tulyaḥ pātakīkaḥ api na śrutaḥ kṣitimam vadāmi aśvattha māhātmyam sarva pāpa vināśanam sa itihāsam dvija śreṣṭha śṛṇu vatsa samāhitaḥ mā āsīt tretā yuge vipra sarva prāṇi hiterataḥ jṣāti pūjā rataḥ nityam dīpa dāneḥ atas sadā mumukṣuḥ sa dvija śreṣṭha sarvadā parameśvaram pūjayāmāsa parayā abhaktyā nārāyaṇam prabhum tasya bhaktim tatas jṣātvā mahatīm su dṛḍhām prabhuḥ tathā api sa dvija śreṣṭhaḥ keśavasya mahātmanaḥ pūjām anudine cakre bhaktyā paramayā a sudhīḥ duḥkhena upārjitam vittam vinaṣṭam sakalam dvijaiḥ dṛṣṭvā api tena vipreṇa duḥkhena acintya cetasā mahāviṣṇu saparyāyām dṛḍham baddhvā manaḥ nijam bhūyas api tasya viprasya bhaktim jṣātvā janārdanaḥ cakāra bandhu vicchedam su dṛḍhaḥ śama daḥ tatas bāndhavāḥ tasya viprasya viṣṇu māyā vimohitāḥ pūjayāmāsa satatam prītaḥ pracura bhaktyāḥ bhūyas eva mahā viṣṇuḥ kautukī tasya jaimine tathā api sa dvija śreṣṭhaḥ keśavam kleśa nāśanam pūrva dviguṇayā abhaktyā anityam viṣṇum apūjayat tasya patnī tatas vipra duḥkha śoka ati duḥkhitā pitṛ geham gatā a viṣṇoḥ māyayā a parimohitā atha ekākī sa bhūdevaḥ viṣṇu bhakti parāyaṇaḥ eka dāsa dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ viṣṇu bhaktimatām varaḥ hepa raśum ādāya kāṣṭha artham vipine yayau vanāt kāṣṭham samādāya nityam eva ca sa dvijaḥ hima āgame vastra hīnaḥ kurute śīta vāraṇam hana prām gaṇasthasya śākhām aśvattha śākhinaḥ atra antare mahā viṣṇuḥ tasmāt aśvattha pādapāt niścakrāma sura śreṣṭhaḥ yathā vyathita mānasaḥ dadarśa viṣṇum puratas sa vipraḥ caturbhujam padma dala āyata akṣam baram kuḍalinam su keśam dadhānam abja ādi nija āyudhāni vibhāvasum ca eva sukham pareśam samdṛśyate deva gaṇaiḥ adṛśyam harṣa aśru dhārāḥ rucira akṣi yugmaḥ tuṣṭāva vipraḥ mṛdulaiḥ vacobhiḥ uvāca lakṣmī pate keśava keśi śatro nārāyaṇa ananta vibho prasīda tava avatāram kim aham bravīmi tvayā vinā na asti bhuvi iha kaḥ api kim vā guṇa vyāpta samasta lokam kim vā dayām mitra para eka tulyām tat tvā asvīyām kasyacid īśa viṣṇu bhaktim harasi acyuta dehasam sthām śriyam samādāya mudam pradāsye bhaktiḥ pradattā mahataḥ su dhanyā manye mahātmānam anam śreṣṭham iva aniśam yat yadi api aham duḥkhavatām variṣṭhaḥ umanye tathā pi indram iva adya viṣṇo mānam ātmā jagantām bhavantam sākṣāt samīkṣa iyatas īkṣaṇābhyām tathā api ca agre imam amūrtimān stvat dṛṣṭaḥ asim ekeśavaḥ eka pūjyaḥ tvad darśanām bho maya vṛṣṭi siktaḥ prabho adya kaivalya phalam dadhāra mūrdhā madīyaḥ akhila loka mūrdhanām śreṣṭhaḥ bhavet keśava viśvamūrteḥ uvāca ittham stutvā jagannātham nārāyaṇam anāmayam kṛtām jaliḥ punar prāha bhaktyā ātam iti sa dvijaḥ uvāca kaśā praharaṇaiḥ etat gātram te rudhira ukṣitam sarveṣām eva daityānām śāḥ tvayā āhatāḥ tvām haṃ tum kaḥ kṣamaḥ pṛthvyām prabho adbhutam idam mahat uvāca haṃ tum kaḥ api na kṣamaḥ aśvattha mūtiḥ eva aham kuṭhāreṇa hataḥ tvayā uvāca nininda svayam ātmānam ātmanā bahudhā dvijaḥ trailokya adhipateḥ yathā m sarva pāpa haraḥ viṣṇuḥ samayā avyādhitaḥ kṛtaḥ etat pāpam mayā apāram kartum na ekena śakyate yasmin tuṣṭe pāpinaḥ apibhavanti sura vanditāḥ prasādayanti yam deva abrahma ādyāḥ atibhaktyāḥ yathā kim tapobhiḥ japaiḥ kim vā a kim gṛhaiḥ jīvanaiḥ came dharma artha kāma mokṣāṇām dātā ekaḥ ayam yathā turaḥ iti uktvā asat dvija śreṣṭha tam eva paraśum nije dātum kam ṭhemanaḥ cakre viṣṇu prīṇana hetave tasya bhaktim dṛḍhām jṣātvā adayāluḥ kamalāpatiḥ uvāca mahatyā kṛtām puṃs tuṣṭaḥ asmi na kadāpi aham te bhaktyā ati tuṣṭaḥ asmi bhītim mā kurusattama uvāca mā mā ātiṣṭhatu śarīreta iyācevaram imam prabho uvāca ajṣānāt bhavatā avat sa karma idam vihitam dvija nityam te anupālyaḥ asmi bhakta śreṣṭhaḥ yatas bhavān bhītim vaṃ ravṛṇu mama agratas uvāca tiṣṭhatām su dṛḍhā abhaktiḥ hare kim aparaiḥ varaiḥ uvāca śrutvā avākyam idam tasya keśava praṇaya uditam nija kaṇṭha sthitām mālām prītaḥ tasmai dadau tatas uvāca aśvattha rūpam mām nityam kriyā yogena sattama samārādhaya sarvam te sādhayiṣyāmi chitam iti uktvā tam dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ bhūyas api āliṅgya keśavaḥ abhavat saha sādṛśyaḥ tatra iva karuṇā ālayaḥ viṣṇoḥ kaṇṭha srajam prāpya sa vipraḥ vaiṣṇava uttamaḥ kṛta kṛtyam iva ātmānam matvā tasthau nije gṛhe svayam vavarṣa vittāni bahūni keśava ajṣayā tasya śilpinā aviśvakarmaṇā vaijayam dāsa dāsī samāyuktaḥ nānā vastu vibhūṣitaḥ gaja aśva koṭi sam kīrṇam vibabhau tasya mandiram babhuvuḥ saṅga tāḥ tasya naṣṭāḥ api ca bāndhavāḥ tad gṛham āyayau mṛta putra api tad patnī keśavasya anukam payā mokṣam sa dāraḥ vipra sattamaḥ uvāca sākṣāt eva svayam viṣṇuḥ aśvatthaḥ vṛkṣa sattamaḥ tad bhaktim kurvatām puṃsām vidyate na aśubham kvacid aśvattham sevate yaḥ tu viṣṇum dhyātvā narottamaiḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre aśvattha māhātmye dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhagavant tam janārdanam pūjayet bhakti bhāvena jalaiḥ saṃ snāpya śītalaiḥ tailam suṃ gaṃ dhaṃ haraye grīṣma kāle dinedine pratyaham kamalā kāntam sthāpayet janamam ḍape cāmaraiḥ vījitaḥ śvetaiḥ su dīrghaiḥ kamalāpatim jyeṣṭha imāsi dvija śreṣṭha su prītaḥ kim na yacchati tālavṛṃtaka vātena pavitrām bara vāyunā yaiḥ grīṣme vījyate viṣṇuḥ te sarve svarga gāminaḥ grīṣme harim caṃ danaiḥ ca sa viśet mādhavīm tanum tvad āgamet vija śreṣṭha samuktaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ samdhyāyām sthāpayet viṣṇum deśe dhīra samīraṇe sragbhiḥ pāṭala puṣpāṇām yena viṣṇuḥ alam kṛtaḥ jyeṣṭhe māsi savijṣeyaḥ aśvamedha sahasra kṛt yaḥ tu muktā āvalim dadyāt grīṣme vaiśrī pateḥ janaḥ yaḥ tu maṇḍayati grīṣmeśrī kṛṣṇam maṇimālayā tiṣṭhet viṣṇu purā itāvat maṇi mālā vibhūṣitaḥ kṛṣṇam maṃ ḍayati grīṣme saḥ api tad phalam āpnuyāt vicitram yaḥ tu kam sa gaṇḍūkam prayacchati haraye brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha deyam tanvam śum kaṃ śuci mudā yaḥ tu yavāgūm ati śītalām na anāvyam yuktām śraddhayā avaiṣṇavaḥ janaḥ māsi māsi vipra indra devadevam jagadgurum mahā ṛṣe parām gatim avāpnuyāt kadamba puṣpa mālābhiḥ maṇḍapam jvalana upamam yaḥ tasya brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha vājimedha phalam bhavet sugandhaiḥ ketakī puṣpaiḥ pūjitaḥ kamalāpatiḥ sarva duḥkham harati eva mānavānām dvijottamaiḥ panasānām phalaiḥ divyaiḥ supakvaiḥ ghṛta miśritaiḥ prativāsaram yaḥ dadāti vaiṣṇava janaḥ mahālikā prasūnaiḥ ca yūthikā kusumaiḥ tathā arcayan sakalam kāmam prāpnoti bhuvi mānavaḥ praphullaiḥ pūjayet yaḥ tu tasya tuṣṭaḥ sadā hariḥ maiḥ īyakaiḥ cayaḥ viṣṇum prasū puṣpaiḥ cayaḥ arcayet śrāvaṇe ca eva yaḥ dadyāt lājān dhṛta samanvitān haraye tasya viprarṣe gṛhe śrī sarvatomukhā bhādre māsi dvija śreṣṭha nārāyaṇam anāmayam śraddhayā āpūjayet prājṣaḥ caturvarga pradāyakam sthāpayet puṇḍarīkākṣam bhagavantam tam janārdanam maśakaiḥ ca api prakīrṇa imakṣika ādibhiḥ harim purātana āgāreḥ sthāpayet na hi mānavaḥ harim harim na sthāpayet prājṣaḥ varṣāsu parameśvaram prakuryāt yaḥ tu amānavaḥ ca eva pūjā kāle nivārayet sārikābhiḥ prābṛti amam ca śāyinam acyutam prāvṛṣi sthāpayet viṣṇum niśāyām divya mandire mana bhādra ketakī puṣpaiḥ pūjita vyojana ardanaḥ tatas yatobhādrapade māsi ketakī syāt surā samā sam yuktam ghṛta dugdhābhyām pakva tālam murāraye bhādre māsi dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ haraye tāla piṣṭakam sa ghṛtam vaiṣṇava udadyāt kevala prāpti hetave na rātrau bhojanam kuryāt mumukṣuḥ vaiṣṇava ojanaḥ mad yat toyam dīyate vipra pūrvāhṇe haraye janaiḥ pīyūṣam iva tat toyam gṛhṇāti kamalāpatiḥ tat toyam rakta tulyam syāt na gṛhṇāti tatas hariḥ atas eva dvija śreṣṭha pūrvāhṇe harim arcayet samastam labhate kāmam keśavasya anukam payā kuryāt vā api tathā pūjām na gṛhṇāti cakeśavaḥ tena ca vastreṇa yaḥ pūjām kurute hareḥ prasīdati pūjā phalam na āpnuvanti bali grāhyā ca sā bhavet asaṃskṛta gṛhe pūjā kriyate jagatīpateḥ sā pūjā brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha bali grāhyā bhavet khalu snānam deva arcanam ca eva dānam ca pitṛ pūjanam tilakāni a gṛhītvā yat puṇya karma vidhīyate śaṅkha cakra gadā padmaiḥ aṅkitam yasya dṛśyate mad brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha vijṣeyaḥ saḥ acyutaḥ svayam yaḥ likhet dakṣiṇe bāhau śaṅkha padme ca vaiṣṇavaḥ savye cakram gadām ca eva sa viṣṇuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ paṅkajam dakṣiṇe bāhau śaṅkhasya upari yaḥ ālikhet tat pātakam sakalam tasya tam vandam te dvija śreṣṭha śakra ādyāḥ api nirjarāḥ murāri pāda yugmam ca sva lalāṭe likhet budhaḥ pāpa ātmā api dṛṣṭvā amuktaḥ bhavati pātakāt aṣṭa akṣaram mahā mantram matsyam kūrmam ca yaḥ hṛdi likhet sa vaiṣṇava śreṣṭhaḥ punāti bhuvanatrayam bhṛṣṇa āyudhām yasya śarīram syāt dine dine tasya kṛṣṇaḥ jagannāthaḥ dadāti paramam padam tad āyudhām kita tanuḥ yat karma kurute naraḥ śubham vā api aśubham vā api tat sarvam akṣayam bhavet dānava arākṣasāḥ ca eva bhūta vetālakāḥ tathā piśācāḥ pannagāḥ ca api yakṣa vidyādharāḥ tathā ca eva graha vālagrahāḥ tathā kūṣmāṇḍāḥ ca eva ḍākinyaḥ tathā sarve bhītyā apalāyam te dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇa āyudha aṅkitam dvīpāḥ ca dvīpinaḥ ca eva tathā nyevana vāsinaḥ te bhayāt kṛṣṇa āyudhām kitam yad ādya amahā roga adeha deha avapātinaḥ pṛṣṇa āyudhām kita tanum bhaktyā apaśyati yojanaḥ kṛṣṇa darśana tul yasya phalam prāpnoti mānavaḥ āśvina imā asiyā dadyāt haraye karkaṭī phalam dāmodaram devadevam prapūjayet yathā ukta vidhinā aprājṣaḥ prātar snānam samācaret maithunam ca eva tyajet janma antara arjitaiḥ pāpaiḥ muktaḥ yāti parām gatim tulā rāśi gate sūrye prātar snānam dvijottamaiḥ haviṣyam brahmacaryam ca mahāpātaka nāśanam maithunam ca eva kārttike māsi sevate tri bhojanam para annam ca tailam ca vaiṣṇava ojanaḥ phalam tasya pravakṣyāmi samāsena śṛṇu dvija brahmahatyā ādibhiḥ pāpaiḥ vimuktaḥ kleśa dāmodara puram gatvā ātiṣṭhet koṭi yuga avadhi tam nabhasi tridaśāḥ vāsava ādayaḥ asaupuṇya ātmanām śreṣṭhaḥ keśava arcana tad paraḥ tasya tuṣṭaḥ sadā hariḥ dadyāt akṣaya dīpam yaḥ kārttike hari mandire paramam mokṣam āpnoti prasādāt jagatīpate yat kiṣcid kārttike māsi viṣṇum uddiśya dīyate ghṛta aktam sura pattram yaḥ kārttika imāsi vaiṣṇave na dattam tena kim vipra viṣṇave daitya jiṣṇave ekam eva ambujam hṛtvā dadāti kaiṭabha āraye tasmai kim bhagavant viṣṇuḥ na dadāti śriyaḥ patiḥ kamalaiḥ kārttike māsi yena na ārādhitaḥ hariḥ dhanavān bahu putraḥ ca kuṭum ca poṣakaḥ yena sampūjya govindam pāpa ātmā api ca mokṣa bhāj padmapuṣpasya māhātmyam viśeṣāt ucyate mayā sa itihāsam dvija śreṣṭha sa avadhānam niśāmaya āsīt ekaḥ prajānām abrāhmaṇaḥ sarva śāstra vid hari pāda ambuje yasya manas bhṛṅga sadā sthitiḥ devānām brāhmaṇānām ca gurūṇām ca eva sarvadā kṛta apūjā dvija śreṣṭha kārya akārya śatāni api para dravyam viṣam ca eva para strī iṣu sva mātṛ vat tena eva yat ca eva tathā māyāntam atithim dṛṣṭvā asa vipraḥ parama artha vid bhṛśam mānam na ca āpnoti yācakam ca dvijottamam sarva yajṣāḥ kṛtāḥ tena vratāni sakalāni ca saṃsāra sāgaram ghoram apāram catitīrṣuṇā eka dāsa dvija śreṣṭhaḥ hari bhakti parāyaṇaḥ sva mṛtyum ca nijām jātim cintayāmāsa cetasā aham pūrvam sthitaḥ kovākim vā a karma kṛtam purā katham vā a janma samprāptam gamiṣyāmi kva vā apunar jagāmaha tuṣṭāva aśam karam devam vācā amadhurayā aśivam uvāca namaḥ te jñāna rūpāya namaḥ te jñāna dāyine namaḥ te sarva bhūtānām hṛd ambuja nivāsine namaḥ sam hara ākartre ca paśūnām pataye namaḥ namaḥ asthimālin netubhyam nīlakam namaḥ namaḥ te paṣcaktrāya namaḥ te śūlapāṇine tuṣṭa mānasāya namaḥ astu te bahu rūpāya vai tubhyam viśva rūpāya vai namaḥ dakṣa yajṣa vināśine īśānāya namaḥ tubhyam manīṣāya namaḥ namaḥ tubhyam namaḥ astu dṛśyāya adṛśyāya namaḥ namaḥ tasya stavam samākarṇya śam karaḥ lokaśam karaḥ mahasā prasannaḥ parameśvaraḥ bhūyas api sa dvija śreṣṭhaḥ harṣa nirbhara mānasaḥ kṛta aṣjaliḥ mahādevam tuṣṭāva avara dam prabhum uvāca yam na paśyanti deveśam devāḥ apisava asavāḥ paśyāmi tam aham sākṣāt mahābhāgyam idam mama dhyāna avasthita cittenayaḥ adṛśyaḥ parameśvaraḥ paśyāmitam aham sākṣāt sādhyam kim aparam mama kṛtārthaḥ asmi kṛtārthaḥ asmi kṛtārthaḥ asmi ca bhāgyavān uvāca khalu uvāca bhavantam paramātmānam adṛśyam daivataiḥ api sākṣāt paśyāmi aham nātha kim kāryam aparaiḥ varaiḥ tathā api tvam mahādeva varam ditsuḥ kṛpā mayaḥ pṛcchāmi yat aham kim cit tat brūhi parameśvaraiḥ kaḥ aham tasthau purā deva kim vā akāryam kṛtam purā punar pāpa prabhāvena prāpyate viṣamā āgatiḥ prabhāvaiḥ karmaṇām kānām janma prāptam idam mayā nānā duḥkha pradam kara pāpam ūlam idam janma janma duḥkhasya kāraṇam yasmāt pūrva vṛttāntam ātmanaḥ sthitaḥ aham jananī kukṣau janaṭhara anala tāpitaḥ mūtra viṣṭhā prakīrṇe ca vipākena ca karmaṇām katham mayā anubhūtam tat prabho bhakta ārti nāśana saṃsāre asmin mahā ghūrṇa nānā duḥkha samanvite asāre māyayā viṣṇoḥ mohite pātaka āśraye tathā apāre jagantām īśa patitaḥ asmi katham śiva uvāca aprakāśyam tathā api tvām bhaktam prativadāmi aham purātvam brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭha śabara anvaya sambhavaiḥ daṇḍapāṇiḥ iti khyātaḥ sthitaḥ san loka duḥkhudaḥ dasyu vṛttim prapanna ārti parama kleśa dāyinīm dasyu vṛtti gatam dṛṣṭvā abhavam dayam teṣām nāma ani vipra indra bhātṝṇām nigadāmi aham yaiḥ sārdham bhavatā apūrvam bhrātṛbhiḥ dasyu tā kṛtā daṇḍī daṇḍa āyudhaḥ ca eva dattavant datta bhūḥ tathā naḍaḥ daṇḍaketuḥ ca bhrātaraḥ ṣaṭ prakīrtitāḥ daṇḍena bhavatā anityam sarve vyagrīkṛta ajanāḥ bharaṇye prāntaraḥ viprahatāḥ śata sahasraśas hatvā aca sāyakaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ vanasthena tvayā sadā gavām kravyāṇi bhuktvā ca madirābhiḥ saha dvija bhakṣitāni mṛṇālāni bhrātṛbhiḥ taiḥ jalāni ca bhuktāni padma puṣpāṇi praphullāni bahūni ca tatra snāna artham āgataḥ tatra snātvā a sadharma ātmā a bhagavam tam janārdanam yaṣṭum tvām akamam bhojam yayāce vinaya anvitaḥ hatam paramayā abhaktyā apūjā artham kamalāpateḥ pūjayāmāsa tatra iva viṣṇum sakala kārakam viṣṇu pūjā param dṛṣṭvā atam vipram sarvavedasam viṣṇu pūjā darśanena naṣṭam te sarva pātakam tena eva karmaṇā ātuṣṭaḥ bhagavant karuṇā ālayaḥ bhuktam nānā sukham tatra kṛpayā a kamalā pateḥ tatas karma avasāna itu karma bhūmim imām dvija calā ca ārādhitaḥ mahā viṣṇuḥ kriyā yogaiḥ tvayā prabhuḥ tubhyam dāsyati vijñānam jñānāt muktaḥ bhaviṣyati uvāca prakṛtārthaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ saḥ api jagāma bhavanam svakam ārādhayāmāsa samārādhya ciram prasuptaḥ jñānam samāsādya jagāma mokṣam prasādāt śrī garuḍadhvajasya anicchayā api kamalam yacchataḥ phalam īdṛśam nārāyaṇam ye ca praphulla vārijaiḥ eka aham api utkaṭa pāpa yuktāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca mārgaśīrṣe dvija śreṣṭha mahā lakṣmyā samanvitam pūjayet avyayam viṣṇum bhakti bhāvena vaiṣṇavaḥ durgam na pūjyet tathā asatya bhāṣiṇām ca eva na kuryāt viṣṇu pūjanam datām saṃnidhau cāpi kalahān api kurvatām tathā upahasatām sthānena kuryāt pūjanam hareḥ pratigraha ratānām ca sthāne viṣṇum na pūjayet kṛpaṇānām gṛhe ca eva para vitta abhilāṣiṇām tathā kapaṭa vṛttīnām na kuryāt viṣṇu pūjanam nārāyaṇa arcane vipra param bhakti parāyaṇaḥ mākhaṇḍa jana sambhāṣam na kuryāt hari pūjanam cintā āgama śata śrāntaḥ śilā cakreṣu api dvijaiḥ ananya mānasaḥ bhūtvā bhaktyā viṣṇum jayet budhaḥ tasmāt manaḥ dṛḍhīkṛtya pūjayet kamalāpatim yatnāt vihita śaucaḥ api viṣṇu pūjā paraḥ api ca manaḥ śuddhi vihīnaḥ ced cāṇḍālaḥ iva gamyate meru pramāṇakam svarṇam bine tasmāt ekamanāḥ bhūtvā bhakti śraddhā samanvitaḥ sa vāstuka ādi śākam ca dadyāt sadasi vaiṣṇave keśavāya dvija śreṣṭha saḥ asmābhiḥ abhipūjyate tat eva āgrayaṇe māsi bhaktyā ādadyāt murāraye pauṣa imāsi samāyāte śrī kṛṣṇam vara dam prabhum sarvam mṛ toya a tīkṣu sāgaram yaḥ dadyāt ikṣu naivedyam devadevāya viṣṇave sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt sarvaiḥ purātanam vastram dūrīkṛtyam urāraye tasya vāraṇa arthāya dadyāt vastram ca nūtanam pauṣasam kramaṇevipra salakṣmīkāyaviṣṇave dadyāt mumukṣuḥ manujaḥ daśa varṇam ca pīṭhakam tasya puṇya phalam vacmi śṛṇu vatsa samāhitaḥ agamyā āgamana ādyaiḥ ca vimuktaḥ sarva pātakaiḥ teviṣṇu puram gatvā a viṣṇu nāsaham udate yaḥ tu vādayate hareḥ pūjā kāle dvija śreṣṭha tasya puṇyam vadāmi aham tad abhakṣya bhakṣaṇa ādyaiḥ ca vimuktaḥ sarva pātakaiḥ viṣṇoḥ tatra bhuktvā akhilān kāmān kalpa koṭi śata avadhi punar āgatya dharaṇīm caturvedī dvijottamaḥ tatra bhuktvā akhilān kāmān kalpa koṭi śata avadhi punar viṣṇupuram gatvā mokṣam prāpnoti anuttamam tu mitānām agraṇī syāt sa martyaḥ pratijanmani mṛdam go ādya kṛt yaḥ tu pūjāyām kaiṭabhadviṣaḥ ḍamarum ḍiḍimam ca eva jharjharīm madhurīm tathā paṭaham duṃ dubhim ca eva kāhalam siṃ dhuvārakam kām syam cakaratālam caveṇum vādayatetuyaḥ pūjā kāle mahā viṣṇoḥ tasya puṇyam niśāmaya steya arthaiḥ pātakaiḥ muktaḥ mandiram yāti cakriṇaḥ cayaḥ kuryāt pūjā kāle jagadguroḥ yuktaḥ prayāti mandiram hareḥ jñānam āsādya tatra iva mokṣam akṣayyam āpnuyāt sa yāti brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam yaḥ tu gāyati gītāni bhaktyā nārāyaṇa agratas sa nṛpa tvam avāpnoti gandharvāṇām pureṣu ca iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre bhagavat pūjā māhātmyam nāma caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca nārāyaṇasya māhātmyam punar vacmi śṛṇu dvija sakalam jagant etat dvijottamaiḥ tasmāt viṣṇu mayam dhīrāḥ paśyanti parama arthinaḥ brahma śam kara rudra ādya a viṣṇu am sakalāḥ surāḥ tasmāt samasta deva arcā viṣṇum ekam prapadyate smaratām viṣṇu nāmāni sarva pāpa harāṇi ca sarvam eva dvija śreṣṭha karmaṇā apāpam ucyate anapāyi idam viṣṇoḥ smaraṇam pāpa nāśanam svapan bhuṣjan vadam stiṣṭhan uttiṣṭham tathā smaret aviratam viṣṇum mumukṣuḥ vaiṣṇavojanaḥ na kāla niyamaḥ proktaḥ sarva duḥkha vināśanaḥ nāma prabhāvam vipra ṛṣe keśavasya mahātmanaḥ bravīmi aham samāsena sa itihāsam niśāmaya āsīt sa paraśuḥ nāma pūrvam kṛta yuge śuciḥ jagāma vaśa tām mṛtyoḥ kāsa śvāsa gada arditaḥ hi jīvantī nāma tad patnī sumadhyā anavayauvanā tā ājīvantī dvija śreṣṭha nava yauvana garvitā cakāra citta asātatya ajya nava yauvanā am dharma mārgam dvija śreṣṭha na kadācid dadarśa ha duḥśīlām ca eva tām dṛṣṭvā a tad pitā adharma tad paraḥ apakīrti bhayāt bhīruḥ iti āha atyanta kopavān duṣṭe pāpini mad vaṃśe sarva doṣa vivarjite tātena iti niruktā sa krodha aruṇita locanā atha sā sva icchayā a nārī bhramantī jārakām kṣayā veśyā vṛttim samāśritya tasthau lajjā vivarjitā maḥ śabara uvāpi cāṇḍāla uvāpi tad gṛham pāyāti tasyāḥ tena api mudā krīḍati sā asatī cintayāmāsa ca sā vāra nārī yathā kramāt kadācid brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha kaścid vyādhaḥ tad ālaye mādāya vikraya artham samāyayau sa api vāra aṅga nātam ca śuka śāvakam uttamam tad yogya āhāra dānena vāra strī nityam eva sā mahā śukasya apoṣaṇam cakre tasya jāta kutūhalā saḥ api pakṣi dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ nityam eva tadā ajṣayā tatas asau labdha bhāvaḥ ca śukaḥ gaṇikayā tadā rāmaiḥ iti satatam nāma pāṭhyate sundara akṣaram rāma uccāraṇa mātreṇa tayoḥ ca śuka veśyayoḥ vinaṣṭam abhavat pāpam sarvam eva su dāruṇam kim karān preṣayāmāsa cam ḍa ādyān dharmarāj tatas tatas te kim karāḥ ati veginaḥ yama ajṣayā samāyātāḥ pāśa mudgara pāṇayaḥ mānetum tau samāyātāḥ sarve viṣṇu parākramāḥ karāḥ ūcuḥ vākyam idam kruddhāḥ ayamadūtān sura āsadān aho citram idam vākyam yamadūtā mukhāt śrutam bhaktau api hareḥ etau daṇḍyau bhāskarasūnunā aho caritram duṣṭānām kadācid api na uttamam yatnāt apiyataḥ hiṃsām kurbanti satatam satām duṣṭānām kṛta pāpānām caritram idam adbhutam niṣpāpam apipaśyanti puṇya ātmānaḥ akhilam jagant śrutvā a puṇya ātmanām puṇyam abhitṛpyanti dharmiṇaḥ tṛpyanti pātakam śrutvā apāpinām pāpinaḥ janāḥ pāpa carcām samākarṇya yathā tṛpyanti pāpinaḥ na tṛpyanti yathā prāpya svarṇa bhāra śatāni api aho balavatī māyā mahā viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ bātma pīḍā karam api pāpam kurbanti te dvijaiḥ uvāca iti uktvā viṣṇu dūtāḥ te viṣṇu bhakti parāyaṇāḥ tatas tuśamana preṣyāḥ kruddhāḥ te vahni saṃnibhāḥ vavarṣuḥ sahasā tatra jvaladam gārasam cayān uvāca vihitam camayā api evam śukam veśyām ca pāpinīm netum yūyam samāyātāḥ iti adbhutam iva abhavat nūnam etau yat ānetum yūyam icchata sattamāḥ iti uktvā ārāma dūtāḥ te balinaḥ vidhṛta āyudhāḥ siṃ ha nādaiḥ diśaḥ sarve pūrayāmāsuḥ uddhatāḥ mahā bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās bhās yāmyaiḥ tatas mahā dūtaiḥ dhanuḥ muktaiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ te saṃgrāme atyanta dāruṇe śūlāni adhyakṣipuḥ kecid śaktim kecid mahā arṇave kecid śara sahasrāṇi kecid cakrāṇi teruṣā taiḥ mukta ani mahā astrāṇi viṣṇu dūtāḥ mahā amarāḥ bāṇān vicūrṇayāmāsuḥ gadā praharaṇa ādibhiḥ tatobhāgavataiḥ ertaryāmyāṇām cakra dhārayā keṣām cit caraṇaiḥ channāḥ keṣām cit vāhavaḥ tathā ati adbhuta kṣatāḥ kecid vyāsyāḥ petuḥ gatāsavaḥ sam tyajya sahasā yāmyāḥ saṅgrāmāt ca pradudruvuḥ tān ālokya tatas dūtān palāyana parāyaṇān praviveśa ruṣācam saṅgrāman dhṛta mudgaraḥ yama dūta gaṇa śreṣṭhaḥ caṃ ḍaḥ atyanta pratāpavān tāḍayāmāsa śataśas mudgaraiḥ viṣṇu kiṃkarān tha bhāgavata a dūta a niśita āyudha varṣaṇaiḥ vavarṣuḥ tarasā ākruddhāḥ tam caṃ ḍaṃ caṃ ḍa vikramam mudgareṇa tatas caṇḍaḥ viṣṇu dūtān pṛthak pṛthak tāḍayāmāsa vigalat rakta sam sikta vigrahaḥ dena tāḍitāḥ stena dūtāḥ bhagavataḥ yudhi tyakta satvāḥ pṛṣṭa bhāgam su prakāśaḥ tatas kruddhaḥ japā puṣpa nibha īkṣaṇaḥ praviveśa raṇe yuddham gadā pāṇiḥ mahā balaḥ tāḍayāmāsa sam kruddhaḥ viṣṇu tulya parākramaḥ samuttasthau mahā bhīṣmaḥ sa dhūmaḥ pūti gandhavān veginā na āvarṣaṇam sadyas mumoca atyanta bhīti dam tāḍayāmāsa vipra ṛṣe su prakāśam mahā balam tena pratāḍitaḥ caṃ tatra raktaḥ pariplutaḥ yāmya dūtāḥ tatas ḍama ādāya mūrchitam yuddhāt bhītāḥ pradudruvuḥ viṣṇu dūtāḥ tatas vipra sarve ca ati praharṣitāḥ yama dūtāḥ tatas te ca śoṇita ogha pariplutāḥ yamadūtāḥ ūcuḥ mayam tathā api viṣṇu dūtaiḥ naḥ kṛtā adurgatiḥ īdṛśā mahāpātakinām śreṣṭhau prabhaḥ yadi api tau khalu rāma nāma prabhāvena gatau nārāyaṇa ālayam bhavatā a daṇḍanīyāya iduḥ ātmānaḥ kṛta enasaḥ te api viṣṇu puram yānti prabhu tvam tava kim tadā na asmākam kṛtaḥ paribhavaḥ tu ayam dūtāḥ smaram tau tau rāma rāma nāma akṣara dvayam tadā anamet aṇḍanīyau tayoḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ saṃsāre na asti tat pāpam yat rāma smaraṇaiḥ api naya atisam kṣayam sadyas dṛḍham śṛṇu takim karāḥ ye mānavāḥ pratidinam madhusūdanasya nāmāni ghora durita ogha vināśanāni bhaktyā vadanti puruṣāḥ satatam ati pāpinaḥ api mad bhakta ārti nāśana sura īśvara dīna bandho lakṣmī pate sakala pāpa vināśa kārin ca etat vat anta satatam bhuvi ye manuṣyāḥ te pāpinaḥ api nabhaṭāmama daṇḍanīyāḥ yeṣām vadanti vadaneṣu sadā eva śabdāḥ dūtān amāmi aham api prativāsaram tān murāreḥ carcā su citta mati hārddi nṝṇām ca yeṣām teṣām aham ca satatam praphulla kamala īkṣaṇa rūpa bhājaḥ ye viṣṇu pūjana ratāḥ hari bhakta bhaktāḥ ekādaśī vrata ratāḥ kapaṭaiḥ vihīnāḥ ye viṣṇu pāda salilam śirasā āvahanti te pāpinaḥ api nabhaṭāmama daṇḍanīyāḥ tulasyā anityam bahanti ca bhaṭāḥ praṇamāmi aham tān brāhmaṇa arcana rata aguṇa sevinaḥ ca ca teṣām aham satatam adhīnaḥ ye satya vākya kathaneṣu sadā anurakta āloka priyāḥ ca śaraṇa āgata lokapālāḥ paśyanti ye ca satatam viṣavat para svam na hi daṇḍanīyāḥ ye ca anna dāna niratāḥ salila pradāḥ ca bhūmi prada a nikhila loka hita eṣiṇaḥ ca praśām ca daṇḍanīyāḥ yejṣā atipoṣaṇa ratāḥ priya vādinaḥ ca yedambha kopa mada matsara hīna cittāḥ ye pāpa dṛṣṭi rahita avijita indriyāḥ ca teṣām aham na vidadhāmi kadāpi carcām uvāca viṣṇoḥ nāmāni vipra indra sarva deva adhikāni vai smṛtam yad uccāraṇa mātreṇa pāpīyāḥ ati parām gatim maheśaḥ eva jānāti na anyaḥ jānāti jaimine viṣṇoḥ nāma sahasrāṇām paṭhanāt labhate phalam aho citram manuṣyāṇām caritram idam ucyate rāmaiḥ iti mukti dam durāśayāḥ tathā api durāśayāḥ tāvat tiṣṭhanti pāpāni deha iṣu dehinām vara anyeṣu api ca kāryeṣu vaidikeṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ ṣaḍakṣaram japet yaḥ tu sāyujyam prāpyate hareḥ mantreṇa hari pūjana kṛt naraḥ sarvān kāmān avāpnoti prasādāt cakrapāṇeḥ mṛtyu kāle dvija śreṣṭha rāma rāma iti yaḥ smaret sa pāpiṣṭhaḥ api paramam mokṣam āpnoti mānavaḥ rāma iti nāmayātrāyām ye smaranti manīṣiṇaḥ sarva siddhiḥ bhavet teṣām yātrāyām na atra saṃśayaḥ araṇye prāntare vāpī śmaśāne ya ubhayānake rāma nāma dvija śreṣṭha sarva aśubha nivāraṇam kāma dam mokṣa dam ca eva smartavyam satatam budhaiḥ smarantaḥ hari nāmāninā avasīdanti mānavāḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre paṣcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhūyas eva dvija śreṣṭha mahā viṣṇoḥ parātmanaḥ bravīmi śṛṇu māhātmyam sarva duḥkha vināśanam brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ ca anye antyajāḥ tathā hari bhaktim prapannāḥ ye te kṛtārthāḥ na saṃśayaḥ hari bhaktaḥ śvapākaḥ api vijṣeyaḥ brāhmaṇa adhikaḥ avyājena yadā viṣṇuḥ śvapākena api pūjyate purā āsīt cakrikaḥ nāma śabaraḥ loka karṣa kṛt sujāti vṛtti hīnaḥ ca yuge dvāpara saṃjṣake vipra vādī jita krodhaḥ para hiṃsā vivarjitaḥ dayāluḥ dambha hīnaḥ ca pitṛ mātṛ parāyaṇaḥ na kṛtaḥ vaiṣṇava ālāpaḥ mokṣa śāstram na ca śrutam iti ādīni smaran nityam sa ca nāmāni cakriṇaḥ ādau dadāti tad vaktre nije śabara vaṃśa jaḥ tat mādhuryam tatas jṣātvā vaktrāt niṣkāsya tat punar ucchiṣṭam vā api anucchiṣṭam dvayam eva na vetti saḥ phalam ekam prāpya pakvam priyālasya iti śākhinaḥ sa saṃrambhena vai nija vaktra antare dadau praviveśa galam tāvat tad phalam śṛṇu jaimine yatnāt vidhṛtya savyena pāṇinā sakalam dvija cakrikaḥ cintayāmāsa hari bhakti parāyaṇaḥ na jātaḥ kaḥ api saṃsāre tadā aham iva pātakī harim saṃcintya bahudhā sa cakāra matim tatas ānīya tat phalam pakvam dadau devāya viṣṇave rudhiraḥ kṣita sarva aṅgaḥ patitaḥ kṣiti maṇḍale tam dṛṣṭvā bhagavant viṣṇuḥ gatāsum vyathitaḥ abhavat yatas nija galam chittvā mama santoṣaṇam kṛtam prāṇān api parityajya mama santoṣaṇam kṛtam brahma tvam vā aśiva tvam vā acakri tvam vā api dīyate iti uktvā atyanta saṃtuṣṭaḥ bhagavant garuḍadhvajaḥ samuttasthau mahā sattvaḥ nārāyaṇa parāyaṇaḥ uvāca stotum tathā api rasanā mama vāṣchati tvām caturmukha mukhāḥ api deva vṛndāḥ yena tvayā bhagavatā tridaśa ādi avaiḥ sa asuraḥ nimi sutaḥ kṛta sarva pāpaḥ mad acalā vibhūtiḥ pūrvam kṛtā a bhagavantā parameśvareṇa tasmai namaḥ astu yaduvam śaparāya tubhyam pārijātaḥ hṛtaḥ yena vijitaḥ akhaṇḍalaḥ tvayā līlā jita maheśāya tasmai tubhyam namaḥ namaḥ hetum kṛtvā a vṛkodaram hetum jarāsaṃdhas nipātitaḥ bāṇa asura sya nihata a bāhavaḥ ye tvayā hatāḥ bhūmyāḥ apahṛtaḥ bhāraḥ tvayā ayena mahātmanā kṣattriyān māyayā a hatvā tasmai nityam namaḥ namaḥ uvāca param brahma param dhāma paramātman kṛpā mayaiḥ paśyāmi tvām aham sākṣāt varaiḥ kim aparaiḥ dvija tan na dhyātā bhavataḥ mūrtiḥ pūjā acana kṛtā tava te smṛtāni nāmāni kadācid bhavataḥ mayā māim sma sarva dharma bahiṣkṛtaḥ uvāca vacanā amṛta varṣeṇa tvadīyena mahā āśayaiḥ samprāpya mahatīm tuṣṭim mayā asevaka pāpinā anena atyanta tuṣṭaḥ asmi bhaktim gṛhṇāmi ha ṛṣitaḥ uvāca iti uktvā bhagavant viṣṇuḥ bhakti grāhī dayā mayaḥ tam ālim gitavan bhaktam caturbhiḥ dīrgha bāhubhiḥ uvāca bhūyas api tam mahā bhaktam āliṅgya parameśvaraḥ tatra tuṣṭaḥ hari bhakti parāyaṇaḥ putra dāra ādikam tyaktvā jagāma dvārakām purīm tatra ca evam samāsādya kṛpayā a kamalā pateḥ mokṣam devānām api durlabham tathā api tuṣṭavan viṣṇuḥ jṣātvā bhaktim acaṣcalām tasmāt nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ saṃsāre asmin mumukṣubhiḥ iti śrī padmapurāṇe kriyā yoga sāre ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ adhyāyaḥ punar eva guro brūhi māhātmyam kamalā pateḥ hareḥ kathā amṛtam pītvā tṛptiḥ vai kasya jāyate uvāca yatas keśava māhātmyam śrotum icchasi bhaktyāḥ nārāyaṇa kathā ramyā punāti evam jagat trayam śrotāram pṛcchakam ca eva vaktāram ca dvijottamaiḥ śṛṇu lakṣmī pateḥ vatsa māhātmyam pāpa nāśanam puṇya ātmā sa katham martyaḥ yena na ārādhitaḥ hariḥ asti sarva pura śreṣṭham puruṣottama saṃjṣakam sarveṣām eva tīrthānām variṣṭham tat nigadyate na veda adhyayanam cakre purāṇāni ca sarvaśas tatyāja uttama saṃjṣām ca pākhaṇḍa jana saṃgamāt a yājya dāna grāhī ca para dravya apahārakaḥ tatyāja brāhmaṇa ācāram tathā eva satya bhāvanam gurūṇām atithīnām ca pūjanam brāhmaṇa adhamaḥ ekadā kṛta pāpaḥ asau loka lajjā bhaya anvitaḥ śrāddham cakāra vipraḥ vai śraddhā bhakti vivarjitaḥ vāra nārīm iti prāha gataḥ sa niśi tad gṛham uvāca etat viśāla jaghane pitṛ śrāddha dinam mama paśya rātrim imām kām te sarva loka bhaya āvahām sravat ambuda saṅghātam parivyāptam nabhaḥ sthalāt navām tvad guṇa ākṛṣṭa mānasaḥ asyām api vibhāvaryā antavāham gṛham āgataḥ tvad guṇa ādhyāna viśvāsa āgataḥ aham niśipriye tvām a dṛṣṭvā a kṣaṇam api prītiḥ mama na hi jāyate api duḥkhena hetan vitvān draṣṭum aham āgataḥ tīrtha toya abhiṣekena kām /#kim me prayojanam paratra sukha dām sevām ārādhya mama kim phalam apakīrtim bhayāt kām te śrāddha karma kṛtam gṛhe tat śrāddham rākṣasa grāhyam bhavet na asti atra saṃśayaḥ tathā yadi bhavet viṣṇau tadā prāpnoti kim na hi yama daṇḍa antara sthāyi jīvitam ca śarīriṇām tathā api pātakam mūḍha kuruṣe nirbhayaḥ sadā mūḍhaḥ kṣaṇa vidhvaṃsi jīvitam kim artham śāśvata dhyā kuruṣe churitam sadā aho māyā mahā viṣṇoḥ ekā balavatī kṣitau yatas pāpam prakurvāṇaḥ satatam harṣitaḥ dvijaiḥ sthānam pāpāya me dehi nija dehe durāśraye uvāca manasā cintayāmāsa brāhmaṇaḥ kṛta pātakaḥ dhik dhik mām ca mahā pāpam mūḍham pātakinām varam tat menā asti durātmanaḥ ātma ghāta karam pāpam nityam eva kṛtam mahat jātaḥ yadā dhruvaḥ mṛtyuḥ mṛte svāmī yadā yamaḥ pitṛ yajṣa ādikam karma pūjā ca kamalā pateḥ mārkaṇḍeyam mahātmānam sarva dharma vidām varam tuṣṭāva saḥ dvijaḥ vācā praṇamya bhuvi daṇḍa vat uvāca nārāyaṇa svarūpāya namaḥ te mahātmane namaḥ mṛkaṇḍa putrāya sarva loka hita eṣiṇe jṣāna arṇavāya vai tubhyam nirvikārāya vai namaḥ stutaḥ tena iti vipreṇa mārkaṇḍeyaḥ mahā tapāḥ uvāca parama prītaḥ sarva śāstra artha pāragaḥ uvāca te bhaktyā ati tuṣṭaḥ asmi mahā bhāga varam vṛṇu te abhilaṣitam sadyas sādhayiṣyāmi na anyathā uvāca aham pāpa ātmanām śreṣṭhaḥ dvija ācāra vivarjitaḥ para hiṃsā anvitaḥ nityam para strī nirataḥ sadā mayā mūḍhena vipra indra sadā pāpam kṛtam mahat na amutra api kṛtam puṇyam kadācid api sa ādaram uvāca kṛta pāpaḥ api vipra indra tvam hi puṇya ātmanām varaḥ yatas buddhiḥ iyam jātā tvayi saṃsāra durlabhā puṇya ātmanām puṇya dṛṣṭiḥ vardhate prativāsaram pāpa ātmanām pāpa dṛṣṭiḥ vardhate tu dine dine pāpatmanā api bhavatā pāpa dṛṣṭiḥ nivāryate pāpam kṛtvā api yaḥ martyaḥ pāpāt bhūyas nivartate tam uttaram naram prāhuḥ pūrva janma arcita acyutam nija bhaktam mahāviṣṇuḥ dṛṣṭvā pāpa ratam prabhuḥ dadāti vipulām buddhim yathā bhavati sat gatiḥ atas tvam brāhmaṇa śreṣṭham pratijanma acyuta arcakaḥ acireṇa eva bhadram te bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ yat yat pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra mattaḥ śroṣyasi tam na hi tena upadiṣṭaḥ asau vipraḥ mārkaṇḍeyena dhīmatā anyaiḥ ca puṣpitaiḥ vṛkṣaiḥ śobhitam su manoharam guṣjat bhramara saṃghātam phala śabda ati śabditam mandam mandam vahat vāyu śītalam ca eva vāri ca śata śvāpada saṅkīrṇam śiṣya upaśiṣya saṃkulam tasya āśramam tatas vipraḥ praviśya ati manoharam dadarśa dāntam tattva jṣam sarva śiṣya gaṇaiḥ vṛtam stutvā tam brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha dāntam nārāyaṇa ātmakam uvāca brūhi tat tvam tu mām stauṣi hetunā kena sāṃpratam brāhmaṇaḥ aham mahābhāga brāhmaṇa ācāra varjitaḥ nāmnā bhadratanuḥ khyātaḥ vihita akhila pātakaḥ saṃsāra pāpa vid chedaḥ katham mama pāpinaḥ bhavet uvāca śṛṇu vipra param guhyam te snehāt mayā ucyate yena saṃsāra pāśasya vicchedaḥ bhavate nṝṇām tyaja pākhaṇḍa sam sargam saṅgam bhaja satām sadā smaran nāmāni satatam mahā viṣṇoḥ mahātmanaḥ saṃmārjanam dvija śreṣṭha tathā upalepanam punar mārga śobhām ca dīpam ca keśavāyatane kuru kuru brāhmaṇa sevām ca jṣāti sevām ca sarvadā kathām śṛṇu hareḥ mantram japa tvam dvādaśa akṣaram bhaviṣyati uttamam jñānam jṣānāt mokṣam avāpsyasi uvāca teṣām vivaraṇam brūhi kim moha udambha matsarau tiḥ damaḥ cakaḥ madhya dṛṣṭiḥ cakā proktā kā pūjā kamalā pateḥ horātraḥ cakaḥ proktaḥ kim viṣṇu smaraṇam tathā ke vā paṣca mahā yajṣāḥ kaḥ mantraḥ dvādaśa akṣaraḥ nānā vivaraṇam sarvam brūhi brāhmaṇa sattama uvāca nija ācāra vihīnāḥ ye pākhaṇḍāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ pāpa abhilāṣa rahitāḥ sat janāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ yaḥ abhilāṣaḥ sadā strīṣu vibhava upārjana ādiṣu brāhmaṇa śreṣṭha sa kāmā eti kathyate samākarṇya ātmanaḥ nindām yaḥ tāpaḥ hṛdi jāyate para vitta ādikam dṛṣṭvā ānetum yaḥ hṛdi jāyate tad abhilāṣaḥ dvija śreṣṭhaiḥ sa lobhaḥ eti kīrtitaḥ mama mātā mama pitāmama iyam gṛhiṇī gṛham aham mahātmā adhanavān na tulyaḥ kaḥ api bhū tale māra putra ādya āyānti amuṣya kadā akṣayam na ahiṃsā parikīrtitā yatnāt api para kleśam hartum yat hṛdi jāyate icchā bhūmiḥ dvija śreṣṭha sā adayā parikīrtitā yā a tuṣṭiḥ jāyate citteśāntiḥ sā āgadyate budhaiḥ sam kīrtita udamaḥ prājṣaiḥ saṃmataḥ tatva darśibhiḥ tathā naivedya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ śraddhayā puruṣaḥ hareḥ yaḥ arcanam kurute vipra sā pūjā parikīrtitā tat vijṣeyam ahorātram pūrva apara dina aśanam yat ekīkaraṇam tat ca viṣṇu smaraṇam ucyate brahmayajṣaḥ nṛyajṣaḥ ca devayajṣaḥ ca sattamaiḥ pitṛ yajṣaḥ bhūtayajṣaḥ paṣcayajṣāḥ prakīrtitāḥ mahā mantram imam prāhuḥ tattva jṣā dvādaśa akṣaram sarvam pṛṣṭam brāhmaṇa sattamaiḥ yat jṣātvā mānavāḥ sarve labham te jñānam uttamam tatas pratidinam vipra nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam brūhi lakṣmī pateḥ viṣṇoḥ nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam uvāca śṛṇu vipra pravakṣyāmi nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam sahasra nāma ca ākṛṣya sāram viṣṇoḥ parātmanaḥ aṣṭottaraśatam nāmnām mahā pātaka nāśanam paṭhitavyam yathā dhyātvā śṛṇu dhyānam mayā ucyate atasī kusuma ākāram praphulla kamala īkṣaṇam gavām caraṇa dhūlibhiḥ bhūṣita akhila vigraham prabhum go goṣṭha vāsibhiḥ snigdhaiḥ śiśubhiḥ parivāritam pīta ambaram smara mukham dhyāyet kṛṣṇa āsyam uttamam aum namaḥ asya kṛṣṇa aṣṭa uttara śata nāmnām veda vyāsa ṛṣiḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ devatā śrī kṛṣṇa prīti arthe jape viniyogaḥ namaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ keśavaḥ ca keśi śatruḥ sanātanaḥ kaṃsāriḥ dhenukāriḥ ca śiśupāla ripuḥ prabhuḥ devakīnandanaḥ śauriḥ puṇḍarīka nibha īkṣaṇaḥ bali dhvaṃsī vāmanaḥ aditi nandanaḥ anantaḥ kaiṭabhāriḥ ca mallajit narakāntakaḥ acyutaḥ śrī dharaḥ śrī mās śrīpatiḥ puruṣottamaḥ bhūmidhārī mahākūrmaḥ varāhaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ vaikuṇṭhaḥ pīta vāsāḥ ca cakra pāṇiḥ gadā dharaḥ śam kha bhṛt padma pāṇiḥ ca nandakī garuḍadhvajaḥ mahotsavaḥ mahātejāḥ mahābāhupriyaḥ prabhuḥ tulasī vallabhaḥ apāraḥ pareśaḥ parameśvaraḥ hi rukmiṇī ramaṇaḥ rukmi pratijṣā khaṇḍanaḥ mahān dāma baddhaḥ kleśa hārī govardhana dharaḥ hariḥ pūtanāriḥ muṣṭikāriḥ yamalārjunabhaṣjanaḥ upendraḥ viśvamūrtiḥ ca vyomapādaḥ sanātanaḥ paramātma aparabrahma praṇata ārti vināśanaḥ trivikramaḥ mahā māyaḥ yoga vidviṣṭaraśravāḥ śrī nidhiḥ śrī nivāsaḥ ca yajṣa bhoktā sukha pradaḥ yajṣeśvara urāvaṇāriḥ pra lam ba ghnaḥ akṣayaḥ avyayaḥ sahasranāmnām ca etat tena āmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam duḥsvapna nāśanam ca eva grahapīḍā vināśanam mayā a proktam dvija śreṣṭha vaiṣṇava prīti hetave mahat aṣṭottaraśatam nāmnām tuṣṭaḥ sadā hariḥ śrāddhe cayaḥ paṭhet etat bhaktimān vaiṣṇavaḥ janaḥ sam tuṣṭāḥ pitaraḥ tasya prayānti paramam padam paṭhet yaḥ tu devatā ārādhane tathā dāna kāle ca yātrāyām saḥ vā etat phalam āpnuyāt stavasya āsya prakīrtanāt ye paṭhanti hareḥ bhaktyā nāmnām aṣṭa uttaram śatam na aśubham vidyate teṣām kadācid api bhū tale uvāca samārādhya harim bhaktyā aparamam kṣemam āpsyasi jṣātvā abhaktim hariḥ tasya su dṛḍhām karuṇā mayaḥ śumān tam dṛṣṭvā jagantām īśam kamalā priyam acyutam atha asau brāhmaṇa śreṣṭhaḥ harṣa nirbhara mānasaḥ kṛta aṣjaliḥ jagannātham astauṣīt kamalāpatim dṛṣṭim hare durita gām api mama kṛpālām bhaktim nijām prati vibho śubha dām anaiṣīḥ grāmyaḥ tvayā akāri pumān iva adya ha lu mānavasya tuṣṭe ca yāti sukṛtam prati sā eva dṛṣṭiḥ mayā eva parameśvara kevalam ca tvām vacmi nātha bhavataḥ smaraṇam prabhāvam vyādhaḥ sa vetti kanikaḥ kṛta sarva pāpaḥ sṛṣṭi sthiti pralaya kāraṇe īśvarasya jānāti pannaga ripu dhvaja yajṣa mālī bhrātā ca tasya kṛta pāpa bhayaḥ sumālī harim pradakṣiṇīkṛtya bhavantam yat phalam bhavet tava cittam dayām nātha gaditum bhuvikaḥ kṣamaḥ tvām viddhvā api śaraiḥ vyādhaḥ jagāma paramam padam śiśupālaḥ yayau mokṣam te bhaktasya kā kathā brahma rūpeṇa yena asau tvayā sṛṣṭam idam jagat tvayi tasmin mahā viṣṇoḥ amatām mama mānasam tvayā anena kriyate jagantaḥ kṣayaḥ netrābhyām yasya devasya sūryaḥ ajani divākaraḥ yasya śrotrāt vāyavaḥ apijātāḥ prāṇāḥ cakeśavaiḥ lakṣmī yasya sadā kroḍa īśyāma aṅgasya su nirvṛtā gantum mahimnām sīmānam brahma ādyāḥ apinirjarāḥ dharmāṇām sthāpana arthāya vināśāyaca pāpinām tasmai namaḥ astu me gavām ca brāhmaṇānām ca sādhūnām ca hitam tathā anāthānām ca bandhunām yoginām duḥkhinām tathā manuṣyeṣu ca deveṣu gajeṣu sakaleṣu ca yasmin tuṣṭe parvataḥ api sadyas eva tṛṇāyate mailīyate tṛṇam ruṣṭe tasmai te namaḥ astu me puṇyānām ca yathā puṇye nije putre yathā pituḥ yathā patau satīnām ca tathā tvayi mama astu vai yuvnām cittam yathā strīṣu lubdhānām ca yathā dhane kṣudhitānām yathā ca anne tathā tvayi mama astu vai tṛṣā ārtānām yathā toye tathā tvayi mama āstuvai tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mamama avadhyānām vadhaḥ yaḥ tu māyā mohavatā akṛtaḥ tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama bhrūṇahatyā kṛtāyāca retasām secanam bhuvi tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama ghātakam tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama asatya vacanam yat ca mayā proktam kṣaṇekṣaṇe tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tām niṃ dā kṛtāyā ca para hiṃsā ca sarvadā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama pathi devālaye goṣṭhe mūlamantram ca yat kṛtam tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama snāna artham bhojana artham ca gacchan yaḥ tu nivāritaḥ tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama ekādaśyām suraśreṣṭha yat mayā abhojanam kṛtam tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama dvādaśyām ca daśamyām ca kṛtam yat ca dvi bhojanam tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama nibāraṇam kṛtam yat ca pāna artham dhāvatī gavām tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama kūṭasākṣyam niruktam yat mitra vātsalyatomayā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama ṛtu kāla abhigamanam nija patnyām kṛtam nayat tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama asam vihitam mayā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama yat kṛtam prabho tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama mayā ayāca para pāka kathā śrutā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama aśvattha chedanam kṛtam tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama dadhi dugdha dhṛtānām cavi krayaḥ yaḥ kṛtaḥ umayā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama āśām da tvā aparebhyaḥ cakṛta āsa niṣphalā mayā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama dvijāḥ ca yācakāḥ ca eva kopa dṛṣṭi āmaya īkṣitāḥ tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama bhaiḥ tsa tāmayā tat pātakam kṣayam yātu bhavantam paśyataḥ mama kṣayam gatāni pāpāni bhavantam paśyataḥ mama kṛtārthaḥ asmi kṛtārthaḥ asmi kṛtārthaḥ asmi na saṃśayaḥ papāta pat jaimini jaimini neviṣṇoḥ cāru pāda ambuja dvaye uvāca uttiṣṭha uttiṣṭha te vipraiḥ tuṣṭaḥ asmi te bhaktyāḥ kim brūhi tat te dāsyāmi aham dhruvam mayā kṛtam idam stotram yaḥ paṭhet bhaktyāḥ naraḥ uvāca kim tu tvayā saha prājṣa sakhyam kartum mayā iṣyate atas sakhyam pravivṛtam tvayā saha mayā adhunā uvāca nija kaṇṭha gatām mālām dadau tasmai mudā hariḥ prasārya caturaḥ bāhum stamālim hariḥ sa vipraḥ api mudā viṣṇum tam ālim gitavan prabhuḥ ittham kṛtvā hariḥ sakhyam tena agrajanmanā saha bhakti grāhī dayāluḥ saḥ tatra iva antaradhīyata bhe kanduka krīḍām hariḥ tena agra janmanā kadācid durbalam dṛṣṭvā tam vipram karuṇā mayaḥ uvāca vācam viprarṣe mitra vātsalyāt hariḥ uvāca uvāca kāya kleśam punar kasmāt karoṣi dvija sattama durbalam tvām samālokya hṛdi mama jāyate yathā nija uttarīyaiḥ nija vastra bhūṣaṇaḥ kirīṭam ānīya nijāt lalāṭāt pādāt ca pādām gada yugmam īśaḥ suvarṇa hāram nijakam dadau vipra varāya kṛṣṇaḥ tebhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ śrī hariṇā pradattaiḥ vibhūṣitaḥ ayam sukṛtī dvijanmā mad krīḍet sadā kaṃduka keli vettā kṛṣṇena kṛṣṇa ambuja sundareṇa tam ekadā ābhūṣaṇa bhūṣita aṅgam tāmbūla rāga arucira uṣṭha yugmam divyām baram cārutara uttarīyam smera ānanam tatra dadarśa dāntaḥ uvāca bhadra bhadratano adya api pāpa dṛṣṭim namum casi dṛṣṭvā api bhavataḥ kāryam sakalaiḥ janaiḥ śiṣyaḥ kṛtaḥ tvam yasmāt mama sarvam eva hi bhūṣaṇam aham dayaḥ pāpa tad paraḥ lāḥ tathā caṃ cala mānasaḥ dā kṛt proktāḥ śiṣya adhamāḥ ime caritram uttamam jṣātvā a śiṣyaḥ kāryaḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ yatas durjana ga avidyā gurūṇām ca api duḥkha dā kīrti dāḥ taiḥ caya avidyā aniruktāḥ tatva darśibhiḥ pāpebhyaḥ puṇya karmāṇi na rocam ca yathā miṣṭa anna pānena na hi tṛpyanti gardabhāḥ apakīrti bhayāt lakṣmī dharmaḥ ca sarva kāma daḥ satyam bravīṣi viprarṣe asmi śāstra viśāradaḥ mayā a śiṣyeṇa te kvāpi na apakīrtiḥ bhaviṣyati tvad prasādāt dvija śreṣṭha sarva abhilaṣitam mama uvāca acireṇa eva tapasām katham udyāpanam kṛtam su alpa śramaiḥ apiprāptam mayā asaṃdarśanam hareḥ mayā anitya kriyā ādikam sva hasta valayam ca api sva lalāṭa kirīṭakam nija pāda tulā koṭim nija muktā āvalim dadau tathā mama bhagavant viṣṇuḥ su prītaḥ dvija sattama sevaka duḥkha hā krīḍām uvāca tad sapta varṣa sahasrāṇi bhaktyā aparamayā amayā prārādhitaḥ api meviṣṇuḥ darśanam na dadau vibhuḥ ahoviṣṇum samārādhyapam ca āha anyevasattama yatas tvayā asaha svāmī premṇā āsakhyam cakāra aha uvāca gam kṛtam uvāca iti jagannātham dayālum vinaya anvitaḥ yataḥ brūhi dayā loka malāpate atas tasmai suraśreṣṭha darśanam dātum arhasi uvāca pūjitaḥ aham atas dattam darśanam te mayā adhunā mān draṣṭhum icchati prājṣaḥ tu adṛśyam daivataiḥ api uvāca iti uvāca punar bhaktyā keśavam kleśa nāśanam aho megura veda tva adarśanam pāhi imām prabho uvāca yadā anūnam tvayā utsṛṣṭā amat samdarśana dakṣiṇā tadā gurum samānīya darśanam mamakāraya tasmin vipre samāyātā dāntā dātṛ
